Vibe Coding Opportunities

Expanded scan of OnlineJobs.ph listings from Jun 25, 2026 through Jul 2, 2026 for Claude Code, Cursor, Lovable, AI-assisted web/app building, dashboards, automations, APIs, and adjacent builder roles.

4,881Last-week jobs scanned
214Vibe-coding candidates found
4.38%Share of last-week jobs
125Full-time vibe-coding candidates

Arca thesis: employers are asking for Claude Code/Cursor/Lovable-style builders, often with seniority that is scarce in the Philippines because the tooling is expensive. Arca has a trained, vetted supply of early-career operators who have actually used these tools for weeks under supervision.

AI Automation Specialist

Full Time 45 hrs/week Posted/updated: Jun 28, 2026 $2000/month $2,000/mo est. Senior ask, but trainable profile language

HIRING: AI Automation Specialist (Full-Time) Details about the position: - $1000 to $2000 USD per month! We are open to paying more than $2000 USD per month, depending on your skill level & experience. - Work from home! - 9AM to 6PM Eastern Time - Monday to...

Why it belongs here
  • Explicit tools: claude code, cursor, ai coding agent, coding agent, codex
  • AI/build signals: claude, ai automation, ai agent, ai agents, mcp
  • Build surface: github, repo, api, apis, webhook, webhooks, automation, automations
  • Code/build substrate: github, repo, api, apis, webhook, webhooks
  • Trainable language: va, we can teach

Arca angle
  • Full-time role: good fit for a dedicated Arca graduate placement.
Full job description

HIRING: AI Automation Specialist (Full-Time) Details about the position: - $1000 to $2000 USD per month! We are open to paying more than $2000 USD per month, depending on your skill level & experience. - Work from home! - 9AM to 6PM Eastern Time - Monday to Friday! ------------------------ REQUIREMENTS - Fully fluent in English, both spoken and written. - Previous experience building automations using Make, Zapier or n8n. - Previous experience using an AI coding agent such as Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, etc. You should be comfortable using coding agents to work on repos inside GitHub, make changes, troubleshoot issues, and confirm that the final result works correctly. A significant part of this role will involve using coding agents to build and improve reusable skills, instructions, and workflows that will be used by AI agents. - Comfortable working with APIs, webhooks, JSON, authentication, basic scripts, and AI-agent tools such as MCP servers. You do not need to be an expert in every term listed above. The more you understand, the better, but we can teach specific tools if you have strong fundamentals. We do not require you to know how to code, but it is a bonus. You do not need to be a professional software developer, but you should understand how different tools communicate with each other and be able to troubleshoot integrations when something goes wrong. Preferred, but not required: - Previous programming or software-development experience - Experience writing or modifying scripts - Experience with Google Sheets, Google Forms, Google Drive, Airtable, ClickUp, or GoHighLevel - Experience with AI image and video tools such as GPT Image, Kling, Seedance, Grok Imagine, or similar models - Experience with agents such as Hermes and OpenClaw You do not need experience with every tool we use. We can teach you our specific systems and workflows, but you must already have hands-on experience with AI coding agents, automation platforms, and AI-powered workflows. ------------------------ MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES Your main responsibility would be to automate repetitive processes in the company using mainly AI agents, and some Make/Zapier automations as well. Common examples might look like: - Building and improving AI-agent skills, instructions, and workflows. - Automating the generation of AI ads using image/video AI models. - Automating the onboarding of new clients. - Automating some of our copywriter's tasks. - Automating the tracking of all our data. We already have A LOT of automations + AI workflows set up - you'd be coming into an already existing system. Your goal would be to improve it and keep it up to date. ------------------------ COMPANY INFORMATION We are a marketing company that specializes in Meta Ads (among other things) You would help us automate tasks and processes so that we can create more ads for ourselves and our clients! Last year, we generated over 35,000 leads - you will be contributing to our efforts this year, where we aim to break this goal! ------------------------ So if you're someone who's: 1 - An overachiever 2 - Detail-oriented 3 - Works hard 4 - Proactive 5 - Resourceful Please apply using this link: b2bscale.pro/automation-specialist-hiring-ojph When asked what your favorite color is in the application, please put Magenta as your answer, or else you will be disqualified. Do not send us a message here on Onlinejobs - we do not look at messages. You need to apply using that link and fill out the 5-minute application form. Thank you!

Jr Vibe Coder / Developer Wanted

Full Time 35 hrs/week Posted/updated: Jul 1, 2026 500 $500/mo est. Senior ask, but trainable profile language

This Isn't a Job. It's a Lifestyle. You know who you are. You're the person who stays up until 3am building something nobody asked you to build - just because you wanted to see if it would work. You've got 14 browser tabs open right now, half of them are AI...

vibe coderclaude codecursorwindsurfcodexclaudeai toolsai automationwebsitewebsiteslanding pagelanding pagesrepohtml
Why it belongs here
  • Explicit tools: vibe coder, claude code, cursor, windsurf, codex
  • AI/build signals: claude, ai tools, ai automation
  • Build surface: website, websites, landing page, landing pages, repo, html, css, javascript
  • Code/build substrate: repo, html, css, javascript, python, api
  • Trainable language: junior, va, entry-level, learn
  • Scarcity/seniority signal: expert
Arca angle
  • Full-time role: good fit for a dedicated Arca graduate placement.
  • Comp appears close enough to the Arca $4-$6/hr budget band to pursue.
  • Company/contact signal is present, so this can go into outreach review.
Full job description

This Isn't a Job. It's a Lifestyle. You know who you are. You're the person who stays up until 3am building something nobody asked you to build - just because you wanted to see if it would work. You've got 14 browser tabs open right now, half of them are AI tools you're testing. You saw Claude Code drop a new feature yesterday and you already tried it. You read Hacker News, you follow AI Twitter, you've got a Discord server where people share prompts. You don't just USE technology - you chase it, you break it, you figure out how it works, and you build things with it. You're not looking for a 9-to-5 where someone hands you a ticket and you close it. You want to be in the trenches with someone who moves as fast as you do - building landing pages, spinning up websites, ripping competitor funnels and making them better, wiring up tracking, deploying to production, fixing things that break at midnight because you WANT to, not because someone told you to. We're a digital marketing company that builds fast and ships daily. We use AI coding tools - Claude Code, Codex, Cursor - as our primary workflow. We build things in hours that used to take weeks. And we need a junior tech who can keep up. ## What You'll Actually Do - Build and deploy landing pages from scratch or by ripping and rebuilding existing ones - FULLY WORKING means Google Ads tracking, Facebook Pixel, page speed optimized, above-the-fold perfect, mobile-tested, QA'd before handoff - Implement ad tracking: Facebook Pixel, Google Ads conversion tags, GTM, server-side tagging - Optimize page speed (Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse scores matter here) - Build and customize Shopify stores - Handle system admin - DNS, SSL, hosting, Cloudflare, cPanel, Linux servers - Integrate APIs, webhooks, tracking pixels, conversion APIs - Build full websites and web tools - QA your own work before anyone sees it - you catch the bugs, not us - Live in the CLI/terminal - Git, deployment, server management - Use AI coding tools as your daily driver - not as a novelty ## Who You Are - A tech nerd. Computers aren't your job, they're your life. You code as a hobby. You build side projects for fun. - An AI wizard who's already deep in the game - Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, whatever dropped last week. You keep up because you can't help it. - A problem solver. When something breaks, you don't panic and you don't ask "what do I do?" - you dig in and figure it out. - Fast. Not sloppy-fast, but "I understand the tools well enough to move at speed without cutting corners" fast. - Self-directed. You get a brief, you ship the result. You don't need someone standing over your shoulder. - Young, hungry, and ready to grind. We work hard and we expect you to match that energy. ## You Must Have - Real, daily experience with AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, or similar) - this is non-negotiable - Solid HTML, CSS, JavaScript fundamentals - you understand what AI generates and can debug it when it's wrong - Experience building and deploying landing pages or websites - Knowledge of ad tracking (Facebook Pixel, Google Ads tags, GTM) - CLI/terminal comfort - you live in the command line - Problem-solving ability - you don't wait to be told every step - Professional English communication ## Bonus Points - Shopify development (Liquid, theme customization) - Cloudflare Pages/Workers - Server-side tracking (CAPI, sGTM) - WordPress/PHP - Python or Node.js - Page speed optimization expertise - Tracking platforms (ClickFlare, Voluum) - You follow AI news daily and can tell us what's new THIS WEEK ## The Deal $500/mo to start. We're not going to pretend - this is entry-level pay for an entry-level position. But here's what we WILL do: if you're a superstar - if you ship fast, solve problems, and prove you're the real deal - your pay grows. Fast. We don't keep good people at starter pay. We reward results, not resumes. You'll work directly with the owner. No middle management, no bureaucracy. Async communication (chat/messages), not pointless meetings. You'll learn more here in 3 months than most people learn in a year because you'll be building real things that make real money, not doing tutorials. If this sounds like work to you, this isn't your role. If this sounds like Tuesday, apply now. ## Application Questions Answer ALL of these. Real answers, not AI-generated fluff. If you use AI to write your application for an AI coding role, we'll know - and that tells us you don't understand the difference between using AI as a tool and letting AI replace you. 1. What AI coding tools do you use? Describe your actual workflow - how do you go from a task to a shipped result using AI? 2. Share a link to something you built using AI coding tools (landing page, website, Shopify store, app, tool - anything). What was it, and how long did it take? 3. If I said "rip this lander and make it work" - walk me through exactly what you'd do, step by step. Include tracking, page speed, and QA. 4. What's your experience with ad tracking? (Facebook Pixel, Google Ads tags, GTM, server-side tracking - be specific about what you've actually set up) 5. Tell me about a technical problem you solved on your own. What broke, what did you try, how did you fix it? 6. What CLI/terminal tools do you use? Do you use Git? How do you deploy? 7. Rate yourself 1-10 on each (be honest - I'll check): HTML/CSS, JavaScript, Shopify, Linux/server admin, page speed optimization, API integrations. 8. What's the coolest AI tool or feature you discovered in the last 30 days? What did you do with it? 9. How do you QA your own work before handing it off? Walk me through your process. 10. When can you start? Are you available full-time?

Virtual Assistant (Claude Cowork/Lovable Expert) — 100% Remote

Full Time 35 hrs/week Posted/updated: Jul 1, 2026 up to 650 monthly $650/mo est. Senior ask, but trainable profile language

AI First. If you didn't start reading this ad already thinking about how you'd automate it — this role probably isn't for you. But if you live and breathe AI, keep reading. We're SnappyVAS (snappyvas.com) — an AI-first company and a no-code platform for...

Full job description

AI First. If you didn't start reading this ad already thinking about how you'd automate it — this role probably isn't for you. But if you live and breathe AI, keep reading. We're SnappyVAS (snappyvas.com) — an AI-first company and a no-code platform for building and deploying AI agents: chat widgets, landing pages, bookings, lead qualification, and multi-channel deploy to Slack, WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, and Lark. We practice what we preach: we run our own operations on AI, and we're hiring a right-hand VA who does the same. This is NOT a traditional back-office VA job. We don't want someone who waits for instructions and copies data between spreadsheets. This is a growth-and-promotion role. You'll work directly with the SnappyVAS directors, you'll work ON the platform every day — using it, testing new features, and promoting it — and you'll go find businesses that need us and help bring them in. We want someone smart and hungry — a builder obsessed with productivity, automation, and finding smarter ways to work using AI every single day. If you're the kind of person who teaches yourself new tools on the weekend, gets a kick out of automating things away, and loves the hustle of putting a product in front of the right people, you'll fit right in. The AI tools you must know (in order of importance) Claude Code / Cowork — this is essential and non-negotiable Lovable ChatGPT Perplexity If you're constantly building, researching, automating, promoting, and solving problems with these tools, we want to hear from you. What you'll do Support the directors — act as a right hand to the SnappyVAS founders, handling research, communications, follow-ups, and whatever moves the business forward Work ON the platform — use SnappyVAS daily, build and test agents, stress-test new features, and report back what's great and what needs fixing Market and promote SnappyVAS — create content, outreach, and campaigns that get the platform in front of the businesses who need it Business development & lead generation — research and find prospects (trades, local service businesses, restaurants, creators, and small businesses), build target lists, and help bring them in as customers Automate the growth engine — build AI-driven workflows in Claude Code/Cowork for prospecting, outreach, and reporting; find repetitive work and automate it away Build with Lovable — help ship landing pages, demos, and internal tools Write advanced prompts that produce high-quality, reliable results Research and test new AI tools, then put the best ones to work Create SOPs, documentation, and reports that keep the operation sharp What you need Extensive hands-on experience with Claude Code/Cowork (required), Lovable, ChatGPT, and Perplexity Excellent prompt engineering skills Strong research and lead-generation instincts — you can find the right businesses and the right people to contact A promoter's mindset — comfortable with outreach, marketing, and putting a product in front of people Highly organised with exceptional attention to detail Self-motivated and proactive — a builder who finds solutions instead of waiting to be told Excellent written and spoken English Reliable internet connection and a proper home office setup Bonus points Automation tools: n8n, Make, or Zapier Basic coding or API knowledge Experience in sales, outreach, marketing, or social media Experience supporting business owners, founders, or executives What we offer Fully remote, work-from-home A front-row seat with the founders and real influence over how we grow Long-term opportunity with real career growth An AI-first company that adopts the latest tech constantly Exciting work across many industries as we bring new businesses onto the platform How to Apply To apply, please send: Your resume A short video introducing yourself A summary of your experience with Claude Code/Cowork, Lovable, ChatGPT, and Perplexity Examples of AI workflows, prompts, or projects you've built Which AI tool you use the most, and why Application Test (read carefully) Start your application with the words "AI First" and tell us about the most impressive thing you've built or automated using Claude Code/Cowork. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered. Shortlisted applicants will be invited to complete a short online skills exam. Note: the exam must be completed on your own — using AI to answer the questions will disqualify you (more on that when you're invited). Study snappyvas.com for platform questionsRewrite job ad for onlinejobs.phDesign 20-question screening exam + prerequisitesBuild screening app live in Lovable5Adding auto-email of resultsSnappyVAS_OnlineJobsPH_Ad.mdSnappyVAS_Screening_Exam.mdTrack tools and referenced files used in this task.

We're a digital marketing company that builds fast and ships daily. We use AI coding tools - Claude Code, Codex, Cursor - as our primary workflow. We build things in hours that used to take weeks. Not sloppy-fast, but "I understand the tools well enough to move at speed without cutting corners" fast. - Self-directed. You get a brief, you ship the result. We're not going to pretend - this is entry-level pay for an entry-level position. But here's what we WILL do: if you're a superstar - if you ship fast, solve problems, and prove you're the real deal - your pay grows. Fast. We don't keep good people at starter pay. Why it belongs here

  • AI/build signals: claude, chatgpt, ai tools, ai automation, perplexity

Full job description

I am hiring a full-time AI Automation Specialist to help run and improve a fast-moving sales and lead generation operation. This is not a basic VA role. I need someone who is highly experienced with AI tools, automation tools, CRM systems, and workflow building. You must be able to use AI to move faster, organize systems, automate repetitive work, improve processes, create workflows, and support daily sales operations. Required tools include: - Claude - ChatGPT - Perplexity - Codex - GoHighLevel - Facebook Meta Business Suite - Google Workspace - Automation tools such as Zapier, Make, or similar platforms Perplexity, Claude, ChatGPT, GoHighLevel, and Meta experience are mandatory. If you do not use AI tools daily, do not apply. WHAT YOU WILL DO You will help with: - AI-assisted workflow creation - CRM organization and automation - GoHighLevel pipelines and follow-up systems - Meta Business Suite support - Facebook and Instagram lead management - Lead tracking and reporting - Automation of repetitive tasks - Appointment setting support - Google Sheets / Drive organization - Daily KPI reports - Process improvement - Sales support systems - Creating scripts, templates, and operational workflows You will be expected to think like an operator, not just an assistant. If a task is repetitive, I expect you to find a way to make it faster, cleaner, or automated. REQUIRED EXPERIENCE You must have real experience with: - Claude - ChatGPT - Perplexity - GoHighLevel - Facebook Meta Business Suite - Google Sheets - Google Drive - CRM systems - Workflow automation - Lead generation or sales support - Daily reporting Preferred experience: - Codex - Zapier - Make - WhatsApp Business - Facebook Marketplace - Craigslist - Meta Ads Manager - Appointment setting - Automotive sales support MUST HAVE - Strong English - Fast typing - Reliable internet - Ability to work 40 hours per week - Ability to clock in and out - Comfortable with screen tracking during work hours - Strong attention to detail - Ability to follow instructions exactly - Ability to think independently - Ability to use AI tools to work faster - Honesty about your actual skill level IMPORTANT This is a full-time production role. Time compliance is non-negotiable. Screen tracking is required. Daily reports are required. You must be comfortable being measured by activity, accuracy, and results. Do not apply if you are only a basic VA. Do not apply if you are not strong with AI tools. Do not apply if you are exaggerating your automation experience. COMPENSATION $400/month during training/probation. Commission available after training based on appointments, shows, and completed results. This role can earn more if you produce. HOW TO APPLY Use the subject line: AI AUTOMATION SPECIALIST Answer every question below in order: 1. How many hours per week can you work? 2. Are you comfortable with clock-in/clock-out and screen monitoring? 3. How do you use ChatGPT in your daily workflow? 4. How do you use Claude in your daily workflow? 5. How do you use Perplexity in your daily workflow? 6. Have you used Codex or any AI coding/workflow tool? Explain. 7. Have you used GoHighLevel? What exactly did you build or manage? 8. Have you used Facebook Meta Business Suite? What did you manage? 9. What automation tools have you used? Zapier, Make, Power Automate, or others? 10. Give one specific example of a workflow you automated. 11. Have you done lead generation or appointment setting before? 12. What tools are you strongest with? 13. What tools do you still need training on? 14. Are you willing to complete a paid test task before being hired full-time? FINAL NOTE I am looking for someone sharp, serious, AI-capable, and automation-minded. The right person will help build systems, speed up workflows, organize leads, and make the operation faster every week. If you are excellent with AI tools, automation, CRM systems, and execution, this can become a strong long-term opportunity.

Full job description

Job Title: Agentic AI Developer Company: Build Metric Pty Ltd (Australian) Location: PH Type: Full time Reporting to: Directors About the Role: This is a hands-on builder role. You will work directly with our leadership team to design and build agentic AI systems that automate real business processes, surface insights, and extend the capability of our team across every function. You are not writing specs — you are shipping code that matters. The immediate goal is to build out Buildmetric's company-wide agentic infrastructure using OpenClaw and Claude — the workflows, dashboards, and automation systems that will transform how we operate, from estimating and client management through to reporting, SOPs, and internal processes. This is foundational work with real and lasting impact. Key Responsibilities - Agentic AI workflows using OpenClaw and the Anthropic Claude API — multi-step agents that research, reason, retrieve, and act autonomously across our business - Internal dashboards and operational tools built on OpenClaw that surface business-critical data in real time and give our team full visibility - MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers and plugin systems that extend Claude and OpenClaw into our data sources, tools, and third-party platforms - API integrations connecting our systems with CRMs, accounting software, project management platforms, estimating tools, and more - Company-wide automation pipelines that eliminate manual, repetitive tasks across estimating, reporting, client management, and internal operations - SOPs and workflow documentation systems — helping define, codify, and automate our operating procedures as we scale What We’re Looking For - Hands-on experience with OpenClaw — this is our current dashboard platform and the foundation for our agentic build-out - Solid experience with the Anthropic Claude API, Claude Code, and the Claude Agent SDK - Genuinely current with the AI landscape — you know what is shipping this week, not just what shipped last year - Strong JavaScript/TypeScript or Python (ideally both) — production-quality code, not just demos or prototypes - Comfortable building REST APIs, webhooks, and integrating third-party services end to end - Solid grasp of agentic patterns: tool calling, multi-step reasoning, memory and context management, agent orchestration - Ability to understand business workflows, processes, and operating systems — you can translate how a business actually works into clean automation logic - Works independently, self-manages effectively, and communicates clearly in English Who You Are - Young, sharp, and ambitious — you care deeply about doing excellent work, not just completing tasks - You experiment constantly. You have already built things with AI tools on your own time because you wanted to, not because you were told to - You understand business — you can look at how a company operates and identify where AI and automation creates real leverage - You communicate proactively, flag problems early, and ask the right questions before going down the wrong path -You take full ownership of what you build, from design through deployment and ongoing iteration - You thrive when the technology is evolving fast and the target moves — that excites you rather than stresses you How to Apply Send us an email with the subject line "Agentic AI Developer — [Your Name]". Tell us: - A short intro: who you are, where you are based, and why this role excites you - Links to things you have actually built — GitHub repos, live demos, agents, side projects, anything that shows how you think and build - Specific notes on your OpenClaw and Claude / Anthropic API experience - Your availability and earliest possible start date Apply to: karen@buildmetric.com.au We read every application. Shortlisted candidates will hear from us quickly. No recruiters or agencies, please.

Full job description

Full Stack Software Engineer (Python, Automation & AI Systems) About Us We are looking for an experienced Full Stack Software Engineer with strong software engineering fundamentals and hands-on experience building production applications. We actively use AI-assisted development tools and expect candidates to do the same. However, we are not looking for vibe coders. We are looking for engineers who understand software architecture, security, databases, APIs, scalability, deployment, and multi-tenant systems, and who can confidently design, build, debug, deploy, and maintain production software. The ideal candidate uses AI to accelerate development and improve productivity while applying sound engineering judgment and real-world technical expertise to build secure, scalable, and reliable systems. Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent professional experience is strongly preferred. What You'll Do • Build and maintain web applications, SaaS platforms, internal business tools, and automation systems • Create API integrations and AI-powered workflows • Design, troubleshoot, optimize, and scale production systems • Research and implement emerging AI technologies and development tools • Collaborate on software, e-commerce, automation, and business projects • Work during New York business hours Required Technical Skills Core Development: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, FastAPI, Django, Express, or similar modern frameworks. Software Engineering: Strong understanding of software architecture, APIs, authentication, security, databases, scalability, deployment, and multi-tenant application design. Databases & Cloud: PostgreSQL, Supabase, MySQL, Neon, AWS, Cloudflare, Vercel, Azure, Google Cloud, or similar platforms. AI-Assisted Development: Experience using tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini, Replit, Lovable, Bolt, or similar platforms. Experience integrating LLM APIs, AI workflows, agents, RAG systems, vector databases, and AI-powered applications. Development Workflow: Git, GitHub, code reviews, debugging, troubleshooting, and collaborative development practices. Communication: Excellent written English. Nice To Have • Shopify development • Stripe integrations • Playwright, Selenium, browser automation, or web scraping • Docker, Kubernetes, DevOps, and CI/CD • SaaS, marketplace, e-commerce, or multi-tenant platform experience To Apply Please send: • Resume and portfolio • Examples of recent projects • A short description of the most impressive software system, automation platform, or application you have built • The AI tools you currently use in your workflow Attention to detail is very important, when applying, please use the following subject line, otherwise we won't view you request: "Full Stack Software & AI Engineer 6172026”.

Full job description

SENIOR WEB DEVELOPER (LOVABLE.DEV + SUPABASE) — COMPLETION & STABILIZATION Codeword to require: DYNASTY-DEV About the role: Our multi-brand operating system is built on Lovable.dev and Supabase. We don't need someone to build from scratch — we need someone who can go INTO existing AI-generated systems, find what's fragile or unfinished, and make it production-ready. Execution, not theory. What you'll do: Complete unfinished features, pages, and workflows Debug blank pages, broken data-fetching, failed queries, broken relationships Improve UI/UX and ensure consistency across desktop and mobile Work with Supabase: tables, relationships, RLS, auth, edge functions Integrate APIs and business workflows Maintain and stabilize platforms long-term You're a fit if you have: Real hands-on Lovable.dev experience (inside existing projects, not just new builds) Strong Supabase / PostgreSQL (CRUD, RLS, auth, relationships, debugging) React / Next.js / TypeScript proficiency A track record of taking messy or stalled codebases to a stable finish Ability to work independently, follow a task list, and ship fast Nice to have: Cursor / Claude Code workflow, Stripe/payment integration, experience stabilizing AI-generated codebases. Hours: Full-time or near full-time, daily updates, overlap with US business hours preferred. Pay: [your rate] How to apply: Start your message with DYNASTY-DEV. Send (1) links to live projects you've built or stabilized — Lovable/Supabase especially, (2) one specific example of a broken system you fixed and how, and (3) your GitHub. Shortlisted applicants get a short paid trial task: fix one real broken flow in a sandbox. Required with every application: Your WhatsApp number (this is how we'll contact you — applications without it may be skipped) A 60-second voice intro — introduce yourself and briefly describe one project you stabilized.

Full job description

We're looking for an AI-first developer who genuinely loves building and shows up with the plan. If you light up when you talk about wiring agents together, shipping internal tools fast, and using AI as a daily working partner, and you'd rather drive the build strategy than wait for a spec, we'd love to hear from you. The Role This is a gig-based, project-driven build role focused on internal tooling. Here's what you'd actually be doing: - Building agents and automations from the ground up, including wiring up MCP servers and Claude Code workflows - Building a range of internal tools for the team, the kind of things that remove manual work and speed up how we operate - Working across APIs and integrations, including GoHighLevel, to connect the systems we run on - Partnering with the team on what gets built and why. We work as a team to win, and you'd own the technical thinking on your side of it Within the first 30 to 60 days, success looks like you showing up with the plan. You should be telling us what we should build next, how to approach it, and in what order. You should have a clear point of view on what's worth automating, what isn't, and what you want to ship first. The bar here is strategic ownership of the build, not waiting for a backlog to be handed to you. Schedule Work hours are flexible but need to overlap with our team between 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM EST during active project work. Just want to make sure you can meet inside that window. What We're Looking For - An AI-first mindset. You use AI as a real working partner every day, and it shows in how you work. - Independent problem-solving. You think first, use AI to amplify your thinking, and verify before shipping anything. - A strategy-first approach. You're someone who shows up with the plan and tells us what we should be building, testing, and improving. You partner with our team on execution, but you lead the thinking on your work. - Deep comfort with Claude Code, GitHub, Supabase, Vercel, working with APIs, and the GoHighLevel API. We're also genuinely interested in whatever else you've built your workflow around. - A real love for this work. That comes through fast in conversation, and we'd rather hire someone who has it than someone who's just qualified. How to Apply A few things we'd love you to do, in order: 1. Please start your reply with the word "Jamal." We use this as a small check to spot applicants who read instructions carefully. Without it, we won't be able to review your application. 2. Record a 5-minute video answering the questions below. No script needed. We just want to get a feel for how you think. 3. Share your full tool stack with self-ratings (1 to 10). These ones we already know we need: - Claude Code /10 - GitHub /10 - Supabase /10 - Vercel /10 - Working with APIs /10 - GoHighLevel API /10 Then add every other tool you use, one per line, with /10. Include AI tools, frameworks, automation platforms, niche services, spreadsheets you've built, the works. Honesty matters more than scoring high. The video will give us a sense of where you actually are. 4. Walk us through your work history. For your last 2 or 3 clients or accounts: - What size was the company or account when you started (team size, what they were running, what was manual before you came in, whatever metric fits)? - What did you build for them? - What was the outcome? Where were they when you started, and where are they now? - If you have current clients, where are those projects today? We're trying to understand how you measure your own impact. The more specific, the better. 5. Quick confirmation that you can work somewhere inside the hours described above. How You Use AI In your video, spend a minute or so on this. The more specific the better: - Which AI tools you use daily, weekly, and occasionally - A specific example of a build task in this role where AI saves you real time, and how you use it - A time AI gave you a wrong or bad output. How you caught it, and what you did about it - Anything you've intentionally chosen NOT to let AI do in your work, and why We're looking for real, lived examples. The specifics tell the story. A Few Questions for Your Video Take these in order, and just talk through them naturally. 1. If you came on next week and we asked you to build out our internal tooling, walk us through your first 30 days. What would you want to look at, what would you build first, and how would you decide the order? 2. We hand you a vague request like "we need something to make X less painful," with no spec. Walk us through how you go from that sentence to a shipped tool. 3. An automation you built has started silently failing in production. Walk us through what you check first and how you track it down. 4. Why do you love building this kind of thing? Tell us about a recent tool or automation you shipped that reminded you why you do this work. 5. What's something about building with Claude Code, MCP, or agentic workflows that's changed in the last year that you've actually adjusted your approach around?

Full job description

HOW TO APPLY Fill out the Application form below: forms.gle/qgZgRCdD38XbhrEX6 Company: The FSW Group (ValveMan, FS Welsford, and our growing family of companies) Hours: Full-time | Remote, Philippines-based | 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time Compensation: $7 - $10 per hour (based on experience) WHO WE ARE We are a family business, and we mean that in every sense of the word. The FSW Group is a collection of companies, including ValveMan and Welsford Co., built over decades on relationships, trust, and a belief that how you treat people matters just as much as what you build. We are not a faceless corporation, and we are not looking to fill a seat. We are looking for someone to grow with us for years to come. When we say we treat our team like family, we are telling you what we expect of ourselves as much as what we offer you. We care about the people who build alongside us. We celebrate wins together, we work through challenges together, and we are genuinely invested in helping every team member build a career they are proud of. This is a long-term opportunity, not a gig. If you are someone who wants to keep sharpening your skills, take on bigger challenges over time, and build something meaningful with a company that has your back, we would love to meet you. WHAT WE OFFER A long-term home, not a short-term contract. We are looking for someone to build their career with us. A team that genuinely cares about you and treats you like family. The chance to work with cutting-edge AI tools every single day, and to keep growing your skills as the role expands. After six months of employment, as long as you are meeting all requirements of the role, you will receive five days of paid time off along with a stipend toward your HMO health insurance. Real ownership and real impact. Your work will directly improve how our companies run. OUR CORE VALUES These are not words on a wall. They are how we operate, and they are what we will look for in you. Integrity. Do what is right. Do what you say. Ambition. Continually level up. We want people who are always reaching for the next thing. Entrepreneurial Spirit. Take initiative, think like an owner, and find the better way. Supportive. Win together. Grow together. THE ROLE IN A NUTSHELL We are looking for a self-driven senior developer to become the engine behind how we use AI to improve our businesses. You will use Claude, Claude Code, Codex, and whatever is the best tool for the job at that time. You will own projects from the very first conversation all the way through to a working, deployed solution that people across our organization actually use each and every day. Post deployment, you will train team members on how to use the tool and continue to monitor the tool to assure it works. This is not a build-it-and-hand-it-off role. You will take an idea or an opportunity that may start out fuzzy, shape it into a clear plan, confirm it with the right people, build it, and then get it live and running. You are the owner from start to finish and beyond. The work is broad. Some projects will be classic software and web development. Others will be about streamlining how a part of the business runs, setting up automations and triggers, or building reporting and dashboards. Many will touch the Microsoft ecosystem, including Power Automate and Power BI, as well as Epicor Profit21 - both of which will be a meaningful part of this role. The common thread is that you are improving how the FSW Group operates, and you are using the best AI tools available to do it. WHAT YOU WILL ACTUALLY DO Take ownership of two to three projects at a time across the FSW Group, keeping your focus where it matters most without getting pulled in too many directions at once. Keep track of and manage the pipeline of project requests Understand the full picture of the projects on our plate, and gather complete, well-organized requirements for each one. Turn those requirements into a clear Statement of Work that everyone can agree on. Validate the requirements and the plan with the designated business leader, which depending on the project may be the leader of Welsford Co, the leader of ValveMan, or the CEO of the Group. Build the solution, using Claude, Claude Code, or the best tool/set of tools for that application. Deploy it. Getting something working as an MVP is only half the job. You are responsible for taking it all the way into a live, operational system that actually works in the real world. Work across whatever platforms the project requires, which may include our ecommerce systems, internal web applications, cloud infrastructure, automation tools, and especially the Epicor Profit21 and Microsoft platform through Power Automate and Power BI. Improve processes, not just code. Some of your work will be about rethinking how a workflow runs, adding the right triggers, and finding optimizations that touch any part of the organization. Keep an eye out for new opportunities. As you come to understand how things flow across our businesses, we want you to surface ideas for additional improvements we have not even thought to ask for yet. This is a secondary part of the role, but a valued one. WHO YOU ARE A genuinely strong developer with real experience architecting webapps as well as building and shipping software. Experienced with vibe coding (Claude Code, Codex, etc) specifically, and comfortable making AI tools the center of how you work. Someone with a real track record of architecting and deploying applications, not just prototyping them. You know the difference between “it runs on my machine” and “it is live and people depend on it.” You keep clear repos for handoffs and long term sustainability Capable of taking an ambiguous opportunity and running with it on your own. You can manage the whole pipeline, from requirements to delivery, without needing to be handed every step. Comfortable with the Microsoft platform, including Power Automate and Power BI, as well as Epicor Profit21 or confident you can get there quickly. A clear communicator who can talk to business leaders, understand what they actually need, and keep everyone aligned. Organized enough to juggle a few projects at once while keeping organized and focused on a quality high output. Excited to keep learning. This role will keep evolving, and we want someone who is eager to evolve with it. HOW WE WORK TOGETHER You will report to our Virtual Team Manager, who will help you prioritize, protect your focus, and make sure you have what you need to do great work. Your day-to-day business leader will vary by project, but you will always have a clear point of contact and clear direction on what success looks like. THE SCHEDULE This is a full-time role of 40 hours per week, working 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time (1 hour lunch break) so that you are fully aligned with our US team’s time. Forty hours is also the cap, because we believe in protecting your time and your energy. We are a family-first company, and that means we want you doing your best work during the day and then living your life when the day is done. THE TRIAL PROJECT Before we both fully commit, we will start with one real-world project together. It will be a small to medium sized project, the kind of work you would actually be doing in the role, and it will run from start to finish in roughly one week. You will own it the same way you would own anything else: gather the requirements, validate them, build it in Claude Code, and deploy it into a working system with proper documentation. This gives you a real feel for the work and our culture, and it gives us a chance to see your skills in action. This assures that the role/responsibilities will work for both parties moving forward.

Full job description

ABOUT US: We're AdWave, a creative marketing agency based in Melbourne, Australia. We work with healthcare, cosmetic medicine, and lifestyle brands, handling everything from social media and content design to video editing and marketing strategy. We're a small, fast-moving team that leans heavily on AI tools (especially Claude / Claude Code) to work smarter, not harder. If you're someone who loves automating repetitive work, experimenting with AI workflows, and producing high-quality creative output, you'll fit right in. This is a full-time, long-term position. We're not looking for someone to fill a seat, we want a creative partner who grows with us. WHAT YOU'LL DO (a mix of everything): - Plan, schedule, and manage social media content (Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok) across multiple client accounts - Create graphics and carousels (Canva / basic Figma) following brand guidelines - Edit short-form video (Reels, ads, promotional content) - Produce ad creatives for paid campaigns - Support e-commerce work (Shopify product content, basic store updates) - Build and maintain AI automation workflows (using Claude, Claude Code, and similar tools) - General virtual assistant tasks to keep projects moving - Create and manage SEO - Design and implement Website (Wordpress + Elementor). WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR: - Strong written English (most client-facing work is in English) - Experience with social media management and content creation - Solid graphic design skills (Canva essential, Figma and Photoshop.) - Video editing ability (CapCut, Premiere, or similar) - Genuine interest in AI tools — bonus points if you've used Claude or Claude Code - Self-starter who can work independently and communicate proactively - Reliable internet and a good working setup Nice to have (not required): - Experience with healthcare / beauty / cosmetic brands - Familiarity with Shopify - Knowledge of ad platforms (Meta Ads, Google Ads, Google console) WHY YOU'LL LIKE WORKING WITH US: - Work with cutting-edge AI tools every day, we genuinely invest in working this way - Variety — no two days are the same, you'll touch design, video, social, and automation - Long-term stability with a team that values your growth - Friendly, low-ego environment - Time zone overlap is easy (Philippines and Melbourne are only 2 hours apart) HOURS & PAY: - Full-time (40 hours/week) - Salary: [USD $800–1500/month, depending on experience] - Paid monthly via [Wise / PayPal] HOW TO APPLY: We read every application carefully. To show us you've actually read this post, please start your message with the word "AUTOMATE" applications without it won't be considered. In your application, please include: 1. A short intro about yourself and why this role fits you 2. Links to your portfolio (designs, videos, or social accounts you've managed) 3. Which AI tools you've used and how 4. Your expected monthly salary for full-time work Looking forward to meeting you!

We are looking for an AI Specialist who is passionate about artificial intelligence and enjoys exploring new AI tools and technologies. This role is ideal for someone who stays updated with the latest AI developments and can apply AI solutions to improve productivity, research, content creation, and business operations. Must Have -Proven experience using AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Codex, or similar platforms -Strong prompt writing and problem-solving skills -Ability to learn and adapt quickly to new AI technologies -Experience using AI for research, content generation, analysis, or workflow improvement -Strong written and verbal English communication skills -Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills -Ability to work independently and manage tasks effectively Responsibilities -Research, evaluate, and test new AI tools and technologies -Identify opportunities to improve productivity and efficiency through AI -Create and refine prompts to achieve desired outcomes -Assist with research, content creation, data analysis, and other AI-supported tasks -Document processes and best practices for AI usage -Stay informed about emerging AI trends and developments -Recommend practical AI solutions that support business goals -Collaborate with team members to implement AI-driven improvements Nice to Have -Experience with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex, or similar AI-assisted tools -Basic understanding of APIs and AI integrations -Experience supporting business operations, marketing, customer service, or administrative tasks -Familiarity with no-code or low-code platforms -Experience evaluating and comparing AI tools for different use cases

Need AI-Powered Full Stack Developer to Clone a SaaS Platform Fast (Using Builder.io, Cursor, Locofy, etc.) *Description:* I am looking for an experienced developer who knows how to use *AI coding tools* to quickly clone and rebuild a platform for youtube automation This is NOT a build-from-scratch project. I want someone who can work smart and fast by using AI tools to reverse engineer the frontend and backend structure. ### Your Job: You must: *1. Clone the Frontend* Use tools like: * Builder.io * Locofy.ai * v0 * Similar AI UI cloning tools Take screenshots/live pages and rebuild the UI almost exactly. *2. Reverse Engineer the Platform* Use: * Wappalyzer * BuiltWith * Browser DevTools To analyze: * Frontend framework * Backend logic * APIs * Database structure *3. Rebuild Backend Using AI Coding Tools* Use: * Cursor * Bolt.new * Lovable * AI coding assistants To quickly generate: * Admin panel * User dashboard * Database structure * Authentication * CRUD systems * Team management * Video workflows *4. Connect APIs* Must integrate: * OpenAI (script generation) * ElevenLabs (voiceovers) * YouTube API (uploads/scheduling) * FFmpeg (video rendering) * Translation APIs ### Important: I am specifically looking for someone who: * Knows how to use AI tools to speed up development * Has experience cloning SaaS platforms * Understands automation systems * Understands YouTube automation workflows * Can work fast and efficiently ### Goal: Build an MVP version of the youttube automation platform as fast as possible by using AI-assisted development. ### When applying: Send: 1. What AI tools you use for cloning/building 2. Similar SaaS/dashboard projects 3. How fast you can deliver 4. Your estimated price Long-term work available if successful.

Full job description

Mabuhay! We're Shoprev, a fast-growing marketing agency that helps automotive, home service, and local businesses generate more leads through marketing, automation, AI, and operational systems. We're looking for someone who genuinely loves building systems. The type of person that gets excited when they can eliminate manual work, automate an entire process, organize messy operations, and make a business run smoother than ever before. This is NOT an IT support role. This is a systems-building role. You'll become the technical backbone of our company by owning and improving the software, automations, AI agents, and operational infrastructure that powers our business. If you've mastered GoHighLevel, ClickUp, Zapier/Make, AI tools, APIs, and enjoy solving operational problems, we'd love to meet you. ____________________________________________________ YOUR MISSION Your mission is simple: Build systems that save time, eliminate manual work, improve client experience, and allow our team to scale. You'll constantly ask yourself: "How can we make this process faster, easier, and more automated?" If that's naturally how your brain works, you'll fit right in. ____________________________________________________ WHAT YOU'LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR 1. GOHIGHLEVEL EXPERT Become our internal GoHighLevel expert. Responsibilities include: • Successful A2P Compliance Setup • Build and maintain client accounts • Client onboarding • Client migrations • Build SaaS snapshots • Build funnels • Build websites • Configure pipelines • Build calendars • Create forms and surveys • Build opportunities • Configure phone systems • Review generation systems • Email automations • SMS automations • AI appointment booking • Missed call text back • Conversation AI • Workflow troubleshooting • CRM optimization • White-label SaaS setup • Quality assurance before launches • Ongoing optimization of client accounts ____________________________________________________ 2. AI AGENT DEVELOPMENT We're heavily investing in AI. You'll help us design and build AI agents that improve both our internal operations and our clients' businesses. Examples include: • AI receptionists • AI appointment setters • AI customer support • AI review assistants • AI lead qualification • AI sales assistants • Internal AI knowledge agents • SOP AI assistants • Voice AI • Chatbots • Custom GPTs • Prompt engineering • AI workflow optimization Experience with OpenAI, Claude, n8n, Vapi, ElevenLabs, Voiceflow, Make.com, or similar AI platforms is a huge plus. ____________________________________________________ 3. CLICKUP SYSTEM DEVELOPMENT Own our entire ClickUp workspace. Responsibilities include: • Design scalable workflows • Build dashboards • Create custom fields • Build automations • Build & Organize SOPs • Project templates • Task templates • Team reporting dashboards • Workspace optimization • Internal documentation • Productivity improvements • Time-saving automations ____________________________________________________ 4. AUTOMATION & INTEGRATIONS One of your biggest responsibilities. You'll constantly identify repetitive work and automate it. Platforms may include: • Zapier • Make.com • n8n • GoHighLevel • ClickUp • Google Workspace • Slack • OpenAI • APIs • Webhooks • CRM integrations • Third-party software We love automation. If something can be automated, we probably want it automated. ____________________________________________________ 5. REVENUE OPERATIONS & BUSINESS IMPROVEMENT You'll work directly with leadership to improve how our business operates. Examples include: • Improve onboarding • Improve fulfillment • Eliminate bottlenecks • Reduce manual work • Increase team productivity • Standardize internal processes • Create and maintain SOPs • Improve reporting • Improve communication • Recommend new software • Build internal dashboards • Continuously optimize company operations ____________________________________________________ 6. SYSTEM OWNERSHIP You'll become the go-to expert for all of our internal software. Examples include: • GoHighLevel • ClickUp • Google Workspace • Slack • OpenAI • Zapier • Make • n8n • Calendars • CRM • Reporting systems • AI platforms When something breaks... You'll either fix it... Or build it better. ____________________________________________________ WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE Within your first 90 days, we'd love to see: ? Every client onboarded consistently ? Manual work significantly reduced ? Better ClickUp organization ? Better dashboards and reporting ? AI agents actively saving time ? Faster client onboarding ? Improved SOP documentation ? New automation ideas implemented ? Measurable improvements in team efficiency ____________________________________________________ REQUIRED SKILLS Must-Haves • 2+ years of GoHighLevel experience • Advanced ClickUp experience • Strong automation experience • Zapier and/or Make.com • Experience with APIs and webhooks • AI workflow development • Excellent written and spoken English • Strong documentation skills • Has urgency • Highly organized • Detail-oriented • Strong troubleshooting ability • Independent problem solver • Systems thinker Nice-to-Haves • n8n • OpenAI API • Claude • Vapi • ElevenLabs • Voiceflow • Cursor AI • Python • JavaScript • HTML/CSS • CRM implementation • Marketing agency experience • Local business marketing experience • SaaS experience ____________________________________________________ WHO YOU ARE You don't wait for instructions. You identify problems before anyone else notices them. You naturally think, "There's got to be a better way to do this." You enjoy: • Building systems • Solving operational problems • Automating repetitive work • Learning new software • Working with AI • Improving business processes • Creating documentation • Finding efficiencies You are dependable. You take ownership. You continuously learn. You get things done. ____________________________________________________ COMPENSATION This role is designed to grow with the company. As your responsibilities and impact increase, so will your compensation. ____________________________________________________ TO APPLY We believe skill matters more than a perfect résumé. Please submit the following: 1. A 2–4 minute video introducing yourself (do not read from a script). Tell us about the most impressive automation or system you've ever built and why you're proud of it. 2. Links, screenshots, or case studies showing: • GoHighLevel accounts you've built • ClickUp workspaces you've designed • Automations you've created • AI agents or AI workflows you've implemented 3. Rate yourself from 1–10 in the following: • GoHighLevel • ClickUp • Zapier • Google Workspace • AI Automation • APIs/Webhooks 4. In writing, describe one repetitive business process you automated and estimate how many hours it saved each week. 5. Include the word "SYSTEMS" in the subject line of your application. Applications that do not have the following, will not be considered. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us for years to come. If you're passionate about building systems, leveraging AI, and making businesses run more efficiently, we'd love to hear from you.

Full job description

Coordinate 3-5 contractors (scaling to 10-15) building AI-powered business systems across multiple concurrent projects. You'll translate technical specs into executed code, manage dependencies, and maintain quality standards. Remote, full-time (40 hours/week), Philippines-based, EST overlap required (4-6 hours daily). **CRITICAL REQUIREMENT:** You must be comfortable using AI coding assistants (Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, Cody, GitHub Copilot, etc.) to build production features daily. **WHAT YOU'LL DO:** Contractor Coordination (40%): - Break complex specs into contractor assignments - Track deliverables across multiple concurrent projects - Prevent duplicate work and dependency conflicts - Conduct code reviews against specifications - Resolve blockers and coordinate between developers Hands-On Development (30%): - Build proof-of-concepts with AI coding tools - Debug integration issues between contractor deliverables - Create reference implementations - Implement critical path items when contractors are blocked System Visibility (20%): - Track component ownership across all projects - Maintain production-readiness dashboards - Identify dependency blockers before they cascade Documentation (10%): - Maintain decision logs - Document shortcuts taken for speed - Build pattern libraries from successful implementations **REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:** Technical: - 3+ years coding (Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, or similar) - Experience with AI coding assistants for daily work - Production deployment experience - Modern frameworks (React, Node.js, FastAPI, or similar) - APIs and microservices architecture Coordination: - Coordinated 2+ developers on projects (formal management not required) - Breaking requirements into executable tasks - Code review experience - Multi-component systems delivered on schedule - Async coordination across time zones Communication: - Excellent written English for async work - GitHub/GitLab workflows and PR reviews - Comfortable working independently with weekly check-ins - Willing to push back when specs are unclear or timelines unrealistic **DIRECT COMMUNICATION REQUIRED:** We need someone who will tell us when specs are incomplete, flag issues early, challenge decisions that create technical problems, and say "this won't work" instead of silently struggling. **WORKING WITH THE FOUNDER:** 1. Founder writes comprehensive component specs 2. You break specs into contractor assignments 3. Contractors execute using AI-assisted development 4. You conduct technical validation and code review 5. You provide acceptance recommendations 6. Founder makes business decisions based on your assessment You maintain the component control system, track dependencies, conduct code reviews, handle tactical execution. **THIS ROLE ISN'T FOR YOU IF:** - You're not comfortable learning and using AI coding tools daily - You need daily standups instead of async coordination - You prefer single-project focus over managing multiple systems - You avoid telling leadership when they're wrong **TO APPLY, INCLUDE:** 1. Contractor Coordination Example: Your most complex multi-developer project (system, how you prevented conflicts, what went wrong, timeline, outcome) 2. Spec Writing Sample: Write contractor-ready spec (1-2 pages) for "Build an SMS-based collections system that coordinates with a database to track tenant payment status and automatically sends reminder messages." Include acceptance criteria. 3. Scenario Responses: A) Three contractors building interdependent services. One goes silent for 3 days. What do you do? B) Contractor delivers working code that doesn't match architectural patterns. How do you handle it? C) Two contractors independently created similar database tables with different schemas. How do you resolve it? D) Founder asks for a timeline you know is impossible. What do you say and how? 4. Logistics: Your timezone, EST overlap availability, start date, current hourly rate expectations ($7-10 range) **WAGE/SALARY PER MONTH:** $7-10/hour USD ($1,120-1,600/month for 40 hours/week) based on experience and AI tool proficiency. Performance bonuses: $200-500/month for hitting delivery and quality targets. Annual raises tied to portfolio growth and team expansion.

Full job description

About the Role Not someone testing it. An expert. You’ve built tools, automations and more. We're seeking an exceptional Claude Code Expert to join our team as a full-time contractor. You'll be our go-to expert for building AI-powered automation tools, client-facing applications, and internal dashboards using Claude Code. Your primary focus will be mastering Claude Code to create solutions that solve SEO workflow challenges, automate repetitive tasks, and deliver new capabilities to our clients. This is a unique opportunity to be an early adopter of Claude Code, working on cutting-edge projects at the intersection of AI and SEO. While SEO knowledge is a bonus, we're primarily looking for a skilled developer who's excited about Claude Code and willing to learn SEO as you build solutions. About Makarios Marketing Makarios Marketing is a results-driven SEO and digital marketing agency specializing in local service businesses and ecommerce brands. We're at the forefront of leveraging AI automation to build tools, dashboards, and workflows that solve real SEO problems for our clients and streamline our internal operations. What You'll Do Core: Claude Code Development & AI Automation Build AI-powered SEO tools and dashboards using Claude Code that solve real client problems Create client-facing applications that leverage Claude's capabilities to automate SEO tasks (keyword research, content optimization, backlink analysis, local SEO insights, etc.) Develop internal Makarios Marketing tools to streamline our processes (client reporting dashboards, link prospecting tools, citation audits, SEO analytics aggregators, etc.) Automate SEO workflows using Claude Code to handle repetitive tasks like data processing, content analysis, competitive research, and performance tracking Write clean, maintainable code that other developers (and clients) can understand and build upon Optimize Claude Code applications for performance, user experience, and accuracy Test and iterate on applications to ensure they deliver real value and work as intended Document your builds clearly so clients and team members can understand what you've created and how to use it Secondary: SEO Knowledge Application Learn SEO fundamentals as you build from our team (local SEO, backlinks, on-page optimization, technical SEO, etc.) Understand the SEO problems you're solving so you can build better, more relevant solutions Collaborate with our Head of SEO and team to understand client needs and translate them into automation opportunities Suggest new tool/automation ideas based on SEO gaps you identify Support the team in understanding what's possible with Claude Code for SEO workflows Tertiary: Leadership & Project Ownership Lead buildouts from concept to delivery, managing your own timeline and deliverables Communicate progress clearly with the Makarios Marketing team Manage client expectations around timelines and capabilities Be the expert voice on what's possible with Claude Code and when we should use it Required Qualifications & Experience Claude Code & Development Solid programming foundation (JavaScript, Python, or similar languages) Active experience building with Claude Code (since its release - even if only a few months) Demonstrated ability to create functional AI-powered applications - portfolio showing Claude Code projects you've built Understanding of APIs and how to integrate AI into applications Strong problem-solving skills and ability to debug and iterate Experience with full-stack development OR strong specialization in either frontend or backend (you don't need to be expert in both, but you need to be solid in at least one) SEO Knowledge (Bonus, but valuable) Any experience with local SEO, backlink analysis, on-page optimization, or SEO tools Understanding of what makes good SEO (even if you haven't built it professionally) Curiosity about SEO and willingness to learn as you build Soft Skills & Work Style Detail-oriented and takes pride in work quality Self-motivated - you can own projects from start to finish without constant oversight Communicator - can explain technical concepts clearly to non-technical clients and team members Curious learner - excited to learn both Claude Code deeper and SEO as you go Problem-solver - when something doesn't work, you figure it out rather than giving up Time zone flexible - willing to overlap with US working hours when needed for collaboration What You'll Submit With Your Application We want to see what you can do. Please include: Claude Code Portfolio (2-3 projects minimum) Links to or descriptions of Claude Code projects you've built What problem each project solved How you built it (brief technical overview) Results or feedback you received The more projects, the better - we want to see breadth and depth GitHub or Code Repository (if available) Any public code repositories showcasing your work Well-commented, clean code examples SEO Experience (if you have it) Any SEO projects or tools you've worked on Experience with SEO tools, platforms, or workflows Understanding of local SEO, backlinks, or other SEO areas Cover Letter Info on You Tell us about your Claude Code journey and what excites you about it WHY you stand out from others Specific examples of problems you've solved with Claude Code Why you're interested in combining Claude Code with SEO Your experience working on full-time remote projects What We Provide Full-time remote work from anywhere in the Philippines (or your location) Bonuses in pay for quick builds, and saving time Paid courses to increase skills Collaboration with our Head of SEO and Founder on strategy and direction Exposure to real client problems that your solutions will solve Opportunity to be an expert in an emerging technology at the intersection of AI and SEO Potential for growth as Claude Code capabilities expand Flexibility to work on both internal tools and client deliverables Compensation & Terms Compensation: $800-$1,200/month (based on experience and portfolio quality) Employment Type: Full-Time Contractor Work Arrangement: Remote Schedule: Full-time availability with flexibility around US collaboration hours Why This Role? This is a unique opportunity to: Build real products that solve real problems for real clients Lead your own projects with ownership from concept to delivery Learn SEO alongside development without needing to be an SEO expert upfront Work with an agency that's genuinely excited about AI automation Be an expert voice in an emerging space Important Notes We're looking for serious builders, not learners just exploring Claude Code Your portfolio matters more than credentials - show us what you can build We value quality over quantity - a few exceptional projects beats many mediocre ones This role requires responsibility and ownership - you're leading buildouts, not just following instructions We need to see evidence that you've actually shipped Claude Code projects, not just played with it Add auto26 in your application to be considered How to Apply Resume/CV Claude Code Portfolio (with links and descriptions) GitHub profile or code samples Cover letter Any SEO experience documentation Note: As you reviews this job description, you may notice we value attention to detail. Keep that in mind as you prepare your application - the specific details matter, and we notice when people read carefully. Makarios Marketing

Full-time, long-term opportunity. Environment here is CREATIVE and FUN. YOUR FOCUS: You'll be building systems for explosive growth in 2026 and 2027. Examples: • Building Automations (n8n, Zapier, A.I. Tools etc.) • Website Development (HTML, CSS, Javascript etc.) • CRM Development Bonus: • App updates (React Native if you know it) Other: • Creating beautiful, concise, clean reports • Research • Etc. Our culture is fast-paced and every day is unique. WORKFLOW: For starters, you'll be assigned projects. You must take ownership in pushing the projects through completely from A to Z. Eventually, you'll need to pro-actively identify our shortcomings and opportunities, and propose projects. Looking for SMART, CRITICAL THINKERS! SCHEDULE 9:00am - 6:00 PM PST (Los Angeles time) Monday - Friday GROWTH: Payment increases over time. If you are outstanding, future leadership roles may be possible. TRAINING: You'll receive basic training, but every day is unique here. You must be a quick learner with a "can do - I'll figure it out" attitude. COMPANY CULTURE Working in a small business like ours is different from a large corporation. For example: • More creativity - You'll handle a wide variety of tasks and projects. This is more challenging than just following strict templates, but also more stimulating and exciting. • Impact - Your actions will have a big impact on the business, which you will clearly see • Feedback - Your feedback on what we are doing well, and what could be better, is not only valued, but is mandatory! ABOUT YOU: • Excellent written English (show this in your application!) • Coding experience • Technical - great with computers • Good listener - only needs to be told once • Strong communicator (you must OVERcommunicate with management and team members) • Smart, quick learner • Fastidious - attention to detail • Decent at basic math • Pro-active - anticipates what may be helpful and goes above and beyond to contribute • Meticulous, organized, methodical. • Reliable! Always shows up and focuses. • Critical, creative thinker. Not robotic. Always looking for better ways to do things. Always considering all the angles of a task. • Willing to share your opinion - we NEED to hear your opinions • Able to ask clarifying questions in order to get tasks right the first time • Always eager to improve yourself and the company’s systems. Habitually thinks strategically and takes action for improvements. • Self-starter • Independent decision maker • Flexible - can quickly adjust on the fly • Comfortable with excel • Fast computer • Fast, dependable Internet • Bonus if you have experience or interest in salsa or bachata! APPLY NOW. FORMAT YOUR APPLICATION AS A NUMBERED LIST WITH THE FOLLOWING: 1. Brief intro about you 2. Can you work the hours requested? 3. Complete this form: form.jotform.com/250204175159957 4. Write in the subject line of your application: 1. Grammar score 2. Typing WPM 3. Numbers assessment answer (regarding achieving $2,000 profit) 5. In which coding languages do you have education or experience? (Javascript, HTML, CSS, Python, Database software, React Native, Open Claw, n8n, Zoho CRM , Zoho Deluge, or anything else?) Rate yourself from 1 to 10 in each (will verify later via coding tests) • 1 = Super basic • 10 = I'm an outlier. Could code this language as senior programmer at world's best tech company 6. What is your competitive requested monthly payment for this full-time position? (Don't email me off the platform or message on social media - your application will be disqualified. Don't worry, I personally check every application here) Looking forward to meeting you! --------- Search: VA , virtual assistant , executive assistant , code , python , javascript , C , C+ , C++ , Deluge , API , AI , A.I. , artificial intelligence, llm , automate, automation , zoho , crm , deluge , make , n8n , zapier , react , react native , openclaw , open claw, cursor , claude code

Full job description

I’m hiring an Executive Assistant | Automations Manager for St. Pierre. St. Pierre helps $1M-$10M foundation and waterproofing contractors keep a 3-6 week backlog of high-ticket jobs. This is not a basic VA role. This role is for someone who can work directly with the founder and clients, understand messy business problems, identify the real gap, design the fix, build the workflow, test it, document it, and make sure it works in the real world. Your job is to help turn repeated business work into reliable systems. You will work across: - GoHighLevel - CRMs - APIs - Webhooks - n8n, Make, Zapier, or similar tools - Google Sheets - Databases - Dashboards - Claude Code, Codex, and ChatGPT - Client onboarding, reporting, and troubleshooting workflows You do not need to be a traditional software developer. You do need strong English, clear writing, reliability, fast learning, and real experience using automation tools. The work will include: - Turning Loom videos, screenshots, transcripts, and notes into finished work - Turning repeated tasks into SOPs, checklists, workflows, and automations - Building or cleaning up GoHighLevel workflows - Building or improving Google Sheets trackers - Helping design dashboards and reporting systems - Drafting client updates when something needs explaining - Reviewing applicants and organizing recruiting pipelines - Researching tools, vendors, or competitors and recommending the best option - Helping with inbox, calendar, admin, reminders, and follow-ups - Supporting CRM, automation, onboarding, and troubleshooting projects You will work in 4-hour blocks. Each block should produce a clear finished output, such as: - a workflow - an SOP - a checklist - a tracker - a client update - a research memo - a dashboard spec - a fixed automation - a clear next-step plan You are a fit if: - You write clearly in English - You are organized and reliable - You can figure things out without needing every tiny step explained - You use Claude Code, Codex, ChatGPT, or similar tools to work faster - You have used tools like GoHighLevel, Google Sheets, Zapier, Make, or n8n - You can explain technical issues in plain English - You check your work before sending it back - You ask smart questions when needed - You want long-term work and more responsibility over time You are not a fit if: - You disappear when stuck - You need constant hand-holding - You send raw ChatGPT output without checking it - You say “done” when work is incomplete - You only want repetitive data entry - You cannot write clearly - You avoid messy problems - You build things without testing them How to apply: Do not send a generic message. Reply with: 1. A short intro 2. Your current availability 3. Your expected monthly pay for part-time work 4. Which tools you have used: Claude Code, Codex, ChatGPT, Google Sheets, GoHighLevel, Zapier, Make, n8n, Loom, Canva, etc. 5. Your strongest proof link: workflow, dashboard, SOP, tracker, automation, case study, Loom, or portfolio 6. A short Loom video showing: - your spoken English - your current Claude Code / Codex / ChatGPT workflow - one automation, workflow, tracker, or system you built - one messy problem you solved - one thing that broke and how you fixed it The best person can grow into a lead ops / automations manager role as we build the company.

Full job description

About the company: Edge360 / Staff360 is a trusted Managed Service Provider (MSP) and Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) agency. We help businesses streamline operations, optimize technology, and scale efficiently by providing reliable IT solutions and outsourcing support. We're growing fast and looking for motivated professionals who want to be part of a team that drives digital transformation. About the role: We are looking for a highly skilled and self-directed Virtual Assistant who is fully proficient in Claude Code and Cowork. This is a hands-on, results-driven role where you are expected to independently build, manage, and deliver real outputs using these tools — no hand-holding required. You will work on a variety of projects, including dashboards, presentations, websites, integration fulfillment, and automation workflows. If you love building things and thrive without micromanagement, this role is for you. What you'll do: Build and maintain dashboards and data visualizations using Claude Code and Cowork Design and develop websites and landing pages independently Create polished presentations and reports for clients and internal use Build integration between tools, platforms, and APIs Automate workflows and streamline processes using AI-powered tools Manage tasks and deliverables independently with minimal supervision What we're looking for: Full proficiency in Claude Code and Cowork — you must be able to demonstrate real work you have built using these tools Fully self-directed — able to take a task and run with it without constant guidance Strong portfolio of outputs: dashboards, websites, presentations, integration, or automatons built in Claude Excellent written and verbal English communication skills Reliable internet connection and a stable remote work setup Detail-oriented, proactive, and able to meet deadlines consistently Compensation: Paid hourly — rate based on experience and skills demonstrated during the application process Flexible hours — results matter more than schedules How to apply: To be considered for this role, please submit all three of the following: 1. Updated CV or portfolio — include links to work you have built (websites, dashboards, integrations, etc.) 2. Self-introduction video — record a short video (2–5 minutes) discussing your relevant experience with Claude Code and Cowork, and walk us through at least one thing you have built 3. Cover letter or message — briefly tell us why you are the right fit for this role Applications without a portfolio and self-introduction video will not be reviewed.
