Full job description

**Job Title:** CAD / Takeoff / Metal Fabrication / Technical Assistant — Long-Term Remote Position **Company:** TCB Metal Works **Location:** Remote — Philippines **Type:** Part-Time to Full-Time **Hours:** 20–40 hours per week **Base Pay:** $5 USD per hour, with opportunities for increased pay and performance bonuses on profitable jobs We are a metal fabrication, welding, and machining shop in the United States looking for a highly capable, multi-skilled individual from the Philippines to join our team long-term. This is not a simple data-entry job. We are looking for an all-around problem solver who can help with CAD work, material takeoffs, shop drawings, estimating support, fabrication planning, technical research, product development, software projects, and sales/marketing systems. The right person should have experience or familiarity with structural steel, metal fabrication, welding, machining, and how metal parts are actually made in the real world. You do not need to know everything on day one, but you must be willing to learn quickly, figure things out, and take ownership of tasks even when they are unfamiliar. During busy times, the work may focus heavily on project takeoffs, CAD, shop drawings, estimating, and fabrication planning. During slower times, you may be helping engineer new products, design parts, build internal software using AI tools, create sales funnels, research new business ideas, improve systems, or help develop new revenue streams for the company. We need someone highly versatile. The ideal person is not limited to one narrow job description. We are looking for an all-star player who can move between technical, creative, research, software, and business tasks as needed. **Pay and Hours:** This position is for approximately **20–40 hours per week**, depending on workload, skill level, and performance. The base pay is **$5 USD per hour**. This base rate applies during slower periods, training periods, research tasks, internal projects, and general busy work. When we are working on highly profitable jobs, large fabrication projects, successful estimates, product development, or revenue-generating work, we are happy to increase pay and offer strong performance bonuses. We want someone who can grow with the company and be rewarded when they help create real value. For the right person, this can become a long-term role with increasing responsibility, higher pay opportunities, and bonuses based on performance and profitable work. **Main Responsibilities:** * Review architectural drawings, structural drawings, shop drawings, and PDFs * Perform material takeoffs for metal fabrication projects * Identify steel members, panels, plates, tubes, brackets, cages, railings, frames, and other fabricated components * Create or assist with CAD drawings and shop drawings * Help organize parts, assign part numbers, and break large projects into clear fabrication scopes * Assist with estimating by identifying materials, quantities, processes, and fabrication steps * Research materials, hardware, fabrication methods, welding requirements, and project details * Help convert customer drawings and project information into clear shop instructions * Help engineer and develop new metal products * Assist with software projects using AI tools, no-code tools, or programming when needed * Help build sales funnels, landing pages, lead lists, and marketing systems * Research new business opportunities and ways to improve company operations * Communicate clearly about what information is missing or unclear * Use AI tools, software, and online resources to solve problems and improve workflow **Required Skills:** * CAD experience such as AutoCAD, Fusion 360, SolidWorks, Revit, SketchUp, or similar * Ability to read and understand technical drawings * Experience with takeoffs, estimating, or quantity counts * Familiarity with structural steel and metal fabrication * Basic understanding of welding, cutting, bending, drilling, machining, and assembly processes * Strong English reading and written communication * Strong attention to detail * Ability to learn independently and solve problems without needing every step explained * Willingness to work on different types of tasks depending on what the business needs **Big Plus If You Have:** * Background in computer science, programming, automation, or scripting * Experience with Revit, BIM files, IFC files, STEP files, or DWG files * Experience creating shop drawings * Experience with steel detailing * Familiarity with CNC plasma, laser cutting, press brake bending, machining, or welding symbols * Electronics or controls knowledge * Experience building websites, landing pages, sales funnels, or internal tools * Experience using AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Replit, or other automation tools **Who We Are Looking For:** We want someone who is resourceful, technical, curious, and not afraid of hard problems. You should be the type of person who can be given an unfamiliar task, research it, test ideas, ask smart questions, and find a way to get it done. We need someone who can grow with the company and become a key part of our estimating, drafting, project planning, product development, and business systems process. This position is ideal for someone who enjoys learning, solving technical problems, building things, and working on real-world fabrication and business projects. This is not the right position for someone who only wants to do one repetitive task every day. We need someone who is comfortable switching gears and helping wherever they can create value. **To Apply:** Please send the following: 1. A short introduction about yourself 2. Your CAD, takeoff, fabrication, steel, software, or technical experience 3. Examples of drawings, takeoffs, estimates, software projects, websites, funnels, or technical work you have done 4. Software and AI tools you are comfortable using 5. Your expected hourly rate 6. Your availability and preferred work schedule 7. In your application, include the phrase: **“I can figure it out”** so we know you read the full job post We are looking for someone reliable, sharp, versatile, and long-term. If you are a self-starter who wants to become a valuable part of a growing metal fabrication business, we want to hear from you.

Full job description

VersAssist is a fast-growing AI-powered execution company that helps entrepreneurs, authors, educators, and businesses bring ideas to life through content, automation, software, and digital products. We are looking for an AI-assisted Game Developer to join our growing game development department. You will work directly with our team to build educational, promotional, and commercial games using modern development tools and AI-assisted workflows. This is an excellent opportunity for a developer who enjoys creating games, learning new technologies, and leveraging AI tools to accelerate development. Our team actively uses tools such as Claude Code, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other AI platforms to improve productivity and speed up development cycles. RESPONSIBILITIES Develop and improve game projects for web, mobile, and desktop platforms. Work on gameplay systems, UI, menus, player progression, and game mechanics. Collaborate with project leads and other developers to implement new features. Use AI tools such as Claude Code and ChatGPT to assist with development, debugging, and documentation. Review and improve existing codebases. Fix bugs and optimize game performance. Create and maintain technical documentation. Participate in project planning and provide development estimates. Test builds and ensure game quality before release. Learn and adopt new AI-driven development workflows as they are introduced. QUALIFICATIONS Required Experience with at least one game engine: Unity Godot Unreal Engine Understanding of game development fundamentals. Ability to work independently and solve technical problems. Strong attention to detail. Good written English communication skills. Comfortable using AI tools as part of the development process. Reliable internet connection and computer. Preferred Experience publishing games to web, mobile, or desktop platforms. Experience with multiplayer systems. Experience with educational or simulation games. Familiarity with Git/GitHub. Experience working with remote teams. Understanding of AI-assisted coding workflows. COMPENSATION Starting Pay: $3.50 per hour for the first 100 hours. Incremental Increase: $0.50 increase per 100 hours worked until reaching $5.00 per hour. Expected Weekly Hours: 10+ hours per week, with potential for additional hours based on project workload and performance. BENEFITS Long-term opportunity with a growing company. Flexible working hours. Hands-on experience with cutting-edge AI development tools. Opportunity to work on multiple game projects. Career growth into senior developer or project leadership roles. Collaborative and supportive team environment. Access to AI-assisted development workflows and training. APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS To apply, please submit: Your resume. A brief introduction about your game development experience. Links to any games, GitHub repositories, demos, or portfolio projects. Your preferred game engine (Unity, Godot, Unreal, etc.). A short paragraph explaining how you currently use AI tools in your development workflow. IMPORTANT: Include the phrase "AI Game Builder" in the first line of your application so we know you read the entire job posting. We are looking for developers who are excited about the future of AI-assisted game development and want to grow alongside a rapidly expanding team.

Full job description

Local SEO Specialist (MUST HAVE AI AUTOMATION SKILLS IN LOCAL SEO) Full-Time - Makarios Marketing | [Remote] About the Role We're not looking for a traditional SEO hire. We're looking for a rare hybrid: someone who lives and breathes local SEO and thinks like an AI engineer. You'll be responsible for delivering measurable search results for our clients while simultaneously building the tools, agents, and automations that put us years ahead of the competition. If you've ever thought, "I could automate this with an agent," while doing SEO work — this role was written for you. Read this entire post before applying. We mean it. Most SEO job posts get flooded with copy-paste applications from people who skimmed the title. This isn't that kind of job, and we're not that kind of company. If you're looking for a basic SEO role where you build a few links and write some meta descriptions, please move on. This role will frustrate you. If you're someone who loses sleep thinking about why a map pack result is where it is, and you've ever opened n8n or Claude Code just because you were curious — keep reading. Who We Are We're a results-driven SEO company that doesn't just execute strategies — we build the tools and systems that make those strategies unstoppable. We work in local SEO and we take it seriously. We're growing and we need someone who can grow with us, contribute ideas from day one, and help us deliver things to clients that no one else in the market is offering. What This Role Actually Is You will own local SEO strategy and execution across client accounts and you will build AI-powered tools and automations that make our work faster, smarter, and more valuable. These two responsibilities are equally important. You can't do one without the other here. This is not a junior role. This is not a "we'll train you on AI" role. You need to come in already capable. Your Day-to-Day Responsibilities Build and execute deep local SEO strategies — Google Business Profile, map pack optimization, local citations, geo-targeted content, and local link building Identify automation opportunities in our SEO workflows and build agents using Claude Code and n8n to handle them Create custom client-facing tools and reporting dashboards that go beyond anything a standard SEO platform offers Manage technical SEO audits, on-page optimization, and content strategy across multiple client sites Design and run link building campaigns that prioritize local authority and genuine relevance Monitor algorithm changes and translate them into concrete strategy shifts before clients even notice an impact Bring new ideas to the table — if you see a smarter way to do something, we want to hear it You Are Exactly Who We Need If: You have deep, real-world local SEO experience — you know how the local algorithm works, you've ranked businesses in competitive markets, and you can explain why something works, not just that it does You've built workflows or automations in n8n — not watched a tutorial, actually built something You've used Claude Code to build or deploy AI agents in a real context You've worked with OpenClaw or similar AI platforms to extend what's possible You can write enough code (Python, JavaScript, or similar) to build tools that actually work You've managed SEO across multiple client accounts simultaneously You think in systems — you see every repetitive task as a future automation You communicate clearly in written English with clients and teammates You Are Not Who We Need If: Your experience is mostly on-page basics and you've never touched automation You've "heard of" n8n or Claude Code but never opened them You apply to every job posting with the same template message You need hand-holding to figure out what to prioritize You're looking for a role you can coast in You've done some SEO, but never specialized in just that We will not respond to generic applications. If your opening message doesn't show us you read this post, it goes straight to the archive. Tell us why you stand out, what you bring, how you will stand out from others. We get tons of applications. STAND OUT Include code SEO 26 somewhere in your application — this tells us you read everything and follow instructions, two things that are non-negotiable in this role What We Offer Full-time, long-term position — we're not looking for a short contract, we're looking for someone to grow with us Bonuses for performance as well as paid trainings and courses you need or want Competitive monthly salary based on your experience and skills Full access to the tools you need — AI platforms, SEO software, automation tools Real creative freedom — if you have an idea for a tool or system, you can build it A team that actually values what you bring and won't micromanage how you do it How to Apply Send your application and include all of the following or it will not be considered: A specific example of a local SEO win you're proud of — what was the situation, what did you do, what happened One automation or AI tool you've built — describe what it does and what you used to build it Share documents, agents, work you've done that is relevant Applications without all three of the above will not receive a response. No exceptions. This role is for the person who sees a gap in what's possible and immediately starts thinking about how to close it. If that's you, we'd love to hear from you. Monthly - $800-1200 USD for 40 hours a week (negotiable on experience) Must be willing to work 9am - 5pm EST

Full job description

## **Job Description** We are building a **multi-brand, CRM-driven business operating system** using **Lovable.dev** as the core platform. This ecosystem powers several live platforms, including: • **Unforgettable Times** (events & experiences platform) • **TopTier Experience** (luxury chauffeur & curated experiences platform) • **Playboxxx** (creator & entertainment platform) • **OS Dynasty** (the master operating system tying everything together) We are looking for a **Lovable-experienced web developer** who can work **throughout the day** to help finalize smaller details, fix issues, complete unfinished features, and keep the platforms moving forward daily. This is an **ongoing role**, not a one-time project. --- ## **What You’ll Be Responsible For** • Completing unfinished pages and flows across multiple platforms • Fixing “Failed to fetch” and data rendering issues • Finalizing CRM systems and linked records • Completing Product pages and CRUD functionality • Building and refining advanced forms and modals • Ensuring data consistency across desktop and mobile • Polishing UI/UX so no page feels incomplete • Maintaining platform stability as new features are added You will actively help **fully complete**: GasMask (primary focus to start) Unforgettable Times TopTier Experience Playboxxx The Core OS (Global CRM, Brand CRMs, Admin tools) ## **Required Skills (Non-Negotiable)** • Strong hands-on experience with **Lovable.dev** • Working knowledge of **Supabase** (tables, relationships, CRUD, RLS) • Ability to debug and fix data fetching issues • Experience working on **CRM or business platforms** • Comfortable refining existing systems (not just starting new ones) • Attention to detail and ability to follow structured task lists • Ability to work independently and communicate clearly You can paste this directly: Required Skills • Hands-on experience with Lovable.dev • Working knowledge of Supabase (tables, relationships, CRUD) • Ability to debug and fix data rendering issues • Experience completing and polishing existing platforms • CRM or business platform experience • Strong bug-fixing and attention to detail • Responsive across desktop and mobile • Clear WhatsApp communication and daily availability If you cannot troubleshoot why something works on mobile but not desktop, this role is not a fit. --- ## **UI / Brand Awareness** You must respect brand color systems and platform identity, including: . Gasmask red / black • TopTier Experience – Black / Silver / Luxury UI • Unforgettable Times – Festive / Event-focused UI • Playboxxx – Bold, modern, creator-centric UI • OS – Clean, professional, system-first design Blank pages, broken links, or unfinished flows are considered bugs. --- ## **Nice to Have (Strong Plus)** • Experience with AI-powered features or automation • Familiarity with role-based access systems • Multi-platform or multi-brand experience • Understanding of business workflows and scaling systems --- ## **Work Structure** • Long-term, ongoing role • Task-based assignments per platform • Daily collaboration and iteration • Real-time fixes and refinements This role is ideal for someone who enjoys **finishing complex systems** and keeping platforms clean, functional, and scalable. --- ## **How to Apply** To apply, please include: • Your experience with **Lovable.dev** • Examples of platforms or systems you’ve worked on • Your experience with **Supabase** • Your **availability during the day** • **Your WhatsApp number** so we can contact you directly ?? Applications without a WhatsApp number will not be considered. --- ## **Who This Role Is Not For** • Beginners learning Lovable • Developers who only build landing pages • Anyone uncomfortable working inside existing systems • Short-term freelancers looking for quick gigs

Full job description

**About the role** I run a fast-growing AI consulting business serving high-profile entrepreneurs in the German-speaking market. We help them work with Claude (Cowork) and we build the setups and skills that run their business. We already run client Claude setups, email systems on client servers, dashboards, and sales workflows live. I have more client projects and more ideas than the team can execute, so I'm bringing on one more builder. This is not heavy coding. It is knowing how to use Claude and Claude Code the right way: building skills cleanly, testing properly, and shipping things that actually work. **Who you'll work with** You won't be alone. You'll join a small, tight team and work directly with me and another developer. Clear structures, clear briefings, daily contact. Lots of guidance early, more freedom as trust grows. **What you will do** - Build and test Claude skills (for clients using Claude Cowork and for internal use) - Set up and run client systems on their VPS servers (email: classify and structure mail, auto-draft replies, pre-filtering, black- and whitelists by sender and topic) - Build dashboards and controlling from Excel exports (turning platform exports into clean revenue and commission numbers) - Content and design skills, reusable templates (keynotes, presentations) - Proposal and invoice workflows - Lead scraping and enrichment, end-to-end sales workflows - Build custom MCPs that connect a client's Claude Cowork setup to their VPS - Turn finished projects into reusable templates we deploy across many clients Most client projects are not advanced. The work is simple but takes time, and it has to be done carefully and correctly. **What matters most to me** Two things above everything: honesty and reliability. When you tell me a skill or a system is done and working, I need to fully trust that. I do not want to re-check your work. "Done" has to mean done and tested. My clients are in the German-speaking market, so data protection (GDPR) and security are always at the highest level. Precise, careful, conscientious work is the foundation. **Must-have** - Hands-on experience with Claude / Claude Code (Cowork): able to build, test and ship skills - VPS / server skills: comfortable setting up and running systems on a Linux server - Strategic thinking: if I send you a discovery-call transcript, you can suggest how you would build it and why - Follows instructions precisely and works in a structured way - Honest and reliable - Detail-oriented and careful (data protection and security) - Good written English **What I offer** - Long-term, full-time collaboration, not short project hopping - A growing company with high-profile clients and a real team around you - Clear structures, clear organization, very clear instructions - A performance culture: I do not care how long you take or how you got there, I care about the result. Strong, fast, high-quality work is rewarded with raises, quickly **Hours** We work on Gulf Standard Time (Dubai, GMT+4). Team hours are 10 AM to 6 PM Dubai time, which is 2 PM to 10 PM your time in the Philippines. We have a short daily check-in call, and I want a short written end-of-day report every day. **Compensation** Starting salary $800 USD/month. We start lean. Performance is rewarded fast: above-average work means steady raises and growing income over time. The person we hired last round is already on this path. **Who should not apply** Please don't apply if you're a general virtual assistant. We need a specialized Claude expert, not a VA. If your background is general IT support or make.com / n8n automation, this is not the right fit either. The projects you've built have to be built with Claude. We do NOT use n8n or make.com or zapier. **How to apply** Don't send me a portfolio or a long write-up. Just reply with one line: "I'm in". That's it. I answer everyone, and we take it from there together. Applications close **Tuesday, June 30, EOD**.

Full-time, long-term opportunity. Environment here is CREATIVE and FUN. YOUR FOCUS: You'll be building systems for explosive growth in 2026 and 2027. Examples: • Building Automations (n8n, Zapier, A.I. Tools etc.) • Website Development (HTML, CSS, Javascript etc.) • CRM Development Bonus: • App updates (React Native if you know it) Other: • Creating beautiful, concise, clean reports • Research • Etc. Our culture is fast-paced and every day is unique. WORKFLOW: For starters, you'll be assigned projects. You must take ownership in pushing the projects through completely from A to Z. Eventually, you'll need to pro-actively identify our shortcomings and opportunities, and propose projects. Looking for SMART, CRITICAL THINKERS! SCHEDULE 9:00am - 6:00 PM PST (Los Angeles time) Monday - Friday GROWTH: Payment increases over time. If you are outstanding, future leadership roles may be possible. TRAINING: You'll receive basic training, but every day is unique here. You must be a quick learner with a "can do - I'll figure it out" attitude. COMPANY CULTURE Working in a small business like ours is different from a large corporation. For example: • More creativity - You'll handle a wide variety of tasks and projects. This is more challenging than just following strict templates, but also more stimulating and exciting. • Impact - Your actions will have a big impact on the business, which you will clearly see • Feedback - Your feedback on what we are doing well, and what could be better, is not only valued, but is mandatory! ABOUT YOU: • Excellent written English (show this in your application!) • Coding experience • Technical - great with computers • Good listener - only needs to be told once • Strong communicator (you must OVERcommunicate with management and team members) • Smart, quick learner • Fastidious - attention to detail • Decent at basic math • Pro-active - anticipates what may be helpful and goes above and beyond to contribute • Meticulous, organized, methodical. • Reliable! Always shows up and focuses. • Critical, creative thinker. Not robotic. Always looking for better ways to do things. Always considering all the angles of a task. • Willing to share your opinion - we NEED to hear your opinions • Able to ask clarifying questions in order to get tasks right the first time • Always eager to improve yourself and the company’s systems. Habitually thinks strategically and takes action for improvements. • Self-starter • Independent decision maker • Flexible - can quickly adjust on the fly • Comfortable with excel • Fast computer • Fast, dependable Internet • Bonus if you have experience or interest in salsa or bachata! APPLY NOW. FORMAT YOUR APPLICATION AS A NUMBERED LIST WITH THE FOLLOWING: 1. Brief intro about you 2. Can you work the hours requested? 3. Complete this form: form.jotform.com/250204175159957 4. Write in the subject line of your application: 1. Grammar score 2. Typing WPM 3. Numbers assessment answer (regarding achieving $2,000 profit) 5. In which coding languages do you have education or experience? (Javascript, HTML, CSS, Python, Database software, React Native, Open Claw, n8n, Zoho CRM , Zoho Deluge, or anything else?) Rate yourself from 1 to 10 in each (will verify later via coding tests) • 1 = Super basic • 10 = I'm an outlier. Could code this language as senior programmer at world's best tech company 6. What is your competitive requested monthly payment for this full-time position? (Don't email me off the platform or message on social media - your application will be disqualified. Don't worry, I personally check every application here) Looking forward to meeting you! --------- Search: VA , virtual assistant , executive assistant , code , python , javascript , C , C+ , C++ , Deluge , API , AI , A.I. , artificial intelligence, llm , automate, automation , zoho , crm , deluge , make , n8n , zapier , react , react native , openclaw , open claw, cursor , claude code

Full job description

ABOUT BITS Binary IT Solutions is a digital services company serving clients across the US and Canada. We build websites, automate workflows, and deliver technical solutions for businesses that need a reliable partner. We’re a small remote team that moves fast and works smart, and AI is a big part of how we do it. THE ROLE We’re looking for a junior Digital Solutions Analyst to join our team. This is not a traditional tech role where you need years of experience with every tool. We use AI heavily to build, automate, and solve problems and we're looking for someone who thinks the same way to join our team. If you know how to use AI to figure things out, learn fast, and take ownership of your work, you’ll fit right in. What matters most to us is how you think, not what’s already on your resume. WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING • Building websites and web projects using AI-assisted development (Next.js, Tailwind CSS, React, using AI as your co-pilot) • Setting up and managing hosting environments, DNS, Cloudflare, Vercel and cPanel • Handling domain and DNS migrations • Building automation workflows using n8n • Working with APIs and AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, and other LLMs) • Supporting ongoing technical projects across the team • Deploying and managing sites on platforms like Vercel WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR • Smart and resourceful, you figure things out. • AI-native, you already use AI tools in your work or projects • Basic technical literacy: DNS, Cloudflare, cPanel, n8n (you don’t need to be an expert, but you need to know your way around) • Fast learner, junior level is fine, but curiosity is a must! • Punctual and deadline-driven, we don’t chase people • Takes ownership, if it’s yours, you see it through to completion • Not afraid to ask questions when stuck • Team player with strong communication skills • Fully fluent in English (written and spoken) • Reliable internet connection with a backup option BONUS POINTS • SEO fundamentals • Google Analytics or Google Search Console experience • Any personal or freelance projects built with AI COMPENSATION Starting at ?16,000/month (part-time), based on experience. Room for growth and performance bonuses for the right person. HOW TO APPLY To be considered, please begin your application with the exact phrase 'BITS AI 2026'. Applications that do not include this will not be reviewed. Send your resume and a short message telling us why you’re a good fit. Show us tools you’ve used, AI projects you’ve worked on, or anything you’ve built. Links to work are a bonus. Applications without a personal message will not be considered. Apply to: ----------

Full job description

We're looking for a sharp, tech-curious right hand who loves using AI to make things run faster and smarter. The heart of this role is using AI to build — simple automations, internal tools, and reports that save our small team hours every week. If you get a little thrill from figuring out a new tool, automating something tedious, and making a process better than you found it, you'll fit right in. It's a mixed role, and we want to be upfront about that. The AI, automation, and efficiency side is the core of what we're hiring for — but you'll also help with customer service for our clean Christian music app, a bit of marketing, and general admin, and you need to be genuinely open to pitching in wherever the team needs you. We use tools like Claude (and Claude Code) every day. You don't need to have done this before — but you do need to be excited to learn it. If you anticipate what's needed before being asked, take real ownership, communicate like a pro, and love learning something new — keep reading. We're hiring the person, not the résumé. Technical curiosity and drive matter most; the rest we can teach — including how we build with AI. What you'll do Build, automate, and make us more efficient with AI — use Claude / ChatGPT (and grow into Claude Code) to automate repetitive work, build simple internal tools, draft content, and find smarter, faster ways for the team to operate. This is the core of the role. We'll teach you; you bring the curiosity. Turn data into insight — pull together clear daily reports and spot patterns (with AI's help). Bring us insights, not just numbers. Be my right hand — anticipate needs, follow through without reminders, flag issues early, and close loops. Support our clean Christian music app — customer service, content, and launch-related help. Pitch in on the rest — influencer outreach, light e-commerce / Etsy support, and general admin as we grow. A real love of music is a big plus — you'll be working in it every day. Who you are (this matters most to us) Technically curious — this is the big one. You enjoy poking at new tools, you're energized (not intimidated) by AI, and when you see a repetitive task your first instinct is "can I automate this?" Any interest in coding, automation, scripting, or tinkering is a real plus. Great — not necessarily experienced. Eager, smart, proactive, and resourceful. We'd take a brilliant fast-learner over a seasoned coaster every single time. A self-starter who takes initiative instead of waiting to be told, and teaches themselves what they don't know. Open and flexible — happy to jump from an automation project to a customer-service question to a quick admin task without missing a beat. You're here for the technical work, but you don't consider anything "below" you. A clear communicator — responsive, easy to work with, and good at keeping us in the loop. Reliable and professional — you do what you say you'll do, and you have a stable internet connection good enough to hold a video call and screen-share without dropping. Honest and accountable — you log the time you actually work and speak up early when something's off. This one is non-negotiable. Detail-oriented. To show us you read carefully, please mention your favorite color in your application where it asks how you heard about us. Mission-aligned — you genuinely connect with what we're building: clean, faith-friendly music for families. Helpful (but NOT required — we'll train you) AI & automation — bonus points for hands-on Claude / Claude Code experience, automation work (n8n, Make, Zapier), or any interest in coding or scripting. Using ChatGPT, Claude, or other AI tools in your daily workflow. Data analysis (with AI's help) to generate reports and spot trends. Pinterest / social media scheduling tools. Customer service experience. WordPress publishing and AI image generation (e.g., Ideogram, gpt-image). Influencer outreach and management. The details: Full-time, 40 hrs/week, long-term. We start at $400–500/month and there's room to grow — in both pay and responsibility — as you take on more and grow into the AI/automation side. Based in the Philippines, with some flexibility to occasionally overlap U.S. Mountain Time for a quick call or chat. We use the time tracker Trackabi for active work hours. Benefits Flexible hours — days, nights, spread out, or catch up on weekends. PTO after 6 months full-time. Paid training time to learn new skills on the clock. A genuinely great team and culture. I treat my team like friends, not just freelancers — many have been with me for years, with no plans of leaving. How to apply Apply through the Google Form here: forms.gle/6P8ZySUcbKz67U5U6— that's the only way to apply, so please don't DM or email instead. Two quick things in the form: When it asks about your experience with AI tools, tell us about a time you taught yourself a new tool, or automated or figured out something you'd never done before — what you did and how it turned out. There's no "right" answer; we just want to see how you think and learn. We're hiring one person and reviewing applications as they come in. Top candidates get a paid test project — your real chance to show us how you work. If the AI and automation side sounds more like a chore than a challenge you'd enjoy, this probably isn't the right fit — and that's completely okay. But if everything above sounds like you, we'd genuinely love to meet you.

Full job description

Save On Branson is looking for a practical, business-minded full-stack developer to help build and improve SMASH, our in-house CRM, booking, lead management, order, reporting, and operations platform. SMASH is not a simple brochure site. It runs real business workflows: lead intake, sales follow-up, order creation, ticketing, vouchers, vendor reconciliation, timeshare/tour workflows, reporting, automations, and integrations across the Save On Branson ecosystem. We need a developer who can step into an existing production system, understand how the business works, improve what is already there, and build new features that help our sales, marketing, operations, and leadership teams move faster. We use Timeproof and Easy Pay. What You’ll Work On You’ll help maintain, improve, and build features across SMASH and related internal tools, including: • Lead management and sales pipeline workflows • Order and booking flows • Reporting dashboards and operational reports • Vendor, ticket, voucher, and reconciliation tools • CRM automation and follow-up systems • Integrations with external APIs and internal services • Performance, reliability, and data-quality improvements • UX improvements for internal teams who use the system every day We are also in a large AI push to implement more AI technology and automation workflows to increase overall efficiency. Core Technology Stack The ideal candidate should be comfortable with: • C# / .NET • _ASP.NET Core_ • Entity Framework / EF migrations • SQL Server • Stored procedures, views, reporting queries, and data troubleshooting • Angular / TypeScript • HTML, CSS, responsive UI work • REST APIs and service-layer architecture • Git-based source control • Azure DevOps, pull requests, branches, and work items Experience with any of these is a plus: • ASP.NET Boilerplate / ASP.NET Zero • PrimeNG or similar Angular UI frameworks • Background jobs, scheduled jobs, or automation workflows • CRM, booking, ticketing, reservation, or ecommerce systems • Reporting systems and business analytics • API integrations • AI-assisted development tools such as Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, etc. What Makes Someone a Great Fit We are looking for someone who is more than just a ticket-taker. The right developer should be able to: • Read and understand an existing codebase without needing everything rewritten • Diagnose bugs from real user reports and production data • Write clean, maintainable code that fits the current system • Work confidently with SQL Server and business-critical data • Understand business workflows before changing them • Communicate clearly with non-technical team members • Think through edge cases, reporting accuracy, and operational impact • Own a problem from investigation through deployment • Balance speed with quality Examples of Projects You Might Handle • Build a new inbox/view for a specific lead or order type • Add filters, columns, and export options to an internal report • Fix a bug in how orders, hooks, or statuses are counted • Improve a sales agent workflow to reduce manual work • Add an integration between SMASH and another internal/external system • Update Angular screens for better usability • Create or modify SQL reports used by management • Improve data consistency between leads, contacts, orders, and campaigns Required Experience • 3+ years professional software development experience • Strong C#/.NET experience • Strong SQL Server experience • Experience building or maintaining web applications • Ability to work in an existing production codebase • Comfortable debugging across frontend, backend, and database layers Preferred Experience • Angular experience • CRM, booking, travel, ticketing, or sales operations software experience • Azure DevOps experience • Experience with reporting-heavy business systems • Experience modernizing older systems without breaking daily operations What We Value We value developers who are practical, reliable, and curious. SMASH supports real people doing real work every day, so the best fit is someone who cares about usability, accuracy, and business impact. You do not need to be flashy. You do need to be dependable, thoughtful, and capable of shipping useful improvements.

Full job description

Build the Future of the Beauty Industry Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term We're looking for an exceptional AI Automation Engineer to join our team at Salon Business School. We believe the future of the beauty industry isn't just better education. It's intelligent systems. We're building AI products that help salons: • Answer phones • Book appointments • Follow up with leads • Reactivate guests • Coach teams • Automate operations • Increase revenue • Deliver an exceptional guest experience This isn't a maintenance role. You'll help build products that thousands of salon owners will use. About Us Salon Business School helps salon owners build businesses that create freedom. We've spent years developing proven systems for: • Guest experience • Team development • Sales • Leadership • Retail • Recruiting • Retention • Operations Now we're turning those systems into AI-powered software. What You'll Do You'll work directly with our founders to build AI products from the ground up. Projects may include: • AI Receptionist • AI Salon Director • AI Owner Coach • AI Beauty Pro Coach • AI Lead Follow-Up • AI Sales Assistant • AI Workflow Automations • CRM integrations • Phone systems • SMS automations • Knowledge bases • API integrations • Internal dashboards You'll help us turn ideas into products. Technologies We'd Love You To Know We don't expect you to know everything. But experience with these is a huge plus: AI OpenAI API Claude API Prompt Engineering Knowledge Bases RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) AI Agents Automation n8n (preferred) Make.com Zapier Voice AI Vapi Retell AI Twilio Voice Development JavaScript TypeScript Node.js Python REST APIs Webhooks OAuth GitHub CRM GoHighLevel HubSpot Salesforce (bonus) The Type of Person We're Looking For You're naturally curious. When you see a repetitive task, your first thought is: "Could we automate that?" You enjoy solving problems. You love learning new technology. You like building things that people actually use. You communicate well. You're resourceful. You can figure things out without waiting to be told every step. Most importantly… You're excited about helping build something that doesn't exist yet. What Success Looks Like Within your first 90 days, we'd love to see you: ? Build our first AI receptionist ? Connect voice, SMS, and CRM ? Create reusable automation templates ? Build scalable AI workflows ? Help launch our first AI-powered salon product Bonus Points If You Have Experience With Voice AI Call center automation Appointment scheduling Booking systems Calendars Conversational AI SaaS products No-code/low-code tools Compensation Competitive salary based on experience. Long-term opportunity with room to grow as we expand our AI product division. How To Apply Please send: Your resume Links to projects you've built Any AI automations you've created A short Loom video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and showing us your favorite AI project. IMPORTANT Instead of writing "I read the job description," start your application with: "The future belongs to builders." This lets us know you pay attention to details. Then answer these questions: What's the coolest AI automation you've ever built? If you had one month to build an AI employee for a salon, what would you build first and why? Which AI tools do you use almost every day? What's one repetitive business process you think AI will eliminate over the next five years?

Full job description

We're looking for a Mid-Level Full Stack Developer to join our team in a remote, part-time capacity (approximately 20 hours per week to start). This opportunity is ideal for developers who enjoy enhancing existing applications, are experienced with modern JavaScript technologies, and can confidently manage assigned work with minimal supervision. Instead of creating new applications from the ground up, you'll contribute to the continued development of products already in progress. You'll work alongside the team to implement enhancements, resolve issues, and help ensure applications are stable, scalable, and ready for production. Our engineering team leverages AI-assisted development throughout the software lifecycle, so experience using tools such as Claude Code to improve development efficiency is important. What You'll Do: -Contribute to the ongoing development of applications built with Node.js, React, and Next.js. -Build, refine, and maintain features based on established requirements. -Support efforts to improve application quality and production readiness. -Investigate, debug, and resolve issues within existing applications. -Complete assigned development tasks independently while collaborating with the broader team. -Incorporate AI-assisted development tools, including Claude Code, into your daily workflow. -Produce clean, organized, and maintainable code. -Participate in technical discussions and code review activities when required. Required Qualifications: -3+ years of experience in Full-Stack Software Development. -3+ years of experience developing applications with JavaScript/TypeScript. -3+ years of experience building back-end applications using Node.js. -3+ years of experience developing front-end applications using React and Next.js. -Experience working within established production codebases using version control platforms such as Git, GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket. -Experience troubleshooting, debugging, and maintaining production applications using tools such as Browser DevTools and the Node.js Debugger. -Experience using AI-assisted development tools such as Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, or ChatGPT. -Strong English communication skills with the ability to clearly communicate technical decisions. Preferred Qualifications: -Experience enhancing and maintaining existing production applications rather than working exclusively on greenfield projects. -Ability to consistently write clean, maintainable, and well-structured code. -Experience participating in code reviews and technical discussions. -Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. -Ability to work independently with minimal supervision. ???? Work Schedule" 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM (Philippine Time) ???? Engagement: Part-time engagement (minimum of 20 hours per week) with the opportunity to transition into a full-time position based on business needs and performance.

AI Agent Developer

About the Role We're looking for a developer who lives at the intersection of AI and automation. You'll design and build fully autonomous creative pipelines that take a single prompt and produce complete, polished advertisements — visuals, video, copy, and...

Full job description

About the Role We're looking for a developer who lives at the intersection of AI and automation. You'll design and build fully autonomous creative pipelines that take a single prompt and produce complete, polished advertisements — visuals, video, copy, and editing — with no manual intervention and other sorts of Ai agents that helps our beauty brand Faccelove function more efficiently. You'll work with Claude Code as the orchestration backbone, integrating third-party generative AI services (NanoBanana for image generation, Higgsfield for AI video, and others) into seamless, production-grade workflows. The end goal: a system where a human provides a brief and gets back a finished creative asset. What You'll Build - Autonomous AI agent pipelines using Claude Code that chain together multiple generative AI services end-to-end - API integrations with image generation (NanoBanana), video generation (Higgsfield), and editing/post-production tools - Prompt engineering systems that translate high-level creative briefs into structured, multi-step agent workflows - Quality control and feedback loops — automated checks that evaluate outputs and retry/refine when needed - Robust error handling, state management, and logging for complex multi-API orchestration Requirements (Must-Have) - Hands-on experience building AI agents or agentic workflows (Claude Code, LangChain, CrewAI, or similar frameworks) - Strong proficiency in Python and/or TypeScript — you write clean, production-grade code, not just scripts - Experience with LLM APIs: function calling / tool use, structured outputs, prompt chaining, and multi-turn orchestration - Proven ability to integrate and orchestrate multiple third-party APIs in a single automated pipeline - Solid understanding of async programming, error handling, retry logic, and building resilient systems Nice-to-Have - Familiarity with generative media APIs — image generation, video generation, or AI-driven editing tools - Experience with creative production workflows (advertising, content creation, or media post-production) - Background in MCP (Model Context Protocol), tool servers, or building custom tool integrations for LLMs Tech Stack - Claude Code, Anthropic API, Python, TypeScript, NanoBanana, Higgsfield, MCP, REST APIs, Webhooks, Git What Sets You Apart You don't just use AI tools — you build systems that make AI tools work together autonomously. You've shipped at least one project where an AI agent completes a multi-step task end-to-end without human intervention. You understand that the hardest part isn't the individual API calls — it's the orchestration, the edge cases, and making the whole pipeline reliable at scale. You're comfortable in ambiguity. This space is new and moving fast. You'll often be the first person to figure out how to make two services talk to each other in a way nobody has documented yet.

Full job description

We're a fast-growing U.S.-based online education company looking for a Technical Operations Specialist to join our Operations team. This is NOT a traditional virtual assistant role. We're looking for someone who enjoys solving problems, building systems, improving processes, and working with modern automation tools. You'll work directly with our Head of Operations on projects that improve how our business runs across Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, Finance, and Operations. If you enjoy building workflows, connecting software together, troubleshooting issues, documenting processes, and continuously improving systems, we'd love to meet you. Responsibilities • Build and improve workflows in HubSpot • Create and maintain automations using n8n, Zapier, or Make • Troubleshoot system issues and identify root causes • Connect business tools using APIs and webhooks • Improve operational processes through automation • Build dashboards and reports using Google Sheets • Document processes and create SOPs • Test new software and recommend improvements • Collaborate on AI-powered workflows and internal tools Requirements • Strong English communication • Experience with HubSpot (required) • Experience with automation platforms (n8n, Zapier, or Make) • Comfortable learning new software quickly • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills • Highly organized and detail-oriented • Able to work independently and own projects Bonus Skills • JavaScript • APIs & Webhooks • SQL • Google Apps Script • Stripe • Calendly • Slack • AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor)

Full job description

AI-Powered SEO Specialist Full-Time - Makarios Marketing] | [Remote] About the Role We're not looking for a traditional SEO hire. We're looking for a rare hybrid: someone who lives and breathes local SEO and thinks like an AI engineer. You'll be responsible for delivering measurable search results for our clients while simultaneously building the tools, agents, and automations that put us years ahead of the competition. If you've ever thought "I could automate this with an agent" while doing SEO work — this role was written for you. Read this entire post before applying. We mean it. Most SEO job posts get flooded with copy-paste applications from people who skimmed the title. This isn't that kind of job, and we're not that kind of company. If you're looking for a basic SEO role where you build a few links and write some meta descriptions, please move on. This role will frustrate you. If you're someone who loses sleep thinking about why a map pack result is where it is, and you've ever opened n8n or Claude Code just because you were curious — keep reading. Who We Are We're a results-driven SEO company that doesn't just execute strategies — we build the tools and systems that make those strategies unstoppable. We work in local SEO and we take it seriously. We're growing and we need someone who can grow with us, contribute ideas from day one, and help us deliver things to clients that no one else in the market is offering. What This Role Actually Is You will own local SEO strategy and execution across client accounts and you will build AI-powered tools and automations that make our work faster, smarter, and more valuable. These two responsibilities are equally important. You can't do one without the other here. This is not a junior role. This is not a "we'll train you on AI" role. You need to come in already capable. Your Day-to-Day Responsibilities Build and execute deep local SEO strategies — Google Business Profile, map pack optimization, local citations, geo-targeted content, and local link building Identify automation opportunities in our SEO workflows and build agents using Claude Code and n8n to handle them Create custom client-facing tools and reporting dashboards that go beyond anything a standard SEO platform offers Manage technical SEO audits, on-page optimization, and content strategy across multiple client sites Design and run link building campaigns that prioritize local authority and genuine relevance Monitor algorithm changes and translate them into concrete strategy shifts before clients even notice an impact Bring new ideas to the table — if you see a smarter way to do something, we want to hear it You Are Exactly Who We Need If: You have deep, real-world local SEO experience — you know how the local algorithm works, you've ranked businesses in competitive markets, and you can explain why something works, not just that it does You've built workflows or automations in n8n — not watched a tutorial, actually built something You've used Claude Code to build or deploy AI agents in a real context You've worked with OpenClaw or similar AI platforms to extend what's possible You can write enough code (Python, JavaScript, or similar) to build tools that actually work You've managed SEO across multiple client accounts simultaneously You think in systems — you see every repetitive task as a future automation You communicate clearly in written English with clients and teammates You Are Not Who We Need If: Your experience is mostly on-page basics and you've never touched automation You've "heard of" n8n or Claude Code but never opened them You apply to every job posting with the same template message You need hand-holding to figure out what to prioritize You're looking for a role you can coast in We will not respond to generic applications. If your opening message doesn't show us you read this post, it goes straight to the archive. Include code SEO 26 somewhere in your application — this tells us you read everything and follow instructions, two things that are non-negotiable in this role What We Offer Full-time, long-term position — we're not looking for a short contract, we're looking for someone to grow with us Competitive monthly salary based on your experience and skills Full access to the tools you need — AI platforms, SEO software, automation tools Real creative freedom — if you have an idea for a tool or system, you can build it A team that actually values what you bring and won't micromanage how you do it Bonuses for performance as well as paid trainings and courses you need or want How to Apply Send your application and include all of the following or it will not be considered: A specific example of a local SEO win you're proud of — what was the situation, what did you do, what happened One automation or AI tool you've built — describe what it does and what you used to build it Share documents, agents, work you've done that is relevant Applications without all three of the above will not receive a response. No exceptions. This role is for the person who sees a gap in what's possible and immediately starts thinking about how to close it. If that's you, we'd love to hear from you. Monthly - $800-1200 USD for 40 hours a week (negotiable on experience) Must be willing to work 9am - 5pm EST

Full job description

We are looking for a mid-level to senior full-stack software engineer to join our team for a 60-day project.or longer This role is for someone who can work independently, build assigned features, understand front-end and back-end development, and use AI tools to move faster while still producing clean, reliable work. Project Overview We are building and improving systems related to: * CRM workflows * Webhooks * APIs * Automations * User-facing pages * Database connections * System integrations * Front-end and back-end feature development You will be working with a team that uses AI tools to help build robust systems, document work, test ideas, troubleshoot issues, and speed up development. Tools We Use Experience with these tools is preferred: * Lovable * Base44 * Supabase * Render * Claude * Perplexity * Notion AI * Other AI coding, automation, database, or research tools You do not need to be an expert in every tool, but you should be comfortable using AI and modern development tools as part of your development workflow. Skill Level We Are Looking For We are open to either of the following: Mid-Level Developer / Software Engineer This person can: * Build assigned features from scratch * Work with minimal supervision * Connect front-end pages to back-end services * Work with authentication, databases, and APIs * Participate in code reviews * Ask good questions when requirements are unclear * Follow project instructions and document progress Example: Building a user registration page and connecting it to authentication and a database. Senior Developer / Senior Software Engineer This person can: * Design system architecture * Solve more complex technical problems * Mentor or guide other developers when needed * Think through scalability, security, and performance * Help structure systems so they are reliable long term * Review code and recommend better technical approaches Example: Designing a data flow or integration system that works smoothly across the front-end, back-end, CRM, database, webhooks, APIs, and automation tools. Main Responsibilities You will help with: * Building CRM-related features * Creating and connecting API integrations * Setting up and troubleshooting webhooks * Building automation workflows * Creating front-end pages and connecting them to back-end logic * Working with databases and authentication systems * Deploying and managing applications using tools like Render * Using Supabase for database, authentication, and backend workflows when needed * Using Notion AI or similar tools for documentation, planning, and project organization * Testing features before delivery * Documenting what was built * Communicating progress clearly with the team Requirements Please apply only if you have: * Full-stack development experience * Experience with APIs and webhooks * Experience working with databases * Understanding of front-end and back-end development * Ability to build features independently * Good problem-solving skills * Ability to use AI tools productively * Clear written communication * Reliable internet connection * Availability for a 60-day project Position Details * Project length: 60 days * Pay: $150 per week * Role type: Project-based position * Work type: Remote * Schedule: To be discussed How to Apply Please answer the following questions: 1. Are you applying as a mid-level developer or senior developer? 2. What full-stack technologies do you use most? 3. Describe your experience with APIs and webhooks. 4. Have you worked on CRM systems or automation tools before? 5. Which tools have you used for development? Lovable, Base44, Supabase, Render, Claude, Perplexity, Notion AI, or others? 6. Share 1–3 examples of projects you have built. 7. Are you available for a 60-day project at $150/week? Please put the word FULLSTACK at the top of your application so we know you read the full post.

Right-Hand VA (AI & Tech Focus) — Clean Christian Music App

  • AI/build signals: claude, chatgpt, ai tools

Arca angle
  • Full-time role: good fit for a dedicated Arca graduate placement.
  • Comp appears close enough to the Arca $4-$6/hr budget band to pursue.
Full job description

We're looking for a sharp, tech-curious right hand who loves using AI to make things run faster and smarter. The heart of this role is using AI to build — simple automations, internal tools, and reports that save our small team hours every week. If you get a little thrill from figuring out a new tool, automating something tedious, and making a process better than you found it, you'll fit right in. It's a mixed role, and we want to be upfront about that. The AI, automation, and efficiency side is the core of what we're hiring for — but you'll also help with customer service for our clean Christian music app, a bit of marketing, and general admin, and you need to be genuinely open to pitching in wherever the team needs you. We use tools like Claude (and Claude Code) every day. You don't need to have done this before — but you do need to be excited to learn it. If you anticipate what's needed before being asked, take real ownership, communicate like a pro, and love learning something new — keep reading. We're hiring the person, not the résumé. Technical curiosity and drive matter most; the rest we can teach — including how we build with AI. What you'll do Build, automate, and make us more efficient with AI — use Claude / ChatGPT (and grow into Claude Code) to automate repetitive work, build simple internal tools, draft content, and find smarter, faster ways for the team to operate. This is the core of the role. We'll teach you; you bring the curiosity. Turn data into insight — pull together clear daily reports and spot patterns (with AI's help). Bring us insights, not just numbers. Be my right hand — anticipate needs, follow through without reminders, flag issues early, and close loops. Support our clean Christian music app — customer service, content, and launch-related help. Pitch in on the rest — influencer outreach, light e-commerce / Etsy support, and general admin as we grow. A real love of music is a big plus — you'll be working in it every day. Who you are (this matters most to us) Technically curious — this is the big one. You enjoy poking at new tools, you're energized (not intimidated) by AI, and when you see a repetitive task your first instinct is "can I automate this?" Any interest in coding, automation, scripting, or tinkering is a real plus. Great — not necessarily experienced. Eager, smart, proactive, and resourceful. We'd take a brilliant fast-learner over a seasoned coaster every single time. A self-starter who takes initiative instead of waiting to be told, and teaches themselves what they don't know. Open and flexible — happy to jump from an automation project to a customer-service question to a quick admin task without missing a beat. You're here for the technical work, but you don't consider anything "below" you. A clear communicator — responsive, easy to work with, and good at keeping us in the loop. Reliable and professional — you do what you say you'll do, and you have a stable internet connection good enough to hold a video call and screen-share without dropping. Honest and accountable — you log the time you actually work and speak up early when something's off. This one is non-negotiable. Detail-oriented. To show us you read carefully, please mention your favorite color in your application where it asks how you heard about us. Mission-aligned — you genuinely connect with what we're building: clean, faith-friendly music for families. Helpful (but NOT required — we'll train you) AI & automation — bonus points for hands-on Claude / Claude Code experience, automation work (n8n, Make, Zapier), or any interest in coding or scripting. Using ChatGPT, Claude, or other AI tools in your daily workflow. Data analysis (with AI's help) to generate reports and spot trends. Pinterest / social media scheduling tools. Customer service experience. WordPress publishing and AI image generation (e.g., Ideogram, gpt-image). Influencer outreach and management. The details: Full-time, 40 hrs/week, long-term. We start at $400–500/month and there's room to grow — in both pay and responsibility — as you take on more and grow into the AI/automation side. Based in the Philippines, with some flexibility to occasionally overlap U.S. Mountain Time for a quick call or chat. We use the time tracker Trackabi for active work hours. Benefits Flexible hours — days, nights, spread out, or catch up on weekends. PTO after 6 months full-time. Paid training time to learn new skills on the clock. A genuinely great team and culture. I treat my team like friends, not just freelancers — many have been with me for years, with no plans of leaving. How to apply Apply through the Google Form here: forms.gle/6P8ZySUcbKz67U5U6— that's the only way to apply, so please don't DM or email instead. Two quick things in the form: When it asks about your experience with AI tools, tell us about a time you taught yourself a new tool, or automated or figured out something you'd never done before — what you did and how it turned out. There's no "right" answer; we just want to see how you think and learn. We're hiring one person and reviewing applications as they come in. Top candidates get a paid test project — your real chance to show us how you work. If the AI and automation side sounds more like a chore than a challenge you'd enjoy, this probably isn't the right fit — and that's completely okay. But if everything above sounds like you, we'd genuinely love to meet you.

Full job description

AI & Automation Specialist (Full-Time Remote) Salary $600-$1,000 USD per month (depending on experience) Location Remote (Philippines Preferred) About Us We are a fast-growing eCommerce business operating across Amazon, TikTok Shop, wholesale, private label, and international marketplaces. We're looking for a full-time AI & Automation Specialist whose primary responsibility is simple: Make the business more efficient every single week. You will work directly with the founder, identify repetitive tasks, build automations, improve workflows, and leverage AI tools to save time across the company. Your Mission Your goal is to help the founder and team achieve more in less time. You should constantly be asking: What can be automated? What can be delegated to AI? What tasks are wasting time? How can we improve existing workflows? What processes can be simplified? You will be expected to actively suggest improvements rather than simply waiting for instructions. Responsibilities AI & Automation Build workflows using AI tools Create automations using platforms such as Make, N8N, Zapier and similar tools Connect software using APIs where possible Research and test new AI tools AI Assistants Create custom GPTs and AI assistants Improve prompts and workflows Build internal knowledge bases Create AI systems for customer service, operations, and administration Business Operations Review existing processes Document SOPs Identify inefficiencies Suggest improvements Help implement new systems Research & Development Stay updated on the latest AI developments Test new tools and software Present ideas that could save time or money Required Skills Essential Strong experience using Claude Strong experience using ChatGPT Experience with AI prompting Excellent English communication Strong analytical skills Ability to learn quickly Attention to detail Preferred Make.com N8N Zapier Airtable Notion Google Workspace Python API integrations E-commerce experience What We're Looking For We want someone who: ? Loves AI ? Is constantly learning new tools ? Thinks independently ? Enjoys solving problems ? Looks for ways to improve processes ? Can communicate ideas clearly ? Is excited about building systems KPIs Success in this role will be measured by: Number of automations implemented Hours saved per month Process improvements delivered Quality of ideas suggested Speed of implementation Overall impact on business efficiency To Apply Please send: CV/Resume A short Loom video (3-5 minutes) Examples of AI workflows or automations you have built List of AI tools you use regularly Your internet speed Your expected salary Bonus Question If you joined our company tomorrow, what are the first 3 areas of a growing eCommerce business you would try to automate and why?

Full job description

We're looking for a sharp, creative, trend-obsessed marketer who lives on social media and loves using AI to make great content faster and smarter. The heart of this role is organic social — finding what's working right now, testing new content types before everyone else does, and turning scrolls into follows, clicks, and customers. You'll have real ownership over what we post, how it performs, and where we grow next. If you get a little thrill from spotting a trend early, trying a format nobody's done yet, watching the analytics climb, and making a piece of content better than you found it — you'll fit right in. You don't need to have done all of this before, but you do need to be excited to learn. We use AI every day, and you'll use it to move faster: drafting, repurposing, researching, and creating gorgeous visuals. It's a mixed role, and we want to be upfront about that. Organic social and marketing are the core of what we're hiring for — but you'll also help with customer service for our clean Christian music app, a bit of general admin, and whatever else a small, growing team needs. You need to be genuinely open to pitching in wherever we need you. We use tools like Claude (and Claude Code) every day, and we'll teach you how we work. If you anticipate what's needed before being asked, take real ownership, communicate like a pro, and love learning something new — keep reading. We're hiring the person, not the résumé. Creativity, instincts, and drive matter most; the rest we can teach — including the AI tools we build with. What you'll do Own our organic social (the core). Plan, create, and post across our platforms; catch trends early and act on them fast; test new content types and formats; build engaged audiences and keep them growing. This is the heart of the role. Make scroll-stopping content — with an eye for design. Create visuals that look premium and on-brand, using AI image tools (Midjourney, Ideogram, gpt-image, and friends) to produce gorgeous images quickly. Good taste matters here. Grow beyond organic. Pitch in on email marketing, funnels, paid ads, and influencer marketing as we scale. You don't need to be an expert in all of it — but you should be eager to learn it and run with it. Turn data into insight. Monitor analytics across platforms, spot what's working (and what's not), and bring us clear takeaways — not just numbers. Then double down on the winners. Use AI to work faster and smarter. Lean on Claude / ChatGPT (and grow into Claude Code) to draft content, repurpose it across platforms, research, and automate the tedious parts of content ops. We'll teach you; you bring the curiosity. Be my right hand. Anticipate needs, follow through without reminders, flag issues early, and close loops. Support our clean Christian music app — content, community, customer service, and launch-related help. Pitch in on the rest — light e-commerce / Etsy support and general admin as we grow. A real love of music is a big plus — you'll be working in it every day. Who you are (this matters most to us) Creative and trend-obsessed — this is the big one. You live on social, you catch trends before they peak, and you have strong instincts for what makes people stop, save, and share. An eye for design. You know what looks good, and you can create (or AI-assist) visuals that feel premium and on-brand. Very proactive — a true self-starter. You take initiative instead of waiting to be told, teach yourself what you don't know, and your first instinct on a repetitive task is "can I make this faster?" Tech-curious and AI-friendly. You're energized (not intimidated) by AI tools, and you're excited to use them every day to create and move faster. Any interest in automation or tinkering is a real plus. Comfortable with numbers. You actually look at the analytics and let them guide your next test. Great — not necessarily experienced. Eager, smart, proactive, and resourceful. We'd take a brilliant fast-learner over a seasoned coaster every single time. Open and flexible. Happy to jump from a content project to a customer-service question to a quick admin task without missing a beat. You're here for the creative and marketing work, but you don't consider anything "below" you. A clear communicator — responsive, easy to work with, and good at keeping us in the loop. Reliable and professional — you do what you say you'll do, and you have a stable internet connection good enough to hold a video call and screen-share without dropping. Honest and accountable — you log the time you actually work and speak up early when something's off. This one is non-negotiable. Detail-oriented. To show us you read carefully, please mention your favorite color in your application where it asks how you heard about us. Mission-aligned — you genuinely connect with what we're building: clean, faith-friendly music for families. Helpful (but NOT required — we'll train you) Hands-on organic social experience (TikTok, Instagram / Reels, Pinterest, YouTube Shorts, Facebook). Any experience with email marketing, funnels, paid ads (Meta, etc.), or influencer marketing. AI image generation (Midjourney, Ideogram, gpt-image) and design tools (Canva, Figma, etc.). Using ChatGPT, Claude, or other AI tools in your daily workflow — bonus points for Claude / Claude Code or automation (n8n, Make, Zapier). Reading analytics to spot trends and report results. Pinterest / social media scheduling tools. Customer service experience. WordPress publishing. Influencer outreach and management. The details Full-time, 40 hrs/week, long-term. We start at $400–500/month and there's room to grow — in both pay and responsibility — as you take on more and grow into the wider marketing and AI side. Based in the Philippines, with some flexibility to occasionally overlap U.S. Mountain Time for a quick call or chat. We use the time tracker Trackabi for active work hours. Benefits Flexible hours — days, nights, spread out, or catch up on weekends. PTO after 6 months full-time. Paid training time to learn new skills on the clock. A genuinely great team and culture. I treat my team like friends, not just freelancers — many have been with me for years, with no plans of leaving. How to apply Apply through the Google Form here: forms.gle/FYMdZ3h6LzWd1H5GA — that's the only way to apply, so please don't DM or email instead. Two quick things in the form: When it asks about your experience with AI tools, tell us about a time you taught yourself something new — a tool, a content format, or a campaign — what you did and how it turned out. There's no "right" answer; we just want to see how you think and learn. We're hiring one person and reviewing applications as they come in. Top candidates get a paid test project — your real chance to show us how you work. If creating content, chasing trends, and using AI to do it all faster sounds more like a chore than something you'd genuinely enjoy, this probably isn't the right fit — and that's completely okay. But if everything above sounds like you, we'd genuinely love to meet you.
