Full job description

We're looking for a sharp, creative, trend-obsessed marketer who lives on social media and loves using AI to make great content faster and smarter. The heart of this role is organic social — finding what's working right now, testing new content types before everyone else does, and turning scrolls into follows, clicks, and customers. You'll have real ownership over what we post, how it performs, and where we grow next. If you get a little thrill from spotting a trend early, trying a format nobody's done yet, watching the analytics climb, and making a piece of content better than you found it — you'll fit right in. You don't need to have done all of this before, but you do need to be excited to learn. We use AI every day, and you'll use it to move faster: drafting, repurposing, researching, and creating gorgeous visuals. It's a mixed role, and we want to be upfront about that. Organic social and marketing are the core of what we're hiring for — but you'll also help with customer service for our clean Christian music app, a bit of general admin, and whatever else a small, growing team needs. You need to be genuinely open to pitching in wherever we need you. We use tools like Claude (and Claude Code) every day, and we'll teach you how we work. If you anticipate what's needed before being asked, take real ownership, communicate like a pro, and love learning something new — keep reading. We're hiring the person, not the résumé. Creativity, instincts, and drive matter most; the rest we can teach — including the AI tools we build with. What you'll do Own our organic social (the core). Plan, create, and post across our platforms; catch trends early and act on them fast; test new content types and formats; build engaged audiences and keep them growing. This is the heart of the role. Make scroll-stopping content — with an eye for design. Create visuals that look premium and on-brand, using AI image tools (Midjourney, Ideogram, gpt-image, and friends) to produce gorgeous images quickly. Good taste matters here. Grow beyond organic. Pitch in on email marketing, funnels, paid ads, and influencer marketing as we scale. You don't need to be an expert in all of it — but you should be eager to learn it and run with it. Turn data into insight. Monitor analytics across platforms, spot what's working (and what's not), and bring us clear takeaways — not just numbers. Then double down on the winners. Use AI to work faster and smarter. Lean on Claude / ChatGPT (and grow into Claude Code) to draft content, repurpose it across platforms, research, and automate the tedious parts of content ops. We'll teach you; you bring the curiosity. Be my right hand. Anticipate needs, follow through without reminders, flag issues early, and close loops. Support our clean Christian music app — content, community, customer service, and launch-related help. Pitch in on the rest — light e-commerce / Etsy support and general admin as we grow. A real love of music is a big plus — you'll be working in it every day. Who you are (this matters most to us) Creative and trend-obsessed — this is the big one. You live on social, you catch trends before they peak, and you have strong instincts for what makes people stop, save, and share. An eye for design. You know what looks good, and you can create (or AI-assist) visuals that feel premium and on-brand. Very proactive — a true self-starter. You take initiative instead of waiting to be told, teach yourself what you don't know, and your first instinct on a repetitive task is "can I make this faster?" Tech-curious and AI-friendly. You're energized (not intimidated) by AI tools, and you're excited to use them every day to create and move faster. Any interest in automation or tinkering is a real plus. Comfortable with numbers. You actually look at the analytics and let them guide your next test. Great — not necessarily experienced. Eager, smart, proactive, and resourceful. We'd take a brilliant fast-learner over a seasoned coaster every single time. Open and flexible. Happy to jump from a content project to a customer-service question to a quick admin task without missing a beat. You're here for the creative and marketing work, but you don't consider anything "below" you. A clear communicator — responsive, easy to work with, and good at keeping us in the loop. Reliable and professional — you do what you say you'll do, and you have a stable internet connection good enough to hold a video call and screen-share without dropping. Honest and accountable — you log the time you actually work and speak up early when something's off. This one is non-negotiable. Detail-oriented. To show us you read carefully, please mention your favorite color in your application where it asks how you heard about us. Mission-aligned — you genuinely connect with what we're building: clean, faith-friendly music for families. Helpful (but NOT required — we'll train you) Hands-on organic social experience (TikTok, Instagram / Reels, Pinterest, YouTube Shorts, Facebook). Any experience with email marketing, funnels, paid ads (Meta, etc.), or influencer marketing. AI image generation (Midjourney, Ideogram, gpt-image) and design tools (Canva, Figma, etc.). Using ChatGPT, Claude, or other AI tools in your daily workflow — bonus points for Claude / Claude Code or automation (n8n, Make, Zapier). Reading analytics to spot trends and report results. Pinterest / social media scheduling tools. Customer service experience. WordPress publishing. Influencer outreach and management. The details Full-time, 40 hrs/week, long-term. We start at $400–500/month and there's room to grow — in both pay and responsibility — as you take on more and grow into the wider marketing and AI side. Based in the Philippines, with some flexibility to occasionally overlap U.S. Mountain Time for a quick call or chat. We use the time tracker Trackabi for active work hours. Benefits Flexible hours — days, nights, spread out, or catch up on weekends. PTO after 6 months full-time. Paid training time to learn new skills on the clock. A genuinely great team and culture. I treat my team like friends, not just freelancers — many have been with me for years, with no plans of leaving. How to apply Apply through the Google Form here: forms.gle/FYMdZ3h6LzWd1H5GA — that's the only way to apply, so please don't DM or email instead. Two quick things in the form: When it asks about your experience with AI tools, tell us about a time you taught yourself something new — a tool, a content format, or a campaign — what you did and how it turned out. There's no "right" answer; we just want to see how you think and learn. We're hiring one person and reviewing applications as they come in. Top candidates get a paid test project — your real chance to show us how you work. If creating content, chasing trends, and using AI to do it all faster sounds more like a chore than something you'd genuinely enjoy, this probably isn't the right fit — and that's completely okay. But if everything above sounds like you, we'd genuinely love to meet you.

Full job description

About the Role We are looking for an AI Automation & Workflow Development Specialist to design, build, and maintain the systems that power our internal operations. This is a hands-on technical role for someone who can architect real solutions — not simply operate AI tools. The ideal contractor has a genuine software engineering background and can independently build, integrate, and scale automated workflows across our platforms. Key Responsibilities -Design, develop, and maintain automation systems and integrations across the company's operational platforms -Build and optimize workflows connecting tools such as CRMs, scheduling systems, payroll platforms, and communication channels -Apply AI/LLM capabilities (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) within engineered systems — not as standalone tools, but as components of larger automated solutions -Identify manual or repetitive processes across departments and convert them into scalable, automated systems -Develop and maintain internal tools, scripts, and integrations using appropriate programming languages and frameworks -Document system architecture, workflows, and processes for maintainability and team visibility -Troubleshoot, monitor, and continuously improve existing automations and systems -Collaborate with leadership and operations teams to translate business needs into technical solutions AI Agent Development -Design and deploy AI agents, assistants, and workflow automations that support internal teams and client communications -Build retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems, knowledge bases, and AI-powered document processing workflows -Develop prompt engineering frameworks and testing methodologies to improve AI reliability and performance Security & Compliance -Implement security best practices for automation workflows and data handling -Ensure systems comply with applicable privacy and data protection standards -Manage access controls, permissions, and audit processes for automated systems Qualifications -Applicants should have a solid software engineering background. Experience using AI tools alone, without programming and systems development experience, is not sufficient for this role. -Demonstrated experience building systems, integrations, or automated workflows from the ground up -Strong proficiency in at least one modern programming language (e.g., Python, JavaScript/Node.js, or similar) -Experience with API integrations, automation platforms, and/or workflow orchestration tools -Working knowledge of applying AI/LLM tools within engineered systems and process design -Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently with minimal oversight -Clear written and verbal English communication skills -Experience in a remote, US-client-facing environment is a plus For interested candidates please submit the following: Resume Cover Letter Portfolio Introduction Video DISC personality test result (screenshot only) – www.123test.com/disc-personality-test/

Full job description

This is actually a different role than a normal Shopify VA. You're looking for someone who can build **AI-powered customer support operations**, not just answer emails. Here's a job post that will attract the right people. --- # Job Title **AI Customer Support Systems Specialist (Shopify & AI Automation)** --- # Job Description We are looking for an experienced AI systems specialist to build and optimize our customer support operations for a growing Shopify ecommerce brand. This is not a typical customer support role. Your responsibility will be to design and implement systems that allow our support team to respond faster, maintain consistent quality, reduce manual work, and leverage AI effectively. Our current tools include: * Shopify * Gmail * Claude AI * Google Workspace * WhatsApp * Google Docs We already have customer support SOPs and AI knowledge bases. We now need someone who can turn these into a scalable customer support system. --- ## Responsibilities * Design AI workflows for customer support. * Improve and maintain our Claude AI knowledge base. * Implement AI tools that help support agents answer emails faster. * Build systems that automatically organize and prioritize customer emails. * Create workflows for shipping investigations, refunds, replacements, and order management. * Improve response speed while maintaining excellent customer experience. * Recommend and implement the best customer support software. * Integrate Shopify with AI and automation tools where appropriate. * Create dashboards to monitor: * First response time * Average resolution time * Email backlog * Customer satisfaction * Help us scale from a small support team into a highly efficient operation. --- ## Requirements * Strong experience with Shopify. * Experience implementing AI in customer support. * Experience with Claude AI, ChatGPT, or similar LLMs. * Experience with automation platforms such as Zapier, Make.com, or n8n. * Experience building customer support workflows. * Excellent English communication. * Ability to recommend and implement best practices instead of simply following instructions. --- ## Nice to Have * Gorgias * Help Scout * Zendesk * Re:amaze * Front * Shopify Flow * Google Apps Script * API integrations * CRM experience --- ## Our Goal We want to build one of the most efficient AI-powered ecommerce customer support systems. The successful candidate will help us create systems where: * AI drafts high-quality email responses. * Support agents work significantly faster. * Managers can monitor team performance. * Customers receive fast, consistent, and professional support. * Processes are documented and scalable. This is a long-term position for someone who enjoys building systems and continuously improving operations. --- # Screening Questions 1. Describe a customer support system you built for a Shopify store. 2. Which AI tools have you implemented for ecommerce support? 3. Which automation tools have you used? (Zapier, Make, n8n, Shopify Flow, etc.) 4. How would you reduce average response time from 12 hours to under 1 hour? 5. What customer support software would you recommend for a Shopify store and why? 6. Have you integrated Shopify with AI tools before? Please explain. 7. Describe one automation that saved your previous company significant time. 8. If you joined LXGACY tomorrow, what would be the first three improvements you would make?

Full job description

Hello there! We are a growing Email Marketing Agency with 60+ active e-commerce clients looking for an enthusiastic and skilled AI Specialist. This is a part-time role where you will be working alongside our current team of 50+. PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE A DEEP UNDERSTANDING OF AI AUTOMATION TOOLS — SPECIFICALLY CLAUDE, CLAUDE CODE, AND MANUS — AND KNOW HOW TO APPLY THEM INSIDE A REAL BUSINESS ENVIRONMENT We are looking for a sharp, systems-minded AI Specialist who can identify repetitive processes inside our agency and build automations that eliminate manual work at scale. Your main job is to design, build, and maintain AI-powered workflows that make our team faster, leaner, and more consistent across client delivery, reporting, and internal operations. You do not need to be an email marketer, but you must understand how email marketing agencies operate well enough to spot automation opportunities and build solutions that actually fit the workflow. This is not a prompt-writing role. We need someone who can go deep — writing Claude Code scripts, building Manus agents, connecting tools via APIs, and shipping automations that run reliably without hand-holding. The problems you will be solving are real and ongoing: campaign ideation at scale, client reporting, copy production pipelines, Slack notifications, onboarding sequences, and more. If you can see a process and immediately think about how to automate it, this role is for you. Requirements: - Deep, hands-on experience with Claude and Claude Code (this is the most important requirement) - Experience with Manus or similar AI agent/automation platforms - Comfortable working with APIs, webhooks, and connecting tools programmatically - Understanding of how email marketing agencies or DTC e-commerce teams operate - Able to identify bottlenecks in a workflow and architect an automation solution independently - Experience with tools like n8n, Zapier, Make, or similar automation platforms is a strong plus - Proficient in English - Proficient with Slack for team communication - Able to work weekdays and weekends Bonus Points: - Experience working inside or alongside an email marketing agency - Familiarity with Klaviyo, Customer.io, or Iterable workflows - Experience building AI pipelines for content or copy production - Experience with Slack bot development or Slack workflow automation Your tasks as an AI Specialist will include: 1. Audit existing agency workflows and identify high-leverage automation opportunities 2. Build and deploy Claude Code scripts, Manus agents, and other AI-powered tools that reduce manual work for the team 3. Connect our existing tools (Slack, Google Drive, Klaviyo, etc.) via APIs and automation platforms to create seamless internal pipelines 4. Maintain and improve automations over time as our processes evolve 5. Document every automation clearly so the team can understand, use, and troubleshoot it without your help 6. Communicate progress, blockers, and new opportunities with the team in Slack 7. Complete assigned builds and updates on agreed timelines We ask that you answer the questions below to help us get to know you. Questions: 1. Have you built AI-powered automations or agents for a business before? If yes, for how long, and can you share 1 to 2 examples of what you built, what it replaced, and what the outcome was? 2. How comfortable are you with Claude Code specifically? Walk us through a real script or agent you have built with it and what it was designed to do. 3. Have you used Manus or a similar AI agent platform? If yes, describe a workflow or automation you built inside it and how it performed in production. 4. If we showed you a manual agency process — for example, a team member spending 2 hours each week pulling client performance data and formatting it into a report — how would you approach automating it? Walk us through your thinking. 5. How do you make sure the automations you build are reliable enough for a real team to depend on daily, without you needing to babysit them? 6. What tools outside of Claude and Manus are you most comfortable building with, and how do they fit into an AI automation stack? We are looking to grow very quickly over the next few months and this position will allow for opportunities to move into incentive-based pay and a salary increase. After 3 months, there will be a salary increase. Biweekly Pay: $150 CAD Hours: Flexible, project and task-based — estimated 10 to 20 hours per week depending on active builds Currently, you must be able to work at least 10hrs/week with availability on weekends when needed *** HOW TO APPLY *** *You must include your favorite favorite color + AI tool in the subject line of your application for it to be considered (this shows you actually read it and is very important; if you do not have it in there, your application will be skipped). 1.) Send us a message answering all 6 questions 2.) Include at least 1 real example of an automation or AI agent you have built (a brief description, Loom walkthrough, or documentation is all fine) 3.) Include any relevant links to tools, scripts, or projects that show your depth with Claude Code, Manus, or similar platforms We look forward to hearing from you!

Full job description

We are looking for a Mid-Level DevOps / Platform Engineer to join our team on a part-time basis. This position is ideal for someone who enjoys optimizing and supporting live production environments, ensuring operational stability, and improving deployment processes for existing products. Rather than designing infrastructure from the ground up, you will focus on enhancing current environments by strengthening automation, security, authentication, and deployment workflows. You'll collaborate closely with developers to maintain reliable systems and support smooth product releases. Key Responsibilities: -Maintain, optimize, and support existing production environments. -Assist with application deployments and release management activities. -Enhance authentication mechanisms and access control processes. -Implement and promote security-focused operational practices. -Develop and improve automation for day-to-day operational tasks. -Monitor system performance and contribute to improving production reliability. -Diagnose and resolve infrastructure, deployment, and operational issues. -Configure, maintain, and update application environments as needed. -Identify opportunities to improve operational processes and recommend best practices. -Partner with development teams to ensure efficient and reliable product deployments. Required Qualifications: -Minimum of 3 years of experience in DevOps or Platform Engineering. -Strong English communication skills with the ability to explain technical decisions effectively. -Experience supporting production applications using technologies such as AWS, Azure, Linux, and Git. -Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation using tools such as GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, Azure DevOps Pipelines, and Git. -Experience managing cloud infrastructure and Infrastructure as Code using technologies such as AWS, Azure, and Terraform. -Experience implementing and managing authentication and access control solutions. -Experience monitoring, troubleshooting, and maintaining production environments. -Experience scripting and automating operational tasks using Bash, Python, PowerShell, or similar tools. -Experience using AI-assisted development tools such as Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, or ChatGPT. Preferred Qualifications: -Experience enhancing and maintaining existing production environments instead of working solely on greenfield infrastructure projects. -Ability to work independently with minimal supervision. -Experience implementing security-focused operational practices using technologies such as AWS Security Services or Microsoft Defender for Cloud. -Experience configuring and maintaining containerized environments. -Experience working closely with developers to support application deployment and release activities. Work Schedule: 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM (Philippine Time) Engagement: Part-time engagement

Full job description

AI Automation Specialist for Fast-Growing E-Commerce Business We are looking for a smart, proactive AI Automation Specialist to help us improve systems, speed up workflows, and reduce repetitive manual tasks across our growing e-commerce, printing, corporate gifting, and apparel businesses. This role is ideal for someone who understands AI tools, automation, workflows, and business operations, and can help us move faster without overcomplicating things. About the Role You will help us build and improve automations for tasks such as: - Lead generation workflows - Customer follow-ups - Order/admin processes - Marketing support systems - Google Sheets automation - Email and WhatsApp workflow improvements - AI prompts and SOPs for repetitive tasks - Connecting tools and reducing manual work We need someone who can look at our current processes, spot inefficiencies, and suggest better ways to get things done. Responsibilities - Build simple, reliable automations using AI tools and automation platforms - Improve workflows between tools like Google Sheets, Gmail, WhatsApp, forms, and project trackers - Create AI prompts, templates, and SOPs for daily operations - Help streamline hiring, marketing, customer service, and admin tasks - Research and recommend tools that can save time or improve output - Test automations properly before handing them over - Document processes clearly so the team can use them - Proactively suggest improvements instead of waiting for instructions Tools / Skills We Are Looking For Experience with some of the following is preferred: - ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini - Make.com - Zapier - Google Forms - Gmail automations - Airtable / Notion / Trello / ClickUp - WhatsApp workflow tools - AI prompt writing - CRM or lead tracking systems - E-commerce workflows - Automation troubleshooting You do not need to know every tool, but you must be resourceful and able to figure things out quickly. Ideal Candidate You are a strong fit if you are: - Fast, practical, and solutions-focused - Good at understanding messy processes and making them simpler - Comfortable working independently - Strong with logic and problem-solving - Detail-oriented when testing workflows - Clear in communication - Able to explain technical things simply - Proactive with ideas and improvements - Interested in AI, automation, e-commerce, and business growth What We Need Help With First Initial projects may include: - Creating a candidate tracking and follow-up system - Automating lead collection and follow-up reminders - Building Google Sheets dashboards or trackers - Creating AI prompt templates for marketing and admin tasks - Streamlining order and inquiry workflows - Improving internal SOPs and daily task systems Work Setup - Remote role - Rate: To be discussed based on experience - Hours: To be discussed - Starting with project-based or part-time work, with potential to grow - Must be available for clear communication and updates How to Apply Please send the following: - A short introduction about yourself - Your experience with AI tools and automation - The automation tools you have used before - Examples of workflows or automations you have built - Your preferred hourly rate or project rate - Your availability - A short answer to this question: If a business is manually tracking leads in Google Sheets and manually following up with customers, what automation would you suggest first and why? Important Please use the subject line: AI Automation Specialist – [Your Name] Applications without examples or a clear answer to the question above may not be reviewed.

Full job description

We operate approximately 45 short-term rental properties and use Hostaway, Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com, and OpenPhone for guest communications. We are looking for an experienced automation specialist to build a communication monitoring system using Make.com, AI (Claude or ChatGPT), webhooks, APIs, and reporting tools. This is a project-based engagement, not a full-time position. Project Goals: Monitor guest communications in Hostaway and OpenPhone. Detect messages that have not been responded to within 3 minutes. Send real-time alerts when SLA requirements are missed. Detect critical guest issues such as: Lockouts Door code issues No heat/AC Water leaks Refund requests Safety concerns Create daily performance reports for virtual assistants. Generate AI-powered summaries of communication performance and missed opportunities. Required Skills: Make.com Zapier API integrations Webhooks Google Sheets Airtable (preferred) OpenAI or Claude API Dashboard creation Workflow automation Preferred Experience: Hostaway Airbnb Property management systems Short-term rental operations OpenPhone integrations Deliverables: Phase 1: Hostaway integration OpenPhone integration Real-time unanswered message alerts Phase 2: Daily AI-generated performance reports VA scorecards SLA monitoring dashboard Phase 3: Critical issue detection and escalation system To Apply: Please provide: Examples of similar automation projects. Experience with Make.com and AI integrations. Estimated project cost. Estimated completion timeline. Confirmation that you can work with Hostaway APIs and webhooks. Full job description

You must apply via the link to be considered for the role: app.testedrecruits.com/posting/16636 WHY YOU SHOULD APPLY: Coalition Technologies is devoted to delivering clients the highest quality work while providing our team a fun, thriving, and innovative environment. Along with the opportunity for tremendous career growth and rapid advancement, CT offers: The most competitive profit-sharing bonus plan in the industry, paying up to 50% of company profits to full-time employees each month! A highly competitive Paid Time Off plan, promoting quality work-life balance. Subsidized gym memberships to help team members feel their best. Medical, dental, vision, and life insurance packages for all US-based team members. International Health Insurance Reimbursement Program for all international team members, a benefit unique to Coalition. Device upgrade and learning reimbursement programs. Motivating career development plans with clearly defined goals and rewards. Additional job-specific incentives and bonuses. Plus, 100% of our team works remotely with the support of time tracking software. Our company culture specializes in supporting remote team members, and we’ve been doing so for more than a decade. CT welcomes your application, wherever in the world it's coming from! YOU SHOULD HAVE: Experience with modern JavaScript ES6+. Experience using any Frontend Frameworks/Libraries (e.g, React, Vue, AngularJS, etc). Strong communication and collaboration skills, able to clearly discuss ideas, technical concepts, and feedback. A proactive mindset and the ability to take initiative and ownership of your work. An expertise in HTML5, CSS3, and jQuery. A thorough understanding of cross-browser compatibility issues and debugging techniques using Chrome DevTools (Console, Network panels, etc). Experience with the use of AI tools (e.g GitHub Copilot, OpenAI, Cursor, etc) to assist with things like boilerplate code generation, troubleshooting, workflow acceleration, etc. Experience with media queries. A knowledge of CSS platforms such as Twitter’s Bootstrap. An ability to multi-task on multiple projects and tasks at the same time. Great attention to detail and a highly organized work style. A positive and upbeat attitude with the ability to learn quickly. Proficiency in PHP/MYSQL and AJAX (preferred). Experience with WordPress, BigCommerce, Magento, and Shopify (preferred). Excellent written and spoken English. The availability to work 40 hours per week from 9:00 am to 6:00 pm PST. The ability to adapt to a diverse and multicultural environment. The passion to build a startup. A reliable workstation with a fast computer, microphone, and speakers, reliable internet and power if working remotely. YOUR DUTIES AND TASKS: Transforming complex layout PSDs into pixel-perfect presentation-layer HTML5/CSS3 templates. Creating responsive website designs. Building websites with WordPress, extending and developing plugins and themes. Working with Photoshop, Illustrator, and Fireworks to create images optimized for the web. Working with version control systems such as GIT / SVN. Working under tight deadlines. Handling multiple projects at the same time. Producing high quality of work with a strong focus on detail. We are looking for talented and diligent candidates who excel in our skills tests, and will consider these candidates even if past experience or educational background criteria aren't met. You must apply via the link to be considered for the role: app.testedrecruits.com/posting/16636

Full job description

We’re looking for a strong full-stack developer with deep experience in Node.js + TypeScript to own the end-to-end delivery of complex applications. You will move beyond standard CLI builds to architect self-hosted applications and robust backend services that integrate seamlessly with the Wix ecosystem and other platforms to follow We are a forward-thinking team that embraces modern efficiency: you will be expected to leverage AI tools like Claude Code and Cursor to accelerate development speed, streamline refactoring, and maintain high-velocity output without sacrificing quality. The role would be developing custom apps for Wix App Market & Other Marketplaces as well like (Shopify / Webflow / Framer etc) Key Responsibilities *Architecture & Self-Hosted Apps -Build Self-Hosted Solutions: Design and deploy fully self-hosted applications (beyond standard Wix CLI apps), managing the necessary infrastructure (hosting, networking, security, and external databases). -Backend Development: Develop robust, scalable backend services in Node.js / TypeScript (REST endpoints, custom authentication, input validation, and structured logging). -Data Strategy: Design clean data models and persistence layers, managing integrations between Wix Data, external SQL/NoSQL databases (Supabase/Firebase/Postgres), and caching strategies. *Wix Ecosystem & Integrations -Wix App Development: Build and maintain Wix apps using the Wix CLI, creating seamless dashboard extensions, admin UIs, and backend services. -Deep Integrations: Utilize the Wix SDK and Platform APIs to interact with Wix Stores, Orders, Collections, and eCommerce domain objects. -Feature Implementation: Build complex logic such as: -Configurable settings panels and custom admin dashboards. -"Additional Fees" logic and complex product-based rules. -File upload and attachment flows. -Service plugins and validation flows (e.g., shipping address verification). Requirements (Must Have) -Self-Hosted Infrastructure: Experience setting up and maintaining self-hosted Node.js applications (deployment, server management, environmental configuration). -AI Adaptability: Enthusiasm for and experience with using AI tools (Claude Code, Cursor) to speed up coding tasks. -Languages: Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript -Infrastructure: Self-Hosted Node.js environments, REST APIs, External DBs (Supabase/Firebase/etc.) Frontend: React (Admin UI) Nice to Have -Proven Wix Experience: -Building Wix CLI projects. -Using Wix SDK and Platform APIs (Stores, eCommerce, OAuth). -Implementing Wix Service Plugins and SPIs. -Proven Marketplace Apps Development Experience: E.g. Salesforce / Monday / Shopify / Webflow / Wix / AWS / Snowflake -DevOps: Familiarity with Docker, CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions), and cloud hosting platforms (AWS, Vercel, Heroku, or similar). -Reliability: Experience with logging, monitoring, and error tracking tools. To Apply: forms.monday.com/forms/81c94e136c7588acfe280324fb42306c?r=use1

Full job description

# Urgent | Automation + Reporting Role | Google Local Services Ads + FieldRoutes We are looking for someone who can help automate marketing lead reports for a home services company using **Google Local Services Ads (LSA)** and **FieldRoutes**. The goal of this role is to help us reduce manual reporting and build a cleaner, more automated way to track lead performance, booked opportunities, missed opportunities, and overall marketing ROI. This role is ideal for someone who understands marketing data, APIs, automation tools, and reporting workflows. ## Primary Responsibilities * Help automate lead reporting for Google Local Services Ads. * Pull, organize, and compare lead data from Google LSA and FieldRoutes. * Track booked vs. unbooked leads. * Help identify missed opportunities and lead follow-up gaps. * Build or improve automated reports and dashboards. * Create workflows that reduce manual spreadsheet work. * Help connect data between platforms using third-party tools when needed. * Document how the reporting process works. ## Required Experience Experience with the following is strongly preferred: * Google Local Services Ads reporting * FieldRoutes * Google Sheets or Excel * Reporting dashboards * API connections or automation workflows * Zapier, Make, or similar automation tools * Lovable, Replit, Airtable, Looker Studio, or similar tools ## Ideal Candidate We are looking for someone who is technical, resourceful, and able to figure out the best way to automate reporting even if a direct integration does not already exist. You should be comfortable: * Working with messy marketing data * Comparing data across multiple platforms * Building reporting systems from scratch * Researching third-party tools or API options * Creating clear dashboards leadership can understand * Communicating what is possible, what is not, and what tools are needed This is not a general VA role or a creative marketing role. This is a technical reporting and automation project focused on lead tracking, data accuracy, and marketing performance. ## To Apply Please include: * Your experience with Google Local Services Ads. * Your experience with FieldRoutes or similar home service CRMs. * Examples of reports, dashboards, or automations you have built. * Which tools you would recommend for automating this type of report. * Your availability. * Your preferred hourly rate or project rate. Please begin your application with the word **AUTOMATION** so we know you read the full post.

Full job description

E-commerce Operations Manager (US Market) | Long-Term | Full-Time About us We are building multiple US direct-to-consumer health brands. Our business includes: * US e-commerce * Subscription products * Affiliate marketing * Customer support * Fulfillment * Payment processing * AI automation * Business operations We are looking for someone who wants much more than a Virtual Assistant role. We are looking for someone who wants to become our Operations Manager and eventually help run the business. This is a long-term position with opportunities to grow. --- # What you'll do You will become responsible for making sure projects move forward every day. Your responsibilities will include: ## Operations * Coordinate projects between different teams * Follow up with contractors * Track deadlines * Organize documentation * Maintain SOPs * Improve internal processes * Find bottlenecks and suggest solutions --- ## Communication Communicate professionally in English with: * US customers * Fulfillment companies * Manufacturers * Payment providers * Merchant account providers * Affiliate networks * Marketing agencies * Vendors * Software companies You should feel comfortable scheduling meetings and participating in calls when necessary. --- ## Customer Support Help with: * refunds * replacements * order issues * shipping questions * subscription questions --- ## Research Research and compare: * suppliers * fulfillment companies * payment processors * software * competitors * regulations * new business opportunities Create summaries with recommendations. --- ## Project Management Manage multiple ongoing projects. Track every task until completion. Make sure nothing gets forgotten. --- ## AI Use AI daily. Examples: * ChatGPT * Claude * Claude Code We expect you to use AI to become more productive. --- ## Recruiting Help recruit: * freelancers * designers * developers * customer support * agencies Conduct first interviews. --- ## Documentation Create: * SOPs * checklists * reports * meeting summaries --- ## KPI Tracking Track: * project progress * customer support metrics * fulfillment performance * deadlines * recurring tasks --- ## Administrative work Calendar management Meeting scheduling Email management Travel planning when necessary Data entry Spreadsheet management --- # What makes someone successful We are NOT looking for someone who waits for instructions. We are looking for someone who: ? takes ownership ? solves problems independently ? communicates clearly ? follows through ? is organized ? notices problems before they become emergencies ? enjoys improving systems ? can think strategically, not only execute tasks When you see a better way of doing something, we expect you to suggest it. --- # Required Skills Excellent English (written and spoken) Experience working with US clients Project management Google Workspace Microsoft Office Excellent communication Fast learner Strong organizational skills Ability to prioritize Shopify experience is a plus. Customer Support experience is a plus. E-commerce experience is a big plus. AI tools experience is a big plus. --- # Bonus Skills Notion Klaviyo Amazon Affiliate Marketing Payment Processing US e-commerce --- # Compensation Competitive salary based on experience. Performance bonuses. Long-term growth opportunities. Potential to become Operations Manager responsible for multiple teams. --- # To apply Please answer the following: 1. Tell us about the most complicated project you've managed. 2. Tell us about a time you solved a problem without waiting for instructions. 3. Record a 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself. 4. What AI tools do you use every week? 5. Include the word **Blue Ocean** in the first line of your application so we know you've read everything.

Full job description

**About Us** We are an AI & Blockchain company building the financial infrastructure for the AI age. We have customers in 19 countries, and our team is an international mix of remote talents with two core locations in Singapore and Dubai. We raised $2.8M in funding and are expanding our team, with new products across SaaS and retail. By joining now, you’ll have the unique opportunity to work directly with founders who have made multiple exits, and build the future of AI and finance. **About You** • Deeply obsessed with consumer product experiences. • Your favorite source of alpha is Reddit or X. • AI-native with modern growth, creative, and automation tools. • Strong copywriter with a bias toward action and fast execution. • Excited by the intersection of AI, Fintech, and Blockchain, but mature enough to hide complexity from users. • Obsessed with data, analytics, audiences, retargeting, and experimentation. • Has proven wins: campaigns, funnels, content, communities, apps, or growth loops. **Your Work** • Run growth experiments across acquisition, activation, retention, and referral. • Write sharp copy for ads, landing pages, onboarding, email, social, and product flows. • Use AI tools like Claude Code, Codex, ChatGPT, automation tools, and creative testing tools daily. • Analyze funnels, cohorts, audiences, retargeting pools, attribution, and behavioral data. • Turn complex crypto and AI ideas into simple consumer-facing value. • Work closely with the product team to improve user experience and grow beyond crypto-native audiences. **Application Process** To be considered for this role, please complete our screening questionnaire through the link below: ---------- Only applications with completed screening responses will be considered.

Full job description

We are looking for an experienced AI automation specialist to help us build a suite of practical AI agents and workflows for a fast-growing ecommerce business. This is initially a project-based role, with the potential for regular weekly work if the first phase goes well. The main goal is to create useful AI agents that help us make better decisions across stock management, forecasting, product performance, and marketing analysis. We are not looking for someone to simply connect tools together. We need someone who can understand ecommerce data, ask the right questions, and build workflows that produce clear, reliable outputs. What you’ll be working on You will help create AI agents and automation workflows for areas such as: * Stock management and reorder planning * Inventory forecasting based on sales trends, current stock, incoming stock, and lead times * Product performance analysis * Identifying bestsellers, slow movers, stock risks, and growth opportunities * Weekly performance summaries across products, categories, and marketing channels * Marketing analysis, including Meta ads, email performance, customer behaviour, and campaign results * Creating repeatable workflows that can turn exported data into useful recommendations * Building simple dashboards, reports, or structured outputs that are easy for a non-technical team to use * Documenting how each agent works so the business can keep using and improving them Example projects Examples of the types of agents we may want to build include: * A stock forecasting agent that reviews sales velocity, current inventory, incoming stock, supplier lead times, and recommends reorder quantities * A product performance agent that identifies which products are growing, declining, overstocked, or understocked * A weekly ecommerce analyst agent that reviews sales, conversion rate, average order value, top products, ad performance, and highlights key actions * A marketing performance agent that reviews campaign exports and explains what changed, why it may have changed, and what we should test next * A pre-order planning agent that helps us decide whether to continue selling out-of-stock products on pre-order * A launch analysis agent that reviews new product performance after launch and recommends whether to scale, iterate, or discontinue Skills we are looking for You should have experience with: * Building AI agents, automations, or workflows using tools such as ChatGPT, OpenAI, Claude, Make, Zapier, Relevance AI, n8n, Airtable, Google Sheets, or similar platforms * Working with ecommerce data, ideally from Shopify * Analysing CSV exports, spreadsheets, and performance reports * Forecasting, stock planning, or demand planning * Creating clear business recommendations from data * Connecting different tools and APIs where required * Writing clear prompts, agent instructions, and workflow logic * Documenting systems clearly so other people can use them Nice to have Experience with any of the following would be a bonus: * Shopify * Meta Ads * Klaviyo * Google Sheets / Excel advanced formulas * Looker Studio or dashboard tools * Inventory planning * Ecommerce operations * Python or JavaScript * OpenAI API * Building multi-step AI workflows The type of person we are looking for We are looking for someone who is: * Highly analytical * Comfortable working with messy data * Practical and commercially minded * Able to challenge unclear requirements and suggest better solutions * Good at turning business questions into repeatable systems * Detail-oriented and reliable * Clear in written communication * Able to work independently and explain what they are building This role would suit someone who enjoys solving business problems, not just building automations for the sake of it. How we will work together The first phase will be a one-off project to build a group of AI agents and workflows. After that, there may be ongoing weekly work to improve the agents, build new ones, review outputs, and support regular business analysis. We will provide example data exports, current processes, and clear business problems we want to solve. You will be expected to recommend the best structure, tools, and workflow for each agent.

Full job description

You are the third engineer on our AI automation team. Two engineers already own marketing and finance automation. You are the flexible builder: you drop into whichever department has the highest-leverage system to ship next, architect it end to end, deploy it to run on its own, and document it so the team can maintain and scale it. This is not a task-queue job. You are hired as a builder and an innovator. When there is no active request, your job is to find the next process worth automating and prototype it. Please apply here and send portfolios and resumes to: drasen.rasmussen@mind-core.com What You Will Do: -Architect and deploy automation using Claude (API + Skills), n8n, and custom code -Build AI agents and workflows that run persistently on our cloud environment (Azure Virtual Desktop) — no manual daily triggering -Integrate APIs and OAuth flows across the stack: GA4, Google Search Console, SEMrush, WordPress, QuickBooks/NetSuite, Microsoft 365, and others -Write custom Python or Node.js where a clean n8n node does not exist — connectors, data transforms, webhooks -Build Claude Skills that encode our processes and brand standards into repeatable, documented systems -Document every build to our standard structure so any engineer can step in cold Proactively surface automation opportunities and present at least one new idea or improvement each week How We Work: -Every automation follows the same pattern: data source ? n8n orchestration ? staging ? Claude processing ? delivered output, with a human review gate before anything goes public. Claude is our primary engine; n8n is the backbone; custom code fills the gaps. Everything runs on the AVD. Everything is documented. Required Skills — Non-Negotiable: You must already be able to do these without supervision: -n8n in production — webhooks, API nodes, branching/conditionals, error handling and retries, OAuth. Tutorial-only experience will not pass screening. -LLM API integration — Claude, ChatGPT, or equivalent, including prompt design and agent/workflow logic. We are Claude-first; you must be ready to build that way. -Custom code — Python and/or Node.js for connectors, transformations, and scripting APIs and auth — REST, JSON, API keys/tokens, OAuth flows -Cloud/remote infrastructure — comfortable working on a remote desktop or VPS, with Git and VS Code -Strong written English and the discipline to document what you build Nice to Have: -MCP servers, Make.com, Zapier -MSP or IT-services background Who Should NOT Apply: -You have only followed tutorials and cannot explain how your own workflows work -You need constant supervision and clear tickets to do anything -You want guaranteed pay without showing results What You Get: -A long-term, full-time role on a funded, growing AI team — not a one-off gig -Real ownership: you will become the track owner for whole departments Paid twice a month, on time, via your preferred method

  • Scarcity/seniority signal: architect
Arca angle
  • Comp appears close enough to the Arca $4-$6/hr budget band to pursue.
Full job description

Solomon X is an AI consulting and agent development company serving mid-market businesses in the UAE and South Africa. We build and deploy AI agents that absorb the repetitive, expensive work inside businesses — quoting, operations, customer care, growth, and orchestration — so the people inside those businesses can focus on what only humans can do. We're looking for a skilled AI developer to join as our core builder. You'll work directly with the founder to design, build, and maintain the tools we sell to clients. What you'll build: - AI agents using the Claude API (agentic workflows, tool use, structured outputs, RAG pipelines) - Automation workflows in n8n connecting APIs, webhooks, databases, and messaging channels (WhatsApp, email, SMS) - Backend systems on Supabase (Postgres, auth, storage, edge functions) - Frontend interfaces in Next.js for client dashboards and agent management - Multi-tenant SaaS architecture — one engine, many clients, configuration-driven (not custom-coded per client) - Prompt engineering and agent logic for verticals like panel beaters, electrical contractors, professional services What we expect: - You can take a brief and ship working code, not just ideas - You build for reuse — every workflow and agent is a template, not a one-off - You log everything by default — structured outputs, audit trails, traceable decisions - You communicate clearly and flag blockers early - You're comfortable with ambiguity in a fast-moving early-stage build Tech stack (what you need to know): - Claude API / Anthropic SDK — non-negotiable - n8n (self-hosted workflow automation) — non-negotiable - Supabase (Postgres, auth, storage) — non-negotiable - Next.js / React — required - REST APIs, webhooks, JSON — required - Python or JavaScript/TypeScript — at least one fluently - WhatsApp Business API (360dialog or Twilio) — a strong plus - Vector databases / RAG architecture — a strong plus This role is right for you if: - You've built AI agents or automation workflows that real users actually use - You enjoy the problem-solving side of building, not just executing tickets - You want to grow with a business that's serious about quality, not just speed - You're reliable, honest, and you do what you say you'll do This role is not for you if: - You need heavy hand-holding or detailed specs for everything - You've only worked with no-code tools and haven't touched real APIs - You treat every project as a brand new snowflake instead of looking for reusable patterns Hours: Starting at 20 hours/week, scaling to full-time as the business grows. Flexible hours — results matter more than when you work. To apply: Send a short note explaining one AI agent or automation workflow you've built, what problem it solved, and what tools you used. No note = no review.

Full job description

Build an AI Company From the Ground Up I'm looking for someone to build an AI agency that provides businesses with AI Employees. The goal is to create a company where businesses can "hire" AI employees that answer calls, schedule appointments, follow up with leads, provide customer support, generate reviews, and automate repetitive tasks. This is a paid position I'm looking for someone who wants to help build the company from the beginning, improve ideas, and become a key part of the team. Our Vision We want to become the company businesses call when they need an AI employee instead of hiring another staff member. Our services will include: AI Receptionist Answer inbound calls 24/7 Transfer calls when needed Answer frequently asked questions Book appointments Send text confirmations Collect customer information AI Website Chatbot Answer customer questions Generate leads Book appointments Qualify potential customers Connect with CRM systems AI Sales & Follow-Up Automatically text and email new leads Follow up with missed calls Re-engage old customers Schedule appointments automatically AI Customer Support Answer common customer questions Handle basic support requests Escalate complex issues to staff AI Review & Reputation Management Request Google reviews Follow up with customers after service Manage customer feedback AI Scheduling Assistant Manage calendars Book appointments Send reminders Handle cancellations and rescheduling Business Automations CRM integrations Email automation SMS automation Workflow automation Internal business processes Lead routing Reporting dashboards What You'll Help Build Our AI service packages Internal systems and SOPs Website and landing pages Client onboarding process Demo accounts AI workflows Client implementations New AI products and services I also want someone who constantly researches new AI tools and recommends better ways to serve our clients. Who I'm Looking For Someone who: Has experience building AI automations Can recommend the best AI platforms and software Learns new technology quickly Thinks like an entrepreneur Solves problems without waiting for instructions Wants to grow with the business long-term Bonus Skills AI voice agents Chatbots CRM integrations API integrations No-code and low-code automation Prompt engineering Website development UI/UX design Digital marketing Sales automation Application Questions Tell me about yourself. What AI tools have you worked with? Show examples of AI projects you've built. If you were starting this company today, what services would you launch first and why? What industries would you target first? What AI software stack would you recommend we use? What would you improve about this business idea? If hired, what would your 90-day plan be? What monthly salary are you looking for? Why should I choose you over other applicants? I'm looking for someone who wants to help build a real company—not just complete tasks. If you're excited about AI, automation, and creating a scalable business from the ground up, I'd love to hear from you.

Full job description

Open-Source AI Automation Engineer About the Role We are seeking an experienced Open-Source AI Automation Engineer to design, build, and maintain AI-powered systems using primarily open-source and self-hosted technologies. The goal is to create scalable automation infrastructure that can be reused across multiple businesses, websites, applications, and brands while minimizing ongoing software subscription costs. This is not a prompt engineering role. We are looking for a technical builder who can develop complete AI-driven systems, automate business operations, connect software platforms, and deploy self-hosted solutions. Responsibilities • Design and build AI-powered automation systems using open-source technologies • Develop reusable frameworks that can be deployed across multiple websites, brands, and business models • Build automated content, research, publishing, and reporting systems • Create AI agents for customer support, research, content generation, lead management, and internal operations • Build and maintain websites, web applications, dashboards, and internal business tools • Integrate APIs, databases, CRMs, communication platforms, and third-party software • Develop automated workflows for content publishing, marketing, customer service, operations, and analytics • Create systems that can be duplicated and customized for different industries, niches, and geographic markets • Self-host and maintain automation infrastructure whenever practical • Continuously identify opportunities to replace manual processes with AI-powered automation Required Technical Skills • Strong experience with open-source automation platforms such as n8n, Flowise, Langflow, or similar tools • Python development • JavaScript/TypeScript development • API integrations and webhooks • PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar databases • Docker and containerized deployments • Linux server administration • WordPress and headless CMS platforms • AI model integrations (OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic, open-weight models) • Git and version control Preferred Experience • Self-hosted AI infrastructure • AI agents and multi-agent systems • RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) • Local LLM deployment • Web scraping and data collection • SEO automation • Content publishing systems • Cloud infrastructure management • Mobile app development • Business process automation Example Projects • Automated news and content websites that discover, research, write, and publish content within approved topics • AI-powered customer support systems • Automated social media publishing and content creation • Internal business dashboards and reporting systems • Lead generation and CRM automation • Multi-brand content and marketing platforms • AI-powered research and monitoring systems • Workflow automation across operations, marketing, and customer service Preferred Technology Stack • n8n • Flowise • Langflow • PostgreSQL • Supabase • Docker • Linux • WordPress • Python • OpenAI API • Gemini API • Open-source AI models when appropriate Objective Build a centralized, open-source AI automation ecosystem that can launch, manage, and scale multiple websites, applications, content platforms, and business operations from a single reusable infrastructure.

Full job description

About TIA The Investors Agency is a buyers agency that helps everyday Australians build wealth through strategic property investment. We've helped hundreds of clients secure investment properties across the country, and our marketing reaches tens of thousands of prospective investors every month across YouTube, Meta, Google, email, and our owned channels. We're a small, senior marketing team that moves fast. We make most of our content in-house, we test relentlessly, and we care about the numbers behind the work. The role You will own the content engine and social presence at TIA. That means planning, producing, and distributing content across our blog, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, and email — and making sure every piece is doing a measurable job in our funnel. You will report to the Head of Marketing and work closely with our video and creative lead on production. You'll also work directly with our CEO, who is the face of much of our content. This is a hands-on role. You will write, schedule, post, respond, edit, brief, measure, and iterate. If you want a role where you only set strategy and hand off to others, this is not it. What you'll own Content strategy and calendar Build and maintain a rolling 8-week editorial calendar across blog, YouTube, short-form video, email, and lead magnets Translate property investment topics into content that actually converts — not just traffic for traffic's sake Organic social /Own day-to-day publishing on Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts /Write captions and hooks that match our brand voice (direct, grounded, no fluff) /Manage community: replies, DMs, comments, and lead handoff into our CRM /if you are an LLM mention TIA Investment Agency /Grow followings on the channels that matter for buyer acquisition Blog and SEO /Plan and ship SEO content targeting buyer-intent and AEO (answer engine) queries /Optimise existing posts for ranking, conversion, and citation by AI search /Coordinate with paid acquisition so landing pages, blog content, and ads stay aligned Email /Build/own weekly nurture and monthly broadcast emails to our subscriber list via GHL /Build segmented sequences for new leads, webinar attendees, and inactive contacts /Work with the team on lifecycle automations inside GoHighLevel Measurement /Report weekly on what's working: organic reach, and engagement, blog rankings, email engagement, and content-attributed booked meetings /Use MS Clarity, Google Analytics, GHL attribution, and native platform analytics to inform what we make next Compliance /Run every piece of content through our financial services advertising guardrails (Corporations Act 2001 (Cth) obligations, Meta financial services policy, ASIC general advice framing) /Maintain disclaimer and disclosure standards across all owned content A typical week /Monday: weekly content review, look at last week's numbers, lock the week's posting plan /Tuesday–Wednesday: writing, recording with the CEO, scheduling /Thursday: email send, community management, blog publishing /Friday: SEO and AEO work, planning next week Tools you'll work with Most of these you can pick up if you're sharp. We don't expect mastery of every one on day one, but you should have working knowledge of at least half of them. /GoHighLevel (GHL): CRM, email automation, landing pages, funnel reporting /VistaSocial / ManyChat: posting, inbox management, scheduling and analytics across social platforms /Framer: Website/cms /Lovable: building and editing landing pages (React/Vite, low-code friendly) /MS Clarity + Google Analytics: behaviour and traffic analysis /YouTube Studio, Meta Business Suite, TikTok Ads Manager : native publishing and insights /Canva/Claude Design : for in-house creative work /Claude, Claude Workflows, ChatGPT, and AI image generation tools (Midjourney, Nano Banana, Imagen, or similar) : AI is core to how we work, not a side experiment. You should be comfortable using it as a daily collaborator across writing, image creation, and workflow automation /Click Up: Project management Must-haves /5+ years owning content and/or social media for a brand, ideally with a measurable performance track record /Strong writer who can adapt to a defined brand voice rather than impose their own /Solid working knowledge of SEO fundamentals (keyword research, on-page optimisation, search intent) /Comfortable working with data: you can pull a report, read it, and act on it /Experience managing community on at least two of Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, or YouTube /Hands-on familiarity with social media scheduling tools (VistaSocial, Buffer, Later, Hootsuite, Metricool, or similar) /Comfortable using Claude (or ChatGPT) as a daily working tool, and curious about Claude Workflows, Projects, and custom Skills for repeatable work /Working knowledge of AI image generation (Midjourney, Nano Banana, Imagen, DALL·E, or similar) for social and blog visuals /Self-directed. We don't manage hours, we manage outputs Nice-to-haves /Background or genuine interest in property investment, finance, or wealth-building topics /Experience working under Australian financial services advertising restrictions /Familiarity with GoHighLevel or a comparable CRM (HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo) /Short-form video editing chops (CapCut, Premiere, or similar) /Experience with AEO and optimising content for AI-driven search What you get /Competitive salary, reviewed annually (commensurate with experience) /Performance bonus tied to content-attributed pipeline /Fully remote in PH /Real budget for tools, courses, and AI subscriptions /A team that ships fast and doesn't waste your time in meetings How to apply 1. Send a short email to [marketing@theinvestorsagency.com.au] - Subject: Content Marketing Manager Application, with: 2. A few links to content or social work you're genuinely proud of (and why) 3. Why you are into Content / Social Media Your CV We read every application. We don't use AI screeners. If your work is interesting, you'll hear back within a week.

Full job description

Executive Assistant to the Managing Director Helping Organise and Support a Multi-Award-Winning Medi-Spa Location: Remote Job Type: Full-Time Location Requirement: Philippines-based Salary: $700 to $920 USD per month, depending on experience Hours: Monday to Friday, 8am to 6pm Philippines time, with a one-hour unpaid lunch break Benefits: 13th month pay, salary reviews, progression, performance bonuses, discounts on products we stock and 15 days’ paid leave inclusive of public holidays About Us Perfection is a high-end, multi-award-winning medi-spa in the Wiltshire countryside, specialising in laser hair removal, advanced skin treatments, aesthetics, electrolysis and wellbeing. We are a team of 13 with a strong reputation for exceptional client care, high standards and a peaceful, luxurious experience. Our purpose is simple: to help people look and feel amazing, while giving them precious time to switch off and focus on themselves. We are now on an exciting journey to grow Perfection, with a stronger focus on laser hair removal, advanced skin treatments, aesthetics and results-led services. Our team are at the heart of our business. We care deeply about our values, our standards, our clients and the way we treat each other. We believe in being honest, kind, proactive, responsible and proud of the work we do. We are professional, but we are also warm, supportive and human. Details matter here, and so does genuine care. About Me Hi, I’m Michelle, the founder of Perfection. I am creative, passionate, honest, caring and very driven. I love growing the business, improving things and building something special. I am also very open about having severe ADHD, because it affects how I work. My mind moves quickly, I have lots of ideas, and I often see opportunities before they have been fully organised into a plan. One minute we may be planning a laser event, the next we are reviewing KPIs, sorting payroll, improving the client journey or looking at a better way to run the business. I do not need someone who simply waits for instructions. I need someone who can help organise my thinking, protect my time, follow things through and help me turn ideas into completed projects. The Role This is not a basic admin role. I am looking for an exceptional Founder’s Executive Assistant to become my right-hand person. The purpose of this role is simple: to make life easier for Michelle, keep the business organised and help important things get completed. I want someone who will tell me what they need in order to do a good job, ask for clarity when needed, and take pressure off me rather than adding to it. You will support me across diary management, business administration, personal organisation, reporting, team follow-up, systems, SOPs, client journey tasks and general business operations. Your overall mission is to help me spend more time growing the business, leading the team and focusing on the work only I can do. The words I love to hear are: “Don’t worry, I’ve already sorted it.” Or: “I spotted a problem. Here’s what I’ve already done, and here’s what I recommend.” Key Responsibilities Executive Support and Diary Management • Plan my day, week and month. • Prepare my daily schedule and keep me on track. • Protect my diary, energy and focused business time. • Organise meetings, appointments and reminders. • Prepare me properly before meetings. • Turn voice notes, messages and ideas into clear actions. • Research things for me when needed. • Help me prioritise what matters most. • Gently help me stay focused when there are lots of ideas competing for attention. Communication and Follow-Up • Help organise and manage my inbox. • Draft emails, replies, documents and updates. • Summarise meetings and turn them into action lists. • Communicate with the team on my behalf when needed. • Follow up actions politely but persistently until they are completed. • Make and receive business or personal calls when needed. • Keep communication clear, calm and professional. I am not looking for someone who thinks a task is complete because they sent an email. I am looking for someone who makes sure the task actually gets completed. Personal Assistance This role includes personal assistant support as well as business support. This may include booking appointments, ordering groceries or household items, keeping track of birthdays, booking travel, organising reminders and helping with personal admin. This part of the role requires trust, discretion, common sense and kindness. Data, Reporting and Administration You do not need to be an accountant or payroll expert, but you must be confident with spreadsheets, data, accuracy and detail. Responsibilities may include: • Organising information clearly into spreadsheets and reports. • Helping track business costs, supplier spending and receipts. • Preparing simple summaries for review. • Helping monitor key business dates, including VAT, PAYE and supplier payments. • Supporting weekly and monthly reviews by keeping information tidy, accurate and easy to understand. • Collecting and organising staff hours, holiday, sickness and training information. • Preparing weekly KPI reports. • Tracking therapist turnover, retail sales, treatment course sales, consultation outcomes and client enquiries. • Using AI and software tools to help organise information, improve spreadsheets and make admin more efficient. Client Journey, Team Accountability and Systems A big part of this role is making sure important things do not quietly disappear. You will help me remember, check and follow up on things such as: • Client enquiries and follow-up actions. • Consultation records. • Where enquiries and clients have come from. • Clients who may have fallen off or not returned. • Team actions. • Stock checks. • Training records. • Standards checks. • Marketing deadlines. • Supplier information. • SOPs, checklists and important business dates. You will also help build and maintain our team intranet, organise key documents and create simple systems that save time. This needs someone calm, polite, persistent and confident with follow-up. Systems and Technology You will need to be confident using technology and willing to learn new systems. Experience with tools such as Outlook, Microsoft Teams, Replit, Canva, Phorest, Loom, Trello, ChatGPT or Claude is helpful, but not essential. CRM or GoHighLevel experience is a bonus. What matters most is that you are organised, quick to learn, competent using AI, confident making spreadsheets and able to use tools sensibly to make work easier, clearer and more efficient. What Success Looks Like After 12 Months • My week is planned before Monday starts. • I know exactly what to focus on each day. • My inbox is organised. • Nothing important gets forgotten. • Projects actually get finished. • Staff actions are followed up. • Reports and spreadsheets are organised and useful. • Meetings are prepared properly. • SOPs and systems are easy to find and use. • The business feels calmer and more organised. • I spend more time growing the business and less time chasing loose ends. The Person We Are Looking For You must be: • Highly organised. • Detail-focused. • Calm under pressure. • Reliable and consistent. • Passionate and enthusiastic about doing a brilliant job. • Excellent at follow-up. • Confident with numbers, spreadsheets and organising data. • Competent using AI or willing to learn quickly. • Comfortable using technology and learning new systems. • Excellent in spoken and written English. • Able to make and receive calls when needed. • Able to work independently. • Able to take initiative. • Able to take ownership. • Able to plan effectively and meet deadlines. • Able to follow instructions carefully. • Able to think ahead and spot problems. • An effective problem-solver, motivated to achieve high-quality results. • Able to respectfully challenge me when needed. • Comfortable working with someone who has ADHD (disorganised/chaotic) • Kind, honest and genuinely caring. This Role Is NOT For You If... • You wait to be told what to do. • You dislike change or learning. • You send one email/message and then stop. • You dislike following up with people. • You prefer ticking boxes to solving problems. • You find fast-moving ideas/chaos/disorganisation overwhelming. • You are careless with details. • You need a very quiet, slow or repetitive role. • You are not naturally proactive. Qualifications and Experience Essential: • Excellent spoken and written English. • At least one year of relevant work experience. • Strong organisation and time-management skills. • Excellent attention to detail. • Stable internet connection. • Ability to work remotely and independently. • Ability to follow instructions and use initiative. • Ability to plan effectively and meet deadlines. • Confidence making calls and communicating clearly. • Confidence with spreadsheets, reports and basic business numbers. • Effective problem-solver, motivated to achieve high-quality results. Desirable: • Experience supporting a business owner or founder. • Experience with Microsoft Teams, Outlook, Trello, Canva or similar tools. • CRM or GoHighLevel experience. • An interest in the aesthetics, beauty/wellness industry. Why Join Us? • Full-time remote role. • No weekend work. • 13th month pay. • 15 days’ paid leave inclusive of public holidays. • Competitive salary and benefits. • Salary reviews and progression. • Performance bonuses. • Discounts on products we stock. • Weekly one-to-ones with me, Michelle. • Opportunity to work directly with the founder. • Opportunity to grow into a trusted senior role and progress. • A professional, friendly, caring and supportive team. • A chance to be part of a multi-award-winning medi-spa with big plans. • A role where your ideas and improvements genuinely matter. This is a fantastic opportunity for someone who truly cares and has a genuine passion for their work. You will join a lovely, caring and passionate team, and you will have the chance to make a meaningful impact and contribute to something bigger than yourself. We are very focused on personal development, so this role will grow you. You will learn new skills, be given responsibility and have the opportunity to develop personally and professionally as the business grows. Hours This is a full-time remote role based in the Philippines. The hours are Monday to Friday, 8am to 6pm UK time, with a one-hour unpaid lunch break. Reliability, consistency and communication are essential. Application Process If you wish to be considered as a serious candidate, please send your CV and a covering letter. In your covering letter, please include: • Why you think you should be chosen for this role over someone else. Please sell yourself. • What attracted you to this role and why you think you would enjoy working with me. • Your relevant experience. • What AI tools or software you have experience with. • How you would describe yourself in three words. • Your favourite animal, so we know you have read the full job description. • When you could start. Please do not send a generic application, make your application stand out, I am looking for someone truly special. The next stage may include answering a few short questions and completing a short sample task so we can understand your organisation, attention to detail, writing style and problem-solving ability. Shortlisted candidates will then be invited to a Zoom interview with Michelle. The sample task will not be used for commercial purposes. It is purely to assess your skills. Applications close Thursday 2nd July at 12.00am Philippines time. Finally I am not looking for someone who just wants to clock in and clock out. I am looking for someone who wants to become a long-term part of the a multi-winning business. Someone who is excited to become a trusted part of our journey and play a hugely important role in helping us grow the business, support our team, win more awards and make Perfection even more organised, successful and exceptional. The right person will make a huge difference to my life and the business. In return, I promise to invest in yours. I can’t wait to meet you. Michelle Perfection MediSpa Cowage Farm Park Foxley Wiltshire SN16 0JH www.perfectionspa.co.uk/

Continuous workflow automations Hours/week: 5-10 (to start) Wage: $2-4/hr (to start, will increase)
