Full job description

Developer – Remote Part-Time Role in growing european agency We are looking for a skilled, reliable and highly trustworthy developer to join our small European digital company. We are a relatively new company, but we already work with active clients and larger development projects. Our team works fully remote, and we are looking for someone who can become a long-term part of what we are building. This is not a short-term task-based role. We are looking for someone who can grow with us over time. The position starts at 4 hours per working day, with the possibility of becoming full-time later as the company and workload grow. What you will work on You will work on both our own platform and client projects. The work will include different types of development tasks, such as: Development of our own platform and CMS Working with Payload CMS and our custom setup built on top of it Building pages and features based on designs Client website development Bug fixes and technical problem solving Support tasks and smaller client requests Improving existing features and workflows Some tasks will be practical, such as taking a design and building it in our system. Other tasks may be more technical, such as fixing errors, improving functionality or working with APIs. We need someone who can handle both. Technologies we use You should be comfortable working with: TypeScript Node.js Next.js React Payload CMS PostgreSQL REST / GraphQL APIs You do not have to be an expert in every single technology from day one, but you must be a strong developer who understands modern web development and complex systems. AI and Claude Code We use AI actively in our development workflow. You will get access to Claude Code, and we expect you to use it as much as possible to work faster and better. However, we are not looking for someone who simply copies AI-generated code. You must understand the code, be able to make good technical decisions, test your work and take responsibility for the final result. Who you will work with You will work closely with one of the company owners, who is also a developer with 20+ years of experience from large and complex development projects. This means you will have the opportunity to learn, discuss technical solutions, ask questions and develop side by side with someone highly experienced. We are looking for someone who wants to improve, take responsibility and become a stronger developer over time. Who we are looking for We are looking for someone who is: A skilled developer Reliable and honest Self-driven Good at solving problems Able to work independently Easy to communicate with Fluent in English Comfortable joining short video calls when needed Interested in a long-term role Serious about quality We do not care if you have 1 year or 10 years of experience. What matters is that you are good, reliable and able to deliver quality work. Please do not apply if you are not confident that you can work with the technologies mentioned above. There will be a technical test, so applying without the right skills will only waste your time. Working hours This role starts with 4 hours per working day. Our preferred setup is that you work the same 4 hours each working day within this time window: 11:00–19:00 Central European Time During your working hours, we expect you to be available for: Short video calls Quick check-ins Questions and feedback Daily communication You will also be expected to upload or share your work every day, so we can follow your progress clearly. Communication Good communication is very important. Your English must be fluent enough that we can easily discuss tasks, technical problems, requirements and feedback. Since this is a remote role, we need someone who is responsive, clear and dependable. Hiring process The hiring process includes: A short unpaid technical test A fully paid 1-month trial period The technical test will take a few hours and is used to evaluate your skills, problem-solving and quality of work. The test will be limited in scope and is only used as part of the hiring process. The first month is a normal paid working month. During this month, we will evaluate whether the communication, quality and working relationship are a good fit. Long-term opportunity For the right person, this can become a very strong long-term opportunity. As the company grows, the role can grow too. There may be an opportunity to move into a full-time position and, in the future, potentially help lead a small development team. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company and become an important part of what we are building. Salary This is a fixed monthly salary role based on your skills and experience. Please include your expected monthly salary for a part-time role of 4 hours per working day in your application. Start date We are looking for someone who can start on August 1st. How to apply Please send whatever you think is relevant for us to evaluate your skills. This can include: A short introduction about yourself Your development experience Examples of previous work GitHub, portfolio or code samples Your experience with TypeScript, Next.js, React, Payload CMS or similar systems Your experience using AI coding tools, especially Claude Code Your expected monthly salary for 4 hours per working day Which 4 hours you would prefer to work each working day within the 11:00–19:00 Central European Time window It is also a plus if you include a short video where you introduce yourself, explain your experience and show or describe your work setup. To show that you have read the full job post, please start your application with the word PAYLOAD. We are looking for a serious, skilled and trustworthy developer who wants a long-term remote role.

Full job description

We're Nestra, a rental-tech / lead-generation startup launching in Arizona. We match renters to apartments, book tours, run a soft credit check + background screening, and refer pre-qualified renters to apartment communities for a commission. Your job is to integrate third-party APIs and ship features, not build from scratch. Tech stack (must know): React 19 + TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, tRPC, Node/Express, Drizzle ORM with MySQL. Deployed on Vercel, source in a shared GitHub repo (PRs + code review). What you'll work on: Integrate a Credit Reporting Service (CRS) API for soft credit pulls Integrate a tenant background-check provider, including async webhooks Build a partner portal where apartment communities log in to view leads Build automated email/SMS notification workflows Implement a commission-tracking pipeline and consent/audit logging Must-haves: Strong TypeScript + React; REST/webhook API integration experience; experience deploying via Vercel and working in a shared GitHub repo; clean code habits; good written English for daily async communication. Bonus: FCRA/credit/background-check or payments APIs, real-estate/proptech, queues/background jobs on serverless. How we work: We use AI-assisted development tools (e.g., Claude Code) in our workflow. Comfort with AI coding tools is a plus, but strong fundamentals come first. To apply, reply with: (1) a link to your GitHub or portfolio (2) a short note on a third-party API you've integrated and how you handled errors/webhooks, and (3) how you'd handle a slow third-party webhook callback on Vercel without hitting function timeouts. Applicants who answer all three are prioritized!

Full job description

Remote | $15-20/hour | 10-25 hours/week to start (full-time potential) About Premium Invention We're a profitable DTC brand selling premium solar-powered security cameras ($300-500) to off-grid customers across North America — ranchers, cabin owners, farmers, construction sites. We sell directly to consumers through Shopify Plus. We're launching multiple new products in 2026 and need a developer who can keep our storefronts fast, tested, and converting. What You'll Actually Do Our Shopify Plus setup spans four subdomains (US, Canada, UK, Australia) with ongoing CRO tests, product launches, and checkout optimization. Day-to-day, you'll be: Building and iterating on landing pages for new product launches Implementing CRO tweaks from our Head of Growth and Product Marketing team (A/B tests, new sections, trust elements, comparison tables) Debugging and fixing issues across all four regional storefronts Managing DNS, subdomains, and domain configurations Optimizing site speed — we lose revenue every time a page crawls Checkout customization within Shopify Plus Scripts and Functions Using Claude Code / Cursor to move faster, not as a crutch You'll work closely with our marketing team under the Head of Growth. You're not just taking tickets — you're flagging what's broken, suggesting better implementations, and pushing back when something won't work. Must-Have 3+ years professional development experience with Shopify Plus specifically (not just basic Shopify) Hands-on with Liquid, HTML, CSS, JavaScript — you write this code yourself, not just direct others DNS and domain management — you've set up and debugged subdomains before Clear written and spoken English — team coordination happens over Zoom Comfortable with AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, or similar) — we work fast and expect you to leverage these Nice to Have Experience with Shopify Plus Scripts and Shopify Functions Built custom checkout experiences on Plus Worked on DTC brands selling physical products (not just agency work) Familiar with tools like Hotjar, GA4, Google Tag Manager Experience with multi-region / multi-currency Shopify Plus setups Not For You If Your Shopify experience is only Basic/Advanced Shopify, not Plus Your experience is limited to Shopify theme customization without backend or Plus-specific work You need detailed specs for every task and can't work from a brief You're looking for a full-time salaried role right now (this starts part-time) You're uncomfortable being tracked via Hubstaff while actively working AI coding tools aren't already part of your daily workflow Complete form below. Estimated time: 15-20 minutes. ---------- Do not message on onlinejobs.ph. Please fill in the form to help us get to know you better. We respect your time. Strong candidates are invited to next step within 48 hours.

Full job description

1. AI Development and Management Design AI Virtual Assistants: Create virtual AI agents capable of performing various tasks, from customer service to advanced process automation. Full Project Lifecycle: Manage the complete development process from ideation to deployment, including prompt engineering, data processing, and integration. Customization of AI Agents: Tailor AI agents to fit specific organizational needs, adjusting their behavior and functionality. Work with Claude AI and Other Platforms: Build agents using Claude and other leading AI platforms, ensuring compatibility and optimization. 2. AI Integration and Automation Integration with Existing Systems: Integrate AI virtual agents into existing business systems, CRM platforms, or enterprise software. Automate Workflows: Develop AI models to automate internal business processes, such as customer queries, appointment scheduling, data entry, etc. API Integration: Connect AI agents with external APIs to extend their capabilities, such as payment gateways, third-party services, or cloud-based applications. 3. Prompt Engineering Develop Advanced Prompts: Write and refine natural language prompts to optimize AI responses for specific tasks, ensuring accurate and efficient output. Training and Fine-tuning: Train AI agents on specific datasets to improve accuracy and relevance in their tasks. Maintain and Update Prompts: Regularly review and update prompts to reflect evolving needs and maintain relevance. 4. AI Testing and Optimization Test AI Agents: Conduct rigorous testing on virtual assistants to ensure they operate smoothly and effectively, identifying and resolving potential issues. Optimize AI Performance: Regularly evaluate the performance of AI agents, fine-tuning their algorithms for better results and user experience. Error Handling: Design and implement error management systems to handle edge cases and unexpected inputs from users. 5. User Experience and Interaction Design Build Interactive Interfaces: Create user-friendly interfaces and conversational flows for AI agents, ensuring they are intuitive and efficient for end-users. Develop Multi-channel AI Assistants: Ensure that AI agents can function across different communication channels (website, email, social media, etc.). Personalization of AI Responses: Create personalized experiences for users based on their preferences, behaviors, and interactions. 6. Monitoring and Maintenance Ongoing Monitoring: Continuously monitor AI agents for performance, user interactions, and system errors. Analytics & Reporting: Generate performance reports on AI interactions, analyzing user engagement and the effectiveness of responses. Troubleshooting: Quickly resolve any issues or bugs reported by users or internal teams. 7. Security and Privacy Data Privacy: Ensure that AI agents comply with privacy and data security regulations (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA) when processing user data. Secure Communication: Implement security protocols for all interactions between users and the AI agents to safeguard sensitive information. 8. Documentation and Training Create Documentation: Develop comprehensive documentation on the design, functionality, and maintenance of the AI virtual assistants. Provide Internal Training: Train internal teams on how to interact with, manage, and optimize AI systems. 9. Collaboration and Communication Work with Cross-functional Teams: Collaborate with developers, business analysts, and stakeholders to align AI systems with business goals. Client Communication: Communicate directly with clients to understand their needs and provide tailored AI solutions. 10. Research and Development Stay Up-to-date on AI Trends: Continuously research the latest developments in AI technologies, tools, and platforms to bring innovative solutions to the organization. Experiment with New Technologies: Test and implement emerging AI frameworks, platforms, and tools to enhance capabilities. Desired Experience and Skills Experience: At least 3 years of experience in AI development, with specific expertise in virtual assistants, agents, and prompt engineering. Platforms: Strong experience with Claude, GPT-based models (e.g., GPT-4), and other AI platforms such as Dialogflow, Rasa, or IBM Watson. Programming: Proficiency in Python, JavaScript, or other languages commonly used in AI development. AI Frameworks: Familiarity with machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, and OpenAI’s API. Problem-solving: Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to think critically when optimizing and troubleshooting AI systems. Communication: Strong communication skills to document processes and explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.

Full job description

About DCB Digital We're a growing Queensland-based digital marketing agency working with professional services and trades businesses across Australia. We specialise in web design, SEO, paid ads, and social media, and we work with clients who are serious about getting results. We're a small, focused team that cares about doing good work properly. Everyone here is across real client accounts from day one and expected to take ownership of their area without needing to be managed closely. About the role We're looking for a Digital Marketing Coordinator who wants to grow with us, not just fill a seat. This is a broad role and that's intentional. You'll work directly alongside the Directors across content creation, social media, AI, automations, operations, systems, and client support. In the short term you'll also be across social media delivery as we transition away from that service. For the right person, that's an opportunity to get across every part of how a digital agency runs and build from there. We use AI properly here. Not as a gimmick, but as a core part of how we work. We're building automations, running AI agents, and integrating AI tools across the agency as it grows. This person needs to be genuinely across that world, not just familiar with it. We're not looking for someone who needs a lot of direction. We're looking for someone who spots what needs doing, does it well, and is always thinking about how to do it better. How we work We don't measure success by how many tasks got completed. We measure it by outcomes. Every piece of work we do has a reason behind it and we expect everyone on the team to understand that reason, not just execute the task. If you're the kind of person who asks "what are we actually trying to achieve here" before diving in, you'll fit right in. If you'd rather just be told what to do and get it done, this probably isn't the right place for you. We're always looking at how we can do things better, get stronger results for our clients, and improve how the agency runs. We want someone who thinks the same way, comes with ideas, and isn't satisfied with good enough. What you'll be doing Director and client support Managing the Directors' inboxes and calendars Scheduling meetings, managing deadlines, and protecting their time Drafting and responding to emails on behalf of the Directors Assisting with client communications and following up with clients as needed Taking notes during client calls and sending follow-up summaries and next steps Keeping communication moving so nothing gets missed Social media, content creation and account growth Designing graphics and social assets in Canva across multiple client brands Basic graphic design work beyond Canva where required Editing short-form video for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and Stories using CapCut and AI-assisted tools Writing captions suited to each client's tone and audience Creating and managing content across LinkedIn, Meta, and TikTok Managing content calendars across multiple client accounts Scheduling and publishing content across LinkedIn, Meta, and TikTok via Later, Buffer, or Meta Business Suite Growing client accounts and DCB Digital's own accounts through organic and paid strategies Staying across platform trends on LinkedIn, Meta, and TikTok and applying them quickly Monitoring account performance and adjusting content strategy based on what the data shows Optimising profiles, posting cadence, and engagement tactics to drive consistent growth Managing client Slack channels and keeping communication organised Pulling performance reports and flagging what needs attention Responding to comments and DMs on client accounts as required SEO, website and content support Uploading and formatting blog posts and pages across client websites in WordPress Assisting with content briefs and outlines during busy periods Light editing of SEO content before it goes live Resizing and compressing images for web use, with correct file naming and alt text Preparing and optimising all assets before they go near a website Quality checking websites before and after updates go live Reviewing content for accuracy, formatting, and consistency before it reaches the client Pulling reports from Google Search Console, GA4, and other platforms AI and automations Working daily with our AI stack including Claude, ChatGPT, Paperclip, and Hermes Using Hermes as part of your daily workflow and helping build and manage it as the agency develops Building and maintaining automations in Make.com and Zapier from scratch Helping integrate AI tools across agency workflows as we grow Identifying where AI and automation can remove bottlenecks and flagging opportunities to the Directors Keeping across new AI tools and developments and bringing relevant ones to the table Operations, systems and research Ensuring Zoho is updated daily across all active client accounts Assisting with onboarding new clients and getting them set up correctly in Zoho Keeping track of client deliverables and deadlines across the agency Following up with the team to make sure work is on track and nothing is slipping Chasing outstanding tasks and keeping the Directors informed of anything at risk Organising and maintaining folder structures across all client accounts Building and documenting processes and SOPs into a proper agency system Supporting the broader DCB tech stack as it grows Collecting data and conducting research for client reporting and new business Competitor and market research across both client accounts and agency growth Collating findings into clear, usable formats for the Directors Ad hoc project support across the agency as needed Basic bookkeeping support Collecting and uploading receipts to Xero Reconciling receipts and categorising expenses Chasing missing receipts when flagged by our bookkeeper Keeping the accounts clean between bookkeeper reports Tools you'll need to know Canva and basic graphic design CapCut and AI video editing tools Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and TikTok (content creation, management, and scheduling) Later, Buffer, or Meta Business Suite Claude, ChatGPT, Paperclip, and AI agent workflows Make.com and Zapier (building from scratch, not just maintaining) Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive) WordPress Slack Zoho ClickUp or similar project management tools Xero (basic receipt and expense management) Google Search Console and GA4 What we need from you Proven experience working inside a digital marketing agency (non-negotiable) Strong English, written and spoken, you'll be communicating with clients and on behalf of the Directors Solid content creation skills across Canva, Instagram, and short-form video Basic graphic design skills beyond Canva Proven experience creating and managing content across LinkedIn, Meta, and TikTok Proven experience growing social media accounts organically and through paid activity Someone who is genuinely across platform trends and knows how to use them, not just someone who follows them passively Genuine hands-on experience building automations in Make.com or Zapier from scratch Real working knowledge of AI tools including Claude, ChatGPT, and AI agents, not just a passing familiarity Comfortable working alongside and helping develop AI agents as part of daily operations A solid understanding of SEO basics and how digital marketing agencies operate Experience managing a busy inbox and calendar on behalf of someone else Strong research skills and an ability to turn data into something useful A sharp eye for quality, errors, and inconsistencies A genuine drive to do things better, someone who brings initiative and fresh thinking rather than waiting to be told Comfortable with Xero at a basic level Highly organised with the kind of attention to detail that means things don't fall through the cracks Someone who follows through without being chased and communicates proactively when something is off What we offer $9 to $12 USD per hour based on experience Performance bonuses introduced from 60 days based on outcomes and results Rate reviewed at 90 days Long-term role with genuine growth potential Direct access to and mentorship from the Directors Exposure to a broad range of digital marketing disciplines A front-row seat to how AI is changing agency work, and a real role in building it Why this role is worth your time You'll work directly with the Directors, be trusted with real client accounts from day one, and have a clear path to taking on more as the business grows. This isn't a role where you clock in, complete a task list, and disappear. We're a growing agency that does good work and takes it seriously. The person who comes into this role and performs well will have more opportunity here than most agencies would offer. More responsibility, more involvement in where the business is going, and room to grow into a senior position over time. If you're looking for somewhere to genuinely build a career in digital marketing, this is worth your time. You'll thrive here if you Can manage content for multiple brands and keep each one sounding like itself Get excited when a trend drops and already know how to make it work for a brand Are comfortable being trusted with a Director's inbox and client communications Have actually built automations, not just switched them on Know your way around AI tools and are genuinely curious about where they're going Come with ideas, not just completed tasks Are always looking for a better way to do something, not just the way it's always been done Take pride in being genuinely good at what you do, not just getting it done Pick up new tools quickly and don't need things explained twice Spot problems before they're flagged and say something Want to grow into something bigger, not just tick tasks off a list This role is not for you if you Need a lot of hand-holding or detailed daily instruction Have only worked in-house or as a solo freelancer, never inside an agency Think using AI means occasionally asking ChatGPT a question Are happy to complete a task without understanding why it matters Treat a job description as a strict list of tasks rather than a guide for what the business needs To apply Record a Loom video (5 minutes maximum) and include the link in your application. Applications without a Loom video will not be considered. Your Loom must cover: Introduce yourself and tell us about your experience working inside a digital marketing agency Walk us through one automation you have built from scratch, what the problem was and what it solved Show us an example of content you have created for a client and talk us through your thinking behind it Tell us what AI tools you use every day and show us how you use at least one of them Tell us why this role is the right next step for you We're looking for clear, confident English, specific examples not general claims, and someone who gets genuinely excited talking about this work. Someone who can't be bothered recording a Loom won't progress to the next stage.

Full job description

Part-time | Trial: 1 Month | Potential Long-Term Position We’re looking for a proactive, creative Marketing & AI Virtual Assistant to help grow an online tennis education brand. You’ll work directly with the creator of the Modern Tennis Method, helping build digital products, grow social media, automate marketing, and launch online programs. This is a long-term opportunity for the right person. ? Responsibilities Social Media * Schedule Instagram posts & Reels * Repurpose content for Facebook and TikTok * Write captions * Upload stories * Respond to comments and DMs * Research trending content * Suggest new Reel ideas ? Marketing Help package and launch digital products: * Beginner tennis guides * Online courses * Live bootcamps * Coaching programs Help create: * Sales pages * Product descriptions * Offers * Pricing ideas * Launch plans ? AI & Automation Use AI tools such as: * ChatGPT * Canva AI * CapCut AI * Claude (bonus) * Perplexity (bonus) Help build: * Lead magnets * Email sequences * Instagram DM automation (ManyChat) * Sales funnels * Landing pages ? Canva Create professional designs including: * PDFs * Lead magnets * Instagram carousels * Story graphics * Course workbooks * Checklists * Presentation slides ? Research Research: * Competitors * Marketing trends * Viral content * Product ideas * Customer pain points * Pricing ? Advertising (Bonus) Experience with: * Facebook Ads * Instagram Ads * Lead generation campaigns (Not required but highly valued.) ? We’re Looking For Someone Who ? Speaks and writes excellent English ? Is organised ? Thinks proactively ? Learns quickly ? Uses AI daily ? Understands marketing psychology ? Can solve problems independently ? Has experience with social media growth ? Tools We Use * ChatGPT * Canva * CapCut * Google Drive * Google Docs * Google Sheets * ManyChat * Meta Business Suite Bonus: * Notion * Stan Store * Kajabi * Mailchimp * Zapier * Make.com ? Trial Period The first month will be a paid trial. During this time we’d like your help with: * Growing Instagram * Building our first lead magnet * Organising content * Creating Canva assets * Setting up marketing funnels * Helping launch our first online product If it’s a great fit, we’d love to continue working together long-term. ? Hours 10–20 hours per week to start. Flexible schedule. Remote. ? Compensation Starting from US $ 5- 10/hour, depending on experience. Performance bonuses available as the business grows. ? To Apply Please send: * Your resume * Portfolio (Canva/social media work) * Examples of Instagram accounts you’ve helped grow * AI tools you use regularly * A short Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself * Your favourite marketing campaign and why you liked it ? One small task “Imagine you’re helping a tennis coach grow on Instagram. Give me: * 3 Reel ideas * 1 lead magnet idea * 1 digital product idea * 1 way AI could save us time.”

Full job description

Company: Moon Media Location: Remote Type: Full-Time Working Hours: Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST Experience Level: Mid-Senior --- About Moon Media We're a fast-growing creative agency that helps brands dominate short-form content. Our clients include companies with millions of followers, and our systems power the production and management of hundreds of videos every month. But we're not just building content. We're building the infrastructure behind it. At Moon Media, **Notion is the backbone of our operations.** From project management and client delivery to production tracking, internal dashboards, documentation, and workflows, nearly everything runs through our Notion workspace. As we continue to scale, we're looking for someone who can help us build the next generation of our internal operating system. If your first instinct when you see an inefficient process is, *"There's a better way to build this,"* we'd love to meet you. --- The Role As our **Notion Systems Specialist + Automation**, you'll be responsible for designing, building, maintaining, and continuously improving the systems that power Moon Media. You'll work directly with the Founder and Head of Operations to improve our Notion workspace, automate repetitive processes, and create scalable solutions that help the business operate more efficiently. This is not an IT support role or a traditional virtual assistant position. Instead, you'll become our internal systems expert, building the infrastructure that supports our operations as we continue to grow. --- What You'll Be Working On: Priority #1: Notion Systems This will be the primary focus of your role. You'll help us: * Maintain and improve our existing Notion workspace * Build new databases, dashboards, templates, and workflows * Design scalable systems for project management, production, and operations * Improve reporting and visibility across the business * Continuously optimize our internal operating system as we grow Priority #2: Automation & AI Once workflows are built inside Notion, you'll help automate them. This includes: * Automating repetitive operational tasks * Streamlining onboarding workflows * File and folder organization * Notifications and reminders * Connecting software platforms to eliminate manual work * Researching and implementing AI tools that improve efficiency Priority #3: GoHighLevel (Nice to Have) GoHighLevel experience is a bonus, but it is **not** the primary focus of this role. We already have our CRM and funnels in place. We're mainly looking for someone who can support GHL automations and integrations when needed. --- Responsibilities * Build and maintain advanced Notion workspaces, databases, dashboards, and templates * Design scalable workflows that improve operational efficiency * Create native Notion automations and recommend external automation opportunities * Build automations using Zapier, Make, n8n, or similar tools * Analyze existing processes and recommend smarter system solutions * Connect software platforms to eliminate repetitive manual work * Research and implement AI tools that improve business operations * Troubleshoot and maintain existing systems and integrations * Create documentation and SOPs for new systems and workflows * Work directly with leadership to turn ideas into scalable operational solutions * Continuously improve internal workflows as the company grows --- Requirements (Non-Negotiable) * Advanced experience with Notion, including databases, relations, rollups, formulas, templates, and workspace architecture * Strong systems thinking and process optimization skills * Experience building automations using Zapier, Make, n8n, or similar platforms * Ability to design scalable workflows instead of temporary fixes * Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities * Excellent organization and documentation skills * Comfortable learning new software and technologies quickly * Self-starter who can work independently and take ownership of projects --- Nice to Have * Experience with GoHighLevel * Experience working with APIs and webhooks * Experience with Claude or other AI tools * Experience building AI workflows or AI agents * Experience building systems for agencies or fast-growing startups --- Who This Role Is For This role is for someone who genuinely enjoys building systems and making businesses operate more efficiently. You love creating clean Notion workspaces, designing workflows, connecting software, and simplifying complicated processes. You're naturally curious, proactive, and always looking for ways to improve operations through better systems. You don't wait for problems to be assigned. You identify opportunities, recommend better solutions, and build systems that save time for everyone around you. --- Why This Role Matters: Everything our team does runs through our operational systems. The solutions you build will directly impact how efficiently Moon Media operates every single day. You'll help leadership spend less time on repetitive work and more time growing the business. You'll have ownership over our internal operating systems and play a key role in shaping how Moon Media scales over the coming years. --- HOW TO APPLY: If you're passionate about Notion + automation, and building systems that make businesses run better, we'd love to hear from you! Apply Here: catnip-peak-d94.notion.site/3813b9fa536580f5bda7d0a6c68670f4 --- **IMPORTANT:** We will only consider applicants who complete the Notion application form linked above. Please do NOT reply or apply through this posting, as applications submitted here will not be reviewed.

Full job description

Scale AI Pros Hiring: GoHighLevel Virtual Assistant (Automation & AI Specialist) Location: Remote (Preferred: Philippines, Latin America, or other English-speaking regions) Employment Type: Full-Time or Part-Time (Based on Experience) About Scale AI Pros Scale AI Pros helps small service businesses grow through AI-powered automation. We design, build, and support complete business systems using GoHighLevel, AI voice agents, automation workflows, CRM optimization, landing pages, and lead generation strategies. We don't simply set up software—we deliver measurable business results. We're looking for a highly skilled GoHighLevel Virtual Assistant who is proactive, detail-oriented, and capable of building production-ready systems with minimal supervision. What You'll Do As a GoHighLevel Automation Specialist, you will: Build complete GoHighLevel subaccounts from scratch Configure CRM pipelines and opportunity stages Create landing pages, websites, and funnels Build Forms, Surveys, and Calendars Configure appointment booking systems Develop advanced automation workflows Configure AI Voice Agents and AI Chat Agents Build email and SMS follow-up campaigns Set up missed-call text back automations Configure review and reputation management campaigns Import and export snapshots Connect domains and DNS records Configure LC Email, LC Phone, Mailgun, and Twilio (when applicable) Integrate third-party applications using Zapier, Make, or webhooks Troubleshoot automation issues Test all client implementations before deployment Document completed work using standard operating procedures Provide occasional technical support to clients Required Skills Candidates should have strong experience with: GoHighLevel CRM Configuration Pipelines Workflows Calendars Forms Surveys Landing Pages Funnels Websites Opportunities Snapshots Memberships Communities Reputation Management Reporting AI Experience building or configuring: AI Voice Agents AI Chat Agents Prompt Engineering Knowledge Bases Appointment Booking Conversation Flows Human Escalation Automation Experience with: Conditional Logic Workflow Design Webhooks APIs Zapier Make.com n8n (Preferred) JSON (Preferred) Marketing Knowledge Understanding of: Lead Generation Sales Funnels Facebook Lead Ads Google Ads SEO Basics Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), including optimizing GoHighLevel websites and content for AI-powered search platforms such as ChatGPT, Google AI, and Perplexity Email Marketing SMS Marketing Conversion Optimization Preferred Qualifications 2+ years of GoHighLevel experience Portfolio of completed GoHighLevel projects Experience with GoHighLevel website development, SEO, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) Experience with AI implementations Strong English communication skills Excellent written documentation Experience working with U.S.-based clients Ability to manage multiple client projects simultaneously What Success Looks Like Within your first 90 days, you should be able to: Build complete client systems independently Troubleshoot automation issues efficiently Configure AI receptionists Create high-converting landing pages Deliver projects on schedule Communicate professionally with clients Document your work thoroughly Identify opportunities to improve client automation Required Application Materials Please include: Your resume. A brief cover letter explaining why you're a good fit. Links to three GoHighLevel projects you personally built. Screenshots or short videos of automation workflows you've created. A list of AI tools you have experience with. Your internet speed test results. Your preferred working hours (including your time zone). Your hourly rate or monthly salary expectations. The word "Automation" in the subject line so we know you've read the entire posting. Interview Process Qualified applicants will complete: Initial application review Technical interview Live GoHighLevel interview Practical build assessment (60–90 minutes) AI Agent design exercise Final interview Compensation Compensation is competitive and based on experience, technical ability, and assessment results. Outstanding performers will have opportunities for long-term employment. Why Join Scale AI Pros? We're building a company focused on delivering real business outcomes through AI and automation. If you enjoy solving complex problems, learning new technologies, and helping businesses grow, we'd love to hear from you. If you're passionate about GoHighLevel, AI, and automation—and you take pride in delivering exceptional work—we encourage you to apply today.

Full job description

We are building a full-scale insurance lead generation and automation system inside GoHighLevel and are looking for a highly skilled Systems Engineer to help build, organize, and maintain it. This is NOT a basic VA role. You will be working directly with the owner to develop a plug-and-play system used by multiple insurance agents. This includes pipelines, advanced workflows, SMS/email automation, AI-driven engagement, dialer integrations, and system architecture across multiple accounts. We already have some systems in place, your role is to help condense, improve, and maintain them at a high level. As well as being the point of contact for agents if things break or they want custom things added/taken out. ? Responsibilities: • Build and manage GoHighLevel pipelines, based on lead type (Final Expense, Term, IUL, etc.) • Create and optimize workflows (SMS, email, tagging, follow-ups) • Implement and maintain tagging logic across campaigns • Connect and manage Make.com automations (webhooks, routing, integrations) • Assist with dialer integrations (TrackDrive, GHL LC Phone, WAVV, etc.) • Help implement AI-driven SMS workflows (appointment setting, lead engagement) • Troubleshoot automation issues and optimize system performance • Organize and maintain a scalable system structure across multiple subaccounts ? Requirements: • Strong experience with GoHighLevel (workflows, pipelines, tagging, inbound call routing, NOT just funnels) • Experience with Twilio / LC Phone and understanding of A2P 10DLC registration and compliance • Experience with Make.com (or Zapier, but Make preferred) • Understanding of webhooks, APIs, and automation logic • Experience with SMS/email automation systems • Familiarity with dialers (TrackDrive, WAVV, or similar) • Basic understanding of AI tools (ChatGPT/OpenAI integrations is a plus) • Strong attention to detail and system organization • Ability to follow structured systems and improve them ? Bonus / Preferred Experience (Not Required): • Experience building or working with AI voice/call systems • Understanding of outbound AI calls that qualify leads and route them to agents • Experience with call routing, round-robin distribution, or inbound call flows *** Bonus opportunities and higher pay available for candidates with experience in AI voice systems and advanced automation builds. ? English & Communication Requirement (IMPORTANT): • You must have strong spoken and written English • You must be able to clearly explain systems and communicate issues ???? REQUIRED WITH APPLICATION: Please submit a short Loom video (2–5 minutes) answering the following: 1. Introduce yourself and your experience with GoHighLevel 2. Explain a workflow you have built (trigger ? actions ? result) 3. Describe your experience with automations (Make.com, Zapier, or similar) Applications without a Loom video will NOT be considered. ? Compensation: • $8–$10/hour depending on experience with opportunity for growth • Long-term opportunity with consistent work • Opportunity to grow into a full-time role as the system scales ? How to Apply: 1. Submit your resume/experience 2. Include your Loom video (REQUIRED) 3. Include examples of systems or automations you’ve built (if available)

Full job description

AI Research & Data Mining Specialist (Full-Time) Salary $80 to $125 USD per week Based on experience and demonstrated skill. Schedule Full-Time Monday through Friday 40 Hours Per Week Location Remote ? About SMB Solutions We are an AI automation and digital marketing company that helps businesses grow through AI, automation, SEO, social media, reputation management, and data intelligence. We are looking for a highly organized AI Research & Data Mining Specialist who enjoys finding information that other people cannot. This is not a simple virtual assistant position. You will use cutting-edge AI tools to uncover business opportunities, identify prospects, organize research, and help build intelligent databases for our sales and marketing teams. If you enjoy investigating, researching, organizing information, and using AI to work smarter, this could be the perfect long-term opportunity. ? Responsibilities AI Powered Research Use AI tools to perform deep internet research including: • Industry research • Company research • Market research • Competitor research • Geographic research • Local business research • Social media research • Public data research ? Data Mining Locate and organize information from multiple online sources. Examples include: • Business websites • Online directories • Google Maps • Social media platforms • Forums • Blogs • Public databases • Government websites • Industry associations • Review websites • Business listings ? Lead Intelligence Research and organize information such as: • Company names • Contact information • Decision makers • Industries • Geographic locations • Service areas • Company size • Technologies used • Social media presence • Online reputation • Website information ? Spreadsheet Organization Maintain clean and organized databases using: • Google Sheets • Microsoft Excel • Airtable • CSV files • CRM systems Accuracy and attention to detail are extremely important. ? AI Tools Experience with AI is highly preferred. Examples include: • Perplexity • Claude • ChatGPT • Manus • Gemini • Grok • ScrapeBox • Browse AI • Apify • Clay • Phantombuster • Bright Data • Any other AI research or automation platform If you’ve used different AI tools than those listed above, we’d love to hear about them. ? What You’ll Be Researching Examples include: • HVAC companies • Medical practices • Roofing companies • Law firms • Restaurants • Churches • Insurance agencies • Construction companies • Local businesses • Industry trends • Consumer discussions • Geographic markets • Online communities No two projects are exactly the same. ? Required Skills Excellent internet research skills Strong organizational skills Excellent attention to detail Excellent English Google Sheets proficiency Microsoft Excel proficiency Critical thinking Ability to verify information Ability to work independently Ability to meet deadlines ? Bonus Skills Experience with: AI prompting Prompt engineering Web scraping Data enrichment Automation CRM systems Lead generation Market research SEO research Competitive analysis ? What Success Looks Like The ideal candidate: • Loves solving research problems • Enjoys finding information others cannot • Uses AI to increase productivity • Is extremely organized • Documents everything clearly • Thinks independently • Produces accurate work • Continuously learns new AI tools ? Compensation $80 to $125 USD per week Based on experience and skill level. Weekly pay Full-Time Position Long-Term Opportunity Performance reviews with opportunities for increased compensation. ? How to Apply To show that you pay attention to detail, start your application with this exact sentence: “AI helps me research smarter, not harder.” Then include: 1. Your resume 2. Your internet speed 3. Every AI tool you currently use 4. Your favorite AI tool and why 5. Describe one difficult research project you’ve completed 6. Tell us how you would use AI to find roofing companies in Texas that recently experienced hail damage 7. Share one Google Sheet or Excel spreadsheet you’ve created (if available) Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

Full job description

I am building a Rank & Rent Factory. The long-term goal is to build and manage hundreds of local lead generation websites that generate calls and leads for local businesses. I am looking for a systems-minded AI and automation specialist who can help improve the entire business, not just complete random tasks. This role is for someone who likes building workflows, improving processes, documenting systems, using AI tools, and finding ways to reduce manual work. You may help with: - Building AI-assisted workflows - Using ChatGPT, Claude, or other AI tools to improve production - Creating and improving SOPs - Automating repetitive tasks with tools like Zapier, Make, n8n, Google Sheets, or ClickUp - Helping organize website production workflows - Improving local SEO and website production systems - Creating QA checklists - Testing AI agents and automation ideas - Researching tools and recommending better systems - Helping turn messy processes into repeatable workflows Useful skills: - ChatGPT / Claude - AI tools - Zapier, Make, or n8n - Google Sheets - ClickUp - SOP writing - WordPress - Local SEO - Web research - Process documentation - Basic Python, JavaScript, or Google Apps Script is a plus You do not need to know everything. I care more about problem-solving, clear thinking, communication, and willingness to learn than a perfect resume. This is NOT a simple content writing job. This is NOT for someone who only says “I know ChatGPT.” I want someone who can eventually become an AI Systems Builder inside the company. The right person will help us build systems so future VAs can produce websites faster, better, and with less confusion. To apply, answer these questions: 1. What AI tools have you used for real work? 2. What automations or workflows have you built before? 3. Have you used Zapier, Make, n8n, ClickUp, Google Sheets, or similar tools? Explain. 4. Have you created SOPs or process documents before? 5. Have you worked with WordPress, SEO, or local business websites? 6. Describe one messy process you improved or organized. 7. What is your hourly rate? 8. Are you looking for part-time or full-time work? 9. Start your application with the phrase: “Systems build freedom.” Applications that do not start with “Systems build freedom” will be ignored. This will begin with a paid test task. If you do well, this can become a long-term role with increasing responsibility.

Full job description

AI / ML Engineer S16 (sx16.ai) · Remote (Philippines) · Full-time · Immediate joiner · 2+ years experience About S16 S16 (sx16.ai) is a product company building AI operations-intelligence tools for last-mile delivery and logistics operators. We turn live operational data into real-time intelligence — AI assistants, automated monitoring and alerting, performance analytics, and predictive models — that help delivery operations run reliably at scale. We are a small, fast-moving team shipping production software that is used in live operations every day. The role We are looking for an AI/ML Engineer who can build LLM-powered agents and automation end to end, with solid data science / ML chops alongside it. You will design and ship AI assistants that plug into messaging platforms and operational tools, build the data pipelines and dashboards behind them, and develop the predictive models that make the product smarter over time. This is a hands-on, full-spectrum AI role: from prompt and agent design, to the Python services that run them, to the models and data underneath. What you'll do ? Build LLM-powered agents and assistants. Design system prompts and agent behavior, integrate LLM APIs (Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, OpenAI), and handle context management, conversation memory/summarization, tool use, and reliability/guardrails. ? Ship automation and real-time monitoring. Build Python services (Flask/FastAPI) that ingest live operational data, detect exceptions, run scheduled jobs, and push alerts and notifications — including messaging integrations such as WhatsApp. ? Develop predictive and analytical models (DS/ML). For example, late-delivery prediction and route-difficulty / performance scoring: feature engineering, training, evaluation, and deployment. ? Build dashboards and scoreboards. Real-time performance views and leaderboards (Google Sheets API, Streamlit, or lightweight web apps). ? Deploy and operate. Stand up services on cloud platforms, manage secrets and API keys securely, and keep things running reliably. ? Apply computer vision where it adds value — for example, image recognition for load-out / bag-count verification using real-time object detection. What we're looking for ? 2+ years of professional experience in AI/ML engineering, data science, or a closely related software role. ? Strong programming in Python and SQL. ? Hands-on Generative AI / LLM experience and a solid data-science / machine-learning foundation (full stack detailed below). ? Startup mindset — comfortable with ambiguity, fast iteration, and end-to-end ownership. You ship. ? Immediate availability — we need someone who can start right away. Technical skills ? Languages & databases: Python, SQL, vector databases. ? Machine learning: Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy; regression, classification, clustering; feature engineering and model evaluation; hyperparameter tuning (GridSearchCV); time-series forecasting; A/B testing; statistical analysis, data preprocessing, and exploratory data analysis (EDA). ? Deep learning: TensorFlow, Keras; ANN, CNN, RNN. ? Computer vision: OpenCV, YOLOv8, real-time object detection. ? Generative AI / LLMs: large language models (LLMs), prompt engineering, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), embeddings, vector databases, AI chatbots, agentic AI, LangChain, Hugging Face Transformers, and end-to-end LLM application development. ? Backend & deployment: REST APIs, webhooks, Flask / FastAPI; model deployment; cloud platforms (GCP / AWS / Azure, or Railway / Render / DigitalOcean). ? Data pipelines & analytics: ETL / data pipelines; SQL; medallion (bronze/silver/gold) modeling; Databricks / Spark. ? Visualization & tools: Tableau, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Streamlit; Git / GitHub, Jupyter Notebook, VS Code. Nice to have ? Experience with logistics, last-mile delivery, or other real-time operational data. ? Microsoft 365 / Azure ecosystem familiarity. Logistics ? Location: Remote, based in India or the Philippines. ? Hours: Our operations run on US time zones, so meaningful daily overlap with US business hours is expected. ? Type: Full-time. ? Start: Immediate joiner. How to apply Send your CV plus a short note on a relevant project you shipped (a link to GitHub, a portfolio, or a demo is welcome) to careers@sx16.ai (replace with the correct address).

Full job description

Work with an Australian Software Company We are looking for a talented .NET Developer in the Philippines to join our team as an independent contractor. You'll be working on commercial software applications using C#, .NET, and MySQL, helping to develop new features, improve existing systems, and support customers across multiple countries. Key Responsibilities • Design, develop, test, and maintain .NET applications. • Develop new features and enhancements based on business requirements. • Troubleshoot and resolve software defects and performance issues. • Create and optimize MySQL database structures, queries, stored procedures, and reports. • Participate in code reviews and contribute to software quality improvements. • Integrate applications with third-party APIs and services. • Maintain technical documentation and deployment procedures. • Collaborate with project managers, support staff, and stakeholders located in Australia. • Ensure applications meet security, performance, and reliability standards. Required Skills and Experience Essential • Minimum 3 years of professional software development experience. • Strong experience with: - C# - .NET Framework and/or .NET (Core/.NET 6+) - ASP.NET MVC, Web API, or Windows Desktop Applications - MySQL database development and administration - SQL query optimization and troubleshooting • Experience with: - Git source control - REST APIs - Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) - Software debugging and testing • Demonstrated experience using AI development tools such as ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude, or similar tools as part of the software development workflow. • Ability to evaluate, test, and refine AI-generated code rather than relying on it without review. • Strong English communication skills (written and verbal). • Reliable internet connection and suitable remote working environment. Preferred • Experience with: - MariaDB - JavaScript, HTML, CSS - POS, retail, hospitality, ERP, or business management systems • Experience working with overseas clients or distributed teams. What We Offer • Long-term contract opportunity • Flexible remote work • Exposure to Australian business software projects • Supportive and collaborative team environment • Competitive contractor rates Work Arrangement • This position is fully remote and open to candidates based in the Philippines. • Candidates located in Clark, Pampanga, or nearby areas are preferred. • While the role is currently remote, applicants should be willing to work from an office in Clark, Pampanga up to three days per week should a local office be established in the future. To Apply Please send: - Your CV/Resume - Brief summary of your .NET and MySQL experience - Expected hourly or monthly rate - Availability/start date - Start your application with the answer: What country is home to Kangaroos? - Links to GitHub, portfolio, or sample projects (if available) Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Location: Philippines (Remote) Preferred Location: Clark, Pampanga or nearby areas Employment Type: Contractor / Freelance Experience Required: 3+ Years Technology Stack: C#, .NET, ASP.NET, MySQL, Git, REST APIs

Full job description

We're a growing UK-based digital marketing agency looking for a long-term WordPress web developer to help us build and maintain websites for our clients in the home improvement and trade industries. We use Elementor Pro and have a proven website structure for home improvement businesses, but the design would be open for you to come up with, based on the brief if the client is specific about what they are looking for. The right candidate will follow this structure closely and focus on delivering high-quality, accurate, and brand-aligned sites quickly and efficiently. This role is focused on building new websites, migrating them and updating existing client sites. We provide the plugins and tools you need to build the sites, including the following: • Elementor Pro licence • All premium plugins (fully licensed) • Hosting environment for development • Access to stock image libraries • All written content and page structure • Ongoing training and support • There will be no additional cost to you What You’ll Do: 1. Set up new client sites on a development subdomain 2. Design the site inline with the client’s brief, branding, etc. 3. Move existing content from the old website to the new site 4. Add new content provided by our team 5. Use stock images (we provide access) or reuse quality images from the original site 6. Continue building new pages on a monthly basis for SEO purposes (you’ll be trained on our exact process) 7. Maintain the website each month, making small edits, etc. 8. Migrate the site from the client's existing hosting to ours when needed; set up things like Cloudflare, CAPTCHA, SMTP Pay Structure: 1. $500 USD per website build 2. $7.50 USD per new page for ongoing monthly work (one page using our pre-built templates take less than one hour) 3. Ongoing hours (not including new website builds): 5–15 hours per week, growing over time as we onboard more clients (the goal is to get your to full-time hours) 4. $10 USD per site, per month — basic site maintenance, i.e., updating plugins, taking backups etc. 5. Additional hours paid at $7.50 USD per hour 6. As we grow, our goal is to offer you a full-time position on a monthly wage Long-Term Opportunity: This is a long-term position where hours and responsibility will increase over time. We’re looking for someone who wants to grow with us, become part of our team, and contribute to the success of a fast-growing digital marketing agency. Over time, this role could evolve into many other technical areas within the business. Requirements: 1. Experience building WordPress sites using Elementor Pro 2. Strong attention to detail (structure, spacing, responsiveness) 3. Ability to follow a site structure system 4. Fluent in English 4. Able to work independently and meet deadlines 5. Flexible work hours (you can work anytime from anywhere – as long as the work is completed on time and to a high standard.)? 6. Willingness to have regular Zoom calls with me so we can keep up today with work and train you on anything needed 7. Knowledge of DNS, hosting, and basic technical website tasks 8. Be responsive on WhatsApp, i.e., keep me up-to-date with the projects Bonus Points For: 1. Familiarity with SEO basics 2. Experience working with digital marketing agencies 3. Tools We use ClickUp, GoHighLevel, Airtable (nice to have but not essential) 4. You’re up-to-date with the latest AI, such as Claude Code and you are able to help us innovate and design better ways of doing things How to Apply: 1. In your first paragraph, include the word “kangaroo” to confirm you’ve read the full post 2. Tell us about your experience building WordPress sites with Elementor 3. Share 2–3 websites you’ve built using Elementor Pro (you will be required to show me the backend of these sites during the interview) 4. Include a short 1–2 minute video introducing yourself, upload the video to YouTube and include the YouTube link – start with “Hi Oliver” and explain why you’re a great fit 5. Let us know your availability per week and preferred working hours (in your local timezone) Immediate Start: We have a website that needs to be built right away, and we have lots of other websites that need to be maintained, so we will require you to be able to start immediately after the interview if you are the right fit for the role. As part of the interview process, you will be required to show me the backend of your example sites during the interview, so if you lie and send me websites that you have not built or are not built using Elementor, then you will not be considered for the role. *** Only apply via this website. If you message me via email or phone, you will NOT be considered for this position. ***

Full job description

LEKKER Studios is a premium architectural and real estate photography company based in Northern New Jersey, serving the NYC metro market. We work with luxury builders, developers, architects, and top-tier real estate agents. We are a small, focused team that moves fast and does quality work. We are growing and we are ready to bring in someone who loves AI as much as we do. If you get genuinely excited about what AI can do, and you want to help build real systems for a real business, keep reading. THE OPPORTUNITY This role starts part-time: 12:00 PM to 4:00 PM Philippine Standard Time, Monday through Friday. As we grow together, the position expands to 12:00 PM to 8:00 PM PST. We want a long-term partner, not a short-term hire. The core of this role is AI. You will help us design, build, and run AI-powered workflows that make our business faster and more consistent. You will work directly with our founder and have real ownership over the systems you create. We will train you on how we work. But we need someone who can take that and run with it. WHAT YOU WILL OWN AI Systems (Your Primary Focus) Build and manage workflows using Claude AI as our primary tool Create and maintain prompt systems that produce consistent, high-quality output Own our Higgsfield AI video generation pipeline for marketing and social content Explore and implement new AI tools as the landscape evolves Connect AI tools to our CRM and operations so everything works together Document every system you build so it is repeatable CRM & Operations Manage and improve our Zoho CRM including automations and client pipelines Build SOPs for onboarding, follow-up, and project delivery Keep things on track and flag issues before they become problems Content & General Support Support video editing using Adobe tools Help with social media content batching and scheduling Inbox management, file organization, and founder support WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR Must Have: Real hands-on experience with Claude AI. Actual workflows you have built, not just awareness of it. Real hands-on experience with Higgsfield AI for video generation Familiarity with ChatGPT and prompt engineering Working knowledge of Zoho CRM Proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite (Premiere Pro, Lightroom, or Photoshop) Strong written English Extreme attention to detail Reliable internet and a capable computer Great to Have: Experience connecting tools via Make, Zapier, or APIs Background in real estate, architecture, or luxury brand marketing Experience building and documenting SOPs WHO YOU ARE You are detail-oriented and self-directed. You figure things out before you ask. You are genuinely excited about AI because you have already used it to solve real problems. You communicate honestly. You want to grow with a company, not just fill a role. SCHEDULE & COMPENSATION Starting hours: Monday to Friday, 12:00 PM to 4:00 PM PST Growth path: Expanding to 12:00 PM to 8:00 PM PST Compensation: Performance-based. We pay well for great work. Details discussed in the interview. Location: Fully remote. Philippines-based applicants only. HOW TO APPLY We keep it simple. Send us: A short video (2 to 3 minutes). Introduce yourself and walk us through something you have actually built using Claude AI or Higgsfield AI. Screen recording is perfect. We just want to see real work. A written answer (150 to 200 words) to this question: What is the most useful AI workflow you have built, and what problem did it solve? Your resume or portfolio link Confirmation of your availability for the hours listed We read every application personally. The video is how we get to know you before we ever get on a call, so have fun with it. Show us what you can do. We are building something we are proud of. We hope you want to be part of it.

Full job description

Part-Time CRM & Workflow Assistant (GoHighLevel + AI) ~20 hours/week · Remote · Part-time contract We run two South Carolina real estate businesses — a manufactured-home dealership and a property investment operation — and we're looking for a sharp, self-directed assistant to own the systems that keep deals and leads moving. If you know GoHighLevel inside and out, you're genuinely fast with AI tools like Claude, and you take pride in building things cleanly, this is for you. This is a part-time role (~20 hours/week) with flexible hours. You'll work independently, communicate clearly, and be trusted to run the back end of the business without being micromanaged. What you'll do Build and maintain pipelines, custom fields, forms, and smart lists in GoHighLevel across two sub-accounts Design and troubleshoot automation workflows — lead intake, follow-up sequences, task assignment, appointment reminders Write and refine SMS/email templates and snippets (and keep them compliant) Keep CRM data clean and organized as leads and deals flow in Use AI tools to work faster — drafting copy, building SOPs, troubleshooting — and bring that leverage to the whole operation Document your work so the team can run and modify systems without depending on you being online Who you are Real GoHighLevel experience. You can stand up a pipeline, form, and multi-step workflow from scratch and explain why you built it that way. You know the difference between a tag, a custom field, a custom value, and an opportunity stage. AI-fluent. You use Claude or ChatGPT as a daily tool, not a novelty. You prompt well, you QA the output, and you know where AI helps and where it doesn't. Compliance-aware. You understand SMS basics — A2P 10DLC, quiet hours, opt-outs — and you don't blast leads at 2am. Organized and self-directed. You prioritize well, communicate trade-offs, and make yourself easy to delegate to. A clear communicator. You document what you build and leave things better than you found them. Nice to have Real estate, investment, or home-builder/dealership experience Experience with Claude Projects, custom instructions, or connecting AI to tools (e.g., MCP / APIs) Familiarity with Notion, Google Workspace, or e-signature tools How we hire Our process is fast and practical. After a short intro conversation, we'll send a brief hands-on skills exercise — a small, realistic build inside a sandbox GoHighLevel account (we keep it under ~90 minutes and respect your time). We care more about how cleanly you build, how well you use AI, and how you respond to feedback than about a perfect resume. Logistics Hours: ~20/week, flexible Location: Remote Type: Part-time contract

Full job description

JOB OVERVIEW Are you a detail-oriented, systems-minded Virtual Professional who enjoys keeping financial records organized, building clean trackers, and turning messy information into clear workflows? We are looking for a proactive Executive Admin & Finance Virtual Professional who can support finance, admin, operations, reporting, and process documentation. This role is ideal for someone who is accurate with numbers, comfortable with QuickBooks or similar accounting tools, and excited about using AI responsibly to make work clearer, faster, and better documented. This is not just a task-support role. We are looking for someone who thinks in systems - someone who enjoys creating SOPs, checklists, trackers, dashboards, templates, and better ways of managing recurring work. You may be a great fit if you like organizing details, catching inconsistencies, improving processes, and helping leadership stay financially informed and operationally prepared. What You Will Do You will support day-to-day finance, admin, reporting, documentation, and workflow improvement tasks. Finance & Bookkeeping Support • Track invoices, receipts, payments, payables, receivables, reimbursements, and vendor records. • Support QuickBooks Online or similar accounting systems with organized data entry, categorization, and cleanup. • Assist with bank and credit card reconciliation support. • Help maintain clean records for transactions, vendors, invoices, and supporting documents. • Prepare financial trackers, summaries, simple reports, and management updates. • Organize PDFs, screenshots, receipts, invoices, and related files so records are easy to find and review. • Spot missing information, duplicate entries, inconsistent categories, and reporting gaps before they become bigger issues. Executive Admin & Operations Support • Manage calendars, reminders, meetings, follow-ups, deadlines, and recurring priorities. • Coordinate administrative details, project trackers, vendor information, forms, and documentation. • Support research, file organization, task follow-through, and internal updates. • Give clear progress updates, ask smart questions, and close communication loops. • Handle sensitive business and administrative information with discretion and professionalism. Systems, SOPs & AI-Assisted Workflow Support • Create and maintain SOPs, checklists, trackers, dashboards, templates, and process documentation. • Turn scattered notes, screenshots, recordings, inbox items, or financial details into clear action steps. • Use AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, or similar platforms to support summaries, research, documentation, first drafts, and workflow organization. • Build simple prompt templates or AI-assisted workflows that make recurring tasks cleaner and faster. • Review and verify AI output before sharing it. • Protect confidential information and avoid relying on unchecked AI-generated answers. • Recommend practical improvements when work is messy, manual, duplicated, or unclear. Who We Are Looking For The ideal candidate is organized, accurate, reliable, and comfortable working independently in a remote setup. You should enjoy finance/admin work, but also be curious about systems, documentation, and smarter ways to get things done. You may be a great fit if you: • Have at least 2 years of experience in finance/admin, bookkeeping support, executive admin, operations, or a related role. • Have hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online or a similar accounting platform such as Xero, FreshBooks, Zoho Books, NetSuite, or similar tools. • Are comfortable handling invoice tracking, AP/AR support, vendor records, reconciliation support, reporting, or financial admin tasks. • Have strong Excel or Google Sheets skills for trackers, formulas, organized data, and reporting. • Are highly detail-oriented and careful with numbers, deadlines, and confidential information. • Can write clear updates in English and communicate proactively. • Naturally organize recurring work into checklists, templates, SOPs, trackers, or dashboards. • Are comfortable using AI tools as a work partner for drafting, summarizing, organizing, researching, and improving documentation. • Understand that AI output must still be checked, verified, and handled responsibly. • Are resourceful, coachable, proactive, and able to work with minimal supervision. Preferred Experience: Experience with any of the following is a plus: • QuickBooks Online cleanup, categorization, reconciliation support, or financial reporting. • Accounts payable, accounts receivable, invoice tracking, or vendor management. • KPI dashboards, management reports, data cleanup, or reporting packs. • SOP creation, Loom/process videos, workflow documentation, trackers, or process maps. • Project management tools such as ClickUp, Asana, Monday.com, Trello, Notion, or Airtable. • CRM tools, automation tools, Zapier, Make, or similar platforms. • Supporting executives, operators, finance teams, or operations-heavy businesses. • Coordinating applications, vendor setup, compliance research, permits, or project trackers. • Using AI tools to improve admin, finance, reporting, documentation, or research workflows. Tech & Infrastructure Requirements To ensure a smooth and reliable remote work experience, applicants must have: • Intel i5 10th Gen / AMD Ryzen 5 or higher preferred. • Minimum 8GB RAM. • Laptop or PC preferably less than 3 years old. • Stable internet connection of at least 50-100 Mbps preferred. • Backup internet connection. • Quality webcam, microphone, and headset. Screenshots of device specs and internet speed test may be requested during the application process. You Will Thrive in This Role If... • You enjoy bringing order to messy information. • You like working with numbers, reports, trackers, records, and follow-ups. • You often think, "There has to be a better system for this." • You can follow instructions carefully but also think ahead. • You ask thoughtful questions when information is missing. • You give clear updates without needing to be chased. • You enjoy creating checklists, documentation, templates, and better workflows. • You use AI thoughtfully to improve work quality, not to replace judgment. • You want a long-term remote role where reliability, ownership, communication, and continuous improvement matter. This May Not Be the Best Fit If... • You prefer task-by-task instructions and do not enjoy organizing ambiguity. • You are uncomfortable with financial records, details, deadlines, or accuracy checks. • You do not like documenting processes or creating trackers. • You are not open to learning new systems or AI tools. • You use AI as a shortcut without checking the output. • You struggle with proactive communication or independent remote work. Why You Will Love This Opportunity • Full-time remote work. • Weekends off. • Paid holidays and PTO eligibility. • HMO eligibility after the required tenure period. • Family Medical Incentive eligibility. • PAG-IBIG and referral incentives. • Learning sessions and growth opportunities. • Supportive, growth-driven remote community. • Opportunity to strengthen finance, admin, systems, documentation, and AI workflow skills. How to Apply: Please submit: • Your updated resume. • Your answers to the application questions below. Application Questions 1. Tell us about your finance, bookkeeping support, executive admin, or operations experience. Which tools have you used? 2. Walk us through how you would reconcile a bank or credit card account in QuickBooks Online, or how you would clean up a messy invoice/payment tracker. 3. Which AI tools have you used at work? Share one specific example of how you used AI to organize information, save time, improve documentation, or create a better workflow. How did you check the output for accuracy? Applications with clear, specific answers will be prioritized. We are especially interested in candidates who can show real examples of finance/admin accuracy, systems thinking, responsible AI use, and proactive communication. Apply today and build a meaningful remote career where your accuracy, initiative, and systems mindset can truly shine.

Full job description

About us: Creatr Led is a done-for-you launch partner for content creators — we build and launch product brands for creators (some with audiences in the millions. We launch their own brands and we need someone to come in and assist with the website building and management of the stores on Shopify. What you'll do: • Build Shopify stores from scratch for new creator brand launches — design, code, set up, go live • Create high-converting theme pages, landing pages, and waitlist / coming-soon drop pages • Manage and update stores for each new drop (products, collections, pages) • Own conversion rate optimisation (CRO) • Apply strong copy and design strategy • Use Claude Code to build faster • Set Shopify up properly from scratch (apps, payments, shipping, settings) Requirements: • 5+ years hands-on Shopify — non-negotiable, we need an expert not a learner • Can build with code: Liquid, HTML, CSS, JS (not just drag-and-drop). When you apply, start your message with "Mango Sunrise" so we know you actually read this • Proven experience building theme, landing, and waitlist pages • Strong CRO and design/copy strategy • Working knowledge of Claude Code or other AI coding tools • Self-starter who owns projects end to end, with clear written English How to apply: Start your message with "Mango Sunrise" Send 2–3 links to Shopify stores you built from scratch + what you did on each A 2-minute Loom walking through one store you're proud of Your monthly salary expectation and earliest start date

Full job description

Role Overview: We’re looking for a GHL power user who can build, deploy, and optimize AI voice agents and chat flows inside GoHighLevel. You’ll bridge the gap between conversational AI and GHL’s automation suite (campaigns, pipelines, triggers). Key Responsibilities: Design and implement AI voice agents (outbound or inbound) using GHL’s voice AI tools or third-party voice integrations via webhooks/APIs. Multi-Language switchover knowledge is a must. Build AI-powered chat sequences (live chat + chatbot hybrids) within GHL, including lead qualification, appointment booking, and FAQ handling. Integrate external AI platforms (e.g., OpenAI, ElevenLabs, Bland AI, PlayHT, Voiceflow) with GHL workflows. Configure conversation triggers: SMS ? voice fallback, chat-to-human handoff, voicemail detection, transcript analysis. Set up call tracking, recording, and AI-driven sentiment tagging inside GHL. Optimize AI scripts/prompts for appointment setting, lead nurturing, and customer support. Maintain conversation logs, analyze drop-off points, and improve AI response logic. Required Skills: GoHighLevel expert – campaigns, triggers, workflows, custom fields, webhooks, inbound/outbound voice, chat widget. Experience deploying voice AI agents (Bland, Retell AI, Synthflow, or native GHL Voice AI). Proficiency with chat-based AI (OpenAI Assistant, Dialogflow, or GHL’s native AI chat features). Understanding of conversation design, prompt engineering, and fallback logic. API integration knowledge (REST, webhooks, JSON) – connecting external AI tools to GHL. Bonus: Experience with Twilio, Zapier/Make, CRM data syncing, or call analytics. Nice-to-Have: Prior agency experience managing GHL sub-accounts. Knowledge of NLP or LLM fine-tuning. Experience with compliance (TCPA, consent recording, opt-outs). How to Apply: Send the following to alanc@galactictiles.com Brief intro + link to portfolio or past GHL builds. A short Loom recording (optional) showing a GHL AI voice or chat integration you’ve built.
