Full job description

Location: Remote (Philippines) Employment Type: Full-Time Independent Contractor Salary: $900 to $1,200 USD/month (Depending on Experience) Help Build the Operating System of a Modern Accounting Firm Insight Advantage Group is a fast-growing U.S.-based outsourced accounting and Fractional CFO firm serving businesses across the United States. We're not a traditional accounting firm. We're building a modern, technology-driven company that uses AI, automation, documentation, and standardized processes to help our team deliver exceptional client service. We're looking for someone who wants to help build the systems that allow our company to scale. This is not an Executive Assistant position. This is not a Virtual Assistant position. This is an Operations & Systems role. You'll work directly with our Accounting Manager and leadership team to improve how our business operates. Your Mission Build systems that help our team work smarter. You'll own the documentation, operational systems, project management, and technology that support our accounting team. Your goal is to eliminate inefficiencies, improve communication, document processes, and help us leverage technology to grow. Responsibilities Operations & Project Management (35%) • Maintain and improve ClickUp • Coordinate operational projects • Track action items and deadlines • Organize recurring workflows • Assist with recruiting and onboarding • Coordinate team meetings • Prepare agendas and meeting notes • Keep projects moving forward • Support our Accounting Manager with operational initiatives Documentation & Knowledge Management (35%) • Own our SOP library • Create and maintain process documentation • Record and organize Loom videos • Build training materials • Maintain our internal knowledge base • Create client playbooks • Standardize templates and checklists • Ensure documentation stays current as processes evolve AI, Systems & Automation (30%) • Research and test AI tools • Build and organize AI prompt libraries • Improve ClickUp workflows • Create automations using tools such as Zapier, Make.com, or similar platforms • Evaluate new software and technology • Recommend operational improvements • Help implement systems that increase efficiency across the firm Required Qualifications To be considered, you must have: • Minimum 3 years of experience in Operations, Project Management, Business Operations, or Operations Coordination. • Experience managing projects using ClickUp, Asana, Monday.com, or similar software. • Experience creating professional SOPs using Loom, Scribe, Tango, Notion, or similar documentation platforms. • Excellent written and spoken English. • Exceptional organizational skills. • Strong critical thinking and problem-solving abilities. • Experience working remotely with a U.S., Canadian, Australian, or UK-based company. • The ability to independently manage multiple priorities. • A reliable computer, high-speed internet, and dedicated home office. Highly Preferred We're especially interested in candidates who have experience with: • AI tools such as ChatGPT or Claude • Workflow automation platforms like Zapier, Make.com, or n8n • ClickUp automations • Google Workspace • CRM systems • Process mapping • Business operations • Continuous improvement methodologies Experience supporting an accounting or professional services firm is a strong plus. Who Will Thrive Here You'll love this role if you're the type of person who naturally asks: "Why are we doing it this way?" You enjoy: • Building systems • Creating order from chaos • Improving processes • Learning new technology • Organizing information • Solving operational problems • Helping teams become more productive You're proactive. You don't simply complete tasks. You improve them. What Success Looks Like Within your first six months: • Our documentation is organized and easy to maintain. • ClickUp is consistently updated and supports our workflows. • Team projects stay on track without constant follow-up. • New employees onboard faster because of the systems you've built. • AI and automation opportunities are identified and implemented. • Our Accounting Manager spends more time leading people and less time managing administrative work. Why Join Us? We're building a company designed to scale. Technology, AI, documentation, and operational excellence are central to how we work. You'll work directly with leadership, influence how the company operates, and have significant opportunities to grow as the business expands. We expect this position to evolve into a leadership role as our company continues to grow. Application Instructions Please submit: • Resume • 2 to 3 minute introduction video • Internet speed test • Salary expectations In your application, answer these questions: 1. Describe the most impactful operational improvement you've implemented. 2. What project management software have you used, and how did you use it? 3. What documentation software have you used (Loom, Scribe, Tango, Notion, etc.)? 4. What AI or automation tools have you implemented in your previous role? 5. If you joined our company tomorrow, what would your first 30 days look like? The first line of your application must read: "Great systems create great companies." Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

Full job description

Looking for someone who has GHL (Go High Level) experience, as well as STRONG design skills. Job Overview : We're looking for a excited and dynamic person to join our team. we're in the business of creating automation / funnels / and systems for our clients, and lookint to continually wow them with great looking funnels / pages / or automations that look as good as they work. Job Description: Looking for strong website design skills, unique creativity, and ability to go through a funnel automation and update any / all design aspects (landing pages / emails / thank you pages / notifications etc). we're looking for someone who is a self-starter and not simply just waiting to be asked for things done. Qualifications & Tools : Our main platform is GHL (Go High Level), however we are open if you use other platforms, and can simply figure out how to use GHL well. We are more than open to Ai Deisgned websties / Claude code Etc. Currently we do utilize the Ai-Studio in GHL as well to vibe code, however good coding skills are helpful if claude code is always used.

Full job description

Job Description We are building a multi-brand business operating system (OS) using Lovable.dev and Supabase. Our platforms are already structured. We are looking for a senior web developer to help complete, stabilize, and polish existing systems—not rebuild them. This is a long-term role focused on execution, reliability, and finishing work properly. Phase 1 focus: GasMask (Additional platforms follow after GasMask is stable.) What You Will Be Working On Your job is to take already-built systems and help move them from “almost done” to fully complete and stable. You will work floor by floor, page by page, including: • Completing unfinished pages and flows • Fixing data fetch and rendering issues • Finalizing CRM functionality (stores, contacts, notes, products) • Ensuring all pages work on desktop and mobile • Cleaning up UI and unfinished states • Making sure nothing breaks after changes Platforms include: GasMask (first priority) Unforgettable Times TopTier Experience Playboxxx Core OS tools How Work Is Organized (Important) We use a floor-by-floor checklist system. Each “floor” (module) contains multiple pages. A floor is not complete until every page passes QA on desktop and mobile. If something fails QA, the task is not considered done. This role requires discipline and attention to detail. Required Skills (Non-Negotiable) • Strong hands-on experience with Lovable.dev • Practical experience with Supabase (tables, relationships, CRUD) • Ability to debug issues like: Blank pages “Failed to fetch” errors Data not showing • Experience completing and polishing existing platforms • Comfortable following structured task lists • Strong attention to detail • Ability to test your own work before marking tasks complete This role is not for beginners. Communication & Availability • Must be reachable via WhatsApp • Able to provide regular progress updates • Comfortable working independently with clear instructions WhatsApp communication is required. Compensation ?45,000 – ?65,000 per month (approximately $800 – $1,100 USD) Pay depends on experience, speed, and reliability. There is room for growth as more platforms are completed. Work Setup • Long-term role • Stable, ongoing workload • Clear priorities • No guessing, no chaos • You are paid for completion and stability How to Apply Please include: Your experience with Lovable.dev Your experience with Supabase Examples of platforms or systems you’ve worked on Your WhatsApp number ?? Applications without a WhatsApp number will not be considered. Who This Role Is NOT For • Beginners or trainees • Developers who prefer rebuilding instead of finishing • Developers who don’t test their own work • Anyone uncomfortable working inside existing systems Final Note (Sets the Tone) We value: • Reliability • Clean execution • Systems that stay stable

Full job description

We're Hiring: Tech / IT / Software Developer Remote • Full-Time • Filipino Professionals • International Clients ABOUT AIDUS AiDus places top Filipino tech talent with growth-stage companies in the US, UK, Canada, and Australia. Our clients need developers and IT professionals who can build, ship, and support real products — not just look good on paper. THE ROLE We are sourcing candidates across the full tech spectrum. Tell us your specialty and we will match you with the right client. SUB-ROLES WE'RE HIRING FOR Frontend Developer — React, Next.js, Vue, Angular, Svelte Backend Developer — Node.js, Python, PHP/Laravel, Java, Go, Ruby Full Stack Developer QA / Test Engineer — Manual or Automation (Cypress, Selenium, Playwright, Jest) IT Support / Helpdesk — Tier 1, 2, or 3 DevOps / Cloud Engineer — AWS, Azure, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD Data Analyst / Engineer — SQL, Python, Power BI, Tableau, Looker, dbt AI / ML Engineer — TensorFlow, PyTorch, LangChain, Hugging Face WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR 2+ years of professional experience in your specific discipline Strong English — you will collaborate directly with international teams and clients Portfolio, GitHub profile, or samples of your actual work (required) Experience with remote work tools: Slack, Jira, Linear, Notion, GitHub Reliable internet, own equipment, flexibility for US or AU hours BONUS POINTS FOR Enterprise systems experience: Oracle, SAP, Salesforce, ServiceNow, NetSuite, Workday Cloud certifications (AWS, Azure, GCP) AI-assisted development workflow (GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT) Startup or agency background — you know how to move fast and own your work WHY AIDUS? No middlemen — placed directly with a vetted client company Long-term, stable remote positions — not short freelance contracts Competitive USD compensation based on your stack and seniority level Work with modern teams that ship real products and respect their engineers HOW TO APPLY Fill out our application form here: join.aidus.ai IMPORTANT: We will NOT entertain applications sent via DM, email, or any channel other than the official form above. No exceptions. Only form submissions will be reviewed.

Full job description

About the role I run a growing portfolio of online media businesses powered by custom AI tooling. I'm looking for a Vibe Coder / Prompt Engineer to take ownership of building, extending, and maintaining the AI-powered tools, landing pages, and prompt systems that run the operation. What you'll do — three areas: 1. Tools & platform. Build and maintain our internal AI production tools end-to-end 2. Landing pages & analytics. Build clean, fast, conversion-focused landing pages and webstores 3. Prompt engineering. Write, test, and refine prompts for image, video, and text generation What I'm looking for: You take a goal and return a working, deployed, tested product — not "done on my machine" or "sitting in a branch." If you tell me it's tested, it's tested. You're a proactive self-starter. Nobody will write you a detailed spec. You'll get a Loom or a message describing what's needed and figure out the rest. If something breaks, you investigate before being asked. If you spot a better way, you flag it and build it. You communicate status honestly — "done and live here," or "80% done, blocked on X, here's my plan." Overstating what's finished is the fastest way to not work with me. You move fast — features in hours, not days — and hit deadlines, or flag early if you can't. Hours & working style: Remote, full-time. We move fast and I need you reachable and actively working during core hours, CET time zone. Compensation: Base Retainer (Months 1-2): $600 USD / month Base Retainer (Month 3+): $800 USD / month (based on performance) Maximum Monthly Earnings: Up to $2,000 USD / month (base + bonuses) Paid monthly via Wise/Paypal/Crypto All tools, AI subscriptions, and API credits are covered by me; you provide your own computer and internet. Process: a short trial task so I can see how you actually work, then ongoing engagement for strong performers. To apply kindly watch this loom video and respond with a loom video (5 minutes or less) explaining why you would be a great fit. www.loom.com/share/a8c9a5156bcd45f1a3a8b497f96ae4bf I will be seeing all responses by the end of this week, where will move to phase 2: PAID trial task

Full job description

Job Overview: We are a growing hospitality investment and management company operating a portfolio of boutique and branded hotels across Arizona and California. We’re hiring a Remote Hotel Operations & Revenue Manager who can serve as a strategic partner in overseeing hotel operations, driving revenue, and directly supporting the company president (me) in executing key projects and daily priorities. This role requires someone with hands-on revenue management experience and a proactive, operational mindset. You'll help track performance, lead process improvement, manage action items, and support follow-through across multiple hotels. Comfort with using AI tools, managing task systems, and joining meetings or reviewing meeting to summarize outcomes is a must. This is a long-term remote role with high exposure, varied responsibilities, and the potential to grow alongside our company. Key Responsibilities: Revenue & Performance Management • Oversee room pricing, inventory, and distribution strategy across properties • Analyze occupancy, ADR, RevPAR, and forecasting data; recommend improvements • Audit OTA listings, booking engine setups, and rate parity regularly • Collaborate with presodent to implement pricing, promotion, and channel strategies Operational Oversight & Project Management • Track and support key hotel operations projects, initiatives, and CapEx plans • Support the President to ensure execution of SOPs and operational consistency across the hotel portfolio. Assist in creating SOPs when and where needed. • Identify inefficiencies and suggest operational improvements using AI and automation tools • Assist in preparing & reviewing daily/monthly reports for each hotel. Executive Support (Support for Owner/President) • Join internal and external meetings to take notes, summarize key decisions, and draft follow-ups • Maintain and update a task/project dashboard for hotel operations and executive priorities • Assist in scheduling, email follow-ups, and light research tasks • Prepare quarterly investor business recap for each hotel. • Leverage tools like ChatGPT, Notion, Trello, or AI agents to improve workflows and save time Ideal Candidate Will Have: • At least 2 years of hotel revenue management experience • Background in supporting operations for U.S.-based hotels or hospitality companies • Strong analytical and communication skills • Proactive, self-motivated, and detail-oriented approach • Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, Google Workspace, task/project tools (e.g. Trello, Asana, Notion), and PMS systems (e.g. Cloudbeds, HotelKey, ChoiceAdvantage, SynXis, etc.) • Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Otter.ai, Zapier, or similar platforms • Fluent English (spoken and written); Spanish is a plus • Availability to work partially or fully during U.S. business hours How to Apply If you're excited about supporting high-level hotel operations while working closely with an experienced hospitality investor & entrepreneur, we’d love to hear from you. Please email your resume and a tailored cover letter, and include answers to the following questions to be considered: 1. How many years of experience do you have in hotel revenue management? 2. Have you worked with U.S.-based hotel companies? If yes, please describe your role and the types of properties you supported. 3. What AI tools or automation platforms (e.g. ChatGPT, Otter, Zapier, Notion) have you used, and how would you rate your proficiency on a scale of 1–5 (5 being expert)? 4. Have you provided executive-level support before (e.g. meeting notes, task tracking, project coordination)? Briefly share an actual example. We’re looking for someone proactive, tech-savvy, and ready to become an essential partner in daily operations. Apply today and join a fast-paced, forward-thinking team that values innovation, efficiency, and execution. Compensation & Benefits • Monthly Salary: $1,000 – $2,000 USD (based on experience and skillset) • Performance-based bonuses available every 6-months • Fully remote position with flexible hours (must overlap with U.S. business hours) • Opportunity to work closely with a U.S.-based hospitality executive and gain deep insight into hotel investment and operations • Long-term role with growth potential and increasing responsibility over time • Tools and training provided to support efficiency, automation, and workflow optimization We value initiative, clarity, and innovation—and we’re looking for someone ready to grow with us.

Full job description

BACKEND-FIRST WORDPRESS DEVELOPER REQUIRED — PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING This is not a basic Elementor design role. We are looking for a highly skilled WordPress developer with strong backend development, troubleshooting, custom PHP, webhook integration, email configuration, and custom integration experience. Backend experience is the most critical need for this role. However, you must also have strong front-end skills and be able to accurately build modern, responsive, high-end websites from provided mockups and design direction. If you mostly depend on plugins, templates, WP Forms, Contact Form 7, or drag-and-drop tools to build functionality, this is not the right role for you. You must be able to work with custom PHP, JavaScript, AJAX, WPCode Snippets, custom forms, webhooks, WP SMTP, email configuration, Stripe, Mailchimp, WooCommerce, booking plugins, responsive layouts, custom CSS, and backend WordPress troubleshooting. A critical part of this role will involve building, connecting, and troubleshooting webhooks, form submissions, automated email workflows, SMTP issues, payment notifications, booking notifications, and other backend communication between WordPress and third-party tools. You must also be able to take provided mockups and build clean, polished, mobile-responsive pages with strong attention to layout, spacing, typography, responsiveness, and visual accuracy. We need someone who can fix technical problems, resolve plugin conflicts, troubleshoot broken functionality, test integrations, and make the website work properly without needing constant step-by-step instructions. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY if you cannot confidently handle backend WordPress development, PHP troubleshooting, webhooks, email configuration, custom integrations, and clean front-end execution. ABOUT THE ROLE We are looking for a backend-first WordPress developer who can also execute high-quality front-end website builds. Our websites include custom integrations and custom applications using PHP, JavaScript, AJAX, CSS, WordPress functionality, webhooks, third-party tools, custom forms, email systems, booking systems, payment integrations, WooCommerce, responsive layouts, and performance optimization. This role is not for someone who only builds pages in Elementor or installs templates. We need someone who can build, customize, troubleshoot, and support modern WordPress websites that require backend thinking, custom code, webhook logic, email configuration, front-end accuracy, and real issue resolution. We build our websites using WordPress, Elementor Pro, WPCode Snippets, custom PHP, JavaScript, AJAX, CSS, webhooks, and custom integrations. We do not use templates. We will provide mockups and design direction. You must be able to execute those mockups accurately on the front end while also making sure the backend functionality works properly. Please review these websites before applying: 100bmod.org organizedmovements.com If you cannot support, troubleshoot, and build websites at this level, please do not apply. CRITICAL REQUIREMENT The most important requirement for this role is backend WordPress experience. Again, this is not just an Elementor design role. This is a backend-focused WordPress role for someone who can troubleshoot, code, integrate, configure, and resolve technical problems independently. PHP, webhooks, custom integrations, and email configuration are critical needs for this role. You must be able to troubleshoot and resolve issues related to: Custom PHP functionality Webhook setup and troubleshooting Webhook-based form submissions Webhook notifications and automation AJAX and JavaScript functionality Custom form submissions WP SMTP and email delivery Email configuration and deliverability issues Automated email notifications Booking confirmation emails Payment notification emails Stripe webhook/payment notifications Mailchimp integration and automation WooCommerce setup and troubleshooting WooCommerce email issues Booking plugin setup and troubleshooting Plugin conflicts Broken site functionality WordPress performance issues Mobile and browser-specific issues Backend errors Database or configuration-related issues Custom WordPress workflows Custom integrations that require code beyond basic plugin setup We are especially looking for someone who can create and troubleshoot custom forms using PHP, AJAX, JavaScript, webhooks, and proper email configuration. We are not looking for someone who only knows WP Forms, Contact Form 7, or basic drag-and-drop form plugins. Plugins may be part of the workflow, but you must know how to troubleshoot them, customize them, connect them properly, configure email delivery, and fix issues when they do not work as expected. FRONT-END REQUIREMENT Backend experience is the priority, but strong front-end development is also required. You must be able to take provided mockups, references, or design direction and build the website accurately in WordPress. You should have a strong eye for: Layout Spacing Typography Responsiveness Mobile presentation Visual hierarchy Clean front-end execution Modern luxury website design Animation and interactive effects Custom CSS Cross-browser consistency We do not need someone who only makes pages look nice. We need someone who can make the website look good and function correctly. REQUIRED SKILLS Strong WordPress backend development experience Custom PHP development Webhook integration Webhook troubleshooting Email configuration WP SMTP / email delivery troubleshooting JavaScript AJAX HTML5 CSS3 Custom CSS Elementor / Elementor Pro WPCode Snippets Custom form integrations Custom email notifications WooCommerce integration WooCommerce email troubleshooting Stripe integration Stripe webhook troubleshooting Mailchimp integration Booking plugins such as Amelia Booking notification setup and troubleshooting Events calendar plugins Advanced Custom Fields / ACF Custom WordPress functionality Dynamic content development Plugin conflict troubleshooting Backend issue resolution WordPress maintenance and troubleshooting Website performance optimization Speed optimization Responsive web development Mobile optimization Cross-browser testing Mockup-to-website development Modern front-end development SEO best practices Google Analytics integration Google Search Console setup WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING Building custom WordPress websites using Elementor Pro and custom code Creating custom forms using PHP, AJAX, JavaScript, and webhooks Setting up and troubleshooting WP SMTP and email delivery Configuring and troubleshooting automated website emails Building and troubleshooting webhook-based workflows Setting up and troubleshooting booking plugins such as Amelia Integrating Stripe, Mailchimp, WooCommerce, and other tools Troubleshooting Stripe webhooks, payment notifications, and checkout issues Troubleshooting WooCommerce emails and backend functionality Writing and modifying PHP, CSS, JavaScript, and AJAX Creating custom functionality through WPCode Snippets or theme-level code Troubleshooting plugin conflicts and backend errors Fixing broken forms, checkout issues, email issues, booking issues, and webhook issues Fixing custom functionality when plugins do not work correctly Testing forms, payments, bookings, emails, webhooks, and integrations before submitting work Converting mockups into fully responsive WordPress websites Building polished front-end layouts with clean spacing, typography, and mobile responsiveness Optimizing websites for speed, performance, mobile, and SEO Maintaining and improving existing client websites WHO THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR This role is not for someone who only knows Elementor design. This role is not for someone who only installs plugins and templates. This role is not for someone who depends on plugins for every feature. This role is not for someone who cannot troubleshoot backend issues. This role is not for someone who only uses WP Forms or Contact Form 7. This role is not for someone who cannot write or understand PHP, AJAX, JavaScript, and webhook logic. This role is not for someone who cannot configure or troubleshoot email delivery issues. This role is not for someone who cannot build responsive front-end layouts from mockups. This role is not for someone who ignores spacing, mobile layout, typography, or visual polish. This role is not for someone who disappears, misses deadlines, or needs constant follow-up. This role is not for someone who says “it should work” without testing and resolving the issue. This role is not for someone who cannot take ownership of technical problems. WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR This role is for someone who understands how WordPress works beyond the page builder. You should be comfortable reviewing errors, testing functionality, identifying plugin conflicts, fixing custom code, configuring SMTP, troubleshooting email delivery, building webhook integrations, improving performance, and making sure every part of the website works correctly. You should also be comfortable building clean, modern, responsive front-end layouts that match provided mockups and design direction. You must be able to work independently, communicate clearly, meet deadlines, and take ownership of technical issues until they are resolved. We need someone who can think through problems, not someone who waits for step-by-step instructions for every issue. You may use Codex or AI coding tools to assist with coding, but you must understand the code, test it properly, and be able to fix problems yourself. TO APPLY Please send the following: 1. Your best WordPress websites that include custom functionality 2. Examples of backend WordPress issues you have solved 3. Examples of custom forms you have built using PHP, AJAX, JavaScript, or webhooks 4. Examples of webhook integrations you have built or troubleshot 5. Examples of WP SMTP, email configuration, or email deliverability issues you have resolved 6. Examples of Stripe, Mailchimp, WooCommerce, or booking plugin work 7. Examples of front-end websites you built from mockups or design direction 8. A short explanation of your backend WordPress experience 9. Your availability 10. Confirmation that you reviewed 100bmod.org and organizedmovements.com Applications that only show basic Elementor websites will not be considered. To confirm you've read this posting, begin your application with: "Backend First," followed by two sentences explaining the most complex custom WordPress backend feature you've built, such as a custom plugin, API integration, custom PHP application, database architecture, webhook workflow, advanced email configuration, or similar backend solution, and the business problem it solved.

Full job description

About the Role We're an overseas-focused AI content team running a portfolio of mobile apps. We're hiring an experienced Flutter engineer to handle high-frequency app development, iteration, and store submissions. You'll own the rapid build-and-ship cycle that powers our multi-app matrix strategy. This is a Full-time only position Responsibilities • Develop, maintain, and iterate Flutter apps to support fast replication across our product matrix • Build, differentiate, and publish multiple app variants at high frequency — hitting a steady output of several apps shipped per week • Independently handle iOS App Store and Google Play submissions, reviews, and compliance issues; respond quickly to review feedback • Use AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) heavily to maximize development speed • Implement tracking, attribution (e.g. Adjust), remote config, and growth-related features as needed Requirements • 3+ years of hands-on Flutter experience; able to take an app from zero to published independently • Strong, proven experience building and shipping multiple app variants — deep understanding of app differentiation, avoiding account/app linkage, and passing review • Very familiar with both iOS App Store and Google Play publishing — review mechanics, rejection handling, and account risk management • Daily user of at least one AI Code Agent (Claude Code / Codex / Cursor) — able to ship significantly faster using AI tools • Key hard metric: consistently ship multiple app variants per week • Self-driven, fast-paced, and comfortable with high-frequency iteration Nice to Have • Familiarity with attribution systems (Adjust S2S) • Experience with overseas ad monetization or growth products • Exposure to AI image/video generation products Setup • 100% remote, full-time • Evaluated on delivery and publishing output, not hours

Full job description

Job Title Full-Time AI Builder for Trades Software Startup (ChatGPT, Claude, Zapier) Job Type Full-time, long-term remote role. Philippines only. Compensation PHP 50,000–70,000/month, depending on experience and fit, plus performance-based bonuses as the business grows. This role starts with a 60-day trial period. Compensation and responsibilities can grow if the fit is strong. Working Hours Full-time. We are flexible on the exact schedule, but you must be able to work 8 hours somewhere between 6:00 AM and 6:00 PM Pacific Time. Job Description We are starting a new software business focused on building practical AI-powered tools for trades businesses. The business is early-stage and pre-revenue, so we are looking for someone resourceful, technical, honest, and comfortable building from the ground up. This is not a basic VA role and not a pure coding role. We are looking for a full-time AI builder and support lead who can use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Zapier to create useful workflows, test them carefully, document them clearly, and eventually help support customers. You do not need to be a software developer. Coding is not required. But you must be comfortable with AI tools, automations, troubleshooting, and learning new systems quickly. What You’ll Do Build AI workflows and automations using tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Zapier, Google Workspace, and similar tools. Turn messy business problems into simple workflows. Test automations carefully and make sure they actually work. Write prompts and improve AI outputs. Document systems, SOPs, and customer instructions. Help troubleshoot customer issues once we launch. Create short Loom-style walkthrough videos when helpful. Work directly with the founders to build and improve the business. Required Skills Required: - Strong English writing and communication. - Strong experience using ChatGPT and/or Claude. - Familiarity with Zapier. - Comfortable learning new AI tools and automation tools. - Strong problem-solving ability. - Detail-oriented testing mindset. - Ability to explain technical issues simply. - Reliable internet and reliable work habits. - Comfortable working in an early-stage startup. Nice to have: - Make, n8n, Airtable, Notion, Google Sheets, or CRM automation experience. - Experience with customer support. - Experience making Loom videos or help docs. - Experience with trades, home service, construction, or contractor businesses. - Basic API/webhook familiarity. Who This Role Is For You should apply if: - You enjoy building useful AI workflows, not just talking about AI. - You like figuring things out. - You are organized and careful. - You can work independently without needing every step explained. - You are comfortable supporting customers and troubleshooting issues. - You want a long-term full-time role where you can grow with the business. You should not apply if: - You only want basic VA tasks. - You have only used AI casually. - You need every task explained step-by-step. - You do not like troubleshooting. - You are not comfortable with customer support. Application Instructions To apply, complete this application form: mission.revivepaintingang.uk/apply-ai-builder Please include a Loom/video link showing an AI automation or workflow you have built. If you do not have one already, record a short walkthrough of your most impressive AI/automation project. Important: We will only review candidates who complete the form. Please do not send a generic copy/paste message. In your OLJ message, include the phrase: TRADES AI BUILDER so we know you read the full post.

Full job description

The Opportunity Search is splitting in two. Half your future visitors will find you through Google. The other half will ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Google's AI Overviews *"what's the best rehab that allows..."* — and get an answer with three sources cited. We need one person who can win both. We operate a portfolio of addiction treatment and behavioral health web properties, including a directory platform built on a modern stack (Next.js / Vercel / Supabase). Organic discovery is our primary growth channel, and we want to be early and aggressive on AI search visibility while competitors are still only thinking about Google. What You'll Own Traditional SEO (~60%) - Keyword strategy, on-page optimization, and content direction for YMYL health topics - Technical SEO on Next.js: rendering strategy, canonicals, Core Web Vitals, internal linking, crawlability - Structured data implementation and expansion (schema.org: MedicalClinic, FAQPage, MedicalOrganization) - Programmatic SEO for state/city directory pages — scaled templates that don't read as thin content - Migration support: an active WordPress ? Next.js rebuild with URL preservation and redirect mapping - Competitive gap analysis against established treatment directories AI Search / GEO (~40%) - Get our properties **cited as sources** in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews for treatment-related queries - Structure content for answer extraction: direct-answer formatting, question-based headings, definitive claims with data, citable statistics - Entity and brand optimization: consistent entity signals, Wikipedia/Wikidata-adjacent presence, third-party mentions AI models learn from - Implement and maintain llms.txt and monitor AI crawler access (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot) — deciding what to allow and how to structure it - Track AI visibility: monitor which queries surface us in AI answers, benchmark against competitors, and build a repeatable measurement process (this field has no Search Console — you'll help invent our instrumentation) - Stay current: this discipline changes monthly, and we expect you to bring us the changes before we read about them You're a Fit If You - Have 3+ years of SEO results in competitive or YMYL niches (health, legal, finance) — with at least one win you can walk us through in detail - Have *actually done* AI search optimization — you can show a page or brand you got cited in AI answers, or a documented experiment, not just articles you've read about GEO - Are technical enough to work directly with a Next.js codebase conversation: you don't write the code, but you can spec exactly what the code should do - Understand E-E-A-T and what it takes for health content to survive core updates - Are comfortable in a scrappy, founder-led environment: no committees, fast decisions, your recommendations ship **Nice to have:** behavioral health or healthcare marketing background, familiarity with treatment-marketing compliance (LegitScript, patient-brokering laws), experience with AI content workflows, basic SQL/Supabase. description

Full job description

Mission: Drive measurable growth by executing high-performance search, content, and acquisition tasks. As our Growth Specialist, you will support technical SEO, content production, and PPC performance, helping scale our growth plans to deliver leads, revenue, and retention for internal and client brands. Culture: We are a high-performance, customer-centric team driven by data, design, and collaboration. We value initiative, creative ownership, and continuous learning. Location: Remote (Philippines-based). Strong preference for candidates with experience in or awareness of Australian and New Zealand (ANZ) digital culture and customer expectations. Reports To: Growth Manager ???? Why Join Us? Wolf IQ is a fast-growing, profitable web agency helping SMBs scale online. With over 10 years of solid growth and success under our belt, we’re seeking a Growth Specialist who blends tactical execution with a growth mindset to drive traffic, conversions, and meaningful results. As our Growth Specialist, you will execute the infrastructure that powers our Growth Plans (SEO, Reviews, and Google Ads). You will work closely under our Growth Manager to help scale our growth engine from ~15 to 50+ customers. ???? What You'll Do as a Growth Engineer Key Responsibilities: ???? Content Creation: Take full ownership of drafting and creating high-quality "Meeting of Minds" (MoG) pillar articles. ????SEO Implementation: Execute routine on-page and technical SEO tasks, conduct deep-dive audits, and build competitor backlink lists using enterprise tools. ????Google Ads Management: Handle the hands-on-keyboard execution of weekly Google Ads account reviews and optimizations based on strategic direction. ????Client Reporting Support: Assist the team by pulling data and assembling monthly SEO and PPC performance reports (using Swydo) to ensure they are complete before the 5th of each month. ?????Visual Content Support: Assist in creating high-quality visual assets using Canva to support SEO articles, PPC campaigns, and social proof initiatives. ?????????Automation & Documentation: Identify levers to reduce manual, repetitive work and contribute documented workflows to the Wolf IQ growth playbook. ?????Technical Optimisation: Conduct deep-dive audits and keyword research using SEMrush. ????Cross-Functional Collaboration: Align with Sales, Marketing, Ops, and Support to ensure growth strategies crush company goals. ???? Who You Are 2+ years of experience in technical SEO, PPC (Google Ads), or a growth marketing role. Expert user of SEMrush (or similar enterprise-grade SEO tools). Comfortable blending creative strategy with rigorous analytical execution and statistical thinking. A track record of identifying ways to automate workflows and reduce manual tasks. Knowledge of the Australian and New Zealand (ANZ) digital landscape and how local people search online is an advantage. Proactive, responsive, and collaborative in a remote-first, async-oriented team. ???? Preferred Qualifications: Experience using ClickUp (or similar project management tools) to stay organized and deliver tasks transparently. Deep foundational SEO knowledge, including technical audits, schema markup, and keyword research tools (like Ahrefs or SEMrush). Familiarity with Google Ads management and dashboard tracking tools like Swydo. Experience with Canva for creating professional digital assets. Proficiency in using AI tools (Gemini, Manus, Lovable, or similar) to streamline repetitive administrative tasks and enhance output quality. ???? Ready to Shape the Future? If you're a growth strategist with a love for technical SEO, performance marketing, and building scalable systems—and you’re ready to lead a high-performance digital channel—this role is for you. Apply now and help lead the pack ???? in shaping the digital voice of tomorrow’s brands. To confirm you've read the entire job description, please respond with the subject line: "Grow with Wolf IQ". Be sure to include the following in your application: Resume A short note (3–5 sentences) describing your prior experience Photo of your work area

AI Data Engineer - Data Extraction

Full Time 30 hrs/week Posted/updated: Jun 30, 2026 N/A Salary unclear Senior ask, but trainable profile language

Specification-Driven Extraction Engineering: Design and maintain declarative extraction specifications—using Pydantic models, JSON schemas, or domain-specific languages—that describe exactly which fields to capture, their types, and validation rules...

ai agentai agentsagenticmcpllmwebsiterepocsspythonapidatabase
Why it belongs here
  • AI/build signals: ai agent, ai agents, agentic, mcp, llm
  • Build surface: website, repo, css, python, api, database, automation, workflow
  • Code/build substrate: repo, css, python, api, database, mcp
  • Trainable language: va
  • Scarcity/seniority signal: expert
Arca angle
  • Full-time role: good fit for a dedicated Arca graduate placement.
Full job description

Specification-Driven Extraction Engineering: Design and maintain declarative extraction specifications—using Pydantic models, JSON schemas, or domain-specific languages—that describe exactly which fields to capture, their types, and validation rules. Implement pipelines that translate these specifications into executable extraction plans, leveraging both classical (Scrapy, Playwright) and AI-augmented (LLM-based semantic parsing) backends. Build reusable specification libraries for recurring data types (product prices, tariff codes, regulatory texts) to accelerate onboarding of new sources. Design and implement autonomous data extraction agents that can make decisions about source selection, retry logic, and parsing strategies Autonomous & Self-Healing Systems: Deploy self-healing spiders that automatically detect website layout changes and repair themselves using Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers (e.g., Scrapy MCP Server, Playwright MCP). Integrate semantic extraction (Scrapy-LLM, custom LLM pipelines) to eliminate selector brittleness—spiders rely on field descriptions, not fragile XPaths. Hands-on experience building AI agents and orchestration systems. Orchestrate complex, multi-step browsing workflows with agentic frameworks (BMAD/TEA, AutoGPT-like agents) that reason about page state, adapt to anti-bot measures, and correct their own behaviour in real time. Platform Thinking & Reusability: Move beyond one-off scrapers: build a component-based extraction platform where selectors, login handlers, and pagination logic are shared, versioned, and tested. Implement monitoring, alerting, and automatic rollback for failed extraction runs. Champion ethical crawling by design—rate limiting, robots.txt respect, and compliance with GDPR/CCPA are built into the specification layer, not retrofitted. Collaboration & Continuous Innovation: Partner with data scientists and domain experts to refine extraction specifications for complex, unstructured domains (e.g., legal texts, tariff classifications). Evaluate and pilot emerging tools to push automation coverage beyond 90%. Document and evangelise specification-driven best practices across the engineering organisation. Qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science 3+ years of experience in web scraping or data extraction Required Skills: Proficiency with Python Experience with specification-Driven Extraction Experience with LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, AutoGen Hands?on use of Scrapy?LLM, Scrapy MCP Server, or similar systems that decouple field definitions from page structure Familiarity with frameworks that give LLMs browser control (Playwright + MCP, BMAD/TEA) to handle complex, non?deterministic crawling tasks. Classical Scraping Fundamentals Data Validation & Storage – Ability to define validation rules within specifications and land clean data into SQL/NoSQL databases or data lake Basic API integration and authentication flows. HTTP, DOM, XPath, CSS. Nice to Haves: Contributions to open-source scraping or AI-automation projects. Contributions to open-source scraping or AI-automation projects. Familiarity with data privacy engineering (GDPR, CCPA) baked into specification design. DevOps light – Docker, CI/CD for testing extraction specifications.

Full job description

AI & Computer Programer (Full Time) Please read this carefully to the end. If you do not, I will not respond to your application. Attention to detail is key. I’m looking for a proactive, AI-literate operator to help us stay ahead of the curve by leveraging AI tools to create content, automate tasks, and improve business efficiency. This is a full-time role with serious growth potential. You must be someone who constantly experiments with new tools and loves turning innovation into systems. Our agency specializes in marketing and business support for martial arts schools, eCommerce brands, and service providers — and we are increasingly building AI into our workflows. You’ll work closely with me to implement AI across content, automation, lead nurturing, and backend operations. Key Responsibilities • AI-Powered Video Creation • Use tools like Veo 3, Runway, Pika, or Sora to create short-form AI videos for ads, social content, and storytelling • Assist in turning briefs or written concepts into visual content using AI tools • Add text, captions, voiceovers, and music to finalize AI video assets • Manage content delivery across multiple platforms: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, etc. Business Optimization Through AI • Identify ways to streamline internal operations using AI (e.g., lead routing, onboarding, reporting) • Set up workflows using tools like Zapier, Make (Integromat), or GoHighLevel automations • Help automate tasks like email responses, meeting scheduling, proposal generation, client reporting, etc. • Research and test new AI tools as they’re released — bring us the best of what’s new • Document repeatable processes and systems as we scale AI Content & Communications • Use ChatGPT or other LLMs to help write emails, blog drafts, sales scripts, and FAQs • Generate creative briefs, outlines, or newsletters using AI • Help brainstorm and test new content strategies across channels Must-Have Experience With Some of These Tools: • AI Content & Automation Tools: • Veo 3, Runway, Pika, Kaiber, Sora • ChatGPT, Claude, Jasper, Copy.ai • Zapier, Make (Integromat), GoHighLevel workflows • Google Sheets + AI formulas/macros • Notion AI, Airtable AI (bonus) Marketing + Design Stack: • Canva, CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro (bonus) • Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, YouTube Studio • Slack, ClickUp, Gmail • Shopify or Amazon (bonus if you understand eCommerce workflows) What We’re Looking For: • A genuine passion for AI and emerging tech — you keep up with releases • Someone who thinks in systems and is always looking for what can be automated • Excellent communication skills — you can simplify complexity and write clearly • Strong attention to detail and the ability to turn ideas into structured workflows • Self-sufficient and proactive: you don’t wait to be told what to fix — you spot it and do it This role is full-time. If you’re good, you’ll grow with us. You’ll be helping lead the AI side of the company — not just following checklists. To ensure you’ve read this entire listing, please reply with the word “triangle” and share a list of the AI tools you are most comfortable with. If you’re really about this life, also tell me one brand or business you think is doing something innovative with AI right now.

Full job description

TYPE OF WORK Full Time WAGE / SALARY $800/month starting salary. $100 raises every 6 months up to $1,500 per month. HOURS PER WEEK 40+ JOB OVERVIEW ARTEZIA European Cabinets is a high-end luxury cabinetry, interior design, and furniture company based in San Francisco, California. We specialize in premium European kitchens, custom cabinetry, and modern interior spaces for discerning residential clients throughout the San Francisco Bay Area and beyond. We are looking for a highly intelligent, proactive, tech-savvy AI Strategist & Digital Operations Specialist to join our growing team full-time. There is a heavy emphasis on marketing and SEO design. This is NOT a basic virtual assistant role. We are looking for someone who genuinely understands modern AI tools, digital systems, SEO, automation, and online business operations — someone excited about the future of AI and motivated to help build systems that improve a real business long-term. You will work directly with ownership and collaborate with our marketing, design, and operations teams. This is a long-term role with substantial opportunity for growth as AI becomes increasingly integrated into our business and industry. ________________________________________ ABOUT THE ROLE This role combines several areas: • AI tools & workflow implementation • SEO & WordPress support • Marketing systems & content coordination • AI-assisted creative production • App integrations & business operations • Technical support & research • Process improvement and automation We are not expecting you to already know everything. What matters most is: • intelligence • curiosity • adaptability • organization • communication • initiative • strong English skills • willingness to learn quickly You should enjoy solving problems, researching solutions, testing new software, and helping improve how a company operates. ________________________________________ RESPONSIBILITIES AI & Automation • Research and implement useful AI tools for our business • Help integrate AI into marketing, operations, and design workflows • Build and improve internal systems and automations • Assist with AI-generated content and workflows • Explore tools such as Claude, ChatGPT, Midjourney, automation apps, and related AI platforms SEO & Website Support • Assist with SEO strategy and implementation • Work inside WordPress websites • Help optimize website structure, pages, blogs, and metadata • Coordinate SEO-focused content creation • Help improve Google rankings and organic traffic over time Marketing & Content • Assist with newsletters and email marketing • Help manage and organize social media content • Help repurpose content using AI tools • Coordinate blog articles and SEO-focused content initiatives • Assist with marketing research and analytics Systems & Operations • Help organize and improve our app ecosystem and workflows • Assist with software integrations and process optimization • Research better tools and platforms for the business • Provide general technical support to the team • Help document systems and processes Interior Design & Creative AI • Support our interior design team with emerging AI tools • Help research AI rendering and visualization tools • Assist with AI-enhanced presentation and concept workflows • Explore ways AI can improve client deliverables and design efficiency ________________________________________ REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS • Excellent written and spoken English • Strong organizational skills • Highly detail-oriented • Tech-savvy and fast learner • Strong problem-solving abilities • Comfortable learning new software quickly • Familiarity with ChatGPT or other AI tools • Experience with WordPress • Basic understanding of SEO principles • Ability to work independently without constant supervision • Stable high-speed internet connection • Quiet professional work environment • Reliable computer setup ________________________________________ BIG PLUS IF YOU HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH • Claude • ChatGPT • Midjourney • Make.com • Zapier • Notion • WordPress • SEO tools • Google Analytics • Social media management • Email marketing platforms • AI image generation • Interior design or architecture industry experience • Automation workflows • Content marketing ________________________________________ SCHEDULE • Full-time • Monday–Friday 9am to 6pm • California business hours (Pacific Time) • Night shift in the Philippines • Long-term position ________________________________________ COMPENSATION & BENEFITS • $800/month starting salary • Long-term stable role • Fully remote work-from-home position • Paid holidays and paid time off • Performance-based raises and bonuses • 13th month bonus • HMO / healthcare allowance or healthcare plan assistance after one year • Paid training and professional development • Opportunity for career growth in AI and digital operations • Direct collaboration with ownership and leadership team • Access to premium AI tools and software We are looking for someone we can invest in long-term. As the role grows and delivers value to the business, compensation and responsibilities can grow significantly as well. ________________________________________ ABOUT US ARTEZIA European Cabinets We are passionate about: • great design • modern architecture • premium European cabinetry • thoughtful systems • technology • long-term relationships • innovation • continuous improvement We value professionalism, creativity, initiative, reliability, and positive communication. ________________________________________ HOW TO APPLY Please DO NOT send a generic application. To apply, send ALL of the following: 1. Your resume 2. A short personalized introduction 3. A 2–3 minute video introduction 4. Links to any relevant projects, websites, portfolios, or systems you have worked on 5. A short paragraph answering this question: “What excites you most about AI and how do you think AI will change small businesses over the next 5 years?” 6. Include the phrase: “Future Builder” at the top of your application so we know you read the entire post. Only qualified applicants will be contacted.

Full job description

I’m looking for a long-term ecommerce right hand to help me build, manage, and grow online stores and ecommerce projects. This is not a simple VA role. I need someone who is smart, reliable, organized, and willing to learn many different parts of ecommerce. You do not need to be an expert in everything. If you already know some of these things, that is a big plus. If you don’t, I will teach you. The most important qualities are: fast learner, honest, detail-oriented, proactive, good with tools, and able to figure things out. Tasks May Include: Creating websites and stores using tools like Claude, Wix, Shopify, or other platforms Setting up and managing Wix ecommerce stores Adding custom code to stores when needed Basic VPS/server setup and coordination Setting up tools like AdsPower Helping with Facebook Business Manager, ad accounts, pixels, pages, and campaigns Helping with Google Ads setup and research Product and market research Competitor research Writing product descriptions and store content Testing websites and fixing small issues Managing ecommerce tasks, checklists, and follow-ups Learning new tools and documenting processes Helping me manage projects from idea to launch You Are a Good Fit If You: Are very organized and detail-oriented Can learn new software quickly Are comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude Can follow tutorials and SOPs Can communicate clearly in English Are proactive and ask good questions Are comfortable with technical tasks, even if you are still learning Want a long-term role and want to grow into a manager/right-hand position Experience That Is a Plus: Wix, Shopify, WooCommerce, or ecommerce store building Facebook Ads / Meta Business Manager Google Ads VPS, domains, DNS, hosting, Cloudflare AdsPower or browser profile tools HTML/CSS/JavaScript basics Market research Project management Ecommerce dropshipping or DTC brands Important: You do not need to know everything already. I care more about your attitude, reliability, and ability to learn. I will provide training, examples, and instructions. Work Schedule: Full-time preferred. Some overlap with my timezone is required. Please mention your availability in your application. How to Apply: Please reply with the subject line: ECOM RIGHT HAND In your application, answer these questions: What ecommerce tools or platforms have you used before? Have you used Claude, ChatGPT, or other AI tools? If yes, how? Tell me about a time you learned a new tool by yourself. Are you comfortable with technical tasks like domains, websites, or VPS if I train you? What is your expected monthly salary for full-time work? Please include your internet speed, computer specs, and weekly availability. If you prove reliable and can manage projects independently, salary increases quickly

Full job description

We are seeking an experienced GoHighLevel Automation & AI Specialist to build, optimize, and maintain our complete marketing and sales infrastructure. This is not an entry-level position. We are looking for someone who can think strategically, solve problems independently, and recommend better ways to automate our processes. Responsibilities You will be responsible for: ? Building and managing GoHighLevel CRM ? Creating and optimizing sales funnels ? Building websites and landing pages within GoHighLevel ? Setting up workflows and automations ? Creating email marketing campaigns and nurture sequences ? Creating SMS automation campaigns ? Integrating third-party software using Zapier ? Connecting GoHighLevel with outside platforms ? Building lead capture and follow-up systems ? Creating appointment booking workflows ? Setting up pipeline management ? Managing contacts and customer segmentation ? Troubleshooting automation issues ? Building AI-powered workflows using ChatGPT and Claude ? Helping implement AI solutions that improve business operations ? Recommending new automation ideas to increase efficiency ? Creating SOPs and documenting systems when completed Required Skills Applicants must have experience with: ? GoHighLevel (Expert Level) ? Zapier ? ChatGPT ? Claude AI ? ??Email Marketing ? SMS Marketing ? Sales Funnel Creation ? CRM Management ? Workflow Automation ? Landing Page Design ? API Integrations (preferred) ? Basic HTML/CSS (preferred) Bonus Skills Experience with any of the following is a huge plus: ? Make.com ? Google Workspace ? ??Facebook Lead Ads ? Stripe ? Calendly ? Canva ? Meta Pixel ? Google Analytics ? AI Prompt Engineering ? Automation Strategy ? HighLevel Snapshots Who We’re Looking For The ideal candidate is: ? Detail-oriented ? Excellent communicator ? Self-motivated ? Organized ? Problem solver ? Fast learner ? Able to work independently ? Takes initiative without waiting for instructions ? Thinks strategically about improving business systems To Apply Please include: 1. A short introduction about yourself. 2. Your years of GoHighLevel experience. 3. Examples of workflows or automations you’ve built. 4. Links to sales funnels or websites you’ve created. 5. Your experience with Zapier, ChatGPT, and Claude. 6. Your hourly rate. 7. Your weekly availability. 8. The word “Automation” at the beginning of your application so I know you read this entire post. Applicants who do not follow these instructions will not be considered. This is intended to be a long-term position for the right person.

Full job description

I’m looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive Executive Assistant who has real, hands-on experience using GoHighLevel (GHL) to help manage day-to-day operations in a growing home service business. This is not a beginner role. I need someone who has actually used GoHighLevel in a real business setting — not just watched tutorials. You should be confident inside the CRM, comfortable handling customer communication, and able to keep operations organized without constant supervision. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structure, takes ownership of tasks, and can help keep both customers and internal operations running smoothly behind the scenes. This is a long-term opportunity for someone who is reliable, communicates well, and wants to grow with a business that is scaling. What You’ll Be Doing: * Handle inbound and outbound customer communication via phone, email, and SMS using GoHighLevel * Manage pipelines, leads, opportunities, and follow-ups inside GHL * Build, update, and maintain workflows, automations, and pipelines (if you have experience) * Manage scheduling, appointment setting, and calendar coordination * Support dispatch and technician coordination when needed * Keep CRM records clean, accurate, and updated (notes, tags, statuses, job details) * Handle estimates, invoices, reminders, and customer follow-ups * Assist with daily reporting and tracking inside GoHighLevel dashboards * Help organize internal processes and improve workflow efficiency * Monitor tasks and make sure nothing falls through the cracks * Support basic admin work such as data entry, file management, and documentation * Use AI tools (like ChatGPT) to help improve speed and efficiency What I’m Looking For: * Strong administrative and customer service background * **Proven, real experience using GoHighLevel (must-have)** * Previous experience as a Virtual Assistant or supporting a business owner/operations team * Excellent written and verbal English communication * Strong organizational and time management skills * Ability to multitask and stay calm in a fast-paced environment * Problem-solver who can work independently without being micromanaged * High attention to detail and strong follow-through * Tech-savvy and quick to learn new systems * Professional, reliable, and takes full ownership of tasks Required Experience: * GoHighLevel (REAL daily use — CRM, pipelines, workflows, automations, messaging, etc.) * Administrative support * Customer service (phone, email, SMS) * Calendar and appointment management * CRM management and data entry * Reporting and documentation Preferred Experience: * Home service / trades / service-based business experience * Dispatch or technician coordination * Experience building or managing GHL automations/workflows * Team coordination or supervisory experience * AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) * Basic Canva / social media support Tools You May Use: * GoHighLevel (VERY IMPORTANT) * Jobber / Housecall Pro / ServiceTitan (optional) * Google Workspace * Microsoft Office * Canva * ChatGPT / AI tools * Other CRM and automation tools This Role Is a Great Fit If You: * Know your way around GoHighLevel and have actually used it in real work * Like creating structure and keeping things organized * Enjoy helping a business run smoothly behind the scenes * Take initiative without needing constant instructions * Can think ahead, solve problems, and communicate clearly * Want a long-term role where you can grow with the company To Apply: Send a short introduction along with your resume. Please highlight your **GoHighLevel experience specifically** and the tools you’ve used. If you’re still reading, include your favorite animal in the subject line so I know you actually followed instructions.

Full job description

WHO WE ARE We are a dual-pillar business operating at the intersection of real estate acquisition and credit-driven business funding. On the real estate side, we specialize in creative financing — subject-to deals, cold outreach on vacant, pre-foreclosure, and tax-lien properties. On the funding side, we help small business owners clean up their credit profiles and unlock $50K–$150K+ in business capital to scale through hiring, advertising, and infrastructure. Both businesses are growing fast. We are not looking for someone to maintain the status quo. We are building the infrastructure to scale, and we need the right operator at the center of it. THE ROLE This is not a coordinator position. You are the operational backbone of two businesses. You will manage talent, oversee execution, own systems, and ensure both pillars perform at a high level — simultaneously. You will be the primary point of contact between leadership and the team. Decisions that used to wait will now have a home with you. If you are someone who needs to be told what to do every step of the way, this is not the role for you. If you thrive in ambiguity, move fast, build structure where there is none, and hold people accountable to outcomes — read on. WHAT YOU WILL OWN CREDIT REPAIR OPERATIONS • Oversee day-to-day credit repair operations and client fulfillment from onboarding through resolutionEnsure effective use of compliant credit repair methods and workflows across all active client casesManage CRM systems for client onboarding, dispute tracking, and client communicationMonitor KPIs including turnaround times, client progress, and retention ratesImprove and document SOPs to ensure consistency and scalability as the client base grows MARKETING OPERATIONS • Coordinate and oversee marketing execution across all social media platformsEnsure production of high-quality, attention-grabbing short-form content — Reels, clips, viral editsOversee workflows for content batching, editing standards, transitions, hooks, captions, and CTAsAlign all marketing output with lead generation goals, brand standards, and compliance requirementsServe as the operational bridge between marketing content and sales funnels REAL ESTATE OPERATIONS & VA MANAGEMENT • Manage and communicate with real estate virtual assistants to ensure daily output and accountabilityEnsure accurate property research and market targeting for subject-to and creative finance opportunitiesOversee CRM workflows for real estate lead intake, tracking, and follow-upCoordinate use of tools including Go High Level and Lead Shepherd to manage pipeline activityAct as liaison between leadership and VA teams to maintain performance standards TALENT SOURCING & TEAM BUILDING • You are the eyes and ears of this organization when it comes to hiring — across every pillar, every role, every verticalActively source, vet, and recruit candidates for open roles across the credit repair arm, real estate arm, and marketing and media arm — without waiting to be directedOwn the full hiring pipeline: job post creation, application review, candidate screening, interviews, and final recommendations to leadershipSource talent through OnlineJobs.ph, LinkedIn, and any other platform necessary to find the right people at the right timeIdentify gaps in the team before they become problems — if a role needs to be filled, you are expected to have candidates in the pipeline proactivelyOnboard all new hires with proper documentation, SOPs, access, and expectations from day oneMonitor new hire performance through a structured probation period and make retention or replacement recommendations accordinglyMaintain a running roster of vetted talent that can be activated when a role opens — the business does not stop for vacancies SYSTEMS & AUTOMATION • Identify opportunities to automate repetitive tasks and streamline workflows using AI and CRM toolsImplement and optimize CRM automations, pipelines, tagging systems, and reporting dashboardsContinuously improve internal systems and document SOPs as the business scalesServe as the primary point of contact between the founder and the entire team REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS CREDIT REPAIR — EXTENSIVE KNOWLEDGE REQUIRED • Deep, hands-on knowledge of credit repair processes — dispute methods, Metro 2 compliance, goodwill letters, rapid rescore strategies, and credit bureau protocolsAbility to audit a client's credit profile and identify the correct course of action without guidanceExperience managing active credit repair caseloads and ensuring clients move through the pipeline efficientlyIf you cannot perform the work yourself, you must be capable of identifying, hiring, and managing the talent who can — no exceptions MEDIA & MARKETING — EXTENSIVE KNOWLEDGE REQUIRED • Extensive experience with short-form content creation and strategy — Reels, TikTok-style edits, viral clips, memes, and carousel postsProficiency with CapCut Pro for video editing — transitions, hooks, captions, sound design, and platform-optimized outputStrong understanding of content batching, scheduling, and maintaining consistent brand voice across platformsKnowledge of what drives engagement, reach, and conversion in the credit repair and real estate nichesAbility to oversee and quality-control a content creator or media VA — and step in to execute if that role is vacantExperience with Meta Ads Manager or paid social campaigns is a strong plus REAL ESTATE — VAST EXPERIENCE REQUIRED • Extensive real estate operations experience — creative financing, subject-to acquisitions, seller finance, and distressed property targetingHands-on experience with multiple real estate platforms and lead generation portals (see tools list below)Ability to manage and direct VA cold callers, skip tracers, and lead managers toward daily performance targetsStrong understanding of how to identify, qualify, and track motivated seller leads through the full pipelineIf a tool or strategy can improve team performance and pipeline output, you are expected to know it or find it OPERATIONS & LEADERSHIP • Proven ability to hire, vet, onboard, and manage remote talent across multiple departmentsIf a role is unfilled, the responsibility does not disappear — it falls on you until the right person is in placeStrong SOP development skills — you document everything so the business is never dependent on one personHigh-level proficiency with CRM and automation platforms — Go High Level strongly preferredA-player standard: you own every outcome under your oversight, you hold your team accountable, and you deliver results — not reasons WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE • Credit repair clients move smoothly through the system with clear tracking and minimal bottlenecksMarketing content is consistent, high-quality, and aligned with growth goals across both brandsReal estate VAs operate with clear direction, accurate data, and strong accountability to daily targetsEvery open role has qualified candidates in the pipeline before leadership has to askNew hires are onboarded cleanly, perform to standard, and integrate without disrupting operationsSystems are documented, automated, and scalable — not dependent on any single personLeadership is freed from daily operational oversight and focused entirely on growth PLATFORM & TOOL PROFICIENCY Extensive experience across multiple platforms is required. You must be proficient in at least 2–3 per category. The more you bring, the stronger your application. CRM & AUTOMATION Go High Level* Podio HubSpot ClickUp / Asana / Trello Zapier / Make REAL ESTATE PORTALS & LEAD GEN Lead Shepherd* PropStream* Smarter Contact / SmrtPhone* REI Reply Batch Leads / Batch Dialer DealMachine Skip Genie CONTENT & MEDIA CapCut Pro* Meta Ads Manager Canva Pro Later / Buffer / Metricool Loom / Zoom GENERAL OPERATIONS Google Workspace Slack Notion ChatGPT / AI Tools Asterisk = considered essential. All others strengthen your application. COMPENSATION $100 – $130 USD / Month · Part-Time or Full-Time · Remote This role is flexible — part-time or full-time arrangements are both on the table depending on your availability and the needs of the business. What matters most is that the team gets built right and results are delivered consistently. The right candidate who demonstrates value will have room to grow with us long-term. HOW TO APPLY Do not send a generic application. We will not respond to them. In your application, tell us: (1) which of the two business verticals you have the deepest experience in, (2) the tools you are proficient in and a specific result you drove using them, and (3) describe a time you managed a team remotely and how you held them accountable. Applications that skip these will be disqualified. We move fast. If you are right for this role, you will know within days.

Full job description

EverMint Media is a growing social media marketing agency helping businesses build their brand, generate leads, and grow through strategic social media marketing. We work with founders, service-based businesses, and B2B companies across various industries, helping them create meaningful content, build authority, and attract new clients online. We're looking for a tech-savvy, proactive person to coordinate our technology, AI tools, and integrations — making sure everything behind the scenes runs smoothly. Role Overview This is a flexible, part-time role that combines AI and automation work with general technical operations. This role is perfect for someone who enjoys connecting tools, automating repetitive work, and quietly making everything run better. You'll be the go-to person for anything technical in the business. You don't need to be a software developer. What matters most is that you're hands-on with modern tools, a confident troubleshooter, and comfortable taking ownership of systems while keeping things documented and organised. A key part of this role involves setting up and maintaining AI tools and automations, connecting our platforms so data flows correctly between them, resolving technical issues quickly, and helping the team work more efficiently through smart use of technology. Key Responsibilities AI & Automation Set up, manage, and improve AI tools and workflows (e.g. ChatGPT, Claude, content and image tools) Build and maintain automations using platforms like Zapier, Make, or n8n Create prompts, templates, and simple internal guides for the team Research new AI tools and recommend what's worth adopting Integrations & Systems Connect and maintain our software stack (CRM, email, scheduling, project management, and social media tools) Make sure data flows correctly between platforms Manage accounts, access, and permissions securely Keep systems documentation and SOPs up to date Technical Operations Monitor that automations and integrations are running smoothly Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues for the team Support tracking, reporting, and data hygiene across our tools Assist with ad hoc technical projects as needed Who We're Looking For Hands-on experience with AI tools and automation platforms (Zapier, Make, n8n, or similar) Comfortable with APIs, webhooks, and connecting tools together Strong problem-solver who can troubleshoot independently Excellent written English — able to explain technical things in plain language Highly organised, dependable, and careful with access and data Comfortable following systems and processes while looking for ways to improve them Able to work independently without constant supervision Proactive and resourceful — spots issues before they become problems Positive attitude and willingness to learn Availability Requirements This role requires someone who can check in, respond to messages, and resolve any issues, with availability that overlaps with UK (London) working hours. Occasionally, urgent technical issues may need a faster response. Why Join Us? Flexible remote work Approximately 10–15 hours per week Full training on our internal systems and processes Opportunity to grow with a growing marketing agency Varied, hands-on work with the latest AI tools Supportive and collaborative environment How to Apply AI-generated applications will not be considered, yes, even for an AI role. We are interested in your own thinking, communication style, and writing ability. Please complete our pre-interview application form by copying the link into your browser and removing the 3 spaces in between: forms. gle/goV9M nj78vA4 q6TX8
