Full job description

Employment Type Full-Time 40 hours/week Remote Must overlap with U.S. Central Standard Time (starting by 7:30 PM PHT / 6:30 AM CST) We’re looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term. If you’re juggling multiple clients or short-term gigs, this may not be the right fit. Monthly Salary $1,300 USD/month Paid biweekly or monthly via EasyPay Includes 13th-month bonus and PH holiday leave This role is for a highly skilled and proactive developer — not entry-level. Job Description Frisco Web Agency is hiring a full-time Web Designer & Developer to join our remote team. We're a fast-growing U.S.-based web design and SEO agency that builds custom, high-performing websites to help small businesses grow. You’ll work directly with the founder to implement websites end-to-end using detailed SOPs, checklists, and playbooks. This is a high-ownership, execution-first role — not passive support work. You must be proactive, detail-oriented, and ready to lead your function. If you're a creative problem-solver who thrives on clarity, structure, and high standards — and wants long-term career growth, provision, and impact — we want to hear from you. Responsibilities Build and update websites using mainly Webflow, and sometimes WordPress, Squarespace, and Wix Write clean HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to enhance site functionality Implement SEO best practices (semantic HTML, headings, schema, internal linking) Execute all development tasks using SOPs and checklists Build embeds, global classes, and reusable components Troubleshoot and fix technical SEO issues in Ahrefs and GSC Use tools like ImageFX and stock sites for visuals Perform responsive QA reviews across browsers/devices Follow and implement brand guidelines (fonts, colors, logo usage, etc.) Collaborate on wireframe approvals in Relume Operate inside tools like ClickUp, ChatGPT, Beam Us Up, and GoHighLevel Document all recurring tasks via Loom, Google Docs, or internal wikis Communicate proactively and set realistic timelines Join team syncs daily — twice a day for the first 30 days Non-Responsibilities You will not: Manage ads (but will collaborate with the ads team) Write full marketing copy (but should understand web-friendly phrasing) Build complex backend systems (but must navigate dev tools confidently) Lead UI design (but must understand and implement clean design principles) Manage SEO strategy (but will implement SEO-related technical tasks and uploads) Minimum Requirements Fluent written and verbal English Excellent attention to detail and task follow-through Strong grasp of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript Experience working on multiple website platforms Understanding of UX and web design principles Ability to follow SOPs and documented processes Experience with ClickUp or another PM tool Ownership mindset — solves problems without needing hand-holding Deadline-driven and communicative Fast learner with initiative to self-research Proactive and independent — not reactive or passive Preferred Skills (Can Be Taught During Onboarding) Webflow (CMS, components, animations, custom code) Relume for wireframes and approvals ImageFX or AI tools for image generation Finsweet tools and attributes Basic SEO tools: Ahrefs, GSC, schema Canva or Photoshop (for basic visual edits) Familiarity with Beam Us Up, Loom, Airtable, GoHighLevel, Make/Zapier Comfortable creating documentation (screen recordings, SOPs, how-tos) What We Expect in the First 30 Days Navigate core tools: Webflow, ClickUp, Ahrefs, GSC, Relume Understand our use of CMS, embeds, and global components Begin resolving technical SEO issues Build pages using pre-approved wireframes and SOPs Document all repeatable processes as you learn them Show proactive communication, fast turnaround, and organized task tracking Technical Requirements Stable internet connection: 10 Mbps minimum Reliable laptop or desktop (preferably 8GB RAM or more) Backup internet or mobile hotspot plan Quiet environment for virtual meetings Culture & Values Our team is faith-driven, purpose-led, and committed to building with integrity, stewardship, and excellence. We work fast, take ownership, and honor one another in all interactions. If that resonates with you — and you’re ready for a high-growth, high-trust environment — we’d love to hear from you. How to Apply To apply, you must follow these instructions. Failure to follow them will result in automatic disqualification. Email us with the subject line: "Skilled Developer Application – [Your Name]" Include: A short paragraph about your web development background and why this job interests you Links to 2–3 past projects (live websites or portfolio links — required) Your resume (PDF format preferred) Your answer to this question: “What is one thing you believe makes a website both beautiful and effective?” Optional but preferred: A screenshot of your current internet speed using Speedtest.net What’s your dream job 1–2 years from now? Why are you looking for something long-term? What type of team do you thrive on? Final Note We review all applications thoroughly. Finalists will be invited to complete a paid trial task to demonstrate skill, communication, and attention to detail. We are looking for someone who will own this position — and grow with us for years. Please do not use AI to write your application. We want to hear directly from you — in your own words.

Full job description

# GoHighLevel (GHL) Automation & AI Specialist ### About Us Apex Agent Pro is seeking a highly skilled GoHighLevel (GHL) Automation & AI Specialist to join our growing team. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on building systems, automations, funnels, AI workflows, and scalable client solutions. We are looking for a problem solver who can take ideas and turn them into fully functional systems that drive business growth. ### Required Skills & Experience The ideal candidate must have experience with: * GoHighLevel (GHL) * Building and deploying Snapshots * Landing Page and Funnel Development * Workflow Automation * AI Agent Creation * CRM Configuration and Optimization * Lead Nurture Automations * SMS & Email Automation * Pipeline Creation & Management * API Integrations * Zapier, Make.com, or similar automation platforms * Sales Funnels and Conversion Optimization ### Preferred Experience Bonus points if you have experience with: * Voice AI * OpenAI / ChatGPT integrations * Real Estate CRM Systems * Facebook Lead Generation Automations * Custom Webhooks * SaaS Mode Setup * White-Label GHL Deployments ### Application Requirements To be considered, you MUST submit ALL of the following: #### 1. Introduction Video Record a short 2-5 minute video introducing yourself and explaining: * Who you are * Your experience with GoHighLevel * Your experience with AI and automations * Why you would be a good fit for this role #### 2. Skills Summary Provide a detailed list of: * Your GoHighLevel expertise * AI tools you have worked with * Automation platforms you have used * Types of systems and automations you have built #### 3. Resume / CV Attach your most current resume or CV. #### 4. Portfolio of Work Include examples of: * Snapshots you have built * Landing pages and funnels * Automations and workflows * AI projects * Any relevant client work ### How to Apply Email all application materials to: **[tony@apexagentpro.com](mailto:tony@apexagentpro.com)** Subject Line: **GHL Automation & AI Specialist Application – [Your Name]** Applications submitted without a video introduction, skills summary, and CV will not be considered. We are looking for someone who can hit the ground running and build world-class automation systems. If that's you, we want to hear from you.

Full job description

About Brooklyn Bradley Brooklyn Bradley is a Property Development and AI solutions company specializing in building innovative tools for the real estate industry. Our mission is to improve operational efficiency, enhance workflows, and deliver high levels of accuracy and client satisfaction through cutting-edge AI technology. We're currently testing and refining our solutions for a key client, a leading real estate agency Harcourts Ulverstone and Penguin, before launching commercially to the broader real estate market. About This Role We're seeking an AI Specialist to join our growing team and work alongside our current Developer, Elijah. This is a full-time position covering Australian business hours, enabling us to achieve round-the-clock development and support across our automation platform. You'll be responsible for building new systems, supporting existing solutions, implementing enhancements, and resolving bugs across our diverse technology stack. Key Responsibilities • Design, develop, and deploy AI automation solutions using our core technology stack • Build new features and systems that improve real estate workflows and efficiency • Maintain, support, and troubleshoot existing applications and integrations • Implement enhancements and improvements to current solutions • Identify and resolve bugs across production and development environments • Collaborate with leadership and peers to understand requirements and deliver solutions • Work seamlessly with Elijah to handoff projects and maintain continuity of development • Take on varied project types and pivot quickly as priorities shift • Provide technical support and guidance on implemented solutions Required Technical Skills • Proficiency with Next.js and modern JavaScript frameworks • Strong experience with Supabase (database design, queries, real-time features) • Hands-on experience with n8n automation workflows • Experience integrating with DocuSign and Maestro Flow • Knowledge of Power Automate workflows • Experience working with multiple Large Language Models across different providers • Familiarity with hosting platforms such as Netlify and Vercel • Experience with Eleven Labs (chat functionality) and Retell AI (voice solutions) • Experience in setting up a Twilio SIP Number • Understanding of how API, RestAPI, MCP and Webhooks function • Strong problem-solving abilities and capacity to learn new technologies quickly Technical fluency across the majority of this stack is preferred. While experience with every tool is ideal, we value candidates who demonstrate strong foundational knowledge and the ability to rapidly upskill. Required Personal Attributes • Fast learner with strong adaptability and flexibility • Ability to pivot quickly when priorities or project requirements change • Excellent communicator—both written and verbal—with peers and leadership • Receptive to feedback and committed to continuous improvement • Problem solver who can develop elegant solutions to complex challenges • Reliable, professional, and proactive in your approach to work • Ability to work independently and as part of a distributed team How to Apply Interested candidates should submit their resume, portfolio of relevant work, and a brief cover letter outlining their experience with the technologies listed above.

Full job description

Full-Time | Remote (Philippines) **$5–8 USD/hour + Performance Bonuses** We are a rapidly growing insurance and financial services company looking for our **first Digital Growth Strategist** to lead our online marketing efforts. This is **not** a beginner VA position. This is NOT a Personal Assistant Role. We want SMART and HIGHLY DRIVEN applicants. We are looking for someone who already understands digital marketing, paid advertising, lead generation, and conversion strategies. You should be comfortable taking ownership of projects, making recommendations, testing ideas, solving problems, and producing measurable business results with minimal supervision. If you're someone who enjoys building systems, scaling campaigns, leveraging AI, and helping grow a company from the ground up, we'd love to meet you. --- ## About Us We specialize in helping families protect what matters most through Life Insurance and Mortgage Protection. As we continue to grow, we will also expand into Estate Planning, Retirement Planning, and other financial services. Our business operates with a startup mentality. We move quickly, embrace innovation, and are always looking for better ways to generate leads, improve efficiency, and grow. This is a long-term opportunity with significant room for advancement. --- ## Your Mission Your primary responsibility is simple: **Generate qualified leads that produce a positive return on investment.** You will own and optimize our digital marketing strategy while continuously testing, improving, and scaling campaigns. When campaigns are running smoothly, you'll help improve other digital assets including websites, funnels, landing pages, social media, and automation systems. --- ## Primary Responsibilities * Plan, launch, manage, and optimize Meta (Facebook & Instagram) advertising campaigns. * Plan, launch, manage, and optimize Google Ads campaigns. * Continuously improve campaign performance by lowering cost per lead while increasing lead quality. * Build and optimize lead generation funnels. * Integrate campaigns into GoHighLevel. * Monitor campaign performance and make strategic improvements. * Analyze data and make decisions based on performance metrics. * Conduct A/B testing on creatives, copy, audiences, and landing pages. * Create and publish 1–2 Facebook posts per day related to insurance and financial education. * Assist with website improvements and landing pages when needed. * Leverage AI tools to improve productivity, marketing performance, and creative output. * Stay current with digital marketing trends and continuously recommend new ideas. --- ## Required Qualifications * Minimum 1–2 years of experience managing Meta Ads. * Minimum 1–2 years of experience managing Google Ads. * Proven experience generating qualified leads through paid advertising. * Strong understanding of digital marketing fundamentals. * Comfortable analyzing campaign performance and making strategic decisions. * Excellent written English. * Strong communication skills. * Self-motivated with excellent time management. * Able to work independently with minimal supervision. * Startup mentality and willingness to take ownership. * Comfortable solving problems without waiting for instructions. --- ## Preferred Qualifications Experience with any of the following is highly preferred: * GoHighLevel * Google Analytics * Google Tag Manager * Meta Business Manager * Conversion Tracking * Facebook Pixel * Landing Page Builders * Funnel Optimization * Canva * WordPress * Webflow * ClickFunnels * Zapier * Make.com * ChatGPT * Claude * AI workflow automation Experience within the insurance, financial services, or lead generation industries is a major advantage but not required. --- ## What Success Looks Like Your success will be measured by real business results, including: * Qualified leads generated * Cost per lead * Appointment quality * Campaign ROI * Conversion rates * Weekly KPI reporting * Continuous optimization and improvement We're looking for someone who thinks like an owner—not someone who simply completes assigned tasks. --- ## Growth Opportunity This is intended to become a leadership position. As our company grows, we plan to build an internal marketing team. The person hired for this position will have the opportunity to become our **Digital Marketing Manager**, helping recruit, train, and oversee additional marketing team members. Leadership responsibilities and compensation will grow alongside the company, including additional incentive opportunities tied to team performance. --- ## Compensation * $5–8 USD/hour (depending on experience) * Full-Time (40 hours/week) * Monday–Friday * 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time * Performance bonuses based on qualified leads and closed business generated through digital marketing * Long-term career opportunity with a rapidly growing company --- ## To Apply Please include: 1. Your resume. 2. A portfolio of campaigns, landing pages, websites, or marketing projects you've managed. 3. Examples of Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns you've personally run. 4. The average monthly advertising budget you've managed. 5. The best lead generation result you've ever achieved (include numbers if possible). 6. Which marketing platforms and software you're most experienced with. 7. A short paragraph explaining why you're interested in this role and why you believe you'd be a great fit. Applicants without a portfolio or examples of previous work will not be considered.

Full job description

Job Description: Full Stack Software/Mobile Developer Company Name: FORMURA LIMITED Role: Full Stack Software/Mobile Developer Salary: USD $750 -- USD $1,150 per month (based on experience) Location: 100% Remote -- Open to talent in India, Philippines, Malaysia Job Type: Full-Time (long-term contract/employment) About Us: Dedicated to revolutionizing product design and delivery, our technology company is on a mission to develop innovative Agentic AI solutions. Driven by high energy and a passion for scaling our autonomous platform, we are actively growing our remote engineering presence across India, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Project Overview: We are seeking a highly skilled Full Stack Software/Mobile Developer to lead the development of a next-generation mobile application focused on digital detox and user wellness. The objective is to build a high-performance system that bridges the gap between behavioral psychology and technology through the integration of autonomous agentic AI. This role involves engineering reliable AI agents capable of reasoning and executing tasks to facilitate user engagement, gamified wellness streaks, and secure system-level application management within a nostalgic, high-availability mobile ecosystem. Core Responsibilities: Design and implement multi-agent systems and "reason-to-act" (ReAct) workflows to power autonomous wellness features. Develop a "Nokia-style" nostalgic UI for mobile, ensuring simple, modular, and production-ready navigation. Engineer system-level permissions and secure interfaces between AI agents and external APIs to manage social media access protocols. Create a gamified virtual pet system utilizing persistent user-state tracking and agent behavior monitoring. Oversee the lifecycle of AI/ML components, ensuring infrastructure stability and optimized inference for mobile applications. Requirements: Proven experience in mobile app development (React Native or Flutter) and system-level API integration (Android/iOS). Deep expertise in designing agentic workflows and multi-agent systems using industry-standard frameworks. Strong understanding of system architecture, security protocols, and "human-in-the-loop" error handling for AI agents. Ability to translate high-level behavioral goals into functional architecture and production-ready code. Why You'll Love Working With Us: Fully remote --- work from India, the Philippines, or Malaysia. Stable, full?time income in US dollars (or local equivalent) --- no dry spells. Work at the cutting edge of agentic AI and wellness technology. Real ownership --- you'll shape the architecture of a next?gen platform. Continuous learning culture: we share prompts, frameworks, and research internally. Inclusive, ego?free team where your ideas matter. How to Apply: Send your application to: ---------- Please include the following in your email: ---------- Project Quotation Project Portfolio Curriculum Vitae (CV)

Full job description

Job description: Role Mission We need someone who can take ownership of our GHL environment and the systems around it. Right now, our GHL setup needs a thorough audit, ongoing maintenance, and a real automation strategy behind it. You'll come in, figure out what's working and what isn't, fix it, and then build the automations that let us scale without adding manual work. You'll also keep WordPress healthy and help us think about how our tools connect. If you live and breathe GHL and you get energy from making messy systems clean, this is your role. Who We Are Looking For: You're a systems person at heart. You see a clunky workflow and you can't help but want to fix it! You probably are: Someone with deep, hands-on GHL experience. Not "I've used it," but "I've built and broken and rebuilt it." Comfortable auditing an existing setup and telling us the honest truth about its state.A strong automation thinker who maps a process before building it. Fluent with AI tools and already using them to work faster. Detail-oriented enough to handle systems that touch patient data with care. You probably are not the right fit if you need a fully documented system handed to you before you can start, or if you prefer to stay in one tool and avoid the connective tissue between them. Responsibilities & Expectations This role reports to Autumn, Director of Marketing. You'll work closely with Haley (COO) and Amber (CEO and founder) on priorities and systems decisions. GHL Ownership Audit our current GHL setup end to end and deliver a clear picture of its health.Own ongoing GHL maintenance, cleanup, and optimization.Build, test, and maintain automations, workflows, and pipelines in GHL.Keep our GHL data clean, organized, and reliable.WordPress & Web Maintain our WordPress site: updates, fixes, performance, and uptime.Handle small build and edit requests without breaking things.Automation & Systems Ops Map our key processes and find where automation removes manual work.Connect tools across the stack (GHL, ManyChat, Google Workspace, and others) so data flows cleanly. Document what you build so the rest of the team can use it.Flag risks, gaps, and single points of failure before they become problems.Data & Compliance Treat all systems that touch patient information with HIPAA and PHI constraints in mind.Build with privacy and security as a default, not an afterthought. Must Have (Non-Negotiable) Deep, proven, hands-on GoHighLevel experience. This is the core of the role.Strong WordPress maintenance and editing skills. Demonstrated ability to build real automations and workflows, not just simple triggers. Fluency with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) used in real work. Healthcare or telehealth experience, with real awareness of HIPAA and PHI constraints. ManyChat experience.Google Workspace administration.Nice to Have Zapier or other integration tools.Charm EHR familiarity.Experience documenting systems and building SOPs. Benefits & Perks Fully remote. Work from wherever you do your best work.Full-time role. US hires are W-2 employees with a benefits package and PTO. International hires are engaged as contractors or through an employer of record.Real ownership and authority over your domain. You'll own the systems, not just tickets.Mission alignment. Your work directly helps moms get lactation care when they need it. Bonus Information We're hiring this role because our systems have outgrown a part-time, patchwork approach. We need one person who owns GHL and the automation layer around it so the rest of the team can move fast. Clear communication is non-negotiable in this role. We don't currently hire in California or New York. You must be authorized to work in your country of residence. Our Values: Radical Accountability — We own our outcomes, we welcome feedback, and when someone shows us a better way, we lean in. Competitive Greatness — The women on this team have goals and they are hungry to grow. We want people who feel the same way. Mom First — The mom is the boss. Always. We show up with curiosity, compassion, and zero ego. How to Apply Send us a short video (3 to 5 minutes) answering these four questions: Who are you and what is your experience with GHL Walk us through a funnel you have built or optimized Why you are the right person for this role Email: careers@thelatchlink.com Subject line: "Orangatang" Applications that do not follow this process will not be considered. Following directions is the first thing we look at. Benefits: 401(k) 401(k) matching Dental insurance Health insurance Health savings account Paid time off Vision insurance Work Location: Remote

We are building a fully integrated operational system inside GoHighLevel connected to n8n, and we are looking for a long-term Automation Specialist to own and implement workflows. This is NOT a basic VA position. This role is for someone who understands automation logic, APIs, and building systems that remove manual work. You will help architect and build workflows across: • Lead generation and marketing automation • CRM pipeline management • SMS / email / voice call follow-up sequences • Insurance claim communication workflows • Task automation for operations and fulfillment • Data syncing between platforms using n8n • Internal notifications, reporting, and triggers • Custom automations beyond what GHL does natively • AI-assisted workflows and integrations where useful We are creating a system that runs the business automatically, and you will be the builder behind it. ? Required Experience: • Strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel workflows • Experience using n8n (or Zapier/Make with ability to learn n8n quickly) • Understanding of APIs, webhooks, and automation logic • Ability to map processes and turn them into automations • Comfortable troubleshooting broken workflows • Organized thinker who can document systems clearly • Fluent English communication (written + spoken) ? Nice to Have: • Experience integrating Twilio, OpenAI, Google Workspace, or CRMs • Experience with AI tools or automation agents • Previous work supporting U.S. businesses • Ability to suggest better workflow design (not just follow instructions) ? Compensation: Starting during 60-day build phase: $800–$1,200/month depending on experience After successful probation: $1,200–$1,800/month long-term role Performance bonuses available based on systems completed and reliability. ? This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with a company and build real infrastructure — not short-term task work. To apply, include: 1. Examples of automations you built 2. Tools you used (GHL, n8n, Zapier, etc.) 3. A short description of the most complex workflow you’ve created—

Full job description

About My Digital Group We're a fast-moving digital agency that builds the websites, CRMs, and automation systems that local and expert-based businesses run on. We're small, AI-forward, and we move quickly. We're looking for a GoHighLevel specialist to own our CRM and automation builds so the business can grow without the founder being the bottleneck. What you'll do - Build and configure GoHighLevel: custom fields, pipelines, calendars, forms, funnels, and multi-step automations/workflows. - Take our briefs (written or screen recordings) and implement them accurately - without needing every detail spelled out. - Be a reliable point of contact for client requests: make changes, answer "can the system do X?", keep accounts running smoothly. - QA your own work, protect client data (never run destructive changes without a backup), and document each build as a short SOP or Loom. - Use AI tools daily to work faster - we're an AI-forward team and we expect you to be too. You're a great fit if you - Have real, hands-on GoHighLevel experience (not just "I've seen it") and can show us a build you're proud of. - Are self-directed - you take a brief and run with it. - Communicate clearly in English and keep people updated. - Are genuinely excited about AI and use it to build smarter, not threatened by it. - Take pride in clean, reliable, well-documented work. Logistics - Full-time, fully remote. - Daily overlap with Australian business hours (AEST). - Tools: GoHighLevel (core), Microsoft Office, a task manager, and AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.). Webhooks/N8N experience is a plus. How to apply (read carefully) To show us you read this far, start your application with the word "WORKFLOW" in the first line. Applications that don't will be skipped. Then answer these three questions: 1. What's the most complex GoHighLevel automation you've built, and what did it do? 2. Share a link or screenshots of a GHL build you're proud of. 3. What's one AI tool you use in your work, and how?

Full job description

We’re looking for someone to build, optimize, and maintain our HubSpot CRM while helping us create an AI-driven sales management system. The goal is to eliminate as much time as possible spent inside HubSpot without sacrificing visibility or organization. For example, we’d like to interact with our CRM using natural language: * “What are my priorities today?” * “What follow-ups are due?” * “Which deals are stalled?” * “Who hasn’t responded in over a week?” * “What is Jose supposed to work on today?” * “Summarize my pipeline.” * “Draft follow-up emails for today’s tasks.” HubSpot should remain the source of truth, but we’d like AI to become the primary interface for reviewing sales activity, managing priorities, and making decisions. This role will also include keeping HubSpot organized by maintaining contacts, companies, deals, tasks, notes, automations, and reporting. Application Questions Rather than telling you exactly how we want this built, we’d like you to tell us how you would build it. Please answer the following: * How would you approach this project? * Is this the right architecture, or would you recommend something different? * How would you connect HubSpot with ChatGPT, Claude, or another AI platform? * Would you recommend AI only reads HubSpot, or should it also be able to update records? * How would you ensure the system remains reliable and doesn’t become a maintenance headache? * What parts of HubSpot should remain manual? * What parts should be automated? * What tools, integrations, or APIs would you use? * Have you built anything similar? If so, please describe it. We’re looking for someone who can think through the entire system, recommend the best approach, build it, and continue improving it over time—not someone who simply manages CRM records.

Full job description

Management Accountant, Financial Dashboard Build (Short-term Project) About the role: We are looking for an experienced management accountant to join us on a short-term project (4-6 weeks) to build a live financial dashboard and supporting management accounts for a DTC ecommerce client. This is a hands-on build role. You will be designing and delivering a daily financial dashboard that pulls data from multiple sources via APIs (Zapier, Airtable, Shopify, Meta Ads, bank feeds), presenting estimated and actual figures with variance reporting across revenue, cost of goods, advertising spend, staff costs and overheads. The dashboard needs to work on a rolling daily basis, with data refreshing within 24-48 hours of the source transactions. You will be working under the direction of the Finance Director who will provide the data sets, access credentials and the overall structure. Your job is to take that brief and build the thing, working largely independently on the technical delivery. What you will be building The first deliverable is a daily financial dashboard with the following characteristics: (a) High-level summary rows for revenue, cost of goods, gross profit, expenses, VAT and net profit, with drill-down capability into subcategories (advertising by channel, COGS by supplier, staff costs by source). (b) Three-column structure per day: Estimate, Actual and Variance, with favourable/unfavourable variance logic built in. (c) Dual views: an accruals-based dashboard and a cash-based dashboard. (d) Populated initially with estimated costs (COGS from supplier invoices, staff costs from historical data, ad spend from recent actuals), then progressively replaced with live data as the API integrations come online. (e) Connected via Zapier (or similar) to Shopify (UK, US and ROW stores), Meta Ads, TikTok Shop, Stripe, PayPal, Revolut, Wise, Remote and Airtable (creator contracts), pulling actuals automatically. (f) Built with scalability in mind. The client is expanding into a group structure (multiple brands and entities), so the dashboard needs to be designed in a way that can be replicated and consolidated across additional businesses in the near future. Following the dashboard build, you will assist with Xero integration work: aligning the chart of accounts, reconciling recent months and ensuring the management accounts output ties back to the dashboard figures. What we need from you Essential: You are a qualified or part-qualified management accountant (CIMA or equivalent) with demonstrable experience building financial dashboards and management accounts from scratch, not just maintaining existing ones. You are comfortable working with AI tools and using them in your workflow. This is not optional. We use Claude, ChatGPT and similar tools as part of our delivery process and expect you to do the same. You have hands-on experience with API-driven data pipelines, whether through Zapier or direct API work. You need to be able to connect data sources, map fields and troubleshoot when feeds break. You have experience with Xero (or a comparable cloud accounting platform) and understand how to structure a chart of accounts for ecommerce businesses with multi-channel, multi-currency revenue. You can work independently with minimal supervision once given the brief and access. Preferred: Experience designing management accounts and dashboards for ecommerce, DTC or Shopify-based businesses. Familiarity with A2X, Finaloop or similar ecommerce accounting connectors. Experience building financial models that can scale across a company group (consolidated reporting, intercompany, multi-entity). Understanding of contribution margin, MER (marketing efficiency ratio) and channel-level unit economics. Practical details This is a remote, freelance contract. Hours are approximately 20 to 30 per week for an initial 4-week period, with the possibility of extending to 6 weeks depending on progress. Rate is $8-15 per hour Depending on Experience. There is potential for this to develop into a longer-term management accountant role as the client's group structure grows, but the immediate need is the project build. To apply Please include in your proposal: (a) A copy of your CV. (b) A brief summary of a financial dashboard or management accounts pack you have built from scratch, including what tools and data sources were involved. (c) Your experience with Zapier or similar API/automation tools. (d) Your accounting qualifications and level. (e) Your availability to start (ideally within the next week).

Our visual approach is cinematic, design-focused, and inspired by fashion and luxury branding rather than traditional family photography. The studio is known for its curated wardrobe collection, in-house hair and makeup, and museum-quality fine-art albums. We are looking for a highly organized, visually aware, and digitally fluent Virtual Assistant to support marketing, content operations, audience growth, and administrative workflows across multiple platforms. This is a long-term remote position working directly with the founder inside a fast-moving creative business where marketing and operational decisions directly affect visibility, bookings, and revenue. Responsibilities Content + Social Media • Schedule and publish content across Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn • Organize visual assets and content libraries • Write captions and assist with content formatting • Assist with short-form video editing and repurposing content • Maintain visual consistency across platforms Marketing + Growth • Assist with SEO tasks and blog formatting • Support Google Business Profile updates and optimization • Track analytics, engagement, inquiries, and content performance • Assist with email marketing campaigns and newsletters • Research trends, competitors, and audience growth opportunities Operations + Systems • Help maintain organized workflows and marketing systems • Support project tracking and task coordination • Organize databases, CRM systems, and content calendars • Assist with client communication and administrative tasks • Help improve operational efficiency and organization AI + Digital Tools • Use AI tools such as ChatGPT and Claude for drafting, research, summaries, and workflow support • Assist with AI-assisted content creation and marketing workflows • Help organize automation systems and digital processes Requirements Required • Strong written English communication skills • Strong organizational skills and attention to detail • Familiarity with Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, and social media culture • Comfortable working independently and remotely • Fast learner with strong digital fluency • Reliable internet connection and computer setup • Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines Preferred • Experience with Canva, CapCut, Premiere Pro, or short-form video editing • Familiarity with Notion, Asana, Buffer, Airtable, or project management tools • Familiarity with AI tools such as ChatGPT or Claude • Basic Adobe Creative Suite knowledge • Interest in luxury branding, photography, design, or visual culture • Previous VA, marketing assistant, or social media experience What You’ll Gain • Direct experience inside a luxury creative brand • Real-world exposure to branding, marketing systems, and audience growth • Long-term skill development in AI workflows, digital marketing, and creative operations • Portfolio-building opportunities through real campaigns and projects • Flexible remote work environment • Opportunity for long-term growth and increased responsibility Position Details • Remote position (Philippines-based preferred) • Part-time to start, with potential for long-term growth • graveyard first then Flexible schedule with overlapping working hours preferred • Compensation Full job description

**Applications without a Loom video will not be considered!** Part-Time | Remote | $8–$10/hr | 10 hrs/month (to start) and will scale up to approx 90 hrs/month WHO WE ARE AGENCY678 is a revenue operations and online business management agency. We build and manage the backend systems that allow coaching businesses and agencies to scale properly — from CRM builds and automations to client onboarding, sales infrastructure, and campaign execution. We work inside fast-moving, revenue-generating businesses where systems, speed, and execution matter. We’re growing — and we need someone reliable, switched-on, and execution-focused to support delivery across multiple client accounts. THE ROLE This is an execution-first operations VA role. You are not here to “help out” — you are here to build, implement, and maintain systems properly. You’ll be working directly with the founder and directly with clients to execute backend builds, automations, and operational workflows across client accounts. If you need constant direction or hand-holding, this won’t be a fit. If you’re someone who can take a task, figure it out, and deliver cleanly — keep reading. WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING Systems & Automation - Build and manage workflows, automations, and backend systems - Set up and maintain CRM systems (primarily GoHighLevel/HeyClients) - Create and optimise automations using tools like Zapier and n8n agent - Support AI integrations using OpenAI Chatbots & Lead Flow - Build and manage flows in ManyChat - Support lead capture, qualification, and automation journeys Client Systems & Ops - Set up onboarding systems (Dubsado, HeyClient, forms, automations) - Maintain clean, organised backend systems - Document workflows and SOPs Campaign & Backend Support - Assist with email and campaign setup - Support launches and backend delivery - Ensure everything runs smoothly behind the scenes WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU Non-negotiables: - Experience working with online coaches, agencies, or service providers - Hands-on experience with: GoHighLevel/HeyClients ManyChat Automation tools (Zapier, n8n, or similar) - Comfortable using AI tools (OpenAI) - Strong attention to detail — your work is clean, structured, and reliable - Able to follow instructions and figure things out independently - Good written English and clear communication - Reliable internet and ability to meet deadlines WHO YOU ARE - You’re an executor, not just a thinker - You take ownership of your work and complete tasks properly - You’re resourceful — if you don’t know something, you figure it out - You’re organised and detail-focused - You don’t disappear — communication matters - You want long-term, stable work and to grow with a team WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT - Not a basic admin VA role - Not a “wait for instructions” job - Not for someone juggling 10+ clients with no focus THE DETAILS - Rate: $8–$10/hour (based on experience) - 10 hrs/month (to start) and will scale up to approx 90 hrs/month - Type: Part-time contractor - Location: Remote - Timezone: Must have some overlap with UK or US hours HOW TO APPLY To apply, follow instructions carefully. Include: Your resume A short introduction (max 5–6 sentences) Your experience with the tools listed above (important to have experience with GHL/HeyClients, n8n agent and OpenAI/Claude) A Loom video (MAX 2 minutes) covering: Your background working with online businesses What systems/tools you’ve used (be specific) Why you’d be a good fit for this role Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

Full job description

ABOUT US Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond. Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Claude and Higgsfield like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold. WHO WE WANT This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can: Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god. You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert. Will be utilizing HIggsfield platform very extensively. WHAT YOU’LL DO Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, meme-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – mainly Higgsfield, Veo3, Sora, Seedancw and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc. Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused. WHO YOU ARE 5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, Capcut, Blender, After Effects Pro-level Claude Co Work, Claude Design, Claude Code / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team MUST-HAVES Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–4:00pm PST

Full job description

socials: ---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- The job in one sentence: You run my entire content operation. I film. You handle everything before and after. The daily workflow: 1. You write 30 short-form scripts ? I film them ? I send you the raw clips 2. You write 1 YouTube script ? I film it ? I send you the raw file 3. You edit everything, pull from our shared B-roll folder, and publish I never touch editing software. I never touch Buffer. I just show up, read the script, and film. Your daily output: - 30 scripts written and ready before I start filming - 30 short-form videos edited and scheduled (2 TikTok accounts + 1 Instagram via Buffer) - 1 YouTube video fully edited, uploaded, thumbnail + title + description done - Analytics check — what worked yesterday, what we're doubling down on today Assets you manage: - Shared B-roll folder (you maintain it, organize it, request new footage when needed) - All account logins via Buffer - YouTube Studio You need to know: - Higgsfield and AI video tools - How to study viral content and write scripts that convert — Danish audience, short-form hooks - Buffer publishing workflows - Claude Code or AI automation (bonus — we'll build workflows together) Hard requirements: - Scripts delivered before I wake up - Same-day turnaround on edits after I send footage - No missed days Apply with: 1. 3 short-form edits you've done 2. Write a sample 3-script batch for a Danish content creator in [your niche] — this shows me immediately if you can actually do the job 3. Your rate + hours/timezone

Full job description

About Us Robin Hood Ventures is a real estate wholesaling company based in Richmond, VA. We're building a team of AI employees — automated agents that handle lead qualification, call QA, reporting, and more. We need someone to design the system and own the outcome. About the Role You're not a builder. You're the person who decides what gets built, how it should work, and whether the final product actually matches the vision. You'll design the blueprints for each AI employee, write the functional specs, and manage the AI Builder to make sure every automation is delivered correctly. What You'll Do Map out Robin Hood Ventures' business workflows and identify where AI agents can replace or augment manual work Design detailed blueprints for each AI employee — triggers, logic, tools, prompts, outputs Write clear specs the Builder can execute without guessing QA every build before it goes live — if it doesn't match the blueprint, it goes back Prioritize the build roadmap and keep the Builder on track week to week Flag anything that needs CEO-level input before resources are spent You're a Fit If You Have: Experience designing AI automation systems (not just using them) Deep familiarity with Claude API, Make.com or n8n, GoHighLevel, Twilio, Google Sheets Ability to write airtight specs a contractor can execute without follow-up questions Experience managing or directing a technical builder or developer Clear, direct communication — you'll be the bridge between the CEO's vision and the Builder's execution How to Apply Put BLUEPRINT in your subject line. No BLUEPRINT = no review. Along with BLUEPRINT, send: One AI system you designed — describe the architecture, tools used, and outcome Answer in 3–5 sentences: A CEO tells you he wants an AI agent that listens to sales calls, scores reps, and texts him the top 3 leads by 6am. Walk me through how you'd design it. Compensation $2,500–$3,000/month based on experience Full-time, fully remote Milestone bonuses for shipped phases

Full job description

We're looking for a mildly obsessive technophile who sees a manual process and immediately starts thinking about how to kill it. We're a fast-moving Health-sharing advisory company. Our ops run lean, our team takes ownership, and we have no shortage of things to fix. We need someone who lives and breathes automation — not for the novelty of it, but because inefficiency genuinely irritates them. What you'll be doing - You'll work directly with our leadership team to identify and eliminate inefficiencies across the business. That means connecting tools that should already be talking to each other, automating workflows that are currently running on willpower, and deploying AI where it actually saves time — not just for show. - This is a contract role with real scope, real impact, and no shortage of problems worth solving. What you need to bring - Spreadsheet automation: You turn bloated, formula-riddled sheets into clean, automated systems. - API integrations: If there's a webhook or an endpoint, connecting platforms is second nature. - HubSpot fluency: Workflows, pipelines, properties, and reporting — you've been in the weeds before. - AI tools & implementation: You know OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and the others — and you know how to put them to work. Who you are - You find inefficiency genuinely irritating — and you do something about it - You translate business problems into technical solutions without needing everything spelled out - You ship. You don't gold-plate. You get things working, then make them better. - You're comfortable working independently and communicating clearly with a non-technical team - You stay current — because you actually want to, not because you have to About us We help individuals and businesses navigate health sharing plans, HSAs, and alternative health coverage options. We're a lean, intentional team that runs on EOS and values people who take ownership. We're serious about what we do, but we don't take ourselves too seriously. How to apply Send an email to operations@hsaforamerica.com. Tell us what you've automated, what tools you've connected, and one thing you've built that you're genuinely proud of. We'll take it from there.

Full job description

We are looking for an experienced Go HighLevel (GHL) Specialist to work with us on an ongoing contract basis. This is not an entry-level position. You must be highly experienced with Go HighLevel and be able to demonstrate your previous work during the interview process. Excellent written and spoken English is essential, as you may be building customer-facing assets and occasionally communicating with our team. Your Responsibilities You will be responsible for building and maintaining Go HighLevel systems including: Websites Build professional websites Mobile responsive design SEO-friendly structure Fast loading pages Landing Pages High-converting landing pages Sales funnels Lead capture pages Thank you pages CRM & Pipelines Set up and customise sales pipelines Opportunity stages Automations Lead management workflows Email Marketing Email sequences Nurture campaigns Follow-up campaigns Broadcast emails Email templates Automations Workflow creation Trigger-based automations SMS and email automation Internal notifications Lead routing Forms & Surveys Build questionnaires Client onboarding forms Surveys Conditional logic forms Data collection workflows Calendars & Booking Appointment booking systems Calendar configuration Round-robin scheduling Reminder sequences Confirmation emails and SMS Other Skills Experience with: Custom values Custom fields Tags Snapshots Membership areas Reputation management Workflow troubleshooting Integrations using Zapier or Make (preferred) Essential Requirements You must: Have extensive Go HighLevel experience. Be able to demonstrate previous Go HighLevel projects. Speak and write fluent English. Have excellent attention to detail. Be reliable and meet deadlines. Be able to follow written instructions. Be available for Zoom meetings when required. Bonus Skills Highly desirable: HTML/CSS knowledge Basic JavaScript Graphic design using Canva or Photoshop Copywriting Funnel optimisation Facebook Lead Ads integration Google Ads integration Meta Pixel setup Google Analytics AI tools such as ChatGPT To Apply Please include: Your resume. Your years of Go HighLevel experience. Links or screenshots of Go HighLevel work you have built. Your hourly rate in USD. Your availability (hours per week). Your country and time zone.

Full job description

# Operations & Systems Manager (Remote – Full-Time) ### **This is NOT an administrative assistant position.** We are looking for a highly analytical **Operations & Systems Manager** who enjoys building dashboards, developing KPIs, improving business processes, facilitating leadership meetings, and helping a CEO execute company strategy. If you love creating systems, organizing chaos, holding teams accountable, and using data to drive decisions, this role is for you. **This position requires someone who can think strategically, build operational infrastructure, and help scale a growing organization—not simply complete administrative tasks.** --- ## About Us Elevation Individual and Family Therapy is a rapidly growing multi-location mental health organization serving clients throughout Illinois and Indiana. We are passionate about building an organization that delivers exceptional care while operating with excellence behind the scenes. We are looking for an experienced Operations & Systems Manager who loves structure, systems, data, and accountability. This is not an administrative assistant position. We need someone who enjoys building processes, organizing teams, tracking performance, and making businesses run better. If you naturally think, "There has to be a better way to do this," you'll probably love this role. --- # About the Role Our CEO is highly visionary and growth-focused. Your role is to translate vision into execution. You will build systems, organize projects, hold leaders accountable, monitor KPIs, create dashboards, facilitate meetings, and ensure initiatives move from ideas to completion. You will become the operational hub of the company. --- # What You'll Be Responsible For ### Operational Leadership * Build and improve operational systems * Document and improve workflows * Create Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) * Identify inefficiencies and recommend solutions * Improve communication across departments * Ensure projects are completed on time ### KPI Development & Reporting You will build executive dashboards that track the health of the company. Examples include: * Revenue * Collections * Accounts Receivable * Therapist productivity * Documentation compliance * Scheduling utilization * Client satisfaction * Referral sources * Administrative performance * Hiring metrics * Credentialing progress * Marketing performance * Financial trends You'll create reports that allow leadership to quickly understand what is happening across the business. --- ### Dashboard Creation You'll build dashboards using tools like: * Airtable * Monday.com * ClickUp * Google Sheets * Excel * Looker Studio * Power BI (preferred) You should enjoy turning messy data into simple visual reports. --- ### Meeting Leadership You will: * Run weekly leadership meetings * Create agendas * Capture action items * Assign ownership * Follow up on commitments * Keep projects moving * Ensure accountability You are comfortable respectfully asking leaders for updates and helping them stay on track. --- ### Project Management You'll oversee multiple projects simultaneously such as: * New service launches * Software implementation * Process improvements * Hiring initiatives * Operational changes * Technology rollouts * Workflow redesign * Cross-department initiatives Nothing should "fall through the cracks." --- ### Data & Analytics You should enjoy working with numbers. Responsibilities include: * Tracking trends * Building reports * Identifying operational bottlenecks * Finding opportunities for improvement * Making recommendations backed by data --- ### Process Improvement You'll constantly ask questions like: * Can this be automated? * Can this process be simplified? * Can we reduce manual work? * Can this dashboard update automatically? * Can this report be easier to understand? Continuous improvement is expected. --- ### Executive Support You'll work closely with the CEO by: * Organizing priorities * Following up on projects * Preparing reports * Monitoring company goals * Keeping initiatives moving * Reducing decision fatigue * Creating structure around growth Your success will allow the CEO to spend less time managing operations and more time growing the business. --- # Required Skills * Excellent English communication * Exceptional organization * Strong project management * Advanced Excel or Google Sheets * Dashboard creation * KPI reporting * Process documentation * Meeting facilitation * Strong written communication * Excellent follow-through * Critical thinking * Time management * High attention to detail --- # Preferred Experience Experience with one or more of the following: * Airtable * Monday.com * ClickUp * Asana * Notion * Microsoft Excel * Google Workspace * Power BI * Looker Studio * Zapier * Make.com * AI tools such as ChatGPT Experience supporting founders or CEOs is a significant plus. --- # The Ideal Person You are someone who: * Loves structure * Loves organization * Enjoys creating systems * Notices details others miss * Naturally follows up with people * Thinks several steps ahead * Is comfortable leading meetings * Can respectfully hold people accountable * Enjoys solving operational problems * Is proactive instead of reactive * Doesn't wait to be told what to do * Takes ownership --- # To Apply (Required) **Applications that do not include ALL of the items below will not be considered.** Please submit: 1. Your resume. 2. A brief introduction about yourself. 3. **Screenshots or examples of dashboards you personally built.** 4. **A list of KPIs you have created or managed.** 5. A list of the software you have used (Airtable, ClickUp, Monday.com, Power BI, Excel, Google Sheets, Looker Studio, etc.). 6. The largest team or organization you have supported. 7. **A 3–5 minute Loom video** introducing yourself and answering the following: * Tell us about a business process you improved. * What problem did it solve? * What systems or tools did you implement? * What measurable results did you achieve? 8. Include the phrase **"Systems Drive Success"** as the first line of your application so we know you read the entire job posting. We're looking for someone who enjoys bringing order to complexity, turning ideas into action, and helping a growing organization scale with excellence.

Arca angle

Full job description

Title: Remote Systems & Automations Manager (Airtable & AI Automations Focused) Schedule: 9 am- 5 pm EET (GREECE time zone) Hours: 40-45 Hours Rate of Pay: $1,920 - $2,400 a month ($12-15/hr) This role will begin by auditing and strengthening the business’s internal technical ecosystem, with a focus on creating a robust customer funnel tracking system from awareness to sales. Once that foundation is in place, the role will expand into building a client-facing platform that allows our clients to track their own business inputs and outputs, supported by dashboards, AI tools, trainings, and strategic resources Self Made is a premier global business consultancy and transformation platform dedicated to building a new generation of successful female entrepreneurs. We provide established female founders and service-based business owners with a strategic roadmap combined with modern marketing strategy, tool integration, and community resources to create true leverage, profitability, and operational freedom. Our comprehensive approach explicitly addresses both technical growth requirements and the deeper professional confidence challenges that arise during business scaling. Guided by an absolute commitment to excellence in execution, we exist to help brilliant women combine their lifelong expertise with contemporary rules of visibility to achieve wealth and impact on their own terms Accountability: Phase 1 *Technical ecosystem audit - Review the full business tech stack across CRM, email, payments, forms, automations, analytics, content platforms, and Airtable - Map how leads currently move from awareness to enquiry to sale - Identify data gaps, broken handoffs, duplicate tools, and manual workarounds - Assess which systems are reliable enough to keep and which need replacing or restructuring - Document the current-state architecture in a way that is clear and usable *Funnel tracking and measurement - Build a robust way to track the customer journey from awareness through to conversion - Define the key funnel stages and what each one means in your business - Establish the core metrics to measure at each stage - Create logic for tracking lead source, conversion points, sales activity, and customer movement - Make sure the data can be viewed consistently and updated accurately *Systems integration and data structure - Connect the key systems needed to support clean funnel visibility - Improve how Airtable is used as a source of truth where relevant - Consolidate fragmented data from Stripe, School, and Kit into a single Airtable relational database, establishing a unified Source of Truth with zero duplicate records within the first 30 days. - Ensure data flows correctly between tools and is structured for long-term use - Reduce fragmentation across platforms - Create a setup that can later support a client-facing dashboard *Operational visibility and reporting - Build internal reporting views that allow you to clearly see business performance - Create dashboards or views for sales pipeline, leads, content performance, and conversion trends - Make reporting practical and decision-focused, not just data-heavy - Ensure reporting supports fast insight into what is and is not working *Documentation and implementation standards - Document the systems, workflows, tracking logic, and definitions - Create SOPs for ongoing maintenance and team use - Establish standards for naming, permissions, and data hygiene - Build the setup so it can be maintained and expanded over time Phase 2: *Client platform design - Translate the internal system into a client-facing experience - Design how clients will track both input and output in their business - Structure a performance dashboard so it is simple, strategic, and useful - Ensure the platform helps clients understand performance and take action *Client business tracking framework - Build a model clients can use to track their own awareness, leads, sales activity, and growth - Define which inputs they should monitor, such as content, outreach, offers, and sales actions - Define which outputs they should monitor, such as leads, inbound requests, calls booked, deals closed, and revenue - Make sure the framework is easy to use and relevant for coaching clients *AI and strategic tools integration - Integrate useful AI-supported tools into the client experience - Build access to competitor research workflows - Include transcription and summary features for content and learning - Create access to custom GPTs or guided AI tools for idea development and execution support - Ensure AI tools are practical, safe, and well-structured for client use *Training and guided implementation - Link the dashboard experience to trainings, resources, and strategic guidance - Build a systemised checklist approach to business building inside the platform - Make sure clients know what to do next based on their current business data - Connect education to execution so the platform drives action, not just insight *Events and client engagement - Build a calendar view for upcoming events, trainings, and key touchpoints - Make the platform feel like an active business-growth environment rather than a static portal - Support client engagement through visibility, reminders, and structured planning *Scale, quality, and long-term platform ownership - Ensure the platform is built for long-term use, not quick fixes - Create a permissions structure that protects client data appropriately - Maintain data quality, usability, and reliability as the platform grows - Identify future improvements and help shape the long-term product roadmap - Design and execute a production-ready client interface through reliable API/Zapier schemas engineered to support 100–500 active concurrent users without system lag or handoff breakage. Tasks: *Review and optimise our systems daily to ensure the customer journey from awareness to sale is clear, effective, and scalable. *Track and report on key business metrics, turning data into clear insights and actionable recommendations. *Build and maintain the operational infrastructure of the business, including Airtable, automations, integrations, and SOPs. *Approach problems with clear structure and strategic thinking, turning ideas and gaps into practical solutions *Communicate progress through daily updates, keeping the founder informed on wins, issues, priorities, and next actions. Expectations: *3+ years in operations, systems, product operations, business intelligence, or digital product implementation *Hands-on experience with Airtable and connected tools *Experience setting up or improving reporting dashboards and data flows *Experience building or managing automations and integrations *Experience documenting processes and creating scalable workflows *Experience giving clear updates, recommendations, and next steps to a founder or senior decision-maker *Experience building robust, scalable digital platforms for long-term use, with a clear understanding of clean system architecture, reliability, and user experience at scale. Must be able to create proper production-ready systems rather than quick, patchwork, or vibe-coded solutions, with the ability to support at least 100 active users. *Must be highly detail-oriented and take pride in excellence of execution, with a consistent ability to deliver clean, accurate, high-quality work to a very high standard. Secret Code = DHOPS0626 *Must be highly self-motivated, take initiative, and work with a high level of independence and should be able to understand the wider vision, think proactively, and bring ideas, improvements, and solutions to the table. Salary: Position & Length: Contractor (Remote) 1-Year (12 months) Rate of Pay: $12-$15 USD Scheduled Hours Minimum: 40 hours (Must Track Hours) Scheduled Hours Maximum: 45 hours (Anything above needs approval) Agreed Schedule: Monday–Friday, 9 AM–5 PM ETT GREECE Pay Schedule: Monthly via Wise or preferred method With the submission of hours worked 13th Month Pay Bonus? Yes, performance based metrics TDB at 90 Day evaluation *Application Criteria: Subject Line Please add: SAM Please have an ID score of 70+ Please provide the secret code in the message Application Deadline: July 3rd, 2026

Full job description

About Us We're brand architects. Not decorators. Our agency was built for the founders who'd rather be unforgettable than agreeable. Cinematic, declarative, certain — we architect names people repeat. We deliver full-funnel Meta ad campaigns built to drive measurable revenue, fix website conversions, build unbreakable brand systems, and design scroll-stopping creatives. Our numbers since 2025 speak for themselves: 2,158 campaigns created $4.8M+ generated revenue for clients +47 founders rearchitected 4.9/5 rated by our clients The Role We are looking for a highly skilled Meta Ads & Creative Expert to join our team. You aren't just a media buyer, and you aren't just a designer. You are a hybrid talent who understands how to build profitable Meta campaigns from the ground up and how to generate the high-converting, AI-driven creatives that fuel them. Currently, this role is 24 hours per week, but we are growing fast. We expect this to scale into a full-time position soon, so you must be open and available for increased hours in the near future. Required Skills & Experience To thrive in this role, you must be: An Expert in Meta Ads Management: You know the Business Manager inside and out, understand scaling strategies, and build campaigns that drive actual revenue. An Expert in AI Image Generation: You know how to prompt, iterate, and produce stunning, photorealistic, or highly stylized AI imagery tailored for advertising. An Expert in Meta Ad Creative Design: You understand the anatomy of a scroll-stopping ad. You know how to combine AI imagery, compelling copy, and strong design principles. Fluent in English: Clear, concise, and professional communication is non-negotiable. What We Offer Flexible Payouts: Choose between weekly or monthly payments. Competitive Pay: Your hourly rate will be based strictly on your experience and the quality of your portfolio. Top-Tier Tech Stack Provided: We give you the keys to the best tools on the market. You will get full access to Canva, CapCut, Google Gemini, Lovable AI, Claude, and more. Massive Growth Potential: We are expanding rapidly. As we grow, new job titles are being created. If you prove yourself, you will be first in line for a promotion to a Manager role. ?? How to Apply (Read Carefully) ?? We only hire top talent, and we expect high attention to detail. To apply, you must include a link to your portfolio showcasing your previous work (Meta Ads results, AI-generated images, and ad creative designs). Note: Applications submitted without a valid portfolio link will be declined immediately. If you have what it takes to build campaigns that convert and design creatives that stop the scroll, we want to hear from you. Apply now.

Full job description

**Full-Time | Remote, EST Time** We are a growing telecommunications company seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Partnerships Operations Coordinator/Payroll manager to support our expanding team and partner network. You'll manage partner relationships, oversee pipeline performance, maintain KPIs, and ensure payroll accuracy across our dealer network. The scope will grow quickly with the right person. If you like building structures where there isn't any, this is for you. What You'll Do Be the main point of contact for sub-dealers and external partners Track deals and KPIs across multiple sales divisions and flag any pipeline leakage Work directly with raw backend data to ensure accurate reporting and attribution Process payroll for internal team members and sub-dealers Build SOPs, document workflows, and drive process improvements across the business What We're Looking For Must-Have 3+ years in operations, CRM, or a data-focused role Comfortable working with raw, unstructured data — SQL or equivalent Proven ability to build reporting systems and KPI frameworks from scratch Excellent communicator, Strong English — able to simplify complex data for partners and leadership Full-time availability during EST hours Thrives in ambiguous, fast-moving environments Nice to Have Experience with Claude Code or AI-assisted tools Background in telecom, sales ops, or partner/dealer management Experience working directly with founders or in an early-stage company How to Apply Your CV/resume A brief note on why this role fits you and one specific example of a reporting system or process you built A voice note (1–2 mins) via Vocaroo — record your intro, copy the link, and include it in your application We look forward to hearing from you. **Please note: This is not a VA / EA role.**

Full job description

We are a fast-growing clean beauty brand looking for a highly organized and execution-focused Business Operations & Marketing Coordinator to help support day-to-day business operations, marketing execution, and digital workflows. This is not a high-level strategy role. You will be working on daily tasks and activities to grow the business. This role is focused on: * execution * organization * consistency * communication * helping keep the business moving efficiently across multiple areas You will work directly with the founder and support a variety of recurring operational and marketing tasks across Shopify, Amazon, email marketing, influencer outreach, bookkeeping coordination, and social media. CORE RESPONSIBILITIES: 1. Email Marketing Support * Build and schedule email campaigns * Coordinate promotional calendars * Upload creative assets and product links * Assist with campaign reporting and organization * Work inside Klaviyo or similar email platforms 2. Digital Marketing Support * Familiarity with Meta Ads and Google Ads * Design and launch new campaigns * Optimize existing campaigns * Help organize campaign assets and reporting * Monitor performance dashboards * Support execution workflows 3. Shopify & General E-Commerce Support * Product uploads and updates * Shopify page updates * Promotional banner updates * Collection organization * Basic operational support 4. Social Media Coordination * Schedule and post content consistently across Instagram and TikTok * Organize content calendars * Coordinate creative assets and captions * Maintain brand consistency across platforms 5. Influencer & Creator Outreach * Research creators and influencers aligned with the brand * Send outreach messages and follow-ups * Track conversations and partnerships * Help coordinate whitelisting and creator campaigns TOOLS YOU HAVE USED & FAMILIAR WITH: * Shopify * Klaviyo * Meta Business Suite & Ads Manager * Google Ads Manager * ChatGPT / Claude * Google Sheets * Slack * Notion Experience with all tools is NOT required, but you must be comfortable learning quickly. IDEAL CANDIDATE * Highly organized and detail-oriented * Strong written and spoken English * Comfortable with repetitive execution tasks * Reliable and proactive * Fast learner * Comfortable working in a fast-moving environment * Interested in AI tools and workflow improvement * Able to manage multiple moving parts without losing organization IMPORTANT: This role is heavily execution-focused. We are looking for someone who: * detail oriented * follows through consistently * communicates clearly * stays organized * takes ownership of recurring workflows * helps reduce operational load for the founder COMPENSATION * Full-time (40 hrs/week) *$700-$1200 per month based on experience and skill level HOW TO APPLY IMPORTANT: Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed. 1. Start your application with the word: GREEN 2. Tell us: * what parts of this role you feel strongest in * what tools/platforms you’ve used before * what type of work you enjoy most 3. Share: * resume * portfolio/examples for Meta Ads, Google Ads, Shopify showing what you owned and the results you achieved * sample emails you have created * tools you are familiar with 4. Tell us: * how you currently use AI tools in your workflows * what repetitive tasks you think AI can help improve WHY THIS ROLE IS UNIQUE: We are building an AI-assisted operating system for a modern eCommerce brand. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys: * organization * systems * execution * digital operations * AI-assisted workflows * helping businesses scale efficiently and wants to grow long-term with the company. We are not interested in part time or

Funnelish Funnel Builder (Project-Based) – Health & Beauty E-commerce

About us We run two growing health & beauty e-commerce brands (UK + AUS) — driving traffic through Meta Ads to advertorial funnels built on Funnelish, with checkout on Shopify. We're a small, fast-moving team and we're looking for a reliable Funnelish builder...

  • AI/build signals: claude, chatgpt, ai tools

  • Code/build substrate: repo, html, css, javascript

Arca angle
  • Company/contact signal is present, so this can go into outreach review.
Full job description

About us We run two growing health & beauty e-commerce brands (UK + AUS) — driving traffic through Meta Ads to advertorial funnels built on Funnelish, with checkout on Shopify. We're a small, fast-moving team and we're looking for a reliable Funnelish builder to join us on a per-project basis, with the possibility of ongoing work if it's a good fit. What you'll be doing - Build advertorial and sales funnels in Funnelish based on provided copy, images, and creative briefs - Customize funnel pages using HTML/CSS where Funnelish's native blocks aren't enough (custom layouts, styling tweaks, embeds) - Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to help generate or refine page copy and images where needed - Set up funnel pages to match brand specs (UK or AU, depending on the project) - Connect funnels correctly to Shopify products, checkout, and CTA links - Implement tracking pixels correctly (we use wetracked.io) - Follow our delivery checklists and SOPs closely - Test funnels end-to-end before handover (links, pixels, mobile responsiveness, page speed) - Communicate clearly on progress and flag issues or blockers early - Make revisions based on feedback (creative, copy, or structural changes) What we're looking for - Proven experience building funnels in Funnelish (please share examples/portfolio) - Experience in health & beauty or supplements e-commerce is a must - Strong HTML/CSS coding skills — comfortable writing and editing custom code blocks, not just using drag-and-drop elements - Hands-on experience using Claude and/or ChatGPT for generating/editing text and images is a must - Solid understanding of Shopify integration (products, checkout, cart links) - Experience with Meta Ads pixel setup and tracking (wetracked.io experience is a plus) - Able to work independently from a brief/checklist without heavy hand-holding - Strong attention to detail — broken links or missing pixels cost us money - Comfortable with async communication via ClickUp - Good written English Nice to have - Familiarity with advertorial-style funnels (long-form story-to-offer pages) - Basic JavaScript knowledge (for custom interactions/timers/popups) - Basic understanding of Meta ad compliance (claims, restricted content) How we work - Tasks assigned and tracked via ClickUp - SOPs and brand assets provided via Google Drive - Paid per project/funnel (rate to be discussed based on complexity) - Clear deadlines, clear feedback — we tell you exactly what we need To apply Please send: - Your Funnelish portfolio or 2–3 example funnels you've built - A code sample or screenshot of a custom HTML/CSS element you built in a funnel - An example of text or image content you've created/edited using Claude or ChatGPT - Your experience with health & beauty or supplement products - Your typical turnaround time per funnel - Your rate per funnel (or hourly, if you prefer)
