Operations Coordinator (AI-Driven Project & Task Management)

Part Time 10 hrs/week Posted/updated: Jun 25, 2026 $5/hour $866/mo est. Senior ask, but trainable profile language

KeepUpMedia is a North American marketing agency for premium medical clinics. We move fast, run lean, and live in Slack, WhatsApp, and Asana. I'm hiring an Operations Coordinator to be the person who makes sure nothing we say we'll do ever slips through the...

claudeai toolsmcprepoapiwebhookwebhooksautomationautomations
Why it belongs here
  • AI/build signals: claude, ai tools, mcp
  • Build surface: repo, api, webhook, webhooks, automation, automations, ghl
  • Code/build substrate: repo, api, webhook, webhooks, mcp
  • Trainable language: va, sop
  • Scarcity/seniority signal: lead
Arca angle
  • Comp appears close enough to the Arca $4-$6/hr budget band to pursue.
Full job description

KeepUpMedia is a North American marketing agency for premium medical clinics. We move fast, run lean, and live in Slack, WhatsApp, and Asana. I'm hiring an Operations Coordinator to be the person who makes sure nothing we say we'll do ever slips through the cracks. This is a remote, fully text-based role. Most days are about 1 hour of work; the busiest days cap at 3. The only call involved is a weekly check-in with me. If you're sharp, reliable, and obsessed with getting things across the finish line, this is a long-term growth seat — you start hourly and earn more scope and pay as you prove yourself. WHAT YOU'LL DO - Live inside our Slack channels and WhatsApp group chats and catch every task, request, or commitment the moment it comes up. - Log each task in Asana and assign it to the right owner across our team boards. - Confirm the task with the owner, then drive it to completion ON TIME. Following up, nudging, and escalating to me when something is stuck is the core of this job — not just logging tasks. - Take tasks directly from me and run them through the same pipeline. - Turn meeting transcripts (auto-generated via Fathom) into clear action items using Claude, then assign and track them. - Own new-hire onboarding: when we bring on a new editor or team member, make sure they receive every SOP, then check in regularly so they always have what they need to move work forward. - Send me one short weekly summary: what came in, where it went, and what's at risk. YOU MUST HAVE - Exceptional English — near-native, neutral accent. You'll communicate with North American teammates every day, in writing and on calls. If your spoken English has a noticeable accent, this is not the right role for you. This is non-negotiable. - Deep, daily AI fluency. You already use Claude heavily — if you don't, please don't apply. Experience with Claude MCP connections is the single most important skill for this role; mention it specifically. - Hands-on experience with Asana (essential), plus Slack and WhatsApp. ClickUp and Monday.com experience is a strong plus. - A real track record of being organized, proactive, and relentless about deadlines. - Genuine hunger to grow with a company long-term. BONUS POINTS - Agency or marketing-team experience. - Comfort building or running simple automations (Zapier, webhooks). - You've owned a task or project pipeline before and can point to proof. THE SETUP - Part-time, roughly 10–15 hours/week, remote, fully async except one weekly check-in with me. - $5/hour to start, with bonuses & clear room to grow in "pay" and "responsibility." TO APPLY Start your message with the word "KeepUpMedia" so I know you read this in full. Then tell me: (1) how you use Claude day to day, (2) your experience with MCP connections, and (3) one example of a time you drove a messy set of tasks to completion on time.

Full job description

Virtual Executive Assistant to the CEO Part-Time and Full-Time Opportunities Available About the Role Brand M3dia is seeking a highly organized, proactive, and tech-savvy Virtual Executive Assistant to support our CEO in managing day-to-day operations, communications, and strategic initiatives. As a company specializing in interactive kiosks, custom software solutions, AI-powered technologies, digital signage, and robotics, we are looking for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment and can leverage modern technology to improve efficiency and productivity. Key Responsibilities Calendar Management Schedule, coordinate, and manage the CEO's appointments, meetings, and commitments. Ensure optimal use of the CEO's time and maintain an organized calendar. Communication Management Manage incoming and outgoing communications, including emails, phone calls, LinkedIn messages, and social media inquiries. Draft professional correspondence on behalf of the CEO when required. Staff Coordination Communicate with team members on behalf of the CEO. Delegate tasks as directed, follow up on deliverables, and ensure accountability. Document & Presentation Preparation Create, edit, proofread, and organize reports, presentations, proposals, and business documents. Ensure all materials meet company standards and executive expectations. Meeting Support Prepare agendas, reports, and supporting documents. Take notes, track action items, and ensure follow-up on commitments. Travel Coordination Arrange domestic and international travel, accommodations, transportation, and itineraries. Project Assistance Conduct research, gather data, summarize findings, and prepare recommendations to support executive decision-making. Assist with special projects and operational initiatives. Expense Management Track expenses and organize receipts. Prepare expense reports and ensure accurate documentation. AI & Technology Support Utilize AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Otter.ai, and similar platforms to improve productivity and streamline workflows. Assist with AI-powered research, content drafting, meeting summaries, process documentation, and automation initiatives. Stay current with emerging AI technologies and recommend ways to improve operational efficiency. Qualifications Required Proven experience as a Virtual Executive Assistant, Executive Assistant, Operations Coordinator, or similar role supporting senior leadership or C-level executives. Excellent organizational and time management skills. Strong written and verbal English communication skills. Ability to manage multiple priorities with minimal supervision. High level of professionalism and discretion when handling confidential information. Strong attention to detail and follow-through. Technical Skills Experience using productivity and collaboration tools such as: Zoho Basecamp Calendly Otter.ai ScribeHow Google Workspace Microsoft Office Suite Project management tools AI Experience (Preferred) Experience using AI tools for business productivity, research, writing assistance, meeting management, workflow automation, or administrative support. Ability to effectively prompt AI systems and evaluate AI-generated outputs. Familiarity with AI-powered productivity tools is highly desirable. IT experience a huge plus Nice to Have Experience working in technology, software, digital signage, robotics, AI, or related industries. Project coordination or operations experience. Experience supporting founders, executives, or entrepreneurs in fast-growth companies. Working Conditions Remote position. Main working hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (Canada). Must have a reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace. Must have access to a computer capable of supporting modern business applications. Flexibility to accommodate urgent requests outside standard business hours when necessary. What We Offer Competitive compensation based on experience. Performance-based bonuses and incentives. Opportunity to work directly with an innovative CEO and leadership team. Exposure to cutting-edge projects involving AI, digital signage, interactive kiosks, software development, and robotics. Long-term growth opportunities within a rapidly expanding technology company. Application Process Interested candidates should submit: Updated Resume/CV Cover Letter References Relevant Work Samples (if applicable) A short 1-minute video introduction telling us about yourself, your relevant experience, and why you're interested in joining Brand M3dia. Please also indicate: Your experience supporting executives or business owners. Your experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Otter.ai, etc.). Examples of how you have used AI to improve productivity or workflow efficiency. Your availability and salary expectations. *Please note that only applicants who have carefully followed all application instructions and submitted the required information will be considered for the next stage of the hiring process. Brand M3dia is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes candidates from all backgrounds to apply. Website: www.BrandM3dia.com

Full job description

ABOUT THE BRAND TheUnderShadow.com is the official home of the UnderShadow Universe — a creator-owned intellectual property ecosystem encompassing published novels, branded merchandise (APEX Apparel line), a board game in development, collectibles, future gaming apps, and planned film/television licensing. The brand is authored under the pen name 'A Hardly Scene' (formerly JS Henderson) and currently operates three published novels, a live TikTok Shop with 773 staged SKUs, and a Wix-powered website. The UnderShadow Universe is not a standard retail brand. It is a universe-centric experience brand. Its CRM is not a marketing tool — it is the central operating system for every relationship across every division of the ecosystem. The most critical framing principle: this CRM is called the UnderShadow Intelligence Network. Subscribers are Assets. Customer accounts are Operative Profiles. Rewards are Clearance Levels. The contractor hired for this role must understand and maintain this brand language in every automation, every segment name, every tag, and every customer-facing communication. POSITION OVERVIEW We are seeking a highly skilled CRM Architect with demonstrated Klaviyo expertise to design, build, and manage the UnderShadow Intelligence Network — a comprehensive, multi-segment customer lifecycle ecosystem built on Klaviyo and integrated with our Wix storefront, TikTok Shop, and SMS platform. This is a project-based engagement structured in seven phases. Phases 1 through 3 represent the core build (estimated 3–4 months). Phases 4 through 7 represent ongoing optimization, loyalty infrastructure, and data architecture, with the option to convert to a retained monthly engagement upon successful completion of Phase 3. This role requires a self-directed professional who can take a written architecture specification and translate it into a fully functioning, enterprise-grade Klaviyo ecosystem — independently, on schedule, and with zero hand-holding on platform mechanics. PLATFORM STACK (REQUIRED PROFICIENCY) • Klaviyo (Primary CRM/Email/SMS Platform) — 2+ years required • Wix (Website Platform) — Wix-Klaviyo integration experience required • TikTok Shop — understanding of TikTok Shop data flows and customer data limitations • SMS Platform — Klaviyo SMS, Postscript, or equivalent (platform to be jointly selected in Phase 1) • Loyalty Platform — Smile.io, LoyaltyLion, or equivalent (platform to be jointly selected in Phase 4) • Affiliate Tracking — Refersion, Impact, LeadDyno, or equivalent (platform to be jointly selected in Phase 3) • Google Analytics / Wix Analytics — for dashboard data sourcing • Email deliverability tools — MxToolbox, GlockApps, or equivalent for monitoring THE SEVEN-PHASE BUILD SCOPE PHASE 1 — PLATFORM FOUNDATION & INFRASTRUCTURE Deliverables: • Klaviyo account audit (or initial setup if new): verify sending domain, list health, and existing flows • Email deliverability infrastructure: configure SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records for the sending domain (undershadow.com or designated subdomain). Verify authentication passes MX record check. • Dedicated sending domain warm-up: execute a 4–6 week IP/domain warm-up protocol before any high-volume sending begins. • Wix-Klaviyo integration: configure all native Wix event triggers (purchase, cart abandonment, account creation, form submission) to pass correctly into Klaviyo. • TikTok Shop data bridge: identify and implement the method for capturing TikTok Shop customer data into Klaviyo. (Note: TikTok does not share customer emails natively — solution may include Wix post-purchase redirect, order confirmation email capture, or third-party connector.) • SMS platform selection and setup: evaluate Klaviyo SMS vs. Postscript for brand needs; configure opt-in compliance, short code or toll-free number, and CAN-SPAM/CTIA compliance. • Master segment and tag architecture: configure all 19 customer tags listed in the segment taxonomy below, using the Intelligence Network naming convention. • List import and segmentation: import any existing subscriber list; apply appropriate tags; remove invalid/hard-bounced addresses; establish baseline deliverability metrics. • Naming convention documentation: deliver a written Klaviyo Naming Convention Guide covering all flow names, segment names, tag names, custom properties, and metric names — all using Intelligence Network brand language. Phase 1 Acceptance Criteria: • SPF, DKIM, DMARC all passing on sending domain verification tools • Klaviyo integration test: minimum 5 Wix events (purchase, cart abandon, form submit, account create, page view) confirmed passing data into Klaviyo correctly • All 19 master tags configured in Klaviyo • Naming Convention Guide delivered and founder-approved • Zero emails sent to the list before warm-up protocol begins PHASE 2 — FUNNEL ARCHITECTURE & LEAD CAPTURE ECOSYSTEM Build six independent capture funnels, each feeding a separate Klaviyo list/segment. Each funnel requires: opt-in form (Wix), lead magnet or offer delivery (if applicable), welcome sequence (minimum 3 emails), and tag assignment on entry. Funnel 1 — The UnderShadow Collective (Apparel) Entry offer: 15% first order discount. Welcome sequence: brand story, bestselling items, style guide. Funnel 2 — Intelligence Network Entry (Novels) Entry offer: Free sample chapter download. Welcome sequence: author introduction, universe overview, book order links, reading community invitation. Funnel 3 — Playtest Program (Board Game) Entry offer: Join the board game playtest waitlist. Welcome sequence: game reveal, mechanics teaser, playtest application form. Funnel 4 — Insider Intel (Weekly Briefing) Entry: opt-in for weekly UnderShadow briefing. Welcome sequence: what to expect, first briefing, community links. Funnel 5 — Collector Access (Limited Releases) Entry: opt-in for limited edition alerts. Welcome sequence: collector philosophy, what's coming, Clearance Level introduction. Funnel 6 — Creator Program (Affiliate Recruitment) Entry: affiliate application. Welcome sequence: commission structure, brand guidelines, affiliate portal access, content kit delivery. Phase 2 Acceptance Criteria: • All 6 funnels live and testable on theundershadow.com • All 6 welcome sequences built, tested, and founder-approved before activation • Lead magnet delivery automated for Funnels 2, 3, 5, and 6 • All Wix opt-in forms mobile-responsive and tested on iOS and Android PHASE 3 — FULL AUTOMATION TRIGGER BUILD (110 TRIGGERS) Build the complete 110-trigger automation ecosystem. The 40 existing email templates will be provided at project start. The contractor is responsible for: (a) implementing all 40 existing templates as Klaviyo flows, (b) identifying and flagging any triggers requiring new copy, and (c) building all flows to production-ready status pending founder copy approval. The contractor does NOT write email copy — the founder writes or approves all copy. The contractor builds, tests, and deploys flows. LEAD ACQUISITION (Triggers 41–50) 41. Newsletter Signup 42. Free Chapter Download 43. Character Guide Download 44. Universe Lore Download 45. Cart Started 46. Wishlist Created 47. Account Created 48. SMS Opt-In 49. Contest Entry 50. Referral Program Registration CUSTOMER NURTURE (Triggers 51–60) 51. 7 Days No Purchase 52. 30 Days No Purchase 53. 60 Days No Purchase 54. 90 Days No Purchase 55. Browsed Product Multiple Times 56. Viewed Same Product 5+ Times 57. Category Affinity Trigger 58. Book Interest Trigger 59. Board Game Interest Trigger 60. Apparel Interest Trigger CART RECOVERY (Triggers 61–65) 61. 1 Hour Cart Abandonment 62. 24 Hour Cart Abandonment 63. 48 Hour Cart Abandonment 64. 72 Hour Cart Abandonment 65. High Value Cart Abandonment (Cart Value > $75) POST-PURCHASE (Triggers 66–75) 66. Order Thank You 67. Shipping Confirmation 68. Delivery Confirmation 69. Product Education 70. Apparel Care Instructions 71. Review Request 72. User-Generated Content Request 73. Replenishment Reminder 74. VIP Upgrade Invitation 75. Referral Invitation COMMUNITY (Triggers 76–85) 76. Discord Invitation 77. Community Welcome 78. Creator Spotlight 79. Fan Feature 80. Collector Spotlight 81. Tournament Announcement 82. New Character Reveal 83. Lore Expansion Release 84. Board Game Update 85. App Development Update VIP (Triggers 86–95) 86. VIP Enrollment 87. VIP Tier Upgrade 88. Exclusive Release Access 89. Private Sale Invitation 90. Birthday Campaign 91. Anniversary Campaign 92. Early Access Product Drop 93. Limited Edition Alert 94. Collector Series Launch 95. Founders Circle Invitation WHOLESALE (Triggers 96–100) 96. Wholesale Inquiry 97. Wholesale Approval 98. Wholesale Follow-Up 99. Bulk Order Proposal 100. Distributor Outreach LICENSING (Triggers 101–105) 101. Film Rights Inquiry 102. Television Rights Inquiry 103. Publishing Partnership Inquiry 104. Merchandise Licensing Inquiry 105. International Licensing Inquiry AFFILIATE (Triggers 106–110) 106. Affiliate Application 107. Affiliate Approval 108. Affiliate Performance Review 109. Affiliate Reactivation 110. Top Affiliate Recognition Phase 3 Acceptance Criteria: • All 110 flows built and in 'Review' status in Klaviyo • Each flow tested with simulated contact data to confirm correct trigger firing • Founder has reviewed and approved all copy before any flow is set to 'Live' • No flow sends to actual subscribers until founder approval is documented • Affiliate platform integrated and tracking confirmed on triggers 106–110 PHASE 4 — UNDERSHADOW CLEARANCE LEVELS LOYALTY PROGRAM Implement the UnderShadow Clearance Levels loyalty program — a thematic, 8-tier rewards architecture that replaces standard 'points' language with Intelligence Network nomenclature. Clearance Level Designation Qualification Criteria Level 1 Civilian Entry — account creation or first opt-in Level 2 Observer First email open or site visit post-subscribe Level 3 Informant First purchase or social share Level 4 Operative Second purchase or affiliate referral Level 5 Field Agent Third purchase or UGC submission Level 6 Handler Collector status or wholesale inquiry Level 7 Director VIP enrollment threshold (spend or engagement-based) Level 8 Shadow Council Founders Circle / Lifetime Ecosystem Member Phase 4 Deliverables: • Loyalty platform selection (Smile.io recommended for Wix compatibility) and installation • 8-level tier structure configured with Intelligence Network level names and criteria • Benefits matrix defined per level (to be specified by founder): exclusive content, early access, discounts, physical rewards, event invitations • Clearance Level progression triggers built in Klaviyo: email sent upon each tier upgrade • Clearance Level displayed in Operative Profile (customer account dashboard on Wix) PHASE 5 — INTELLIGENCE NETWORK BRAND ARCHITECTURE IMPLEMENTATION Implement the Intelligence Network brand language across every customer-facing CRM touchpoint. Standard Language Intelligence Network Language Implementation Location Standard Language Intelligence Network Language Implementation Location Subscribe to our newsletter Enter the UnderShadow Intelligence Network All opt-in forms, pop-ups, CTAs Customer Account Operative Profile Wix account dashboard, email references Rewards / Points Clearance Level Loyalty platform, all emails, Wix dashboard Member Asset Membership references, community communications Order Confirmation Mission Confirmation Post-purchase email subject lines Shipping Update Field Dispatch Report Shipping confirmation email subject lines Exclusive Access Classified Access Granted VIP and limited release communications Newsletter Intel Brief Weekly briefing communications Community The Network Discord invitations, community email references PHASE 6 — EXECUTIVE DASHBOARD CONFIGURATION Configure the following metrics tracking in Klaviyo and supplementary analytics tools: • DAILY: Total revenue (CRM-attributed), orders, new leads captured, email opt-ins, SMS opt-ins • WEEKLY: Returning customer rate, cart recovery rate, top 5 products by revenue, top 3 traffic sources, active automation performance summary • MONTHLY: Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) by segment, repeat purchase rate, email revenue, SMS revenue, affiliate revenue, TikTok Shop revenue (via bridge), Clearance Level distribution across the list, list growth rate • Deliverable: A written Dashboard Access Guide showing the founder how to view each metric independently, without relying on the contractor for routine reporting. PHASE 7 — CUSTOMER DATA WAREHOUSE & ONGOING OPTIMIZATION Build and maintain the UnderShadow Customer Data Warehouse — a comprehensive Operative Profile for every contact, containing all data fields specified below. Implement ongoing A/B testing, list hygiene, and performance optimization. Operative Profile Data Fields (Klaviyo Custom Properties): • Full Name • Email Address • Phone / SMS Number • Purchase History (all transactions) • Favorite Characters • Favorite Product Categories • Favorite Faction • Board Game Interest (Y/N) • Book Interest (Y/N) • Collector Status • VIP / Clearance Level • Affiliate Status • Wholesale Account Status • Licensing Interest • Lifetime Spend Value • Engagement Score • Last Activity Date • Predicted Next Purchase Category • Acquisition Source • Prison Outreach Flag (handled via postal — no automated email sequences) Ongoing Phase 7 Deliverables (Monthly): • A/B test 2 subject lines per major flow per month; report results and implement winner • List hygiene: suppress unengaged contacts (90+ days no open) into sunset segment; run re-engagement flow before final suppression • Deliverability monitoring: review spam complaint rate, bounce rate, unsubscribe rate monthly • Flow performance report: delivered to founder monthly — open rate, CTR, revenue per recipient, conversion rate per flow • Clearance Level advancement reporting: how many contacts advanced tiers this month ? MASTER CUSTOMER SEGMENT TAXONOMY (19 SEGMENTS) Every contact in Klaviyo must be tagged with the appropriate segment(s). Contacts may carry multiple tags simultaneously. All tag names use Intelligence Network language. Segment Tag Name Definition / Qualification Criteria Apparel Asset Purchased clothing or merchandise from the APEX line Book Reader Purchased or downloaded a novel Board Game Prospect Requested board game information or joined playtest waitlist Collector Purchased limited edition, premium, or collector-tier items UnderShadow Fan Engaged with universe content (lore, characters) without purchasing TikTok Shop Buyer Made a purchase through TikTok Shop (bridged into Klaviyo) Affiliate Asset Active affiliate promoting the brand Wholesale Prospect Submitted wholesale inquiry Wholesale Account Approved and active wholesale buyer Licensing Prospect Inquired about film, TV, publishing, merchandise, or international licensing Influencer Partner Social reach partner with active collaboration Event Attendee Attended or registered for an UnderShadow event Film/TV Prospect Expressed interest in media adaptations Email Asset Email subscriber — no purchase yet VIP / Clearance Level 6+ Handler, Director, or Shadow Council tier Prison Outreach Contact Books-to-Prisoners program — postal communication only Founders Circle Shadow Council / Level 8 — highest-tier lifetime member Creator Program Applied to or enrolled in affiliate/creator program Inactive Asset No engagement in 90+ days — in sunset flow COMPENSATION STRUCTURE COMPENSATION NOTE: The scope of this engagement — 7 phases covering 110 automation triggers, 6 funnels, an 8-tier loyalty program, a brand architecture implementation, an executive dashboard, and an ongoing data warehouse — requires structured milestone-based compensation, not a flat hourly rate with a weekly hour cap. Phase Scope Payment Trigger Compensation Phase 1 Platform Foundation & Infrastructure Upon acceptance of Phase 1 criteria Negotiated milestone fee Phase 2 Funnel Architecture (6 funnels) Upon all 6 funnels live and tested Negotiated milestone fee Phase 3 Full 110-Trigger Automation Build Upon all 110 flows in Review status Negotiated milestone fee Phase 4 Loyalty Program Build Upon Clearance Levels live on site Negotiated milestone fee Phase 5 Intelligence Network Brand Implementation Upon all brand language applied Included in Phase 4 milestone Phase 6 Executive Dashboard Upon dashboard delivered with guide Negotiated milestone fee Phase 7 Ongoing Optimization Retainer Monthly, ongoing post-Phase 6 Negotiated monthly retainer Note on Rate Expectations: Qualified Klaviyo CRM architects with Wix and TikTok Shop integration experience in the Philippines typically command $8–$18/hr for this skill set. We are seeking the highest-quality professional within this range. Applicants are encouraged to propose a project-based fee structure per phase in addition to or instead of an hourly rate. We will evaluate proposals on competency first, then cost. REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS • Minimum 2 years of hands-on Klaviyo flow building experience (not Mailchimp, not ActiveCampaign — Klaviyo specifically) • Demonstrated experience building multi-segment B2C email automation ecosystems (portfolio required) • Wix platform experience with Klaviyo integration (or willingness to learn Wix-Klaviyo integration before Phase 1 begins) • Email deliverability fundamentals: must understand SPF, DKIM, DMARC, sender reputation, and bounce management • Experience building eCommerce automation flows: cart abandonment, post-purchase, browse abandonment • Experience configuring audience segments, tags, and custom properties in Klaviyo • Strong written English (B2+ level minimum) — you will name flows, segments, and properties and must implement brand language precisely • Self-directed and deadline-driven — this role has no micromanagement. Phases have defined acceptance criteria. • Availability for weekly 30-minute video check-in with the founder PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Klaviyo Product Certification (email or SMS) • Experience with TikTok Shop seller integrations or data connectors • Experience with loyalty platform setup (Smile.io, LoyaltyLion, or similar) • Experience with affiliate tracking platform setup (Refersion, Impact, or similar) • Background in entertainment, publishing, apparel, or creator economy brands • Prior experience building CRM for a universe/lore-based brand (comics, gaming, entertainment) • Klaviyo A/B testing experience with documented open rate improvement results PERFORMANCE KPIs — HOW SUCCESS IS MEASURED Phase KPI Benchmark Phase 1–2 (Foundation) Email open rate > 35% on welcome sequences Industry benchmark: 25–30% Phase 1–2 (Foundation) Click-through rate > 3.5% on promotional flows Industry benchmark: 2.5% Phase 3 (Automation) Cart recovery rate > 10% on 3-step cart abandon sequence Industry benchmark: 5–8% Phase 3 (Automation) Post-purchase review request response rate > 5% Industry benchmark: 2–4% Phase 4 (Loyalty) 20% of purchasers advance to Level 3 (Informant) within 90 days Baseline: to be established Phase 6 (Dashboard) Monthly CRM-attributed revenue tracked and reported Target: 15–25% of total revenue from CRM Phase 7 (Ongoing) List growth: minimum 5% net new subscribers per month via funnel optimization Phase 7 (Ongoing) Deliverability: spam complaint rate < 0.1%; hard bounce rate < 0.5% Gmail bulk sender threshold COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENTS All automation flows and communications must comply with: • CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. § 7701 et seq.) — all commercial emails must include physical mailing address, clear unsubscribe mechanism, accurate from name and subject line • GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679) — for any EU-based contacts: explicit consent required, right to erasure must be honored, data processing basis documented • CCPA (California Civil Code § 1798.100 et seq.) — for California contacts: privacy notice, opt-out of data sale, 12-month lookback on data requests • CTIA SMS Guidelines — for all SMS communications: double opt-in required, opt-out keywords honored, message frequency disclosed at opt-in • Prison outreach segment: all communications with Books-to-Prisoners contacts must be postal-first. No automated email sequences. No SMS. This segment is manually managed. WORK PRODUCT OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY All deliverables produced under this engagement — including but not limited to Klaviyo flow architecture, automation logic, segment structures, custom property configurations, naming conventions, email templates, loyalty tier structures, and the Intelligence Network brand framework — are the exclusive intellectual property of the UnderShadow Universe / Vantara Global LLC. The contractor retains no ownership rights over any work product upon payment of agreed compensation. A Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) is required before project commencement. The contractor will have access to: unreleased character content, upcoming product announcements, wholesale contact data, licensing prospect information, and subscriber data. All such information is strictly confidential and may not be disclosed to any third party during or after the engagement. REPORTING STRUCTURE & COMMUNICATION • Direct report to: Jomo Sekou Henderson, Founder — UnderShadow Universe / Vantara Global LLC • Weekly check-in: 30-minute video call (day/time to be mutually agreed upon at project start) • Communication platform: to be agreed upon (email, Slack, or equivalent) • Phase completion reports: written summary of deliverables completed, any outstanding items, and next-phase kickoff plan — submitted to founder for written approval before next phase billing • Email copy approval: no automation flow goes live without written founder approval of all copy. Contractor submits copy for review via agreed platform; founder has 48-hour review window. • Emergency escalation: for any deliverability emergency (domain blacklist, spam complaint spike), contractor must notify founder within 2 hours of detection APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS To be considered for this engagement, applicants must submit all of the following. Applications missing any element will not be reviewed. 1. A cover letter (minimum 200 words) explaining your specific experience with Klaviyo and why you understand universe-centric brand CRM specifically. 2. Two portfolio examples of multi-segment Klaviyo email ecosystems you have built, including: the client type, the number of flows built, and a screenshot or screen recording of the Klaviyo flow architecture (client name may be redacted). 3. Your proposed project fee structure: either a phase-based milestone proposal or an hourly rate with a phase-by-phase hour estimate. 4. Your Klaviyo certification status (if applicable). 5. Availability: how many hours per week you can dedicate during the Phase 1–3 build period (we recommend minimum 25–35 hours/week during the build phase). 6. One sentence answering this question: What is the difference between a Klaviyo flow and a Klaviyo campaign — and when would you use each? This question (#6) is a qualifying filter. If you cannot answer it in one sentence, this role is not the right fit. BRAND CONTEXT FOR APPLICANTS The UnderShadow Universe is a creator-owned IP ecosystem centered on a classified intelligence organization mythology. The brand's published novels are written under the pen name 'A Hardly Scene.' The merchandise line is APEX Apparel. The CRM is called the Intelligence Network. Customers are Assets. Accounts are Operative Profiles. Rewards are Clearance Levels. If you are a strong Klaviyo technician but have never worked on a brand where every element of the customer experience is a form of storytelling — this project will challenge and excite you. We are not building a standard e-Commerce email list. We are building a classified organization that every customer wants to be a member of. The CRM is the world.

Full job description

# Full-Time Project Manager for Web Design and SEO Agency ## About Frisco Web Agency Frisco Web Agency is a growing web design and digital marketing agency based in Frisco, Texas. Our primary service is designing and developing custom websites for service-based businesses. We also manage ongoing Search Engine Optimization campaigns and occasionally take on other digital projects. We are currently a small team of three: * Christopher Potter — Owner * Rocky Diana — Web Developer * Melissa Saldana — Administrative Support We are looking for a full-time Project Manager who can take ownership of our client projects, organize our fulfillment process, and keep everything moving forward without requiring constant direction. ## The Main Outcome of This Role The most important responsibility of this position is simple: **Make sure every project continues moving forward and is completed on time—or preferably ahead of schedule.** As the owner, Christopher needs to focus more of his time on marketing, sales, strategy, and growing the company. Right now, managing multiple active projects can pull him away from those responsibilities. Your role will be to take ownership of the day-to-day management of our fulfillment. You will need to know: * Where every project currently stands * What has already been completed * What still needs to be completed * Who is responsible for each task * What is due next * What is falling behind * What information we are waiting on * What the client needs to know * What could prevent us from meeting a deadline We do not want someone who only updates tasks after being told what to do. We need someone who thinks ahead, identifies problems early, communicates clearly, and actively pushes projects toward completion every day. ## Primary Responsibilities ### Manage Website Projects Most of your work will involve managing custom website design and development projects. You will be responsible for: * Setting up and organizing projects in ClickUp * Reviewing each active project every day * Creating and assigning tasks * Confirming that tasks have clear descriptions, deadlines, and owners * Following up with team members about incomplete or overdue work * Identifying the next steps before the current steps are completed * Coordinating design, content, development, revisions, quality assurance, and launch * Gathering missing information and materials from clients * Communicating project updates to clients * Preventing projects from becoming stalled * Keeping projects on schedule and pushing for early completion * Escalating problems before they become emergencies ### Manage SEO Campaigns Website projects will be the primary responsibility, but you will also help manage ongoing SEO campaigns. This may include: * Organizing monthly SEO deliverables in ClickUp * Confirming that assigned SEO work is completed * Coordinating content, website updates, keyword research, on-page optimization, and reporting * Tracking recurring monthly responsibilities * Preparing client updates * Following up on missing approvals or information * Making sure monthly deliverables do not get overlooked You do not need to be an advanced SEO strategist, but you should be willing to learn our process and understand enough to manage the work effectively. ### Communicate With Clients You will become one of the main points of contact for active client projects. Communication may take place through: * Email * ClickUp * Google Meet * Internal team messages You will be responsible for: * Providing clear and proactive updates * Asking clients for missing content, feedback, approvals, or access * Explaining what is happening next * Following up when a client has not responded * Setting realistic expectations * Keeping communication professional, organized, and easy to understand * Making sure clients do not have to ask us repeatedly for updates Clients should feel that their project is organized, actively managed, and moving forward. ### Communicate With the Team You will communicate with our team throughout the workday, Monday through Friday. This includes: * Reviewing progress with team members * Following up on tasks * Answering project-related questions * Clarifying priorities * Identifying blockers * Confirming deadlines * Making sure team members understand what is expected * Communicating important client feedback * Helping the team determine what should be worked on next You must be comfortable holding people accountable respectfully and directly. ### Own and Improve ClickUp ClickUp is the primary project management system used by Frisco Web Agency. You will be expected to: * Keep ClickUp accurate and up to date * Make sure tasks are assigned correctly * Maintain deadlines, statuses, dependencies, and priorities * Ensure task descriptions contain enough information for the work to be completed * Keep client and internal communication organized * Improve dashboards, templates, automations, and workflows * Identify areas where ClickUp is becoming confusing or inefficient * Recommend and implement improvements * Make ClickUp a reliable source of truth for the entire company At any time, we should be able to open ClickUp and quickly understand the status of every project. ### Maintain Company Playbooks We use the Buy Back Your Time playbook method to document how work should be completed. You will help: * Create playbooks for repeatable processes * Update playbooks when our processes change * Organize instructions, videos, links, and resources * Identify missing documentation * Make sure team members follow the documented process * Improve processes based on problems that occur during fulfillment Our goal is to build a company that does not depend on information being stored only in one person’s head. ## What We Are Looking For The right person for this role is: * Highly organized * Proactive * Dependable * Detail-oriented * Comfortable following up with people * Able to communicate professionally with clients * Able to manage several projects at the same time * Calm when priorities change * Willing to take ownership of outcomes * Able to think several steps ahead * Comfortable asking questions when something is unclear * Able to make decisions without needing constant approval * Interested in improving systems and processes * Consistent with communication * Able to identify potential delays before deadlines are missed You should naturally notice when something has not been completed and take action without waiting to be reminded. ## This Role Is Not a Good Fit If You: * Wait for someone to tell you every next step * Avoid difficult conversations or follow-ups * Regularly forget details * Are uncomfortable holding others accountable * Only update ClickUp when someone reminds you * Become overwhelmed when managing several projects * Disappear during your working hours * Allow unanswered questions to sit unresolved * Assume that someone else will take responsibility * Communicate vaguely or leave people uncertain * Prefer completing isolated tasks instead of owning the overall outcome ## Required Qualifications * Previous experience in project management, operations, or client coordination * Experience using ClickUp or a similar project management platform * Strong written and spoken English * Strong organizational and time-management skills * Experience communicating with clients through email and meetings * Reliable computer and internet connection * Ability to work independently * Ability to manage multiple deadlines and projects * Ability to document and improve processes * Willingness to learn website development and SEO fulfillment processes Experience working for a web design, marketing, SEO, or digital agency is strongly preferred. ## Working Hours and Availability This is a full-time position requiring 40 hours per week, Monday through Friday. You must be available for a daily meeting with Christopher at: **8:00 a.m. Central Time, Monday through Friday** Because this is a communication-heavy role, you must also be responsive and available during your agreed working hours. Your working schedule will be established so that you have enough overlap with Christopher, the team, and our clients. This is not a position where you can complete all your work without communicating with the team. Active communication throughout the workweek is an essential part of the job. ## Trial Period and Payment This position will begin with a 90-day trial period. During the trial period, we will evaluate: * Reliability * Communication * Organization * Ownership * Ability to manage deadlines * ClickUp management * Client communication * Team coordination * Ability to keep projects moving * Overall fit with the company You will be paid every two weeks. You will complete each two-week work period and then receive payment for that completed period. **Starting compensation: [INSERT MONTHLY SALARY OR HOURLY RATE]** There is room for increased responsibility, compensation, and long-term growth as Frisco Web Agency grows. ## What Success Looks Like You will be successful in this role when: * Christopher no longer has to personally manage every project * Every project has a clear status, owner, deadline, and next step * Team members know what they should be working on * Clients receive proactive communication * Delays are identified and addressed early * ClickUp is consistently accurate * Tasks do not disappear or remain forgotten * Projects are completed on time or ahead of schedule * Company processes are documented and continuously improved * You can clearly explain the status of every active project without confusion or uncertainty The long-term goal is for you to fully own project fulfillment so Christopher can focus on marketing, sales, leadership, and growing the business. ## How to Apply Please include the following information in your application: 1. A short introduction about yourself 2. Your previous project management experience 3. Your experience using ClickUp 4. Any experience managing website or SEO projects 5. An example of a project that was falling behind and how you moved it forward 6. Your approach to following up with a team member who repeatedly misses deadlines 7. Your internet speed and computer specifications 8. Confirmation that you can attend a daily meeting at 8:00 a.m. Central Time 9. Your expected monthly salary 10. A short video introduction explaining why you believe you would be a strong fit for this position At the beginning of your application, include the words: **“I push projects forward.”** Applications that do not include this phrase will not be considered.

Full job description

About Us We are building multiple high growth consumer brands and are looking for someone who wants to become a long-term member of our team rather than just completing oneoff projects. Our first business is Win Your PIP, a UK-based service helping people complete Personal Independence Payment (PIP) applications through a professionally written personalised answer service. Our second business is a direct to consumer e-commerce brand launching premium foot care products on Shopify. We're looking for someone who enjoys improving websites, building landing pages, increasing conversion rates and using data to grow online businesses. Your Role This is not a traditional web design role. Your primary responsibility is increasing enquiries, sales and conversion rates. You will continually improve our websites using customer behaviour, analytics and testing. Responsibilities Optimise WordPress landing pages for higher conversion rates. Build and optimise Shopify product pages. Improve page speed and mobile experience. Create new landing pages for advertising campaigns. Implement Meta Pixel, Google Analytics 4 and conversion tracking. Install and manage Google Tag Manager and other marketing tools. Create thank you pages and lead funnels. Run A/B tests on headlines, layouts and calls to action. Analyse user behaviour using heatmaps and analytics software. Make weekly improvements based on performance data. Work alongside AI tools such as Claude and ChatGPT to rapidly implement ideas and marketing improvements. Essential Skills Strong WordPress experience. Strong Shopify experience. Elementor experience. Excellent understanding of conversion rate optimisation (CRO). Experience with Meta Pixel and Google Analytics 4. Understanding of user experience (UX). Mobile-first design experience. Basic HTML and CSS knowledge. Ability to troubleshoot technical issues independently. Bonus Skills Google Tag Manager. Microsoft Clarity or Hotjar. Copywriting for landing pages. Facebook Ads knowledge. Shopify apps and integrations. WooCommerce. SEO. What Success Looks Like We don't measure success by how attractive a website looks. We measure success by improvements in: Conversion rate Sales Leads generated Average order value Revenue Customer experience Every change should have a clear commercial reason. Who We're Looking For We want someone who enjoys solving problems and making websites perform better every week. You should be proactive, analytical and comfortable suggesting improvements rather than waiting to be told what to do. This is an opportunity to become a long-term member of a growing business with multiple brands and exciting projects. To Apply Please include: Examples of WordPress websites you've improved. Examples of Shopify stores you've worked on. Before-and-after conversion improvements (if available). Your favourite optimisation you've made and why it increased sales.

Full job description

GoHighLevel Specialist + Website+Video & Social Media Creator Remote · Full-Time · US Eye-Care Medical Group (Florida) Base $700–$1,100 USD/month + uncapped new-patient bonuses that can DOUBLE your base. Read This First This is not a generic VA job. We are hiring one exceptional person to run our marketing engine and grow it. We will train you, pay you on time, treat you like a teammate, and reward you directly every time your work brings in a new patient. The harder and smarter you work, the more you earn. Your base is just the floor. Your ceiling is set by you. If you are world-class at GoHighLevel AND can create scroll-stopping video and social content, keep reading. If you are a generalist who has “heard of” these tools, this is not your job — and that’s okay. The Offer (Why the Best Apply Here) Base salary $700 – $1,100 USD/month (full-time, 40 hrs/week) New-patient bonus $ USD for every qualifying new patient your work brings in (booked + shows up). No cap. Realistic earning Drive 35-50 new patients in a month and you will earn up to 50% of your base . The more you produce, the more you make — every month. Reviews Reviewed every 6 months. Strong performers reach the top of the base range within 90 days. 13th-month bonus Paid after 12 months. Paid time off Paid US holidays after probation + paid leave. Payment Bi-weekly via Wise — on time, every time. What the bonus means in plain numbers: $ per qualifying new patient, uncapped. A productive month can earn you more in bonuses than your entire base. We want you to out-earn the salary — that means we’re both winning. Schedule • 45-50 hrs/week (we may start you at 20–30 hrs/week part-time, with a clear, fast path to full-time). • Live overlap required: 9:00 AM – 200 PM US Eastern (9:00 PM – 1:00 AM Manila), Monday–Friday, for real-time work with the CEO and marketing lead. Some flexibility on exact hours. • The rest of your hours are flexible — we care about output, not clock-watching. About Us We are a US-based ophthalmology / eye-care medical group with three clinic locations in Florida. We treat thousands of patients every month, focused on senior eye health, diabetic eye disease, and advanced retinal care. We are stable, established, and real — not a fly-by-night agency. We have a small, dedicated in-house marketing team and an active marketing budget. You will work directly with the CEO and the marketing lead — no five layers of management between you and the people who make decisions and see your work. The Role — In One Sentence You will own our GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM end-to-end and produce the video and social content that brings senior and diabetic patients through our doors — then get paid a bonus on every patient you help bring in. What You'll Actually Do (Day-in-the-Life) — GoHighLevel Operations (the backbone) • Build and maintain workflows from scratch: patient recall, new-patient intake, no-show recovery, review requests, and our referral/ambassador program. • Manage and clean pipelines, opportunity stages, and contact tags. • Build SMS + email sequences (US-tone copy is supplied — you execute and polish, you don’t write from zero). • Set up and maintain calendar integrations and lead routing. • Build dashboards and weekly reports: leads in ? calls booked ? patients shown. • Connect GHL to forms, landing pages, and Meta lead forms. — Video & Social Media Creation (where you shine) • Create and edit scroll-stopping short-form video for YouTube, Instagram Reels, Facebook, and TikTok — content that actually gets seniors (65+) and diabetics to call us. • Run our organic social presence across all platforms, targeting patients within a 15–20 mile radius of each of our three offices. • Edit real footage of our doctors, staff, and (consented) patients into warm, trustworthy, human content. • Important: our audience is older adults and people managing a serious health condition. We use real people, real stories, and a caring tone — never AI avatars or AI voices. You’ll film, cut, caption, and publish content that feels like a trusted neighbor, not an ad. • Track what works (saves, shares, calls, DMs) and make more of it. — Paid Ads Support (Meta / Facebook) • Daily Ads Manager checks: spend, frequency, CPM, CTR, cost-per-lead. • Upload and launch creative; build and duplicate campaigns/ad sets. • Pull weekly performance reports. • You execute under direction — you are not the lead strategist — but you must know Meta Ads Manager cold, including the Special Ad Category (Health & Wellness) rules that apply to US healthcare advertisers. — Reporting + Documentation • Weekly Monday performance snapshot to the CEO. • Build and maintain an SOP document as you go, so the system never depends on one person. Must-Haves (Do Not Apply Without These) 1. 2+ years hands-on GoHighLevel — building workflows from scratch, not clicking templates. Be ready to show real workflows you’ve built. 2. Proven video editing + social content skills — short-form video for Reels / TikTok / YouTube. Be ready to show a portfolio or links to content you’ve made that performed. 3. Meta Ads and Google Manager experience — 1+ year managing live ad accounts. Bonus if you’ve worked under Meta’s Special Ad Category (Health & Wellness). 4. Excellent written and spoken English — you’ll write internal updates and US-facing SMS/email copy reviewed by the CEO. 5. Reliable internet (25 Mbps+), a quiet workspace, and a working webcam (weekly Zoom). 6. Long-term mindset — we’re hiring for years, not months. Job-hoppers will be cut early. Nice-to-Haves (Bonus Points) • US healthcare or medical-practice experience. • HIPAA awareness (we train, but knowing what patient data can’t touch is a plus). • Zapier / Make.com. • Canva / CapCut fluency for fast visual turnarounds. • Experience with patient recall, no-show recovery, or appointment-booking funnels. Who This Is Perfect For • You’ve run GHL for 2+ agencies and you’re tired of juggling 8 clients — you want one company, deep work, and real impact. • You can build systems and make a video that actually makes someone pick up the phone. • You’re motivated by results: you’d rather earn $ a patient with no cap than sit on a flat salary. • You want to grow into an Operations / Marketing Manager role within 12–18 months. • You want a US employer who pays on time, communicates clearly, and treats you like a teammate. Who This Is Not For • Generalist VAs who’ve only “heard of” GHL. • Agencies or teams reselling labor — we hire one human, directly. • Anyone unwilling to do a paid 2-hour test task before a final offer (you keep the pay even if not hired). How to Apply — Read Carefully (This Is Your First Test) We get hundreds of applications. This is how we filter for people who actually read and follow instructions. Subject line, exactly: CLEAR VISION — GHL + Video Specialist — [Your Name] In the body, include — in this order: 7. Codeword: “20/20” at the very top, so we know you read this. 8. 3 GoHighLevel workflows you personally built — 1–2 sentences each: the problem it solved and the result. 9. 2 video / social posts you created — links to the actual content, plus the result (views, saves, calls, leads). 10. 1 Meta Ads or Google campaign you ran — niche, monthly spend, what you optimized for, and the result. 11. Years of GHL experience + years of video/social experience + years of Meta Ads experience. 12. A Loom video (3 minutes max) walking through ONE workflow inside your own GHL account. Required — no Loom, no review. 13. Your full-time monthly rate in USD (and part-time hourly if relevant). 14. Earliest start date + how many hours of US Eastern overlap you can commit to. Applications missing any of the above are rejected automatically. Hiring Timeline • Applications reviewed daily. • Shortlist contacted within 5 business days. • Round 1: 30-min Zoom with the Marketing Lead. • Round 2: Paid 2-hour test task (you keep the pay even if not hired). • Final: 20-min call with the CEO. • Offer within 2 weeks of applying. Why You'll Want This Job • Stable US healthcare company — years in operation, not a startup that might vanish. • Real budget, real tools — you won’t be told to “make it work with free Mailchimp.” • Uncapped bonuses — your effort directly sets your income. Most months, your bonus can rival or beat your base. • Direct CEO access — your work is seen and rewarded. • Clear growth path — Operations / Marketing Manager role opening within 12–18 months for the right person. • One company, one mission, deep focus — no client-juggling. We are looking for one excellent person. Take the time to apply properly — and welcome to a role where the harder you work, the more you earn.

Full job description

# Operations Coordinator / Executive Assistant **Remote | Full-Time | Philippines** We're looking for an organized Operations Coordinator to help keep our business running efficiently behind the scenes. This position supports leadership with reporting, bookkeeping coordination, HR administration, documentation, and day-to-day operations. If you enjoy organizing information, building systems, solving problems, and making sure details don't get missed, we'd love to meet you. ## What You'll Do * Assist with QuickBooks Online bookkeeping * Prepare weekly and monthly reports * Track company KPIs * Coordinate administrative tasks * Help maintain HR documentation * Organize SOPs and company records * Assist with payroll preparation and reporting * Schedule meetings and follow up on action items * Improve workflows using AI tools * Support leadership with special projects ## Requirements Experience with: * QuickBooks Online * Microsoft Excel * Microsoft Word * Microsoft Outlook * Microsoft Teams * AI tools such as ChatGPT, Copilot, Claude, or Gemini Preferred: * HR administration * Experience supporting U.S. businesses * Reporting and dashboards * Process documentation * Calendar management * Executive support We're looking for someone who is: * Extremely organized * Trustworthy * Detail-oriented * Reliable * Able to prioritize multiple projects * Comfortable learning new software * Strong in written English ## About Us We operate multiple hospitality, entertainment, and creative businesses in Southern California. Our team is building systems that combine operations, AI, marketing, finance, and technology. This role has significant opportunities for long-term growth into Operations Manager. ## Hiring Process * Resume Review * Group Interview (Microsoft Teams) * Short Skills Assessment * Final Interview * Paid Trial ## How to Apply Please include: * Resume * Short introduction * Expected monthly salary (PHP) * Internet speed * Computer specifications * Software you're most proficient with * Your favorite AI tool and how you use it To show you've read this posting, begin your application with: **Project Atlas**

Full job description

Job Title: Virtual Assistant - Recruitment and Marketing Coordinator Department: Business Development Hours: Full-Time (7 hours/day, 6 days/week) Schedule: Toronto Time (EST/EDT) Location: Remote / Offshore Job Overview We are looking for an exceptionally skilled and detail-oriented Marketing Coordinator to work directly with our Business Development department. We need a top-tier digital marketer who is a powerhouse at social media management and content creation. Working on a strict Toronto schedule, you will take the lead on growing our online presence, leveraging AI tools and design software to execute marketing strategies that enhance brand visibility and drive sales. Responsibilities Social Media & Content Creation: Lead the strategy, planning, and daily management of our social media accounts. Create engaging, high-quality content tailored to our audience across all platforms. AI & Design Integration: Utilize AI tools (like ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, etc.) and Canva to efficiently generate copy, brainstorm ideas, and design eye-catching visual assets. Campaign Management: Develop, manage, and optimize Facebook Advertising and Google AdWords campaigns to boost engagement and conversions. Web & SEO: Update website content using WordPress and basic HTML. Manage product listings within e-commerce platforms and ensure pages are optimized for SEO. Analytics: Monitor website traffic and campaign metrics using Google Analytics. Track marketing budgets and prepare performance reports for management review. Cross-Functional Collaboration: Coordinate directly with sales and business development teams to align marketing efforts with sales objectives. Requirements Proven Expertise: Strong background in social media management, content creation, digital marketing, SEO, and paid advertising. Tech Stack: Highly proficient in Canva, AI tools, Adobe Creative Suite, WordPress, HTML coding basics, and e-commerce platforms. Schedule: Must be available to work 7 hours a day, 6 days a week, strictly aligning with Toronto time (EST/EDT). Working Style: Excellent analytical and organizational skills. You must be able to work independently, manage multiple projects simultaneously, and interpret data to inform decision-making. Important Note on the Interview Process: We are looking for the best of the best. To ensure a great fit, shortlisted candidates will be required to participate in a live screen-sharing session during the interview to demonstrate their Canva, AI, and overall technical skills in real-time.

TikTok Shop Virtual Assistant 1.) TikTok Shop Operations Manager 2.) Tiktok Shop Sampling / Affiliate Manager 3.) Tiktok Shop Community Manager Job Title: TikTok Shop Operations Manager Ownership / Scope: Responsible for end-to-end TikTok Shop operations, including onboarding, product listings, bundles/variants setup, platform integrations (Shopify, AfterShip, 3PL), workflow automations, dashboard monitoring, and SOP management. Core Responsibilities: Log in to TikTok Shop Seller Center daily Monitor shop health, performance score, and notifications Check fulfillment and order statuses Monitor unshipped, delayed, or failed orders Update product listings (titles, descriptions, variants, bundles) Check for unmapped, inactive, or out-of-stock products Update pricing, inventory, and product details Flag customer messages, reviews, returns, and refunds Violation appeals Enroll promotions, campaigns, and discounts Support affiliate/creator orders (if applicable) Ensure listings comply with TikTok Shop policies Report issues, violations, and daily/weekly performance updates Execute onboarding checklist; verify tax/shipping/returns policies Stand up Airtable/Notion trackers & live reporting Maintain product data quality (titles, attributes, images, PID hygiene) Implement/monitor automations (alerts, syncs, webhooks) Write/update SOPs & templates; train pod on changes Rate: $1,000.00 USD Schedule: Full-time, Remote - PST (8 hours, Monday - Friday) Requirement: Minimum 1 year of hands-on Tiktok Shop Operations experience Kindly fill out this form to apply: api.leadconnectorhq.com/widget/form/OUgebqlO3WkGgO8Blam9?notrack=true *Please note that applications submitted outside this form will not be considered. ***************************************************************** Job Title: Tiktok Shop Sampling / Affiliate Manager Mission: Own the Command Center day-to-day. Keep data clean, tasks closed, and shops healthy. Ownership / Scope: Scorecards; shop health; listings maintenance; samples; affiliate/campaign ops. Core Responsibilities: Coordinate samples; confirm addresses; track ship/receive/post Run daily shop health checklist; flag violations/stock risks Update scorecards & client-ready snapshots Manage listing edits, sample requests, offers/coupons Support affiliate pushes (Reacher exports, invites, contest sheets) Send EOD reports with blockers Rate: $1000 USD Schedule: Full-time, Remote - PST Requirement: Minimum 1 year of hands-on TikTok Shop Sampling / affiliate manager experience Kindly fill out this form to apply: api.leadconnectorhq.com/widget/form/OUgebqlO3WkGgO8Blam9?notrack=true *Please note that applications submitted outside this form will not be considered. ***************************************************************** Job Title: Tiktok Shop Community Manager We’re looking for a Virtual Assistant experienced in community management and influencer/affiliate coordination to support our TikTok Shop operations. Responsibilities: Communicate and build relationships with TikTok influencers and affiliates. Manage and grow the Discord, WhatsApp channel for affiliates and influencers Manage collaborations, partnerships, and paid campaigns. Track influencer performance and report key metrics. Coordinate product samples, campaign timelines, and deliverables. Maintain organized records of communication and collaborations. Requirements: Experience in influencer or affiliate management (TikTok Shop experience is a plus). Strong communication and organizational skills. Ability to handle multiple partnerships and follow up professionally. Familiarity with TikTok trends, creators, and social media engagement strategies. Rate: $1000 USD Schedule: Full-time, Remote - PST Requirement: Minimum 1 year of hands on Tiktok Shop Community Manager experience Kindly fill out this form to apply: api.leadconnectorhq.com/widget/form/OUgebqlO3WkGgO8Blam9?notrack=true *Please note that applications submitted outside this form will not be considered.

Full job description

About the Role We’re looking for a detail-obsessed, highly organized Virtual Assistant to be the operational backbone of Arise Financial Coaching. This is a behind-the-scenes, keep-everything-moving kind of role — the person who makes sure nothing falls through the cracks so our lead coach can stay focused on delivering life-changing results to clients. You will be working inside a fast-growing financial coaching business that handles sensitive client data every single day. Discretion, professionalism, and a genuine respect for client confidentiality are non-negotiable here. If you love systems, take pride in precision, and feel genuinely excited about the world of personal finance — this role was built for you. About the Company Arise Financial Coaching helps professional women break up with financial stress and anxiety for good. Founded by Nicole Stanley, Arise has supported hundreds of clients in paying off debt, saving more, and building wealth with automated money systems that work without restrictive budgets or willpower. Our flagship program, the Financial Goal Accelerator (FGA), takes clients through a three-phase coaching journey — from financial clarity all the way to a fully automated money system running in the background of their lives. We’ve been featured on Good Morning America and have a growing team of coaches, a thriving client community, and a whole lot of momentum. We move fast, we care deeply about the client experience, and we hold ourselves to a high standard. If you thrive in environments that are organized but dynamic, and you want to be part of a business that genuinely changes lives — you’ll fit right in here. Responsibilities Will Include Client Support & Operations Monitoring the client support inbox and triaging incoming tickets, emails, and requests Following up with clients on outstanding prep work, documents, and onboarding steps Tracking client progress through the FGA program and flagging anyone who appears stuck or behind Coordinating client onboarding and offboarding from start to finish using established task templates in ClickUp Processing failed payments and following up with clients on billing issues Ensuring all client records in Airtable are accurate, up to date, and fully populated Systems & Admin Managing and maintaining Airtable bases — updating records, running automations, and flagging errors Keeping ClickUp task templates active and on track across all client workflows Monitoring Zapier automations and flagging any failures or syncing issues Supporting the team with scheduling, documentation, and internal coordination Assisting with the setup and testing of Fillout forms and ThriveCart fulfillment Maintaining SOPs and keeping the operations manual up to date Team & Coach Support Acting as a communication bridge between the coaching team and clients where appropriate Supporting coaches with pre-session prep logistics — confirming client readiness, flagging outstanding documents Tracking weekly hours submissions from coaching team members Flagging blockers, inconsistencies, or process gaps proactively before they become problems Software & Platforms We Use Airtable — client database, automation workflows, and operational hub ClickUp — task management and team communication ActiveCampaign — email marketing and onboarding sequences ThriveCart / ThriveCart Learn — payment processing and course delivery Fillout — client intake and feedback forms Zapier — cross-platform automations Fathom — call recording and transcripts Acuity Scheduling — coach calendar management Google Workspace — email, Drive, Docs, Sheets Stripe — payment processing This Position IS for You If… You have expert-level Airtable experience — you understand bases, views, automations, interfaces, and linked records, and you can troubleshoot without hand-holding You have a genuine interest in or love for personal finance — you find the world of money, debt payoff, and financial systems genuinely exciting You hold confidentiality to the highest standard — you understand that client financial data is sacred and treat it accordingly You have exceptional attention to detail — you catch errors before they cause problems and take pride in accuracy You are proactive and self-directed — you notice what needs to be done and do it without waiting to be asked You are highly organized and can manage multiple priorities, client workflows, and moving pieces at once You have strong written communication skills and can adapt your tone for clients, coaches, and internal team You are reliable, responsive, and take your commitments seriously You thrive in dynamic environments where no two days look exactly the same This Position is NOT for You If… You are not experienced with Airtable or are only comfortable with basic use You are uncomfortable working with sensitive personal financial information You need constant direction or check-ins to know what to do next You struggle to manage multiple priorities or let things fall through the cracks You treat confidentiality as optional or are casual about client data You are not detail-oriented or tend to move fast at the expense of accuracy You are not comfortable working mostly asynchronously with a remote team Compensation Compensation for this role is based on experience. Our budget is between $7-$15 USD per hour and will be discussed during the interview process. This is a part-time contractor position to start with around 10-15 hours per week, with the potential to grow as the business scales. How to Apply To apply, please fill out the application form linked below. We will not be accepting DMs or outside messages — any outreach outside of the application form will automatically disqualify you from consideration. Apply here --> forms.fillout.com/t/43KJawbSf4us We look forward to hearing from you.

Full job description

About Us NP Board Academy is a growing online healthcare education company that prepares Psychiatric Mental Health Nurse Practitioner (PMHNP) students for board certification. We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and coachable team member to become an important part of our company. This is a long-term position with opportunities to grow. We are looking for someone who enjoys learning new technology, solving problems, and taking ownership of projects. You will work directly with the founder and help manage daily operations. Primary Responsibilities WordPress (Highest Priority) * Update and maintain our WordPress website * Create and edit landing pages * Add and manage pop-ups * Upload courses and educational content * Troubleshoot basic website issues * Coordinate with developers when needed Acuity Scheduling * Manage appointment scheduling * Create scheduling workflows * Set up Zoom appointments * Troubleshoot booking issues * Manage student appointments and reminders Social Media Management * Schedule social media posts * Repurpose educational content * Create Canva graphics * Edit short videos using CapCut * Respond to comments and messages Executive Assistant Responsibilities * Manage my calendar * Organize my inbox and draft professional emails * Answer student questions and provide customer support * Coordinate with website developers and other contractors * Help launch new projects * Assist with questionnaires, surveys, and business projects * Organize files and business documents * Research solutions and recommend improvements * Perform additional administrative tasks as assigned Required Skills * Strong WordPress experience * Acuity Scheduling experience * Social Media Management * Excellent English (written and spoken) * Google Workspace * Canva * Highly organized * Strong attention to detail * Reliable internet connection * Able to work independently * Coachable and eager to learn Bonus Skills * CapCut * ChatGPT * Email marketing * Basic HTML/CSS * Customer support experience * Healthcare or education industry experience Who We’re Looking For We are looking for someone who is: * Honest * Professional * Reliable * Positive * Coachable * Flexible * Detail-oriented * A problem solver * Able to communicate well * Comfortable taking initiative This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to grow with our company. To apply, begin your application with the words “Future PMHNP Success.” Then answer the following: 1. Tell us about your WordPress experience. 2. Tell us about your Acuity Scheduling experience. 3. Describe a project you managed from beginning to end. 4. Share one example of how you solved a problem independently. 5. Include a 2-minute video introducing yourself and explaining why you would be a great fit.

Full job description

We're a fast-moving brand selling to the Mexican market, and we're looking for a part-time / per-project Video Editor who can use AI tools to produce realistic, original content that converts. This isn't a stock-footage-and-transitions role. We need someone who can generate brand-new b-roll, scenes, and characters from scratch using AI image and video platforms — and make them look real. What we expect from you: Hands-on experience with AI video and image platforms for creating original b-roll and multi-format content. Tools we use: Nano Banana, Magnific (Freepik), Higgsfield, Seedance 2.0, and Kling 3.0. You should already be comfortable in several of these. A proactive, problem-solving mindset — you can juggle multiple AI platforms and figure out the right one for each job without hand-holding. The ability to not just source AI content, but direct it: prompting, iterating, and editing until the output is genuinely realistic and on-brand. Direct response sensibility — you understand that the goal is performance, not just pretty visuals. What we'll give you: A full, detailed brief for every creative batch The script for each video SOPs documenting exactly how we leverage each AI platform to create realistic content Claude Code Skills that automate parts of your editing workflow so you move faster Magnific (Freepik) credentials — covering every AI video and image generator we use ElevenLabs credentials Video references for inspiration on every brief Performance bonuses for creatives that hit target CPAs Who this is for: Ambitious people who want to sharpen their skills, dramatically increase their output, and help scale a brand. We move fast and reward results — pay structure and bonuses are discussed in the interview. How to apply: Send your portfolio or examples of video ADs you've created (b-roll, full videos, character or scene work — whatever best shows your range). Tell us which platforms you used for each. To confirm you've read the full post, start your application with the word "BANANA." Applications without it won't be reviewed.
