Arca angle
  • Company/contact signal is present, so this can go into outreach review.
Full job description

We are a U.S.-based executive coaching and leadership development company serving senior leaders and organizations nationwide. As we grow our online presence, digital learning programs, and AI-enabled tools, we are looking for a versatile, dependable developer and technical support specialist to be our go-to person for technology across the business. This is a long-term, full-time remote role for someone who is reliable, communicative, and genuinely committed. You will own our websites and also serve as the first point of contact for the day-to-day technology that keeps our team and clients running, from our online learning academy to video conferencing, Microsoft 365, integrations, and everyday software support. We are looking for someone who can both build and support, and who enjoys solving a wide range of technical problems. About the Role Your work will span three connected areas: building and maintaining our websites, launching and managing our online learning academy, and providing broad technical support across the tools our team and clients rely on. This is not a narrow coding-only role. It is a broad technical operations role for someone who enjoys both building systems and supporting the people who use them. The exact mix will shift over time as our needs evolve, so we value someone adaptable who can grow the role with us. You will work closely with our project coordinator and directly with leadership, flag issues early, document your work, and follow agreed processes rather than making changes independently to live environments. Key Responsibilities • Website development & maintenance — Build, update, and maintain our WordPress websites (front-end and back-end), keeping them fast, secure, mobile-responsive, and easy to manage. Stand up new sites as needed and cross-link them within our web ecosystem. • Online learning academy — Help launch, manage, and maintain our online learning platform: setting up courses and users, integrating content and assessments, troubleshooting issues, and keeping the learner experience smooth. • Staging, migrations & hosting — Build and test changes in staging, then execute live migrations only during approved windows and under supervision. Keep hosting, domains, DNS, SSL, redirects, and related configurations stable, documented, and secure. • Change control & rollback planning — Test thoroughly before going live, back up before major changes, prepare rollback plans for website, DNS, LMS, or integration updates, and never make unauthorized changes to live or DNS settings. • Cybersecurity & access management — Support basic cybersecurity hygiene, including plugin/theme updates, malware scans, user access reviews, MFA, role-based permissions, password manager use, and documented onboarding/offboarding procedures. • Data privacy & confidentiality — Maintain confidentiality and follow secure handling practices when accessing client, learner, assessment, email, video, AI tool, and internal business systems. • Communications & collaboration tech — Support tools that power our meetings and client work, such as Zoom, Teams, and other video-conferencing platforms, including setup, troubleshooting, recordings, permissions, and integrations. • Office & productivity support — Provide hands-on help with Microsoft 365 / Office (Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams), file sharing, permissions, account setup, and general software issues for the team. • Email, forms & deliverability — Support email/domain configuration and deliverability basics, including SPF, DKIM, DMARC, form notifications, email routing, and troubleshooting issues that affect client or prospect communications. • Tools, automation & integrations — Connect and maintain third-party tools, forms, scheduling, CRM, assessment, email marketing, payment, automation, and AI-enabled tools so our systems work together smoothly. • AI-enabled workflows — Support setup, testing, troubleshooting, integrations, prompt/tool documentation, and escalation when custom AI development or outside expertise is needed. • Analytics & tracking — Maintain basic website analytics and tracking setup, such as Google Analytics, Search Console, landing-page tracking, and form conversion checks. • General technical support — Act as our first responder for the wide range of tech issues that come up across the business, researching solutions, coordinating with vendors or outside developers when needed, and following through to resolution. • Quality, documentation & reliability — Create and maintain simple SOPs, document setups and procedures, keep recurring tasks repeatable, and communicate clearly about status, risks, and next steps. • Collaboration & tracking — Work within our project management system (Monday.com), give clear status updates, and coordinate with the team on priorities and timelines. Required Skills & Experience • Proven experience building and maintaining WordPress websites (front-end and back-end). • Strong working knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP. • Hands-on experience with hosting, domain management, DNS configuration, SSL, redirects, and safe site migrations. • Comfortable with staging environments, backups, QA testing, change control, and rollback planning. • Experience administering or supporting an online learning platform / LMS, or strong ability to learn one quickly. • Solid working knowledge of Microsoft 365 / Office and common collaboration and video-conferencing tools (Zoom, Teams). • Familiarity with basic cybersecurity practices, password management, MFA, user permissions, and secure account access. • Ability to handle sensitive client, learner, assessment, and business information with discretion and confidentiality. • A broad, resourceful technical troubleshooting ability across software, accounts, integrations, and vendor support. • Understanding of website security, performance optimization, responsive design, analytics, and basic email deliverability. • Excellent written English and clear, proactive communication. • Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional remote work setup. Nice to Have • Experience with learning platforms such as LearnDash, Teachable, Thinkific, Kajabi, or similar. • Familiarity with AI tools, AI workflows, and AI-related integrations. • Experience with Wix or other website builders. • Experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make), APIs, CRM tools, payment tools, and email marketing platforms. • Experience with Google Analytics, Search Console, conversion tracking, and landing-page performance checks. • Basic graphic or design sensibility for landing pages and learning content. Who We're Looking For Most of all, we want someone committed, dependable, trustworthy, and resourceful. The right person communicates consistently, takes ownership, meets deadlines, protects confidential information, and treats our systems as if they were their own. Because our technology needs are broad and growing, we want someone who is comfortable wearing several hats, learning new tools quickly, documenting what they do, and being our reliable problem-solver. We are building a long-term working relationship, not filling a short-term gig. Work Details • Schedule — Part-time. Some availability during U.S. business hours and a regular window of 11:00 AM–6:00 PM Philippines time for coordinated work and live support is preferred. • Arrangement — 100% remote. • Tools — WordPress, Wix, GoDaddy, an online learning platform, Monday.com, Zoom, Microsoft 365, analytics tools, automation tools, AI-enabled tools, and standard collaboration platforms. How to Apply To help us find the right fit, please include the following in your application: • A short introduction about yourself and why you're interested in a long-term, broad technical role. • Links to 2–3 WordPress sites you have built or maintained. • A brief description of your experience with hosting and DNS, online learning platforms, Microsoft 365, Zoom, integrations, cybersecurity/access management, and general technical support. • A brief example of a technical problem you solved where you had to research, coordinate with a vendor, or protect a live environment. • Your availability and preferred working hours. Application tip: Please begin your reply with the word “HEART” so we know you read this posting carefully.

Full job description

We are looking for a detail-obsessed full stack developer who is a Go High Level expert. This is a critical role in our business. Our email operation runs Monday-Friday, without exception, and accuracy matters. This will be a full time job. Your primary responsibility is to build, maintain, and improve our Go High Level ecosystem while supporting our WordPress, Shopify, and custom development projects. You'll work directly with our marketing team to build funnels, automate sales processes, improve customer experiences, and ensure our systems run flawlessly. If you're the type of person who enjoys building funnels and fixing problems before anyone notices them—we want to talk to you. Primary Responsibilities Go High Level (Primary Focus) • Build complete sales funnels • Create landing pages • Build order forms • Create upsells and downsells • Build membership funnels • Create checkout experiences • Configure products • Build forms • Build surveys • Build calendars • Build automation workflows • Create fulfillment workflows • Create abandoned cart sequences • Build email campaigns • SMS automation • Workflow troubleshooting • Pipeline management • Contact management • Opportunity management • Split testing • Funnel optimization • CRM customization • Reporting Marketing Automation • Build advanced automation workflows • API integrations • Webhooks • Zapier • Google Apps Script • Google Sheets integrations • Custom workflow development • Email automation • SMS automation • Payment automations • Fulfillment automations WordPress • Build landing pages • Customize themes • Install/configure plugins • LearnDash • Membership sites • WooCommerce • Custom plugin configuration • Basic PHP troubleshooting • Site optimization • Security • Backups • Performance optimization Shopify • Build product pages • Landing pages • Theme customization • App integrations • Product management • Checkout optimization • Klaviyo integrations • Subscription apps • Shipping integrations Technical Development Experience with: • HTML • CSS • JavaScript • PHP • Laravel • REST APIs • JSON • Webhooks • MySQL • Google APIs • DNS • Cloudflare • Tracking scripts • Facebook Pixel • Google Tag Manager • Google Analytics • Conversion tracking Ongoing Responsibilities • Launch new marketing funnels • Maintain existing funnels • Improve conversion rates • Fix bugs quickly • QA testing • Mobile responsiveness • Browser compatibility • Website speed optimization • Documentation • SOP creation • Technical troubleshooting Required Skills You MUST have: ? Expert-level Go High Level experience ? Strong WordPress experience ? Shopify experience ? HTML/CSS ? JavaScript ? API integrations ? Marketing automation experience ? Strong troubleshooting skills ? Excellent English communication ? Extreme attention to detail ? Ability to work independently Bonus Skills Experience with: • Laravel • PHP • MySQL • Google Apps Script • Zapier • Klaviyo • LearnDash • WooCommerce • Git • cPanel • Linux servers • DNS management • Cloudflare • Stripe • PayPal • NMI • Tracking pixels • Google Ads • Meta Ads • Conversion APIs Who You Are You are the kind of developer who: • Loves solving difficult technical problems. • Takes ownership. • Figures things out. • Documents your work. • Communicates clearly. • Delivers projects on time. • Tests everything before saying it's finished. • Thinks like an engineer—not just a coder. You take pride in building systems that simply work. This Job Is NOT For You If • You only know basic WordPress. • You've only built simple websites. • You don't have Go High Level experience. • You dislike documentation. • You need constant supervision. • You miss deadlines. • You don't test your own work. Compensation Competitive salary based on experience. Full-time position. Long-term opportunity. How to Apply If you think you would be an excellent candidate for this job and you have an amazing attention to detail, here’s what you need to do right now: First, you need to submit your resume and a screen share video (using Loom or similar software) answering the questions: 1. Why are you interested in the role? 2. Why are you the right person for the job and what is your GHL experience? *Make sure to say Hi Jason, My name is XX and I like oranges. I need to know that the video is custom and not generic. If you do not mention oranges in your video, it will disqualify you. Must submit the resume and video link together. Applications with no email and no video who do not use the following subject line will not be considered. Use this subject line here in your email: Orange Full Stack Developer. Must be willing to work same time zone as me. Currently, central standard time in the United States. (Chicago time). I look forward to hearing from you. Thank you.

Full job description

GoHighLevel (GHL) Implementation Specialist CaliaOS is seeking an experienced **GoHighLevel (GHL) Implementation Specialist** to onboard insurance agencies and deploy complete CRM, automation, and AI systems. This is not an entry-level position. We are looking for someone who stays current with the GoHighLevel platform and is comfortable implementing both established and newly released features. Requirements * Expert-level knowledge of GoHighLevel. * Experience implementing complete GHL systems from onboarding through launch. * Strong understanding of CRM setup, pipelines, workflows, calendars, forms, websites, funnels, reputation management, and email/SMS automation. * Experience configuring AI Employees, Voice AI, Conversation AI, and other GHL AI tools. * Ability to connect domains, configure DNS records, and verify email deliverability. * Experience importing, cleaning, and organizing CRM data. * Ability to troubleshoot complex implementation issues independently. * Excellent written and spoken English. * Comfortable leading implementation meetings with business owners. Stay Current with GoHighLevel GoHighLevel evolves rapidly. The successful candidate must be proactive about learning and implementing new platform features as they are released. Submit video of why we should hire you to apply clarity with speaking English is a must!!! You should be familiar with both current capabilities and recently introduced features, understand how they benefit clients, and be able to recommend and implement them as part of the onboarding process. ### What We're Looking For We want someone who doesn't simply know how to use GoHighLevel—they understand the platform inside and out, continuously expand their knowledge, and can confidently deploy the best solutions for each client's business.

Full job description

Remote Property Operations Coordinator (AU Short-Term Rentals) Philippines-based | Full-time | AEST-aligned Join One of Australia’s Largest Short-Term Rental Businesses This is a rare long-term opportunity to work directly with one of Australia’s most established short-term rental operators — supporting a growing portfolio of up to 800 properties across NSW. Staff Connect Australia is building a high-performing offshore team, and we’re looking for a proactive, detail-driven Property Operations Coordinator to become one of our foundational hires. If you’re sharp, confident on calls, and love problem-solving in a fast-paced environment, this role has serious growth potential. You’ll be right at the heart of daily operations — handling bookings, guest and owner communications, issue resolution, and admin support — with exposure to every part of Australian short-term rental management. What You’ll Be Doing This is a hands-on, dynamic role. Your responsibilities will include: - Guest & Owner Support - Handle inbound and outbound calls with guests and property owners via Aircall - Respond to enquiries and issues via Airbnb, Booking.com, direct bookings - Resolve problems efficiently and follow through to completion Operations & Coordination - Monitor bookings, availability, and calendars using Homhero, RMS, and other systems - Coordinate cleaning schedules and ensure properties are guest-ready - Assign and follow up maintenance tasks with trades or contractors - Track cleans, maintenance, guest issues, and owner communications Admin, Reporting & Growth - Manage booking calendars, pricing, and blackout dates - Assist with onboarding new properties and system setup - Support compliance documentation (smoke alarms, council registration, etc.) - Prepare weekly/monthly reports using spreadsheets or dashboards - Help draft and improve SOPs, internal docs, and guest manuals - Identify workflow gaps and suggest smarter processes or automations As the business grows, your role will grow with it — including pricing, owner reporting, SOP ownership, and broader operational oversight. Who We’re Looking For You’re someone who: - Is confident on the phone and professional with both guests and property owners - Thrives in fast-paced, customer-facing environments - Is organised, proactive, and solutions-focused - Can juggle multiple tools and tasks without being micromanaged - Takes ownership and actually cares about doing things properly Skills & Experience Required: - Excellent spoken & written English - Stable internet connection - Confident handling phone calls - Experience (or fast learning ability) with Aircall, Homhero - Familiarity with Airbnb, Booking.com, and direct booking sites - Strong organisational & multitasking skills - Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook) Preferred (but not mandatory) - 2+ years in short-term rentals, property management, or admin support - Experience working with Australian clients - Exposure to cleaning teams or remote contractors We’re open to candidates with less experience if you show initiative, strong communication skills, and the right mindset. Tools You’ll Use Core Systems: - Homhero, RMS, Breezeway, Orana - Comms & Support: - Aircall, Slack, Zoom, MS Teams, Google Meet, WhatsApp - Automation & Docs: - ChatGPT, Zapier, Google Docs, Canva, Microsoft Office, WordPress Bonus Tools: - PriceLabs or other pricing platforms What You’ll Get: - Full-time role – 40 hrs/week (AEST-aligned) - Structured roster – 7-day operation with rotating shifts - You’ll work one or both weekend days - Always two consecutive days off each week - Paid training & onboarding - Direct mentorship from leadership - Long-term career growth in a scaling business - Exposure to end-to-end Australian STR operations A role where initiative, ownership, and ideas are genuinely valued

Tools You’ll Use Core Systems: - Homhero, RMS, Breezeway, Orana - Comms & Support: - Aircall, Slack, Zoom, MS Teams, Google Meet, WhatsApp - Automation & Docs: - ChatGPT, Zapier, Google Docs, Canva, Microsoft Office, WordPress Bonus Tools: - PriceLabs or other pricing platforms What You’ll Get: - Full-time role – 40 hrs/week (AEST-aligned) - Structured roster – 7-day operation with rotating shifts - You’ll work one or both weekend days - Always two consecutive days off each week - Paid training & onboarding - Direct mentorship from leadership - Long-term career growth in a scaling business - Exposure to end-to-end Australian STR operations A role where initiative, ownership, and ideas are genuinely valued

Full job description

Recruitment Marketing & Talent Brand Manager Philippines-Based | Independent Contractor | Remote About Garry Howling Recruitment Garry Howling Recruitment is a specialist UK recruitment business operating exclusively within public practice accountancy recruitment across the United Kingdom. The business recruits solely into: • Audit • Accounts • Tax • Outsourcing • Advisory • Senior leadership and partner-level positions within accountancy firms The business works with: • Independent accountancy firms • Regional firms • Top 100 firms • Top 20 firms • National firms • Boutique specialist firms The business is led directly by Garry Howling, a specialist recruiter with more than 20 years of experience recruiting exclusively within UK public practice accountancy recruitment. This is not a generic VA opportunity. This is an opportunity to become a genuinely important long-term operational support partner within a growing specialist recruitment business with ambitious growth plans. ________________________________________ About The Opportunity We are seeking an exceptional Philippines-based Recruitment Marketing & Talent Brand Manager to support and coordinate marketing and recruitment marketing activity throughout the business. This role is ideal for somebody who enjoys combining: • marketing • organisation • AI • operational systems • recruitment marketing • workflow management • technology • process improvement within a highly organised and commercially focused business environment. The successful contractor will work closely with Garry Howling and will play a leading role in supporting: • candidate outreach campaigns • client outreach campaigns • candidate newsletters • client newsletters • LinkedIn marketing activity • CRM marketing workflows • recruitment campaign coordination • marketing organisation and scheduling • website marketing coordination • operational marketing systems This is a high-trust role suited to somebody who: • genuinely cares about quality • takes pride in their work • enjoys improving systems and workflows • embraces AI and modern technology • enjoys organisation and operational structure • wants to grow alongside a business long term ________________________________________ The Type Of Person We Are Looking For We are looking for somebody who: • is highly organised • communicates exceptionally well in English • has strong attention to detail • enjoys marketing coordination • enjoys operational structure and workflow management • actively embraces AI and technology • can think independently • takes initiative naturally • cares about producing work to a genuinely high standard • enjoys improving processes and systems This role is NOT suited to somebody looking for: • repetitive low-level VA work • heavy micromanagement • basic admin-only responsibilities This role IS suited to somebody who wants: • involvement • responsibility • operational influence • long-term growth • a modern business environment • the opportunity to help build systems and infrastructure ________________________________________ Key Responsibilities Recruitment Marketing Coordination • Coordinate candidate marketing campaigns • Coordinate client marketing campaigns • Support candidate outreach campaigns • Support client outreach campaigns • Coordinate candidate newsletters • Coordinate client newsletters • Assist with LinkedIn marketing activity • Support recruitment marketing workflows • Coordinate campaign scheduling and organisation • Support audience engagement initiatives • Help maintain consistent marketing standards and branding ________________________________________ Candidate Profiles & Marketing Narratives • Prepare professionally formatted candidate profiles and narratives • Produce high-quality recruitment marketing documents • Support commercially effective candidate marketing activity • Ensure all outward-facing written material remains: o accurate o concise o grammatically correct o commercially relevant o professionally structured o high quality in presentation ________________________________________ AI, Systems & Workflow Improvement We are specifically looking for somebody who actively leans into AI, automation, systems thinking, and workflow improvement. The successful contractor will be encouraged to: • utilise AI across marketing workflows • identify opportunities for operational improvement • streamline repetitive processes • improve workflow efficiency • improve campaign organisation • recommend improved systems and structures • explore emerging AI tools and technologies • support scalable operational growth The expectation is not simply to use AI for copywriting. The business is seeking somebody who naturally thinks: “How can this process be improved, streamlined, automated, organised, or enhanced?” ________________________________________ SOPs & Operational Structure The successful contractor will also support the development and maintenance of: • marketing SOPs • campaign workflows • operational process documentation • repeatable systems and structures • marketing standards • workflow procedures ________________________________________ Understanding The Sector The successful contractor will be expected to actively learn and understand: • the UK public practice accountancy market • accountancy firm structures • recruitment terminology • candidate seniority levels • public practice disciplines • the language used within specialist accountancy recruitment This includes understanding: • Audit • Accounts • Tax • Advisory • Outsourcing Alongside candidate levels including: • Semi Senior • Senior • Assistant Manager • Manager • Senior Manager • Director • Partner Ongoing support and guidance will be provided, however genuine interest in understanding the market quickly is important. ________________________________________ Ideal Background The ideal contractor will likely have: • degree-level education • recruitment marketing experience • experience supporting recruiters or recruitment businesses • experience coordinating marketing workflows and campaigns • experience using Brevo or similar email marketing platforms • strong LinkedIn marketing exposure • CRM/database management experience • exceptional written communication capability • confidence working independently • strong organisational ability • strong commercial awareness • interest in AI and emerging technology • experience within UK recruitment environments (preferred) ________________________________________ Essential Skills Exceptional Communication Standards This is absolutely critical. The successful contractor must possess: • highly accurate written English • highly accurate verbal English communication skills • excellent grammar • strong formatting ability • professional communication standards • strong commercial writing capability ________________________________________ Strong Technology Confidence The successful contractor should be highly comfortable using: • AI tools • LinkedIn • CRM systems • Brevo or similar email marketing systems • Canva • Microsoft Office • spreadsheets • workflow management tools • website CMS systems • online research systems ________________________________________ Working Structure • Fully remote contractor opportunity • Philippines-based • Independent contractor arrangement • Long-term contractor opportunity for the right individual • Ongoing collaboration with Garry Howling • Communication primarily via Microsoft Teams • Flexibility to work broadly in alignment with UK business activity where reasonably practical The successful contractor will: • utilise their own equipment • manage their own taxes and statutory obligations • invoice for services provided • operate independently whilst collaborating closely with the business ________________________________________ Compensation & Opportunity This is a long-term contractor opportunity for a high-calibre individual seeking to become an important operational support partner within a growing specialist recruitment business. Compensation will be competitive and dependent upon: • experience • capability • recruitment marketing exposure • operational capability • AI and systems knowledge • communication standards • overall commercial value There is potential for the scope of responsibilities and operational involvement to evolve over time for the right individual. ________________________________________ Application Process The application process is expected to include: 1. CV/resume submission and initial application review 2. Shortlisting of selected applicants 3. Short video introduction (approximately 2–4 minutes) requested from shortlisted applicants only 4. Initial interview 5. Practical assessment task 6. Final interview 7. Contractor offer Please also provide: • your expected hourly rate in USD • details of relevant recruitment marketing and campaign experience • details of the AI tools, CRM systems, and marketing platforms you regularly use • confirmation of your internet speed and equipment setup Direct applications only. No agencies or third-party submissions, please. ________________________________________ Important Notes This opportunity requires: • professionalism • reliability • discretion • strong communication standards • operational discipline • initiative • commercial awareness • systems thinking • adaptability • intellectual curiosity • pride in quality • commitment to continuous improvement Only individuals capable of operating at a genuinely high standard within a commercially focused business environment should apply.

Full job description

We are looking for a long-term, full-time SEO & Performance Marketing Specialist to join our growing team. Your primary responsibility will be to increase organic traffic, improve search engine rankings, and manage high-performing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns. Responsibilities: • Develop and execute complete SEO strategies. • Perform keyword research and competitor analysis. • Optimize websites for on-page, technical, and off-page SEO. • Build high-quality backlinks. • Manage Google Ads Search, Shopping, Display, and Performance Max campaigns. • Create and optimize Meta (Facebook & Instagram) advertising campaigns. • Track and improve ROAS, CPA, CTR, conversion rate, and overall campaign performance. • Set up and manage Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager, Search Console, Merchant Center, and Meta Pixel. • Monitor website performance and provide weekly reports. • Stay updated with the latest SEO and digital marketing trends. Requirements: • 3+ years of proven SEO experience. • Strong Google Ads management experience. • Strong Meta Ads management experience. • Experience with Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager, Search Console, and Merchant Center. • Experience with Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, or similar SEO tools. • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. • Excellent written and spoken English. • Ability to work independently and proactively. • Looking for a long-term position. Preferred: • Shopify or WordPress experience. • Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO). • Basic HTML/CSS knowledge. • AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.). • Email marketing experience. To apply, please include: • Resume • Portfolio • SEO case studies • Google Ads performance screenshots • Meta Ads performance screenshots • References (if available)

Full job description

About JSA Interactive JSA Interactive is a performance-driven digital marketing agency with over 15 years of experience helping home service and local service businesses generate high-quality leads and measurable ROI. We manage millions in ad spend across multiple platforms and pride ourselves on accountability, innovation, and delivering results that drive real business growth. We are looking for a highly experienced Go-HighLevel (GHL) Specialist to join our global team. This is a fully remote role requiring alignment with Eastern Time Zone (USA) working hours. If this is you, please read on. We are excited to meet you! Learn more about JSA Interactive Inc., a global digital marketing company and our brands" jsainteractive.com/ localtreeservicemarketing.com/ www.facebook.com/localtreeservicemarketingadvertising/reels/ www.youtube.com/@localtreeservicemarketing Role Overview: We are hiring a Go-HighLevel (GHL) Specialist to take ownership of the backend systems that power our marketing operations. - This is a high-level, backend-focused role — not client-facing. - You will be responsible for designing, building, and optimizing scalable systems inside GoHighLevel that drive efficiency, automation, and performance across multiple client accounts. - This role requires someone who can think beyond execution — someone who understands business processes, system architecture, and how to translate strategy into automation. What You’ll Be Responsible For: - Architect and manage Go-HighLevel systems across multiple accounts - Build and optimize advanced workflows, automations, and triggers - Set up and maintain webhooks, APIs, Zapier/Make integrations - Configure calendars, notifications, pipelines, and CRM structures - Implement payment integrations and automation logic tied to billing - Connect and manage Google integrations (Gmail, Calendar, etc.) - Build and deploy snapshots and SaaS configurations at scale - Use AI tools to accelerate system builds, workflows, and website deployment - Translate business requirements into fully functional backend systems - Document all systems, workflows, and processes clearly and thoroughly - Identify inefficiencies and continuously improve internal systems What Success Looks Like: - Clean, scalable, and error-free GHL systems across all accounts - Automated workflows that reduce manual work and increase speed - Fast, repeatable deployment of accounts using snapshots and SaaS - Well-documented systems that other team members can follow - Seamless integrations between platforms (no breakdowns or data gaps) - Strong alignment between business processes and system execution Requirements: - Minimum 5+ years of Go-HighLevel experience (REQUIRED) - Excellent English skills for full time work with American English - Proven experience designing and managing complex GHL systems at scale - Deep understanding of: - Workflows, triggers, and automations - Webhooks and API integrations - Zapier, Make, and/or similar tools - Experience setting up: - Payment integrations - Calendars and scheduling systems - Notifications (SMS, email, call workflows) - Google account integrations - Strong experience with: - SaaS mode and snapshot deployment - Multi-account system management - Ability to perform business analysis and translate requirements into systems - Highly detail-oriented with strong organizational skills - Excellent documentation skills (SOPs, process mapping, system logic) - Ability to troubleshoot and solve complex technical issues independently - Ability to work 8 - 5 PM (Easter Standard Time) - Reliable 50+ Mbps internet connection Must provide: - References we can call - Proof of performance (systems built, results, or case studies) Bonus (Highly Preferred): - Experience working with digital marketing agencies - Experience with call tracking, attribution, and lead routing systems - Familiarity with Twilio and advanced SMS automation - Basic understanding of frontend (funnels, landing pages) inside GHL - Experience leveraging AI tools to improve speed and system design What We Offer: - Paid vacation - Ongoing training and development - Sick leave How to Apply: If you believe you meet the requirements for this role, please email your resume to our Global Human Resources Director, Lizelle De Villiers: lizelle@jsainteractive.com Include: - Intro video - Examples of Go-HighLevel systems you’ve built - Details on automations, integrations, or architectures you’ve designed - Results or performance metrics - Any documentation or SOP samples (if available) Working Hours: - 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Time (USA) - The use of Time tracking software is required What We Offer - Salary Range: PHP 50,000 TO PHP 80,000 - Full-time, fully remote position - Competitive compensation based on experience - Opportunity to manage diverse, high-budget campaigns - Access to a supportive team, including designers and specialists - Long-term growth opportunities within a results-driven agency

Full job description

We’re a female-led, family-run business with a digital membership and other products in the food niche. We’re based in New Zealand and are looking for someone to work the day shift, starting at 10h/week and increasing to 20h/week within 3-6 months - we want this role to grow as we get to know your skills and talents. Hourly rate $6-8 usd/h. We value integrity, good communication, and high levels of personal responsibility. We’re looking for a tech savvy person with good attention to detail and a great attitude to support us with a variety of tasks, including: - Loading membership content into the Kajabi portal - Creating digital assets in Canva - Updating and creating landing pages, blog posts, checkout pages - Community post scheduling and event setup - Funnel setup - Email broadcasts and sequences with automations (Kajabi) - Live launch preparation and support - Member support (e.g. queries around payments, actioning cancellations) - Inbox management (Google Workspace) - Digital file management - Creation of SOPs where needed You will need: - High level of attention to detail - Great attitude - Efficient communication - A good level of written English - Decent tech and internet - A high level of proficiency using Kajabi as we use this as an all-in-one platform - Google workspace proficiency (Gmail, Google Drive, Docs, Sheets) - Good level of Canva skills to create assets such as recipe cards, e-books, and other digital downloads - Able to use ChatGPT or Claude to increase work efficiency We currently use: Kajabi, Canva, Google Workspace, Loom, Zoom, Zapier (when needed), Demio (during live launches), ChatGPT, Claude. We are planning to use Monday for project and task management and Slack for communication. To apply: - Send us an application with the subject line Your Kajabi VA Superstar - Include a short video which includes a brief introduction about yourself (1 min) and demonstrates the skills you have in Kajabi and Canva (approx. 5 min) - Tell us your favourite recipe and why (we’re a foodie business, this matters to us) We look forward to hearing from you!

Full job description

Marketing & Growth Coordinator (Remote) Part-Time | 15–20 Hours Per Week | Long-Term Opportunity ABOUT US Green Thumb Lawn & Landscape Services, A Division of Suncoast Exteriors is a growing lawn and landscape company serving residential and commercial customers throughout the Sarasota, Florida area. We’re building more than a landscaping company—we’re building systems for long-term growth. We believe in continuous improvement, leveraging technology, and creating exceptional customer experiences. We’re looking for someone who wants to grow with us and become an important part of our team. ABOUT THE ROLE We’re looking for a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Marketing & Growth Coordinator to help execute our marketing strategy and keep our growth initiatives moving forward. This isn’t just a social media position. You’ll help coordinate marketing campaigns, create content, manage customer communications, support our CRM, maintain marketing systems, and assist with sales follow-up using Jobber, our primary business management platform. You’ll work directly with the owner and gradually take responsibility of many of our recurring marketing and growth activities. WHAT YOU"LL DO Marketing & Content • Schedule and publish social media content • Turn field photos and videos into engaging social media posts and short-form videos • Create graphics using Canva • Edit videos using CapCut • Maintain our content calendar • Coordinate photos and videos from the field • Assist with website updates when needed Customer Growth & CRM • Maintain customer and prospect information in Jobber • Support customer follow-up campaigns • Assist with referral and reactivation campaigns • Help organize customer and marketing contact lists • Track lead sources • Support quote follow-up initiatives Reputation Management • Request Google Reviews from customers • Monitor and respond to reviews using company guidelines • Help maintain our online presence Marketing Operations • Coordinate recurring marketing campaigns • Organize digital marketing assets • Document marketing processes and checklists • Help improve workflows and systems • Assist with special projects as we grow Reporting Track and report on: • Leads generated • Social media performance • Customer reviews • Campaign performance • Marketing KPIs WHO YOU ARE We’re looking for someone who: • Is highly organized and dependable • Communicates exceptionally well in English (written and spoken) • Enjoys learning new technology • Takes initiative and solves problems independently • Pays close attention to detail • Loves creating systems and improving processes • Can manage multiple priorities without constant supervision • Wants a long-term opportunity with room to grow Preferred Skills Experience with some of the following is helpful: • ChatGPT • Canva • CapCut • Jobber (or the ability to learn it quickly) • Google Business Profile • Social media content creation • Customer service or CRM experience If you don’t have experience with every tool but you’re a fast learner with a great attitude, we’d still love to hear from you. WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE Within your first 90 days, you’ll help us: • Maintain a consistent social media presence • Keep marketing campaigns running on schedule • Increase customer reviews • Improve marketing organization and documentation • Support customer follow-up initiatives WHAT WE OFFER • Part-time remote position (15–20 hours per week) • Flexible schedule • Competitive hourly pay • Performance bonus opportunities • Ongoing training • Opportunity to grow into a larger role as our company expands HOW TO APPLY Please submit: 1. Your resume. 2. A 2–3 minute video introducing yourself. Tell us: a. Who you are b. Why this position interests you c. Your experience with marketing, customer service, or business operations d. How you’ve used ChatGPT or other AI tools in your work e. Why you’d be a great long-term fit for our team 3. Links to examples of your work or portfolio (if available). To show that you’ve read this entire posting, begin your application with the words: Growth Starts Here We’re looking for someone who wants to grow with us for years—not just someone looking for their next project.

Paa Prefab is a growing prefab housing and building-products company on the Big Island of Hawaii. We sell prefab buildings, storage and office units, container-style spaces, and related building products for customers who need practical, affordable space. I...

Why it belongs here
  • AI/build signals: chatgpt, ai tools
  • Build surface: dashboard, dashboards, repo, workflow, workflows, ghl

  • Trainable language: va, sop, templates

Arca angle
  • Full-time role: good fit for a dedicated Arca graduate placement.
Full job description

Paa Prefab is a growing prefab housing and building-products company on the Big Island of Hawaii. We sell prefab buildings, storage and office units, container-style spaces, and related building products for customers who need practical, affordable space. I am hiring a remote General Manager / Business Operations Manager to help run the parts of the company that need consistent follow-through, organization, reporting, research, and systems. This role is for someone who can take ownership across multiple areas of the business: finance admin, marketing coordination, sales follow-up, procurement research, customer communication, supplier tracking, project organization, and internal systems. I am looking for someone who can operate independently, solve problems, create structure, maintain standards, and make the business easier to run without needing constant hand-holding. You will work directly with the owner. Your job is to own the operating rhythm of the business, keep work moving, surface decisions clearly, and reduce the number of things that fall back on the owner. Financial, marketing, and sales as well as management success, a hunger and will to succeed, strong problem solving, and the track-record to prove it. Core Areas You Will Help Own Finance and Regulatory Admin You will help keep the business financially organized and legally in compliance of tax and other accounting requirements. This may include: • Organizing invoices, receipts, quotes, payments, and vendor records. • Researching required State, Federal Tax and other required reporting/submissions on time. • Tracking customer deposits, balances due, payment status, and follow-up needs. • Preparing simple finance summaries for owner review. • Coordinating with bookkeepers, accountants, or outside finance support. • Flagging missing documents, unpaid balances, unusual charges, or unclear records. • Helping prepare clean records for taxes, bookkeeping, and reporting. You will not be expected to make final financial decisions without approval, but you should be able to keep the finance admin side organized and visible. Sales Operations You will help make sure leads and customers do not fall through the cracks. This may include: • Managing CRM records and lead pipelines. • Tracking every lead’s status and next step. • Drafting customer replies and follow-up messages. • Preparing quote information for owner review. • Making sure customer questions get answered or escalated. • Tracking interested customers, serious buyers, quote requests, deposits, and delivery status. • Identifying which leads need urgent attention. The goal is not just to reply to messages. The goal is to help build a reliable sales follow-up system. Marketing Coordination You will help keep marketing organized and active. This may include: • Coordinating Facebook Marketplace listings and social media posts. • Organizing product photos, descriptions, pricing notes, and listing copy. • Tracking which products are listed where. • Watching competitor listings and local market pricing. • Helping draft ads, posts, flyers, emails, and simple marketing campaigns. • Tracking which marketing channels are producing leads. • Suggesting improvements based on what customers are asking about. Marketing should be practical, consistent, and safe for the business. No spam tactics, fake accounts, risky shortcuts, or sloppy public claims. Procurement and Supplier Research You will help research and organize supplier options. This may include: • Researching prefab buildings, container units, sheds, storage units, roofing systems, panels, accessories, tools, materials, and related products. • Comparing suppliers, pricing, shipping, minimum order quantities, lead times, and product specs. • Organizing supplier quotes and conversations. • Preparing comparison summaries. • Asking suppliers clear questions. • Tracking open supplier issues and follow-ups. • Helping identify better products, better margins, or better sourcing options. The goal is to help the owner make faster, better purchasing decisions. Operations and Project Coordination You will help turn messy daily business activity into clear systems. This may include: • Creating trackers, checklists, SOPs, templates, dashboards, and simple workflows. • Preparing daily and weekly owner updates. • Tracking open decisions, blockers, customer promises, supplier follow-ups, and delivery issues. • Organizing documents, photos, product details, quotes, invoices, contracts, and project records. • Keeping important information easy to find. • Noticing repeated problems and suggesting fixes. The strongest person for this role will not wait for every task to be assigned. They will notice what is missing and help create order. Looking For: Strong General Manager Traits I am looking for someone who is: • Excellent in written English. • Highly organized and reliable. • Calm under pressure. • Graceful and professional at all times, with customers, vendors, and coworkers. • A self-starter who does not need to be chased. • Comfortable owning several business areas at once. • Good at turning messy information into clear next steps. • Strong at follow-up, reminders, tracking, and documentation. • Able to maintain business standards even when things are moving quickly. • Able to make practical recommendations, not just collect information. • Comfortable making judgment calls and explaining your reasoning. • Careful with customer promises, pricing, permitting, delivery details, and anything that could create confusion. • Honest when you do not know something. • Able to work independently while keeping the owner informed. • Practical, direct, and action-oriented. The strongest candidate will think like a general manager, chief of staff, or operations lead — someone who sees what needs to happen, organizes it, and helps make it happen. Looking For: Useful Experience Direct construction experience is helpful, but it is not required. I am interested in people who have managed complexity in real business environments. Strong candidates may come from many backgrounds, including: • Operations management for a small business. • Finance admin, bookkeeping coordination, invoice tracking, or payment follow-up. • Sales operations, CRM management, lead follow-up, or quote coordination. • Marketing coordination, social media listings, Marketplace, paid ads, or local business marketing. • Procurement, supplier research, vendor management, importing, shipping, or product comparison. • Logistics, dispatch, delivery coordination, warehouse coordination, or inventory management. • Trades businesses, contractor offices, repair businesses, mechanical services, equipment rental, automotive, marine, appliance, solar, or other hands-on service businesses. • Real estate, property management, hospitality, events, or other high-pressure customer-facing operations. • Coordinating many moving parts across customers, vendors, schedules, documents, and money records. • CRM tools, Airtable, HubSpot, Notion, Trello, Linear, Google Sheets, or similar systems. • Working for a US, Australian, Canadian, or UK business. • ChatGPT or other AI tools used for real business operations. • Building trackers, dashboards, checklists, SOPs, or simple systems for a growing company. What matters most is not the exact industry. What matters is whether you can manage complexity, maintain standards, communicate clearly, and keep moving with calm, charm, and good judgment. Looking For: Work Style The business moves fast. Some things will be messy. Your job is to help make them clear. I value short, useful updates. I do not need long vague reports. I want information that helps decisions happen faster. Looking For: AI Tool Judgment I want someone who can use AI tools well, but not blindly. Good AI use means: • Using ChatGPT to draft, summarize, organize, compare, and speed up research. • Checking facts before relying on them. • Editing AI output so it sounds human, specific, and accurate. • Knowing when a customer-facing message needs owner approval. • Separating facts, assumptions, and open questions. • Never using AI as an excuse for sloppy work or for a lack of accountability for the work you do. How To Apply Please reply with: 1 A short introduction in your own words. 2 Your relevant experience. 3 Why you think you are a fit for a General Manager / Business Operations Manager role. 4 Your expected monthly salary in USD. 5 Your available working hours in Philippine time. 6 Your available overlap with Hawaii time, if you know it. 7 A specific example of a messy process, tracker, system, or workflow you improved. 8 A specific example of a time you solved a business problem without waiting for your boss to tell you every step. 9 A specific example of a time you stayed calm and effective in a fast-moving or high-pressure situation. 10 Which areas you are strongest in: finance admin, marketing, sales operations, procurement, customer follow-up, project coordination, systems, logistics, vendor management, or research. 11 What tools you are comfortable with: spreadsheets, CRM, Google Workspace, ChatGPT, Notion, Airtable, Trello, etc. Please also answer these questions: Question 1: A potential customer asks about a prefab home but gives incomplete information. What information would you collect before the owner spends time preparing a quote? Question 2: A customer asks: “Can I live in this? Is it permitted? I’m in Puna and need something cheap fast.” How would you reply? Question 3: You notice that leads are coming from Facebook, text messages, phone calls, and referrals, but there is no reliable system for tracking who needs follow-up. What would you build first? Question 4: You are researching a new supplier. What information would you collect before recommending whether we should consider buying from them? Question 5: Describe a business environment where you had to manage many moving parts at once. What standards did you maintain, and how did you keep things from falling through the cracks? Optional: Tell me how you currently use ChatGPT or AI tools in your work, and how you check the output before using it. Applications that are generic, copy-pasted, or obviously AI-written without personal detail will be skipped. Paid Test Task Strong applicants may be invited to complete a short paid test task before hiring. The test may include: • Creating a lead follow-up tracker. • Drafting a customer follow-up message. • Creating a quote-prep checklist. • Summarizing supplier/product options. • Writing a daily owner update. • Creating a basic finance/admin tracker for invoices, deposits, balances due, and missing records. • Recommending a simple operating system for managing leads, suppliers, quotes, marketing tasks, and follow-ups. • Explaining which customer, finance, pricing, permitting, or public-facing issues should require owner approval. I am looking for judgment, clarity, structure, independence, follow-through, calm under pressure, and practical thinking. Compensation This is a serious full-time role. Pay is USD $2,000/month for the right person. I am willing to pay well for someone who is independent, reliable, organized, calm, honest, and able to take ownership of finance admin, sales operations, marketing coordination, procurement research, logistics support, vendor follow-up, and business systems so the company can run with less owner involvement.

Full job description

Role We are looking for an experienced Shopify Web Developer / Shopify Expert to join our team on a long-term basis. You will be responsible for building our new Shopify website from the ground up, while also maintaining, improving, and optimizing our existing Shopify stores. We are looking for someone who works independently, thinks proactively, solves problems efficiently, and enjoys improving processes behind the scenes. We value reliability, attention to detail, and someone who takes ownership of their work. Responsibilities Maintain and improve our existing Shopify stores. Customize Shopify themes, pages, and layouts. Upload and organize products, collections, and content. Install, configure, and manage Shopify apps. Optimize website speed, performance, and user experience. Troubleshoot and resolve Shopify-related issues. Implement new features and improvements. Perform ongoing website updates and maintenance. Support our team with day-to-day Shopify-related tasks. Communicate progress and collaborate effectively with our team. Requirements Minimum 2–3 years of proven Shopify experience. Experience building complete Shopify stores from scratch. Strong knowledge of Shopify, Liquid, HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript. Experience with Shopify themes, apps, and third-party integrations. Experience maintaining and optimizing existing Shopify stores. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and proactive. Excellent written and spoken English. Able to work independently with minimal supervision. Reliable internet connection. Looking for a long-term collaboration. Nice to Have Experience with WooCommerce. Experience with Klaviyo, Judge.me, Shopify Flow, or similar Shopify apps. Basic SEO knowledge. Experience with Canva or Photoshop. Familiarity with AI tools such as ChatGPT. Experience with Google Workspace and Notion. What We're Looking For We're looking for someone who: Takes initiative and doesn't wait for instructions. Is organized, reliable, and trustworthy. Has excellent attention to detail. Delivers high-quality work consistently. Learns quickly and enjoys solving problems. Wants to grow with our company in a long-term partnership. How to Apply Please send us: Your CV or resume. Your Shopify portfolio. Links to 3–5 Shopify stores you have built or worked on (please explain your role in each project). Your LinkedIn, Upwork, GitHub, or other professional profile (if available). A short introduction about yourself and your Shopify experience. Any reviews or references that demonstrate the quality of your work. Applications without Shopify examples or relevant experience will not be considered.

Full job description

Job Description: We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Personal Assistant / Customer Service Representative to support our growing U.S.-based company. This is a long-term remote opportunity (30 hours per week) for someone who enjoys administrative work, delivering excellent customer service, and improving business processes through automation. The ideal candidate must have excellent English communication skills, strong organizational abilities, and experience using workflow automation tools such as n8n, Zapier, and Monday.com. Responsibilities: Provide administrative and personal assistant support to the management team. Respond professionally to customer inquiries via email, chat, and other communication channels. Prepare customer quotations and follow up on inquiries. Manage calendars, appointments, and daily administrative tasks. Organize and maintain company documents, spreadsheets, and internal records. Coordinate projects and tasks using Monday.com. Build, maintain, and troubleshoot workflow automations using n8n and Zapier. Identify opportunities to improve business processes through automation. Prepare reports and maintain accurate documentation. Submit daily end-of-day reports and updates. Perform additional administrative and customer support tasks as assigned. Requirements: Excellent written and spoken English communication skills. Previous experience as a Personal Assistant, Administrative Assistant, Virtual Assistant, or Customer Service Representative. Experience preparing quotations and communicating with customers professionally. Strong organizational and time management skills. Advanced knowledge of n8n and Zapier workflow automation. Experience using Monday.com for project and task management. Proficient with Google Workspace and Microsoft Office. Ability to work independently with minimal supervision. Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment. Detail-oriented, dependable, and proactive. Professional attitude with strong problem-solving skills. Preferred Qualifications: Experience with CRM platforms. Experience integrating business applications through automation. Knowledge of process optimization and workflow improvements. Experience supporting U.S.-based businesses. Contract Details: Long-term opportunity for the right candidate. $3.00 USD per hour 30 hours per week Schedule: Monday to Friday 10:00 PM – 4:00 AM (Philippine Time) Remote position – Philippines applicants only. Requirements: Signed Contract NDA (Non-Disclosure Agreement) Wise account for salary payments TimeProof time tracker (time tracking is required) You will work closely with both our Philippines-based and U.S.-based teams. How to Apply Please send the following: Resume link Portfolio or LinkedIn profile (if available) Any relevant certificates or training Examples or screenshots of automation workflows you have created using n8n or Zapier (if available) A 3-minute LOOM video introducing yourself and explaining why you are a good fit for this position. (Required – English communication skills are a major part of the role.) Your availability to start if hired. Confirmation that you have read and understand the salary, schedule, NDA requirements, time tracking requirements, and attendance expectations. Important: Applicants with strong communication skills, solid administrative experience, and hands-on experience with n8n, Zapier, and Monday.com will be given priority. Thank you, and we look forward to hearing from you! Note: Only those who follow the application instructions will be accommodated.

Full job description

We are looking for a highly skilled and results-driven Social Media Growth Manager & Virtual Assistant to help build and scale a fitness influencer brand and online coaching business across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, YouTube Shorts, and other relevant platforms. This is not a basic social media management position. We are seeking someone who understands content strategy, audience growth, viral content creation, personal branding, lead generation, AI tools, and online coaching business development. About the Brand I am a fitness coach and content creator building a personal brand focused on fitness, transformation, motivation, and online coaching. I will be filming my workouts and other content daily. Your role will be to turn that content into a complete growth and marketing system that increases followers, engagement, leads, and coaching sales. Responsibilities Social Media Growth & Management * Manage and grow Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube Shorts accounts * Create and maintain a strategic content calendar * Develop growth strategies based on current platform trends and algorithm updates * Research competitors and successful fitness influencers * Monitor analytics and adjust content strategy based on performance Content Creation & Viral Content Strategy * Review daily training footage and identify the strongest content opportunities * Edit short-form videos for maximum engagement and retention * Create compelling hooks, captions, titles, and calls-to-action * Research and implement trending audio, formats, and viral content concepts * Repurpose content across multiple platforms * Generate content ideas that support audience growth and coaching conversions AI & Marketing * Utilize AI tools to improve content creation, workflow efficiency, and marketing campaigns * Assist with lead generation systems and funnel development * Support email marketing campaigns and audience nurturing * Help create automated systems where appropriate Digital Products & Community Growth * Assist in creating and launching digital products including: * E-books * Training programs * Nutrition guides * Online courses * Downloadable resources * Support the development and management of online communities and membership programs * Help organize content and resources for coaching clients Administrative Support * Content scheduling and publishing * Project management and task organization * Communication support as needed * General virtual assistant duties related to business growth Qualifications Required * Proven experience growing social media accounts * Strong understanding of Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube algorithms * Experience creating viral or high-performing content * Advanced video editing skills using tools such as CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar * Experience with AI tools and content automation * Strong written communication skills * Self-motivated, organized, and detail-oriented Preferred * Experience working with fitness influencers, coaches, or online fitness brands * Experience building personal brands * Knowledge of online coaching business models * Experience creating digital products * Understanding of sales funnels and lead generation systems * Graphic design experience is a plus What Success Looks Like The ideal candidate can take daily workout footage and transform it into a complete content ecosystem designed to: * Increase followers * Improve engagement * Generate leads * Build brand authority * Convert viewers into coaching clients * Scale the online coaching business To Apply Please send the following: * Resume * Portfolio * Examples of social media accounts you have managed or grown * Video editing samples * Examples of digital products you have created (e-books, guides, courses, etc.) * Any fitness-related projects you have worked on * Your immediate availability * Your desired hourly rate or monthly retainer Please email or direct message your application. Qualified candidates will be contacted for an interview. We are looking for someone who wants to become a long-term part of a rapidly growing fitness coaching brand and help build a dominant online presence. Apply today if you have the skills, creativity, and experience to help take this fitness coaching business to the next level.
